Yum I can't move much now I ate my tasty dinner already. Go get your KFC meal!!
Great food and customer service! David the shift manager is a great guy and makes sure customers are happy. Best Del Taco in Idaho

Bought a breast meal last week at the drive thru.  Server had an attitude as if doing me a favor.  Got home chicken was very dry, not fresh.  This as been going on too long, has to be because of the location.  Won't be back!

Food tasted old chicken tasted like it was under heat lamp for hours, biscuits were lukewarm mash and Mac and corn was tasteless not sure if that was just KFC's recipe or if it was prepared incorrectly. Gravy was watery overall a bad experience considering I paid 48 bucks for a family meal delivery by grub hub no napkins condiments or plastics included. Location most definitely needs to work on presenting the KFC brand better or this franchise will continue to lose business I'll go to the competitor next time no questions asked!

Girl at the window had an attitude from the get go. ("Amber" )Let me order and pay for my food before she told me it would be a 10 minute wait for fried chicken at KFC...? I would've happily gone else where but that's okay I'll wait. So in anticipation for my wait I asked for butter & jelly for my biscuits but apparently there's a 10 minute wait on that too. So instead of enjoying my biscuit, I'm writing this review. 
 

*waited 20 minutes

I love chipotle. It's one of my absolute favorite spots to go to after a gym workout session. My go to meal here is a bowl with double brown rice, chicken and steak with fajitas, mild and hot sauce with corn. 

Only thing I don't like about this location is that depending on the person serving you, they are sometime stingy with their meat/protein. They don't give you much for a scoop forcing me to ask them for a double scoop. And their service could be a bit faster...especially when I'm the only person in line ordering.

Had a bad pickup experience on 6/20 where they couldn't fill my order and had to substitute. Chicken tasted like it had sat for quite awhile. Also left out a $10 item I ordered. I opened a case with KFC that night and got a nice automated email. 6/25 and no response or anything. Obviously not concerned about customers. I really hardly ever eat there and this is an example of why I guess.

The food itself was good for Del Taco, no complaints there. However this review is specifically for customer service. My sister, mom, grandma and I went through the drive thru around 10:15 pm tonight. My grandma was in the drivers seat, and after we approached the window she gave the woman a coupon, and gift card to start then cash for the remainder. The woman, named Patricia, was already not very nice from the start, she seemed to have an attitude from the beginning. We got our food then my grandma asked for green sauce at the end, the woman was very rude about it. She rolled her eyes, and then sent another crew member to bring it to the window to us, making us feel like an inconvenience for wanting sauce. We pulled out to eat in the parking lot, because the inside was already closed, and my sister was missing a fork in the bag for her chili cheese fry. My mom walked up to the window to ask for a fork and the woman huffed and puffed, as if it's our fault that she forgot to give us a fork. She also didn't give us any napkins either. I was very disappointed in how my grandma and family were treated by this woman for simply ordering food and spending our money at this establishment. Will not be back if this is how customers are treated.
OMG!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! I have been sick, N/V/D/Fever for 3 days after ordering a bowl with steak. Thank God, it did not taste right and I tossed it!  I have reported them to the health department....

They now have the Beyond Meat available as both breakfast sausage and burger patties; this is totally awesome and gives vegetarians a more substantial option than just potatoes.  The sausage has great flavor; my only feedback would be to avoid overcooking it, as it can dry out.

The restaurant was clean and service was quick and friendly.  The cold brew iced coffee is great.

I have lived in a Fishers for 20 years. During that time I visited the prior KFC in "downtown" Fishers. 11 out of 13 times, the food was poor quality, cold or otherwise inedible. Had a teenager who Loved KFC and thought it will be better next time. It never was. It was clear, KFC didn't care and I wasn't returning. It's been more than 6 years since. Tonight someone suggested we try the new one. I gave in reluctantly.

Went there and ordered the usual extra crispy chicken bucket. Got regular recipe - again. The slovenly dude at the window was unfriendly, curt, and could care less - typical management material of the past. Handed me a sticky credit card processing machine, then my food. Food was terrible. Wrong recipe. I can't eat the regular because it's too greasy (extra greasy tonight), and I had intestinal surgery years ago. Couldn't eat it. Chicken was warm, service cold, the crappy restaurant of the past is alive and well at this restaurant. I will never eat there again, neither will my guests and neither should you. KFC Fishers - expanding the definition of junk food!

this is the best chipotle location i have been to in YEARSSS!! takes me back to the times i first discovered chipotle and how in love I was with it. Lately other locations either overcook or burn the steak or chicken, and I have been avoiding most chipotle restaurants because of that. Not here. It is perfect here! customer service is  so friendly and fast working! Their food portions are generous and they give the fair 4 ounces ,they are not stingy like at other many locations.

This CJ's is my spot! I order the super star everytime, and I'm always extremely satisfied! It's hot, fresh, and so tasty. I will continue to give this location my business everytime i want a burger, which is often!

Do NOT accept your takeout order without checking it first. You can't see chicken in this store, so you don't know what your getting before it's bagged. Crispy and extra crispy was soggy and extra soggy when we got back to hotel only 1.5 miles away.  I'm sure if we ordered for eat in, it would have been better.

The Los Altos location is abysmal. I spent 10 minutes in the drive thru today only to get half of what I ordered and the other half was wrong. I called and talked with the manager and her solution was for me to return, spend another 10 minutes so they could fix their mistake. I declined. Other Del Taco locations are not like this. I wonder what is up. Is district management listening? I know I won't be back.

Went thru their drive in tonight and ordered a guacamole chicken crunchtada. Got home and there was NO GUACAMOLE but they drowned it in ranch dressing. The kid at the window was really nice but if Del Taco advertises an item with guacamole they really need to put guacamole on it.

Was surprised with the low reviews because when we took a chance on this location found that the two gals running the drive thru were super nice and friendly. The meal was a great deal! Loved the sides, especially baked beans and coleslaw. The chicken tenders were a tad overcooked, but great customer service!

Not uncommon for them to be out of the chicken pot pies.   Today a 20 min delay.   They give me all the other food while I wait for the pot pie. That way all the food can be cold when they bring it out to the drive thru.   I never expected much from the employees, but the manager should be smarter.   Wouldn't hurt to clean up the place.   Not the KFC of several years ago.

Last night I was just craving fried chicken. I haven't been to a KFC in years and never been to this location. 

I went online, looked at the menu and chose what I wanted then drove over about 5:30. They were out of my first choice - extra crispy shortage! - then out of my second choice... then out of a side... I was hungry, cranky and starting to lose it but the young lady working the window was... extraordinary.

I started to say that she was so sweet, but really, she was so skilled at dealing with cranky people that I followed her suggestions and left happy.

Young, thin, multi-colored hair in a braid. Make this lady a manager if she is not already! You have a customer service treasure there.

Went there on the 29th of July and order an eight-piece box - chicken only, no sides. When I got home I discovered that there were only six pieces in the box. What do you do? Go all the way back and tell them they only gave you six pieces instead of eight. Once you drive off the lot they can claim anything such as you removed them from the box just to get a couple of more. It wasn't worth my time to go all the way back in rush-hour traffic and chance a commotion being stirred up over two pieces of chicken. In the days of the pandemic, most restaurants are doing drive-thru only. Most people using the drive-thru will receive their order and move on so as not to hold up the line. This makes it easy for employees to rip off their customers, and I feel I was ripped off. And what made it worse was the price I paid...$16.38 for eight pieces of chicken and I only got six. Tell me I didn't get ripped off! I hope this message helps others. If you like KFC don't come to this one. Find another one!

Love Grease!
Hate yourself or someone?
Want to torment your body!
Rush now to this KFC!!!!

You will hear some of the most colorful conversations about sex or seeing people fix there hair and serve food!

You know you want chicken wrong stop on in and see the joke we call this KFC!!!

AVOID IT NOW!!! 

If you have read this while eating the food across the street is a nice ER :)

Crap! We had not been to a KFC for 10 years and now will never go back after eating there last night.  Drive through was incredibly slow, only 1 lane open, only 1 window to pay.  The restaurant looks straight out of 1985.  I asked the girl for straws and she said they were in the bag.  They were not.  Pulled back around and parked.  Then realized I was missing the extra mashed potatoes I paid for.  So I went in and showed them the receipt and the manager was very rude.  When I told her about the straws she said, "well, they're right behind you!"  I said, "well I went through the drive through, I shouldn't have to come in to get them!"  The potatoes were runny and nasty, the so-called popcorn chicken was all breading, no chicken.  I WILL NEVER EAT AT A KFC AGAIN!!

I got food poisoning!!! I will never eat at any KFC location. I went there Thursday night 11/17. I ordered a famous bowl when ch is popcorn chicken on top of mashed potatoes, corn, cheese and gravy. As soon as I was almost finished I started feeling weird. I woke up through out the night going to the bathroom. I had it for a few days but my symptoms lasted 8 days. Which a nurse told me is normal. Another thing when I went to give the cashier my credit card she gave it to a boy and he started walking to the back. I asked where was he going she told me they have to charge it back there. I said no and paid with cash instead. Please beware of both of this situations.
How does.a kfc at 12 noon have no chicken??? What  crummy manangement . Horrible, horrible store dont go and waste yr time.

Stingiest Chipotle ever. Ordered a burrito and got such a tiny portion of everything. Asked for more steak and the guy gave me like 3 or 4 more cubes of steak. Burrito is literally about 1/2 the size of what a Chipotle typically serves (and about a 1/3rd the size when you get a 'generous' server). Not coming back here.

Not uncommon for them to be out of the chicken pot pies.   Today a 20 min delay.   They give me all the other food while I wait for the pot pie. That way all the food can be cold when they bring it out to the drive thru.   I never expected much from the employees, but the manager should be smarter.   Wouldn't hurt to clean up the place.   Not the KFC of several year.   Update: place still sucks.  Out of grilled chicken.  Ordered extra crispy chicken, all white meat.  Over cooked dried out lousy tasting.     Update: still about a 40% chance they won't have what you order. At 5:30 they are out of chicken breast and cooking them so you have to wait.   The employees are friendly, but poor management and always dirty

This location is just terrible. Not only are you forced to order online and wait for your food but they don't announce the order so unless you're checking and looking at the bags yourself you won't get your food. The guacamole was not ripe and there were whole chunks of hard avocado in my bowl. Not to mention they forgot sofritas in my bowl and when I went in to have them rectify the mistake they just told me there was a nation sofritas shortage and that is why they put none in. If that was the case, why not tell me in the first place? Awful.

This used to be a great place to come for the buffet.  Not so much anymore. There was no original recipe chicken. Only crispy and baked.  Isn't the original recipe what they are known for? We had to wait for chicken every time! Had to ask for biscuits and mashed potatoes and gravy. No honey sauce for my biscuits. There were people coming in for their lunch hour that spent most of their time waiting on chicken.
Get it together KFC!!

April 22, 2019. Gave this place another try. Ordered 8 piece chicken. They asked if ok that they had no legs, which we wanted. Then they came back and said never mind. We pulled up to the window and inquired about the chicken legs. They said all is good. We get home, no chicken legs. They are just awful there. Rolls were hard as hockey pucks. 

Prior review. Stopped by to order an 8 piece original dark meat and they had no original chicken ready. Would be a 16 minute wait. Really?

After being a huge fan of Harold and kumar this was such an experience! I'm from San Diego so when I visited Nashville and heard there's a White Castle, I was excited. I have had the frozen burgers and was never a fan, but these are another story! A million times better! 

I ordered almost the whole menu. Regular burger, chicken burger, fish burger and the impossible burger. Along with fries and mozzarella sticks. 

Everything we got was outstanding! It tasted so fresh and had wonderful flavor! To my surprise the fish burger was actually my favorite, it was so good! The regular and chicken were also really great. 

The impossible burger was absolutely inedible. It was not good, so I would not recommend that. They definitely need to learn how to perfect those. 


Overall what a fun and great experience. Not only was it good but it was extremely affordable! We ordered almost everything and it was only $20! It was absolutely delicious and I was very impressed! No wonder why Harold and kumar were really craving it!

After I got back to work and they missed half of my order, I sat down to eat my impossible whopper. There were a few things that were weird but I brushed it off as my usual overthinking. I got about 3/4 done and realized I was eating meat. I have not eaten meat in 3 years and got very sick. I don't recommend.

While the BK on Pyramid has had some issues with staff showing up and staying during all this COVID stuff, they make a killer Whopper and their fish sandwiches are amazing. Even their inexpensive chicken nuggets taste great!

Already written up corporate but everyone should see this.

Arrived at like 3:45pm on a Sunday craving chicken stars. Walked to the counter and a teenager (Sammy) took my order. I ordered the first item, a famous star. He tried to end my order there. When I told him I wasn't finished and wanted to order more things he was annoyed.

He practically threw the table number at me when I finished ordering.

Went to fill my drink and one of the ice machines was totally out of ice. Don't know why, it was dead. Went looking for a seat and noticed that someone had spilled all their soda on the floor. There was a wet floor sign but the soda was still on the floor. 

When my food arrived, again he practically threw it at me. I get it you don't want to be here.

Food was okay, what you expect from Carl's. But the service was terrible. The restaurant was disgusting.

If you want Carl's go to another location. Otherwise stick to Chick-Fil-A, 1000x better service.

So I don't always eat fast food, but when I do, I prefer vegan/vegetarian options. Today I tried the Impossible Burger after so many of my friends have posted about it on social media. I wanted to form my own opinion. Even though I waited for 15 minutes in the drive thru line, in the end I finally was able to try the burger at home. 

After unwrapping edge by edge of the meatless package I carefully inspected to assess if the Burger was reminiscent of the notorious Whopper. I even smelled the burger to see if it was like what I remembered. It did smell a little different, however when I bit into it, it had that chargrilled taste I loved and with the juicy lettuce and tomatoes and mayo, the Impossible became possible. This did not disappoint as a whopper and was even more filling than previous burgers. Hands down I would ditch the fries and be content with just getting this for a meal. Great job BK! And as there is a current obsession with who has the best chicken sandwich, I am happy to try your progressive, no animal harmed, and kinder to my body burger.

Awful! We were tired on on the way home after a long day. We got a family meal with grilled and extra crispy. The grilled was the worst chicken product I ever had from a restaurant. It was shriveled, dry and chewy. No one wanted it. A clear fail on what should be the one thing a place like that must get right. Yuck!
This chipotle honestly sucks. I ordered a steak burrito and it was drenched in this sauce. My quesadilla was drenched in oily old chicken mess. Do not recommend. Feel like I'm going to get sick.
The chicken was cooked, but that was the only good thing that I can say good about this place. The chicken was not crispy, it may have been due to the long line and rushed staff.

First time here and wanted some chicken for a fast lunch. Enter the restaurant and was greeted by Tasha.   Who was working the register and waiting on another customer.  She gave me that wow experience.   She was very pleasant and cheerful when waiting on my brother and I.  She was so sweet and kind to everyone who walked through the door.   As other guest left the restaurant she made a point of thanking them for stopping by.   The manager Brittany was working the line and just as friendly and professional.  I tried the chicken little combo.  It was fast.   Fresh and had plenty of flavor.  The potato wedge where crispy and hot.  Because of Tasha and Brittany we will definitely come back.  We will be working right down the street all next week. Will have to come back for lunch.  I would recommend this place.  Thank you Tasha and Brittany for a wow experience.

It used to be that Chiptole was a good spot  for those with a vegetarian or vegan lifestyle. While it's still true, the quality is severely lacking. Our last couple of visits to this location have been sub-par and that's being friendly. 

The employees simply are not familiar with the differences between Vegan, Plant Based, and Vegetarian. 

A little bit of training would go a long way.  Here's how they should be trained 

1- Hi Welcome to Chipotle. No Meat No problem? Are you following a dairy-free, vegetarian, or vegan lifestyle? No worries, I know the differences. 

Then all the dumb questions about cheese, sour cream and meat would be obvious. 

It's not hard. 


Let's go over the quality of the ingredients and the quantity as well.

I typically start my order with the brown rice then order either black or pinto beans, both beans had the crust along the edges of the plan and then I  order the Sofritas crumbles.  They looked old and I am rarely at Chipotle when they are made fresh.  Next comes the salsa. They had the pico de gallo and the corn / mango salsa.  Of course, I didn't want Sour Cream or Cheese but I wanted to share Guacamole portion with my wife who was next in line.  In the past, about 6-8 months ago, my bowl would be as large as the USS Reagan Aircraft Carrier, but lately the portions for my bowl are smaller than a US Coast Guard Cutter. Not sure why, but it is what it is.  The kids behind the counter don't have any leadership and the manager does not have any synergy with the younger kids. Perhaps he's not the manager as he's dressed like the regular employees but there's a lot that is missing.  Two bowls and one burrito for our daughter was $23.00. Yikes.   We'll pass. We're not picky people, but we shouldn't be penalized and charged more for eating less.  

Here's what Chipotle should do.

(1). Train the employees for those customers who have special dietary needs. 
(2) Create synergy between management and employees and empower the employees to take care of the customers. 
(3) Be consistent in your servings and prices.
(4) Don't charge Steak & Lobster prices for someone who orders a salad. Do you really want to lose those customers?
(5) This location is always icy cold. That's why we always take our order to go but since this will be the last time, it's not our problem any more. So, future customers, bring a jacket and a blanket.

Good luck Chipotle. You lost three customers and we don't even eat the meat which has been a problem for you.

I love this KFC/Taco Bell.  The $5 box is very tasty. I get the grilled chicken breast with the green beans. I love that they include a cookie and a drink.  It is a complete meal.  Also, I really love their chicken pot pie. Sometimes, I prefer to do Mexican instead. If I am really splurging, I get the Nachos Supreme. However, typically, I get the Fritos beefy burrito or the beefy grillers.  Anything I get there, I always enjoy it.

I love this particular restaurant because the staff is really friendly and helpful. A couple of times it got my order wrong and they have redid it and given me something for free. Usually, a cookie if I have to drive back there to pick up my corrected order. Also, this restaurant is always very clean. I really like that.  I highly recommend this particular restaurant.
Worst ever Del Taco. Waited 20 mins in the drive thru for cold awful tasting food. Gross

This is the absolute worst KFC I have ever been to. The customer service is horrible. I don't think it's the employees, I think it's management. The fact that it takes almost 20 min to order and receive 2 chicken Little's is ridiculous. There was only one person in front of me in line. This is not fast food.

This is the worst kfc I've ever been to. The drive through always takes 30 minutes to get through and they still mess up your orders. The staff is rude. The last time I went I got a 5 dollar fill up 2 pieces of chicken and mashed potatoes. And they didn't even put in my potatoes!

I was so excited to finally have a Dunkin Donuts nearby but my order is messed up every single time. I love their new beyond sausage sandwich (meatless option) and I ask for no egg on it. 8 out of 10 times there is egg on it, I don't say anything and just peel it off. However when I order a vegetarian option and receive the meat option it's extremely frustrating. This has happened twice; I really think they need to pay more attention to orders.

This place is managed by morons. Avg wait time at noon is 30-45 min. And they run out of chicken all of the time. No thank you.  You can go to HG Hill next door and get fried chicken in 2 minutes and I have never experienced them actually running out of chicken.

Do you not go to chipotle at 6:30 on a Thursday night. I felt like I was being served by five-year-olds. The manager was not on duty or if he was on duty he was smoking pot and giving it to the rest of his employees. They were out of steak at the height of meal time. The man taking the orders was slower than Christmas. Then at one point all the employees just disappeared. I give one star because I walked out with food. Yay! All in all chipotle needs to step up their game.

Since Del Taco was taken away from me in San Francisco (closest location is somewhere far away in East Bay!), I jump at the opportunity for the experience when out of town.

This was my first dine-in experience, but pretty pleasant. Staffers behind the counter we very nice and polite, just what I'd expect from Boise ;) Tables and booths looked relatively clean as well, not always the case at fast food restaurants.

What to order? Chicken soft tacos, crinkle fries and a burger. DUH!

Definitely not healthy, but I love it!

Stopped for a quick bite while out last minute shopping like everyone else so long line expected in drive through.
Ordered off the value menu, crispy shell beef taco and crispy chicken soft taco.
Not for big appetites but for me just enough!
Chicken taco spicy which I love, small piece of chicken and lettuce, flour taco warm. Enjoyed this one.
On the other hand the crispy shell was stale! Yuck! Disappointed as the beef cheese and lettuce were tasty!
I ate the inside only after one bite of shell which completely crumbled.
Under $5 so guess I can't complain too much but they need to check for freshness!
Full enough so on my way to finish my shopping! 
Merry Christmas!
Less than a star. Maybe like a tip top corner of a star. Like wth 30 minutes process to get a couple burgers. Lmao

If you order from here make sure you check your order before you leave and that includes the drive up window.  You pay for things you don't get and you don't get what you order.  Their help really sucks.  Also you order chicken and you usually get pigeon!!!   (size wise)  A drumstick barely has 2 bites on it, a thigh has maybe 4 bites.  This happens at all KFC's.  Apparently there is no quality control!  The managers need to be fired.

My husband and I just left this location. The woman spooning out the rice and meat was incredibly rude - it was obvious that she did not want to be there at all. They were out of sour cream, ran out of lettuce while we were standing there, and had no chips. All of the tables were dirty. We decided to leave with our food, and now we are eating the chewiest steak ever, completely undercooked. We will not be going back to this location anytime soon.
Whopper no tomatoes no onions on it and I don't even have a receipt to call them. Also the burgers Cold the nuggets cold. No pride in the work

Updated review: I am changing it from 3 stars to 1 star. I thought I was ready to forgive them, we went and ordered 2 salads and they brought the dressing up to the register and I went to pay! I was so relieved, not realizing that once again they neglected the dressing. I mean is it really that hard to place it in the bag? It's every single time!!! Now we have to drive all the way back. I'm done with Chipotle. Never again.


Chipotle is really great. It is. Their guac is always on par and their food is consistent and is good every time. However, EVERY TIME I order a salad in a takeout or doordash or Ubereats order, they 100% of the time forget to put the salad dressing in the bag, which is literally the only reason I go to chipotle because I'm obsessed with the vinaigrette. If you're thinking of ordering a salad, and it's takeout, just make sure you emphasize the dressing and ask them to double check.

I hated to be a "Karen" because I usually only share my true opinion here on yelp and I'm not one to "send food back" kind of thing, but after the third time (which happened a few months ago in Utah), I called and they sent me on a wild goose chase through door dash, chipotle customer service (which, by the way, only exists in the form of you submitting an "experience" online) and I never heard back. I know it sounds ridiculous, but I had had a horrible day, hadn't eaten all day, and wanted that salad and that dressing and they forgot it... I was so upset. And they never ever contacted me about it. Fast forward a few months, I was ready to forgive them, but similar situation happened and I didn't get the stupid dressing lol. Our power has gone out along with most of Nashville and surrounding areas, I missed a class an exam because of it, had to go to the vet, etc. I was exhausted. And once again they forgot the salad dressing!! Even when I order in the store and watch them make it, every single chipotle worker forgets to slide the vinaigrette container down the line. I feel like they need to rearrange the whole set up so that vinaigrette's are next to the cashier. Maybe I'm just dramatic because it's just a salad dressing, but if I wanted a bowl...... I would have ordered a bowl.... but I wanted the salad. Also both doordash and chipotle both claimed that it wasn't their fault and to contact the other company... but at least they replied this time!

But when the vinaigrette does come in the order, the steak salad is to die for.

Yes, I am reviewing a Burger King. Translation - I'm VERY bored.  Anyway, nothing that separates this from the thousands of other BK's.   Although this one is somewhat of an anomaly given the fact that you wait longer for your food if you go inside rather than hit the drive thru.  Makes no sense.  

Tip - if you want a really good Whopper, ask for it "off the broiler".  It's as close to a culinary orgasm as you'll get from any fast food restaurant.

This is as others said, the worst KFC in there area, not so much as the food, but its the human attitudes by some of the cashiers, which is all the time there, example, recently I clearly said 2 piece chicken order thru the drive thru speaker the attitude cashier said anything else (basically confirming she understood what i said), i said no, when i got to the window & checked order it had only 1 piece chicken in it, when i said i ordered 2 piece the nasty attitude, 17 year old cashier said no u didnt and i said i did (& i had witness in car with me), I asked the cashier that should had just been glad she had a job at $2.75 per hour, if i can get another piece of chicken, she said no and that i would will have to go around thru drive thru again (there was no customers in drive thru at time & i could see there was no customers at counter in store),I told her nevermind forget it, knowing that my complaints at this location is just beginning moving up ladder. I have had bad experience here before, from store closing but outside signs on menu board fully lighted, then they would watch u on camera sitting there for several mins then someone would say oh we are closed, u look at your watch that says 7pm, but store hours for example say they close at 9pm. Then multiple times when they said there was no chicken here at the chicken store, smh.

I use to be a manager at a fast food store very long time ago, but I do believe the problem here is not just the 17 or 19 year old cashiers, but its the managers as well for allowing their employee's to get away with such a rude poor attitude with their customers, as its the customers that keeps the place open and keep the cashiers their $2.75 per hour jobs. Not mention sometime i suspect food is dirty with bacteria causing stomach problems, i will never go to this place again

I stopped here shortly before 5 to pick up an original recipe family sized meal. VERY disappointed. First of all, there was a VERY LARGE pool of gravy in the bottom of the bag which had started to soak through. What a f**king mess for us to clean up. Apparently, the first container of gravy had spilled, and rather than use a new bag, they just placed a different container of gravy that was not leaking into the same bag. The chicken was dark brown in color, obviously not fresh, EXTREMELY dry & overcooked, hard to tell if it was even supposed to be the original recipe I ordered. I would say it was leftover from the lunch but it was not even that good. More likely a day or 2 old that they had warmed over in dry heat. Biscuits were also extremely dry & not warm at all. Unfortunately, could not give it zero stars.

This was a terrible experience I had ordered 2 quesadillas and a bowl and chips and quest but they made it and some lady took the food and they had to remake it but it was cold and my stomach hurt really bad after but normally its good I don't think the steak was even cooked all the way!!!

I'm big on supporting local businesses, however, there are a few chain restaurants that take the cake. In my opinion, Chipotle is one of them. Fresh produce, hormone-free chicken, beef, and pork, and excellent vegetarian options (the sofritas are delectable). I couldn't ask for more. Almost forgot to mention their house-made crispy taco shells. Just the thought of them makes my mouth water!!

This particular Chipotle is my go to when I'm craving a burrito bowl. The staff is friendly, the meat delicious, the guacamole is fresh, and the service is fast. I normally get a steak burrito bowl or two [high metabolism and it's good, so I indulge] and I've never been let down yet. I have tried chicken in place of steak and that was also good! If ,and that's a big IF, they are in the process of cooking meat and you have to wait, they will accommodate you. That's awesome in my book!

One great thing they have going for them is on-line ordering. This allows the customer to just walk up to the cash register and pick up their food and bypass any line that happens to be there. I do this whenever I can and it's always ready to go. Since I order on-line to go, I've never really sat down at this particular Chipotle but it seems like it would be okay to do. The dining area is always clean, not overly loud, and not overly crowded [ I've been there at the peak and it's busy but not too busy. There's also a patio that people can eat at, also.

As for cons, a past incident would be about how my burrito was made a long time ago. The only issue was that my guacamole was at the bottom of the burrito  instead of mixed in. It's not a big deal as I found out I prefer burrito bowls anyway. I'm sure it was just me. Also, I wish the price was a bit cheaper [it's gone up a little within the year].

I'd recommend this place for anyone who wants a huge burrito, burrito bowl, in a trendy setting with plenty of room and friendly employees. I'd also recommend you try out their on-line ordering [ also can be done on your phone] for even faster service!

Ordered a Bigger box. I asked for Mac n Cheese instead of mashed potatoes. I received 2 Cole slaws. It came with a drink, however I didn't get one. The chicken was old and dry, which makes me wonder if they keep the overtime expired food in hopes of dumping on the drive through customers. The only good thing was the cashier was nice and respectful.

Is everything OK with you guys in Newtown Square PA? C'mon, you can be honest with me.

I tried to call you guys via the number Google listed for you.  It said the number had been disconnected. Whoa! I was surprised! Then I went to Chipotle dot com and queried for zip code 19073 which is Newtown Square PA . I called the number on the chipotle dot com website. Once again, I got that "boop beep BEEEEEEEP" automated message about the number being disconnected.

Alright. I'm not little Miss I Dial The Right Digits Every Time. So I tried AGAIN and got THE SAME RESULT.

Then I tried from my land line. Same.

Level with me, people. Do you need a loan to help you pay your bills? I'm ok with lending you some $$$, as long as you can put down some collateral.
As interest, I will charge a month's worth (prorated if you pay it back sooner) of the following:

3 Items
1) burrito bowl, chicken, no rice, black beans, fajita vegetables, all of the salsas, no cheese, sour cream, no guac

2) burrito bowl, carnitas, white rice, no beans, no fajita vegs, all of the salsas, sour cream, cheese, no guac

3) burrito, double wrap, steak, no rice, no cheese, red salsa, no sour cream, no guac

Guys, let me know. Keep in mind, I'm only offering to get you current with the phone company. PECO, Aqua, you're on your own with those folks.

This place doesn't even deserve 1 star! Pulled up almost 830 pm on a Friday night lights on the outside is completely dark! Not sure if they trying to conserve energy or just keep people away. The only way we knew they were open was people were coming in and out. Menu was for KFC and Taco Bell so really you can have either or both. We were in the mood for chicken and didn't want a full on meal. We ordered the 6 piece chicken for $10 nothing else. We wanted 2 originals, 2 crispy, 2 grilled. Wait wasn't too long. It's when I got home that got me piss! They short us 1 chicken. Sure it may not seem like much but seriously how hard is it too count 6 chicken. And the grill chicken! Omg it was dry as hell and the size of Cornish hen drumstick. Could hardly even eat it cause it was so damn dry. Like literally if you plan on getting food here stay far away or make sure you count your chicken before you leave the place! I'm never coming here again! Employees are lazy and they just don't care!

The chicken and steak from this location is ALWAYS burnt no matter what time of day you go.. sometimes you even get undercooked rice!! I've given this location so many chances just because I'm always on a time crunch and I don't have much time to eat... I will not be returning to this location.
Had a worker shortage like it seems everywhere else in the great Northwest but the food was good.  If you like SoCal Del Taco you will like this one too.

I came in to try the new "Impossible Whopper" and got exactly what I paid for.  I did not suffer any surcharges, and I was able to idle away an hour with my large tea while waiting to pick up a family member from an appointment just down the highway.

The service was friendly, and I was actually impressed at BK's latest corporate facilities makeover to contemporary standards (I suspect it will look very 20-teens twenty years from now, but it looks fresh, now).  

As for the Impossible Whopper, it's similar to the meat Whopper but without the greasy pit feeling that comes on about halfway through the sandwich.  I realized that most of the flavor in a Whopper comes from the seasoning, the char flavor, and the toppings.  It left the exact same lingering aftertaste (which I am not a fan of, much) as the regular burgers.  

I'd put this in three start range, but upped it as the aggregate score is sooooo low.   This was not a one and one-half star experience.

My first visit to a Chipotle restaurant. Staff was nice, carnitas burrito was good. Dining room was clean, but the chairs are not comfy. The most over salted chips I have ever encountered, and I love salty chips! I tried some of my wifes steak bowl which was very good.

I'll give it a try for lunch another time to see if the salt x10 was a missed target.

Revising my previous review of this particular Burger King for taking greedy advantage of the Papal Visit by over-doubling it's prices (double cheeseburger went from $1.69 to $4 that week), and for not carrying standard promos such as the lack of a Halloween Whopper. This is a much nicer place than it was a year ago, but thats about all I can say about it for now.

For whatever reason, DT always sounds delicious after a punk rock show! My experiences at this location are based on my drive thru visits & they are always between midnight and 2am. 

The good:
The food is always made to order & comes out hot.  The crinkle cut fries are perfection and bring me back to eating crinkle cut fries at Carl's Jr when I was a kid.  There is something about those crinkle cut fries.  Yum!! The tacos are always full of fresh shredded cheddar cheese.  Their cheese is to die for! It tastes great & it doesn't have that corn starch film on it.  Fresh shredded is so much better than the pre shredded stuff! The meat, cheese, lettuce ratio is on point. The tacos are awesome & my absolute favorite. 
The employees are always very nice, helpful, & above all patient! I can be pretty indecisive when it comes to food. 

The bad:
The bad is limited to the people who are making the food. There have been several times where my order has been wrong. 
Onions:
My hubby & I don't do onions.  Like one onion will ruin an entire entree.  Lol. Yes, I have issues.   We have gotten onions on items that don't even come with onions.  Tomatoes:
Another issue that we usually have is that the tacos will not have tomatoes on them. Or if they do have tomatoes, it's limited to a single tomato.  The tomato issue happens every single time I eat there. 
Crushed Tacos:
Many times I will get tacos that have been crushed. It sucks to open up the taco and have to grab a fork because you actually have taco salad in the wrapper. 

I think the food prep people just need to slow down a bit & pay attention. That would solve the problems at this location. I will be back.   At the end of the day, I still love Del Taco's tacos...crushed & all.

Yum yum yumm! This particular chipotle makes their sofritas spicer than other locations. The sofritas are amazing. I was so bored of the vegetables they had to offer and I'm so grateful for this addition to their menu. I'm hoping (praying) they introduce queso next! That would be awesome! The location is perfect and close to stores and the highway. Like always, the service was fast because it's setup as an "assembly line". Prices: the tacos, burritos, bowls, and salads are all around $7. Unless you get the grilled onion and pepper (vegetarian option), you will pay extra for guacamole. The chips are salty and fabulous.  Enjoy xo

I consider Burger King to be a below-average fast food provider, and this location has a (typical for BK) slow drive-thru.

That being said, I was curious to try their Impossible Whopper. Why? Well, I find that Impossible "meat" is fairly tasteless, and I figured that it was the perfect choice for a meatless fast food burger. And I was right! When you eat a Whopper, there's the taste of whatever chemicals/seasonings they put on the meat to give it that "flame broiled" taste plus all the veggies. The Impossible Whopper tasted amazingly similar to a normal Whopper, but I could pat myself on the head for having a meat-less meal afterwards. (If anything, this just shows that the Whopper isn't that great of a burger, since it proves that you don't taste beef just everything but the beef.) 

So if you need a fast food meal and want to skip eating meat, the Impossible Whopper is not a bad choice. Of course, if you want a really good vegan meal, try the Mediterranean Chickpea, only a couple miles away.

Worst Burger King experience ever.  $38 order just to get very poor service and quality. Started with the line being very long. When we get two the window we see a few employees yelling at each other and playing around. Ordered two sourdough burgers, the bread wasn't toasted and one of them had two bread ends.  Fries were cold, onion rings were greasy. Niece had a whopper and the meat was red. Management at this restaurant needs to take control of the shifts. Completely disappointed.

Placed online order for pickup for the soonest time at 6pm. I sat there for 20minutes along with many other people. Not sure if it's an app issue or the staff. The location is online only I guess bc of Covid but the staff doesn't wear masks and were touching their face, hats and butts with gloves on then making food. They also were using the small station to make all orders where only 2 people could get orders out.  Nothing I observed for 20 minutes made any sense. I get home my vegan bowl has a piece of steak in it and was literally 3 times more food than my husbands bowl. Luckily we ate at home bc for a to go only place they didn't put forks in the bag. 3 stars bc I got the bigger bowl and it was cooked well.

Extremely, extremely, extremely small portions. Got the smallest dabble of queso on my tacos, minimal meat. They were also out of lettuce AND taco chips lol. Will never recommend this location to anyone. Even got red sauce to go and they only filled it up 1/4 of the way lol. Oh ya, and my steak was grossly overcooked. Terrible business practices. 2 thumbs down

This is possibly the nastiest chipotle I have ever been to. From South Carolina to exton PA, by far the worse service and quality. Today I visited at 730pm and the line was out the door. Not shocking at all, but one person was working the food line and the cashier position at the same time, while two people were on break, the rest were in the back. Every 3 mins someone would come from the back to the front and do absolutely nothing!!! The poor employee was trying to handle over 30 people in line. Time and time again I try this exton location due to the proximity to my house(west Chester is fantastic but too far) they either are out of ingredients at 12pm or the service is horrible. I've had the pleasure of biting into burnt chicken/steak to dry as shit carnitas and barbacoa. My favorite is when they decide to not put the nozzles on the soda machine without "out of order signs", so when you push the button it sprays all over your nice work clothes (just before an important meeting). This location needs serious help and I will no longer be visiting. I'm taking my 3 time a week business to some where different.
Tried the new impossible whopper from the drive thru. It tasted almost the same as the whopper and looked almost the same. I would almost forget it wasn't really meat. Might get it again.

This is the absolute WORST chipotle I have ever been too.  EVER!!! I would give 0 stars if I could.  Seriously! My brother and I came to grab food after being at the car dealership all night.  We stopped in around 8:25pm and there were no customers in line.  I walked up to the counter and asked the girl could I try the sofritas while my brother ordered the burrito.  She gave me a sample and it was decent.  A little spicy.  I told her I wanted a burrito and then I asked her about the peppers and onions and she said they didn't have any. Umm excuse me? That's what I usually order because I don't eat meat.  I decided to go with the sofritas because that was my only choice besides just rice and beans.  

One girl was wiping the counter and kept wiping near the food.  Like girl wipe the counter once the food is moved down.  Don't wipe near peoples food.  My brother asked for lettuce on his burrito and the cashier went to go grab a container and dropped it on the trash and had the nerve to pick it out and was about to bring it to use.  We looked at her and then the other girl told her to grab a new one.  The girl making our food couldn't not wrap the burritos.  She kept ripping the tortilla. She didn't even rewrap my brother she just folded it in the foil.  She ripped mine and I gave her a look so she went to wrap it again.  

A line started to form and it was like 5 people in line by this point and everyone else was standing around.  The manager kept walking back and forth not helping and the other girl kept wiping the counter.  Omg they need to get it together or close.  A bunch of young people who don't know what they are doing.  The manager looked young too, they are all laughing and standing instead of working and obviously need some actual management and organization.  Never again.  I should have just gone to Burger King.
This del Taco was not cooperative and the drive through lady was incredibly rude. I will not be there ever again.

Nothing that tastes like home like a slider... This is the White Castle I have been eating at since I can even remember. Whenever I am home this is the first place I stop since I now line in the land of Krystal's. 

Whether you are stopping in for a meal or a sack at 3:00 am, they are a great price for tasty food. 

I love the original sliders that are a 2-bite square burger, with saute'd diced onions and dill pickle slices on a tiny square roll. There is something about those burgers that bring a smile to my face. Is it the nostalgia or taste, or  little of both.

The employees have always been friendly and efficient in getting me my order. I look forward to returning the next time I am home for a visit. 

Happy dining!

If -5 stars was an option that's what I would give this place. The dining room is closed so the drive thru was 15 cars deep so when I made it to the speaker I asked which chicken was the freshest original or crispy and the lady said we have been so busy nothing is old. Sad that you have to ask these kind of questions at a restaurant but you do. So when I get to the window the lady tells me they don't have any white meat chicken and it's going to be a 30 minute wait for all white meat 10 pieces of chicken so I asked for a manager who came to the window with an attitude so I gave it back to her and said didn't I just see you outside smoking and on your cell phone and she said yes I've been here all day and don't you think I deserve a break and my response was not if you got 15 cars in the drive thru and no chicken to sell. Needless to say I went down the street to Popeyes and they had chicken

Why is this place still open. The good news is that kfc in novi is the worst. It is my fault really. I was supposed to go to wine on us 19. 

Why are they allowed to keep cooked chicken hours before selling.

We used to come to this place quite often; stopped doing that when the quality of food started to get bad. The customer service was still alright. After a few year, we stopped here to give this place a try again, we find that both  food quality and customer service are equally bad.

When we arrived, there was a gentleman at the cash register; he does have a name plate but no name on it and seems to be unhappy seeing us. We ordered 8 piece bucket but without breast; he told us that we have to take breast, the only option. We also ordered potato wedges. We asked for some sauces as well; not sure he heard it because the order arrive, he called me by his finger and handed the food to me. Alas, there were no sauce. I went back to get the sauces but there were no one front, I can see three people but they choose not to see me. After a while, the same gentleman came and gave me sauces.

The quality of food was very bad, the chicken was dry and the wedges were over fried. Not recommended; not even worth thinking about visiting this place.

Terrible customer service. Staff was rude and audibly swearing at a hard other in front of customers. They forgot to add the sofritos to my burrito bowl for my pick up order that took 30 mins to make. To correct it, they gave me a small salsa containers worth so I could add it on at home. The food was excessively salty. All around bad vibes and food. Which isn't the case at all locations, but this one for sure!

Total shit, my chicken had no breading. Wasn't even cooked all the way, still pink. Employees standing around bullshitting. If that were my store, I'd fire everyone . It would be better to be closed that piss off loyal  customers. I threw that crap away. Guess I'll go to Publix and get some good chicken.

This KFC never has anything cooked and ready when you show up.  Doesn't matter if it's dinner time or if it's 2:00PM in the afternoon and the dining room and drive-thru are completely deserted.  Grilled, Crispy, Wings, Bites?  Forget it.  20min wait, every time.  "They just put some in now" is the answer you'll always get, no matter when "now" is.  Apparently the concept of cooking more chicken BEFORE they run out is just too foreign for this KFC.

Whoever owns/manages this place must be completely incompetent.  

Hardly deserving of the title "fast food."  Or even the "Chicken" in Kentucky Fried Chicken, considering they never even have any.

Chipotle is hands down my #1 favorite fast food chain. I love everything they have to offer from their selection of food, their effort towards sustainability, their made to order process, the ease of use to get on the app... All in all, I can pretty much be an ambassador if ever offered a chance. What I love the most about this location is that it is always busy, line almost reaching the door and all, but I always have faith that I'll be munching on my food within 10 minutes. The servers here are hustlin all day and they are very good at moving the line quickly... It always makes for a fun lunch or dinner spot- a no brainer when deciding to get something fast. 

Perhaps one of the best new options is that queso blanco has just been added to the menu! My husband and I love a good queso and frankly the gritty yellow one that launched a few years back just wasn't it... I typically order either a steak bowl or chicken born and the queso blanco makes for a great addition- I may even opt for this instead of the guac.

Also if you haven't already, make sure you download their app. Not only can you easily place a mobile order for pickup or delivery, but remember to scan your personal barcode in-store each time before you checkout. You can rack up points towards a free entree fast. On certain days, you can even get free guac! Huge plus for me and huge incentive to make my way back.

Last thing, drizzle a few dabs of the Chipotle tabasco sauce and ask the workers for a side of the vinaigrette (this one is behind the counter- all prior to checking out). These can enhance the flavor of every meal and are an absolute must for me.

I have been craving Chipotle all evening and decided to go grab a steak bowl. Im not sure the girls name but she had purple hair and I asked for a steak bowl. She asked if I wanted brown or white rice. I told her brown which there was none left of. Instead of getting a new batch she starts scrapping the old and hard brown rice stuck to the bottom of the pan into my bowl. Everyone who works in the food industry knows that all the bacteria lies at the bottom of these pans not to mention it was OLD and HARD rice. I stated "Instead of scrapping the old rice into my bowl would you get a fresh batch?" She gets the fresh batch and instead of making me a new bowl just mixes that in with the old hard rice. This was extremely frustrating and disappointing. My bowl was filled of hard uncooked rice and I couldn't even eat it.

I was looking forward to eat at KFC after two years out of the country. If the server was friendly, the food was plain awful. Small pieces of chicken, dried up from too much cooking, mashed potatoes, dried up in the plate from sitting under heat, the corn was also dried up and plain awful.
To top it all off, the temperature was very cold in that place. They will never see me again.

First let me say that I understand about the staffing issues that are challenging many businesses so the first issue of the inside closed and I waited in the drive thru line with only two vehicles in front of me for just shy of 20 minutes. 
The person at the window apologized for the wait and I thanked him. All good until I get home to unpack the food and in the top of the chicken bucket was the biscuits that come with the meal, only they were smashed down into discs!!!!! 
I get mistakes, but this clearly wasn't a mistake this was enough to make me never risk a lengthy commitment just to get to the food and have someone care this little for their customers make my meal. 
Think about this... if an employee there is willing to ruin a portion of your food for any reason, do you want them to have access to the cooking and building your meal?? I say absolutely not! 
I'll never go back there again!
The employees are always friendly and very personable. The food is yummy and our favorite is the Crispy Coronel Sandwich!! They are better then Popeyes chicken sammies by far!!

This location was so good. The drive thru team member was friendly. After reading our order back to us she said "guarantee you'll love it!" My husband and I giggled but once we hit into the chicken we were pleasantly surprised. The chicken was juicy and well seasoned. The biscuit  was fluffy. The soda was perfect. For fast food, this location exceeded my expectations.
Worst one around, been here a few times and nothing is ever correct. Out of products then online only certain days. Waited 20 minutes then proceeded to tell everyone they had no steak or chicken.
I'm a truck driver , took a shower at pilot , got a double whopper . Just as I expected , fresh food. Fast and friendly service and people. Nice clean place. Thanks.

I'm sad that my burrito, which I was SO looking forward to, was actually cool inside with cheese not melted and steak barely warm. The tortilla was literally cool to the touch, and lettuce was coming out of it along with steak-it wasn't wrapped properly. I'm wondering if it was because I asked the burrito maker to put on clean gloves since she was mopping the floor when I came in (no customers) then said, I'll be with you in a minute, while she finished mopping-which is fine but change the gloves!! When she asked what I'd like, I let her know I'd feel more comfortable sanitary wise if she put on a pair of clean gloves. Broom handles? Yuck! Anyway, I've been there before and it's been great so maybe they need to train a new employee? But for a $12 steak burrito with guacamole, I'd expect a lot more than a cold burrito that contained about 5 chunks of gristly steak I ended up feeding my dog. Not cooked long enough? I've had that burrito there before and it was both hot with tender juicy steak so hopefully this was just a bad day at Chipotle.
Food is pretty reliably good for our family but my wife points out that sometimes the chicken is too old. She often waits for a new batch to finish.

The worst run place we have ever encountered. Management and employees deserve each other. Pretty much anytime of the day you drive by there is never anyone inside. Management attacks you verbally and bully's you. Which he does in front of his employees and the occasional customer. He is not a friendly person. 
      Now, let's get to the food. We asked if we for get some potato wedges with our meal and when we got them they were old and dried out. We asked from some fresh ones and were told they won't cook fresh food if there is still some left and that includes the chicken. 
We decided to try a different KFC in Sparks, and the service in like night and day!! Very professional employees and their customer service is second to none!!  The manager was great (David??) and the store was impecable clean, and there were actually customers sitting in the dining room eating.

I went in to pick up a cup of coffee and I decided to buy donuts to surprise my kids at home.  Once the girl filled the donut box, she proceeded to cough into it with the lid still open.  I did not mention it as she asked me to close the box as she did not have a glove on her hand (she had a glove on the hand that grabbed the donuts).  As I stood to the side and waited for my coffee, I noticed another girl over at the grill, apparently prepping bacon/cheese/sausage sandwiches.  She HAD NO GLOVES ON and was laying the bacon/cheese and other items on each sandwich.  I will never patronize this location again, due to the incredibly unsanitary and unsafe handling of the food there.
Not surprising when seeing other reviews, but my taco had about a quarter of the taco with actual meat and cheese.

They actually have a Keto bowl here. For all that don't know this is Mexican grill that acts like subway. You make it how you want. It's very fresh and you get a lot I mean lot in your burrito just find my pic. Full taste and fast service. Tend change it up every time I go between chicken and steak. Love adding corn white rice and salsa. Yumm! Also loved that tables and surrounding areas were clean. The cleanliness made me and my wife seat and enjoy. Keep up good work.

I have given this location way too many chances. Every single time I've been through this drive thru something is missing. I had to pull around until they finished getting my large order together (3 tender meals,  kids meal,  a bowl and 4 chicken breasts). The gentleman that brought it out seemed annoyed to have been working.  He gave me one bag and I said this is all? He said yep. I said I'm just missing my daughters milk for her kids meal. Upon returning home the bag I assumed was the kids meal had the bowl in it. I tried calling to rectify the situation and it rang off the hook. The fact that this had happened multiple times in the past, and each time, the attitudes of the employees makes me think that place is a shit show of an establishment & no one takes pride in their job & could care less if anything is messed up. Wish I could give 0 stars. The morning staff is at least somewhat Competent BUT the NIGHT SHIFT STAFF ARE ALL FUCKING MORONS!! I've been to this Burger King quite a few times and it's clear as day that the workers at night just don't give a flying fuck. You get what they have under the heat lamp. Period! I ordered a whopper with cheese no onions and received a whopper without cheese and with onion! I could tell it had been under the heat lamp for a while because the top bun was hard as a rock. I went inside to get my correct order and the garbage ass lazy cook told the manager he wasn't making it because they had whoppers under the heat lamp! What a shitbag!!!! The manger had to make my whopper! They also ALWAYS HAVE AN ATTITUDE at the drive thru speaker and can never hear anything. Get the dog shit out your ears and actually give a fuck about your job!! This is about as average as a KFC experience that you can have. It wasn't "blow you away" awesome but neither was it terrible. I decided to go the drive through route when I went because I was short on time. I do have to say, I went through the line fast, they got my order right, and the person taking my order was very friendly and courteous. Definitely helps to contribute to a positive KFC experience.

As far as the food goes, I went because I wanted to try the new Nashville Hot Chicken. I went with the 3 piece tenders meal. I do have to say, the tenders were of a decent size. Not too heavily breaded and were decently moist. However, it was on the greasy side. It almost seemed like the tenders were dunked in chili oil instead of having a real hot sauce. Might be a recipe they need to go back and look at again.

Overall, it was a decent meal. But I so agree with other reviews, this place needs a major overhaul and remodel. With competition up and down the street rebuilding their stores, it's a good time to consider an upgrade or risk being left in the dust.

5-9-2019
This is the worst kfc i have been to in years do not waste your time everyone.It was early afternoon yesterday 5/9/2019 the buffet looked liked it had been sitting there for a week.The tables and floors where dirty all of them.We ordered 2 of the crispy chicken sandwich meals,Both where ice cold so we returned them the cashier did apologize but when the GM came out she was extremely rude and very unprofessional she needs fired.She did not even apologize whatsoever.After telling her about the ice cold chicken she just served us she had the guts to say "well where the fry wedges cold"? I thought does it matter you just severed under cooked  cold chicken she needs fired and this kfc needs shutdown.I will be calling the health department on this place this morning and try to get this place shutdown asap its very disgusting inside.

This is the worst Chipotle I've ever been to. We ordered online and picked up our order, only to get home and realize that they gave us chicken instead of steak, forgot to put salsa on our burrito bowl, and gave us brown guacamole. We tried calling them numerous times and no one would pick up. I'm never going to this location again. The customer service and quality of food at this location is terrible.

I would give this location 0 stars if possible. 

The meridian location is full of rude disorganized employees. Who seemingly could care less about good service. 

It seems this location randomly chooses to do mobile orders only, turning away walk in customers. They then promise you a pick up time that tends to be way off. We had a pick up order time of 5:20 and didn't have our food until 6:15. 

We attempted to come here again. They were out of steak at the moment. Rather than the employee sharing how long it would take to make more, her response was we won't have it for a while then stared at us. Update: they also have no chips currently.

At 2:45 we drove through the drive through twice then tried the door.  No signs other than those that indicated they should have been open.  No integrity as I see it.  Likely the Owner/Manager did not know, the crew just decided to flee and have another J-such is our once vaunted society today.

Tried the chicken wings today, If you like the hot sauce pored onto them then order them. Personally I don't know why I really went there when across the street there is a better place for wings where they atleast try to do do it right.

If Burger King is where you go to "have it your way," this Burger King serves as the chain's nonexample. At the Judge Perez Burger King, you have it their way. Everything―from your wait time to the physical contents of your order―is at their discretion. A Whopper Jr. with no tomato? Sounds like you wanted chicken fries. No? Trust me, sir, I know what I heard. And after you 
do this Burger King's drive-thru's distinctive pull-around-and-wait (an experience as unique as it is inescapable), are you really gonna argue?

I hypothesize Corporate bribes this location to keep their customer satisfaction numbers low and their drive-thru times high. This inflates the performance stats of all other Burger Kings in the district. No other hypothesis explains how a Burger King this consistently bad stays open on Judge Perez, a road with more fast food chains than cars.

The savory food is better than ever, but their online ordering is not as useful as it could be. I would like it if the food were ready for pickup and followed all the instructions. Otherwise, what is the point? Steak or chicken is a bit gristly at times, so I usually get the pork.

I picked up my order on Friday and they told me they were behind, which I understood since it was Friday. I waited for 25 minutes beyond my pick up time. I would have been completely fine with that if the quality of food was on par. When I got my food the portion was tiny. Less than 15 pieces of steak, about a tablespoon of guacamole (that I paid extra for), and a tiny handful of lettuce.  $12 for this?! It's absolutely absurd and I wont be going back.

Can't go wrong with their corporate music mix, or is that someone's iPod? Nothing like eating fried chicken to S.O.S. Band's "Baby We Can Do It". Cole slaw is good but their macaroni cheese tastes like a car seat - the bad kind.

You're here for the chicken: Their chicken still is lower tier for fast food and their bread leaves creepy grease stains, but customer service is tops, and food comes out quick compared to years ago.

In closing: WHY ARE YOU READING REVIEWS FOR A KFC?

Now listen here!!! I had been hearing about this Impossible Whopper at BK. And was hesitant about trying it but i said let me try it.
At this location i want to commend because that burger was nice and hot and fresh. It tasted just like a Real Whopper yall!!!!  i always request fresh fries and BAAAAAAABEEEE... they were so hot i was doing that "jvjvjvjvjvjvj" thing. You know when food is hot and you're trying to cook it down all while eating!! 
I split the meal with my daughter because i was like "what if I don't like it?" But wished I had gotten my own meal. Needless to say.... IT WAS GOOD!.
The customer service was good!
Thank you BK. I'll definitely return

Justin took my order tonight and was really enthusiastic and made my experience so good! It's hard to say that for fast food restaurants sometimes. I will definitely be coming back... This establishment is less than a mile from our house so we will come here for a quick lunch or dinner. Unfortunately we are usually disappointed in the food each time.  It's also an unusual long time in drive thru each time no matter the time of day.  Last time our soft taco had no cheese at all, and the time before my burrito was so stale it wasn't edible.
