Ordered 4 piece tenders with honey mustard. Got 3 pieces, no sauce. Feel scammed. Pick somewhere else if you want fried chicken.

I was going to get Chicken.  I had bad experience in Florida,  wasn't going
To let that ruin my day. As I proceeded to lot, an obnoxious employee smoking right next to store, which is against NJ law. A certain amount 
Of feet away from building is necessary.  I have worked in food much of my
Life . Her clothes dirty, hair unkempt.  I will not patronize a business 
That is sloppy and doesn't follow the law. I didn't enter......please clean up
The ..act....

I ordered a whopper, crispy fish and onion rings. The food was good and definitely did the job to satisfy my craving. I was amazed at how neat my sandwiches were, some fast food places just don't make their food neat anymore. So I really appreciate that.

Have you ever been bad?

So bad that you just want to break the rules on that new diet you just started or was contemplating? I have and I blame a lot of it on this place.

I don't know what it is. Chipotle is just my weakness. It's so good. So fulfilling. So quick.

I like to order a burrito bowl (it's not even a burrito, though?) online and just high and mightily skip in front of that long 12 o'clock lunch hour and pick up my food.

Specifically, I get a bowl, with black beans, fajita vegetables, barbacoa (sometimes sofritas), lettuce, salsa, cheese, extra sour cream and guacamole with a side of chips. Wow. It's truly to die for. Sometimes, I get rice, but it depends if I'm being weary about carb counting that day or not.

This location has the friendliest people. They are just normally a chilled crowd of people just doing their jobs and usually quickly. They also are no strangers to really filling those bowls up. Hope no one calls loss & prevention on them, because I'm loving that I'm getting my money's worth.

It has a nice little ambiance to the place to where you can sit and chill in there. The inside seating area is way better than Broad Ripple's, bit it doesn't match up to the outdoor seating of the latter Chipotle. 

The one thing I suggest not getting here: queso. That cheese dip is so disgusting and bitter. They were so eager to add queso and asked me a few different times. One time I let them give it to me on the side and wow. I haven't eaten that since.

As your everyday, run-of-the-mill Chipotle though, I think this one really exceeds my expectations every time.

So go on ahead and make sure you get your protein in for the day.

Whoever owns, manages this franchise has no business doing either. EVERY SINGLE TIME I go here there is a problem. Everything from point of sale/internet not working, lack of utensils, running out of chicken and steak, taking online orders because they lack staff, and just overall not giving a fuck from the staff. Nothing is going to change until ownership/management change.

these whores fucked up my order.... never again i asked for 1 fucking thingggggggggggg. i hate it here  all i wanted was a damn number 3.... mf gave me a whole different sandwich and did this shit twice like who you fuck up an order twice.  less than 1 star

Are they serious right now??? This whopper Jr is smaller than a child's hamburger anywhere. Did they really think they we wouldn't notice? And yet you are still going to charge $5. UNBELIEVABLE. What a total joke

Didn't think it was possible to find a Dunkin' Donuts worse than the one of 54 by the Wendy's, then you came along. I've been here a small handful of times and today is the last time I will ever go. On the off chance that I do get to order, my coffee is usually messed up and munchkins are miscounted.  I've gotten a Boston cream donut and when they hand me the bag, it looks like a bomb went off inside.  They legit have handed me a sausage wake up wrap that was all opened up and didn't close. Looked as if it had been cooked that way and they just went with it. I've caught the morning staff arguing with each other in the window and whoever takes the morning orders will leave the mic on and have a conversation with staff and take orders about 5-10 minutes later.  

America runs on dunkin but if this is your only option, go to the McDonald's across the street for breakfast or wait till the Wawa opens up.

I have been to this location a couple times and have had a good experience every time. The staff is friendly and the wait is not usually very long. Today I decided to try their new hotdogs. The dog itself was delicious but very thin! I had it without bread. I also had a whopper with cheese and bacon without the bun. The staff was gracious enough to put in all my condiments in the bag without me having to ask. That's always a plus in my book!

To be honest, I'm a little surprised at how low this Chipotle location is rated based on the numerous positive experiences I have had there over the past year. Since moving to the area, I have come to really rely on the Chipotle app for ordering ahead and balancing life with a newborn while working multiple jobs. 

I will say that I no longer enjoy Chipotle's burritos, but have found the tacos to offer the best value for the amount of food you get. Not to mention, the taste of all ingredients at once is quite enjoyable (versus getting mouthfuls of rice or lettuce due to the size of the inevitably messy burritos). Burritos at any location almost always rip based on what I've found. No fun. 

I order the steak tacos which come with 3. If I'm not super hungry I save the last one for later! But they're essentially prepared the same way as burritos. Think of them as 3 mini burritos! Anyway...I digress...the only drawback about this location is the crowded/small parking lot and the semi-awkward waiting area for patrons to stand or pace while waiting to pick up online or mobile orders.

Grub hubbed my 1st whopper in nearly a decade the other day. It arrived cold and tasted exactly like I remembered. 
Actually I should correct that. I got the impossible whopper which tastes exactly like a regular whopper. So did I accidentally get a real whopper or has the premise of real beef at BK always been impossible?

Anyway if it has come even a smidge warm I could've done 2 stars. I got extra cold fries.

The line for the drive thru was so long I parked and went inside.  I was the only customer inside.  One employee took off his gloves, took my order, wouldn't give me a receipt because the machine was out of paper.  Then he put on gloves and went back to placing uncooked bacon on racks.  He probably had at least 12 racks ready but just kept at it.  Another man stood in the back and did absolutely nothing but talk the entire time I was there.  No working whatsoever.  Another man had headphones on so he was taking orders but the line outside only had two cars receive their food while I was inside.  The one female making sandwiches was talking to the three men who were really just talking the whole time I was there.  Now, what bothered me was I saw the female tear a piece of cheese off the sandwich and put it in her mouth and kept eating.  I really just wanted to leave at the point.  So I moved to the far end to make sure she did not eat from my 2 chicken sandwiches.  That was my first time to actually see four employees being so nonchalant in front of a customer and one actually eating off of the sandwich she was preparing, which was either a whopper or a whopper junior.  I promised myself I would never go to the Madison Burger King as long as I'm alive.  When I got home I threw my Burger King food in the garbage.   I'm just sooooo turned off.  She was actually eating the food right off the sandwich and right over it and the entire prep area.  When I went out to get in my vehicle the line of cars still hadn't moved because the four employees inside were too busy talking to each other work was not really getting accomplished. Yuk  Yuk  Yuk  Not sure why they gave me cold fries. Anyway, they do not deserve a star; more like a sad face if anything.

They NEVER have chicken!!! We really wanted fried chicken and my husband said he felt like KFC but they never have chicken. I convinced him to go and sure enough we pulled up to the drive thru and she said " Welcome to KFC all we have is grilled chicken it's at least a 5 minute wait for anything else" This happens over and over. It seems like there are just lazy employees running the place. Last try!

My 10-year old chose KFC (Fenton) for her birthday party dinner. Every kid loves fried chicken!  Unfortunately this restaurant was a mess. I would never use them for a party. I stopped in early afternoon and sort of preordered.  They have no real way to preorder for a party, which is issue #1. So they wrote it down and told me to call about an hour before I would pick up, which I did. When we arrived to pickup they apologized that they lost the slip they wrote down (even after I called to review).  So they couldn't recall the sides I ordered and missed a large side that we paid for (not worth my time to call again). 

They wanted an hour advance notice, but no system to take it. Ridiculous in today's environment. Next time we will head to Porters for our chicken needs. Should have done it to begin with!  Think twice before heading here for a party. It shouldn't be that hard!!!

I wanted to try the #beyondsausage but they wanted to charge me full price for just the sausage and muffin.  Not cool.  I ordered a latte and I asked for it not too foamy so she gave me a medium cup only 2/3 full.  I had questions but she was too preoccupied with the drive thru to pay attention.   I think she may have given me dairy, not almond milk like I asked.  
#badexpe

I went through the drive through at this location ordering a double whopper with cheese and a double cheeseburger. 
When i opened them i saw that there weren't any cheese on either of them. 
So how do you forget to put cheese on a double cheeseburger, and how do you forget to put cheese on the double whopper with cheese? 
It's not the first time this location has screwed the order up either.
Absolutely disgusting! Go to Popeyes instead if you want real fried chicken that not bland and soggy

I had a coupon for two free crispy chicken tacos. I drove up to the takeout window and she scanned my coupon, I then handed her my credit card I got my food I drove off and then I noticed that the receipt had not given me the free tacos. I had also ordered taco salad and nachos. The finished product appear to be just thrown together it tastes it all right the crispy chicken tacos were all right but not getting them free just left a rotten taste in my mouth this isn't the first time I've had a problem with Del Taco I don't think I'm coming back ever again I'm going to stick with Taco Bell. It may have only been $2 that I lost, but it's not the first time I've had a problem there I don't think I'll be back to Del Taco . anytime soon
Bless their hearts. They are nice as can be. Just don't give too many directions via drive through. They won't get them all. Otherwise, chicken was fresh and good.

The person taking orders had a very bad attitude and I'm not sure if they changed or not but I literally got 5 wedges with my 4 chicken tenders when They used to give the fries in the box and way more. I don't know if it's to cut cost but I got way too much chicken for this little bit of fries and KFC is way too overpriced for this.

IF YOU ARE VEGETARIAN DO NOT COME HERE!!!!!!if I could leave no stars I would. Everyone who works here has a horrible attitude and talks to you like you're trash. I always come in to this location cuz it is right next to where I live... I'm always understanding but this time my patience was capped. I am vegetarian and I wanted to order a veggie bowl as I normally do... however... they wouldn't let me have veggies because it was "mobile order only". So I just had beans. One of the ladies also gave me an attitude when I mentioned how I was vegetarian and very rudely said "well you can have the sofritas (I can't have tofu I am allergic). This is a new thing and wasn't like this the last time I ordered here. If this is new, put up a sign for people so they know they can't have veggies with their order so that I won't waste my time coming in here. Also, I have tried to use my egiftcard on the chipotle app here 5 times and every time their scanner doesn't work (works fine at other locations). It only works if I use it for a mobile order. They are too lazy to type in my giftcard info so I always pay with my card. I am also never doing mobile order again either because they always mess up my order. They have forgotten things, messed up my order, etc. So many things wrong with this location.

Ordered here last night for the first time and I wasn't happy. We went through the drive thru and ordered the Fiesta pack. The lady who took our orders was the one of two reasons I am giving this place a two stars. She was very upbeat and super friendly. It took a while to get through the drive thru but I guess that's the risk you take when you go through it because you never know what people order and sometimes it can take a while. But it felt like it was longer than it should have been. We got our food and headed home. Now del taco claims that their food is fresh and honestly it looked pretty fresh for fast food. Nothing was wilted of slimy like some other people said, but I know it's never going to be super high quality. My issue is the flavor and construction. The burritos tasted like NOTHING, now I know I got them without sauce but the sauce shouldn't be the only thing that gives flavor. They come with cheese but the cheese was almost all at the bottom so when you got down there you were pretty much eating cheese and tortilla. The tacos looked good but were probably about 60-70% cheese, flavor was okay but really not great. So while the ingredients didn't look to bad and the lady on the intercom was super nice. Flavor was lacking big time and they need to work on construction. Also price wasn't bad I think for 12 items in the Fiesta Pack it was around $15 with tax.

This is the worse Carl's Jr. I have ever been too...never have I experienced such rudeness and disrespect 
After working my 10 hr shift and still went to school I decided to stop by in my way home just to order something small to calm my hunger 
I order a small fry the girl that was in the drive thru window must have had a rough day or something but she was rude since the beginning I don't know I she was trying to be sarcastic but she asked me three times if that was all I wanted very rudely as if I was bothering her for only a small fry 
When I arrived to the window I told her she didn't need to talk to me that way 
She said " well if you don't like it you can leave because I'm not taking your order and closed her window"
I had know idea a corporation this big can tolerate people like her working 
Let alone refuse a order 
It was rude uncalled for and the worse thing that has ever happened to me
I will be speaking with the district manager and already emailed corporate 
They should not be having people like representing there franchise 
If I could I would have put no star at all

So my first visit was in the drive thru right after this new Del Taco opened. I ordered 3 items and drive off. Got home and found only 2 of the items in my bag. I thought about going back but never got time after that to do so. :-(. Really the reason I went there was because I was short on time anyways. Decided to go back and try it again today. This time I went inside and it was nice but it is also brand new. The girl at the counter and friendly and nice. I ordered 2 shrimp Tacos as they were on sale 2 for 4.50. They came out quickly but the place was not busy either. The first taco had soooo much of that spicy mayo sauce I was almost tempted to have them make me a new one but once again was short on time so I opted not to. Ironically the second taco had the right amount and was a good taco.  So it seems that there are issues with inconsistency. My advice is if you order anything that comes with sauce ask for it in the side so you can gage how much or how little to add for yourself. I don't know that I will come back again but if I do I will be more detailed about what I want on the side. I would say this was a generous 3 star review.  For a brand new Del Taco I did expect a bit more. I know it's fast food but even at that quality of food consistency needs to get better.

Good location, definitely getting busier .
All I know is that I am hungry and I want some carnitas . Been her for 15 minutes , only like 10 people in front of me and watched the burrito maker mess up 3 in a row, this isn't base ball.
Still love this place and can't wait for my carnitas on a salad.

I ordered a 6 piece chicken and some tacos I think that was T11. First off the soda was flat. The crispy chicken was greasy and dark as hell. The tacos had less meat on one and the other had more.....very flimsy!!! This place needs to change because the food here is disgusting!!! I will never come here anymore. I will be in the bathroom for awhile after that meal. If you want good chicken order from somewhere else.

Good service and friendly people. But my rice in my burrito bowl was so undercooked it was like still hard and just not good. Also I got the very end of the steak and got barely any and it was so chewy (used to the extreme chewiness of chipotle steak I just only like that as my meat)

Chipotle let me give you some love on Yelp. I probably have spent at least a few hundred dollars on your salad bowls.

I love how generous and how much value a bowl can be for your money.

What I don't like is that I realize i'm eating the whole bowl and taking down about 1000 calories. 

Lovin me that half chicken half steak.

It was meh. But I think this is a systemic Chipotle problem rather than this particular joint. The chicken was dry, sofritas left cold and clumpy and chicken quesadilla was overcooked. The corporate needs to retrain their staff, because this is not the only Chipotle I've experienced these shortcomings. The food just doesn't taste good as other Mexican joints. Like...Capital tacos? Even Tijuana flats? Way better, cheaper and better service & experience.

This is the best Del Taco I've found in the treasure valley!  Super clean! Fast friendly service. But most of all fresh consistent food!  I'm from the Barstow area and have ate at the original location as well as Lynwood but this one is with out a doubt the closest to those I've found. I drive a few extra miles just for this one.  The Eagle road location  needs some attention!   So drive a little more it definitely worth it!!

Great food. Who would have known that I would want fries with my burrito....but I do!! Always fast and helpful service. Way better than Taco Hell. Be aware the food is very filling, I got a combo that lasted me for 2 meals!!

3 1/2 stars!
Extremely busy on a Sunday night at 7:40. They ran out of the steak, chicken, brown rice, and black beans while we were in line. 

The assembly line staff were waiting for the cooks to replenish those items. We had to wait about 20 minutes. When they gave my bf his steak bowl, the meat was still very rare and red. Not necessarily a bad thing if you are grilling at home, but kinda questionable at a semi-fast food place. He said he wanted to switch to chicken instead since the steak was still red. They made him a new chicken bowl. Food was delicious as always, especially the guacamole! Customer service wasn't the best tonite...the whole staff looked a bit frazzled. It must have been a long day. Still, I would have preferred a smile rather than the look of "I hate my life." ;) Still, I will return. Most experiences here are pleasant. It may not be my favorite Chipotle, but it's the closest one. ;) Everybody has an off day. Let's just hope this doesn't become the norm...

This location is located alongside with a few other stores and restaurants. Unfortunately it is very popular lunch area and you don't always find parking. If you are patient, however ,you can probably grab a spot from after a few minutes. 

The line at this location was definitely long but I wouldn't compare it to New York City long. There is a wait however because usually the line is up to the door. Allow time to wait!

My favorite is always the burrito bowl. I'm not a fan of some of the tortilla skins usually so the goal is always my to go choice. My favorite is the cilantro rice for sure! I love the steak but beware since it's spicy. The pork isn't spicy at all so you have that and also the chicken. The corn is great too. 

Too bad but they give you a smear of guacamole when you order it on the side. The same thing with the salsa. You basically can dip a few chips.

I came in for a Famous Bowl, and was surprised to see a buffet. I didn't know KFC offered a buffet, so I was intrigued; I quickly lost interest when I saw the state of the buffet. The food was mostly empty, it looked like it had been sitting there for a decent amount of time, and the chicken looked overcooked but gooey from sitting in its own juices for too long. I ordered, and the employee proceeded to grab a bowl with his bare hands, and fill my Famous Bowl from the buffet. I wasn't pleased with this because the buffet looked less than appetizing, but decided to let it go and see how it was. The employee couldn't be bothered to let the water drain from the corn before he added it to the bowl, which resulted in everything being watery and soupy. The entire thing was luke warm at best, and the bowl was only around 3/4ths full. All around, this was the worst experience I've ever had at a KFC. I will not be returning to this location.

I won't be coming back to this location. I came a little a while ago (odd hours, I get it) for a steak bowl, but there was only a few scraps of steak left and frankly it looked like dog food and like it'd be sitting there all day. I politely asked if maybe they were making more (there was none left anyways) to which they said "no". One girl finally said if I wanted to wait they could, to which I said yes. I didn't mind waiting, but the attitude of the staff was ridiculous. Not only were they screaming "SHUT UP" at each other over and over again but a different girl came up to me and rudely told me there was enough for my bowl. I said I know, thank you, but it doesn't look very good and she rolled her eyes. Clearly this staff needs a manager or a babysitter on duty, with the exception of the cashier who was friendly and professional. Every chipotle I've been to I've had a great experience with polite staff, this one being the exception.

We just celebrated my Aunt's 100th birthday June 20, 2015 with 26 pieces of fried chicken with mashed potatoes, gravy, green beans, slaw, mac n' cheese and biscuits.  Kristine, the manager, was awesome!!  Not only did she come in on her day off but she made sure everything was as I had ordered.  She took extra care to separate my mom's food from the rest as she is a celiac and allergic to wheat.  Everything was ready on time and was still hot by the time we got it all to the nursing facility.  Many thanks to Kristine and KFC in Avon!!!

ate here today cuz kids were screaming that they were starving.
ordered 2 kids meals and a whopper combo. the kids meals came with different size fries and drinks. the manager quickly resolved the issue by replacing the smaller of both. i cleaned a table for us to sit at. yes I cleaned it. my fries were cold and the box they came in probably tasted better. i stopped eating them and started on the burger. after pulling the core of the lettuce off i began to eat. burger was as cold as the ice in my drink.   this place is horrible. food handling and storage is horrible. the place was a mess.  i won't be back.

My husband and I love Chipotle and when we learned that there was a location even closer to us than the Moorestown Mall, we were thrilled! Unfortunately, this location leaves a lot to be desired, not so much with the food (which is typically fresh and good), but with the service. They have been opened for several months now, but most of their staff clearly has a lot to learn about service and how to cook for more than two people. They never have enough food prepared for the busiest times (Fridays and Saturdays), and my husband has repeatedly had to wait more than 10 minutes to get steak for his burrito! This isn't a fine dining establishment, it's a fast food restaurant that is anything but. Last night, a woman at the register was texting on her phone (trying to hide it under the counter but not doing a great job) while I waited to be rung up. And she was miserable, didn't thank me, didn't give me a tray for my food...nothing that you'd expect as basic customer service skills. 

If you're in a bind, don't want steak, and are up for feeling frustrated while waiting for your food, you may be okay to stop at this location...ideally when a manager is there because I can't imagine there is any manager there on Friday nights when I've gone...and if there is and it's still that bad, that's a huge concern. I find myself going back in hopes it will change, but it hasn't, and last night was the worst yet. I highly recommend driving the extra five minutes to the Moorestown location, or better yet, to the location at the Promenade in Marlton, which has both great food AND service.

I've always had a problem here. Anytime I'm here THERE IS NO CHICKEN! I mean kfc Kentucky fried CHICKEN. And when I finally say ok to the chicken I don't like it's always dry and cold. Horrible place to eat so please for the love of all that's holy don't even look at eating here.

Hell yeah.  Tacos delicious.  Double cheeseburger delicious.  Fries are the best fast food fries period. Yes its fast food but its the king of the niche.  Compare del tacos to taco bell and compare the double del burger to McFilthy, Tha Kang or the Red-Headed Whore and theres no question Del is on top.   Staff was friendly and food came out hot and fresh.  NOM NOM NOM

I must have come here on a bad day. So far, of all the burrito restaurants like this, Chipotle has impressed me least. They seemed to have less choices. 
I got the burrito bowl with steak. The steak was flavorful but very tough and chewy. And I don't think I got a big enough scoop of guacamole for $1.50 extra. I also got chips and salsa, I hated the salsa and the chips were extremely salty. 
But based on all the good reviews here, I might give it another shot sometime.

I had been given a gift card to Chipotle Grill. I went on August 14th 2015 at approximately 8 PM. I ordered the steak burrito and added guacamole. I noticed that my server's pans were very low on rice, both brown and white, and the steak cubes were pretty low also... She was scraping the bottom of the barrel to put my burrito together. My steak burrito came to $10.50. The guacamole, I found out, was two dollars - 20% of the cost of my expensive burrito was for a small measured serving of guacamole! Really!?  AYFKM?

Every time I encountered one of the steak cubes in my burrito, they were tough and chewy and I actually ended up having to spit them out. As I continued "eschewing" the tough steak cubes, I realized I had been served a completely unacceptable burrito, especially considering the $10 and 50 Cent cost. I debated going up to the counter and complaining, maybe I should've done it, but I didn't. I found it very annoying that Chipotle Grill does not have a ground beef option... I find that to be incredulous. 

Chipotle Grill is supposed to be so careful and well known for the quality of their ingredients, and I found the quality control for this visit was completely unacceptable, At least at this location for that particular night.  I will burn out the remaining $14.50 left on my gift card at another location of the Chipotle Grill and provide a review - Hopefully, I will have a better experience to relate!  If I have anything resembling the low-quality of this visit again you better believe I will be marching to see the manager on duty.

I honestly don't see the appeal to with Chipotle. I have been here several times and I have always walked away full, but the food wasn't that good. 

I have ordered the steak burrito at least three times. The meat just doesn't taste that good to me, I don't like the seasonings they use. I will never eat at a Chipotle again. If you are looking for a place with a great burrito, go to Cafe Rio. Unfortunately, there are none in Tucson, they are all in Phoenix. Save yourself the time and just don't!

I really wanted to switch it up from the occasional Taco Bell and try something different in Mexican fast food, which is dumb because we're in Tucson and there is a ton of cheap and delicious Mexican food here!  Anyways, I ordered a chicken taco and burrito and both were bland and forgetful, will not be coming back ever again.

Absolutely no issues - we came at 7:15 PM on a Wednesday night in the summer - so no line and thankfully, no dried-out old food.

My kid got a steak burrito to go and I did not have to cook.

Seriously.  No issues.

Piss poor excuse for a restaurant.  Just went through the drive through ordered a double whopper with cheese and bacon with a poutine.  Simple enough right?  Well not so simple enough for the people working.  What I actually received when I looked in the bag once I got home was a single whopper no cheese no bacon no toppings of any kind oh and no poutine either.  Last time I EVER get food from here as this is not the first time they screwed my order up.  Also place wasn't even busy had maybe 1 customer inside and I was the only one in the drive thru.  This place deserves 0 stars.

Let's get real: It's CHIPOTLE. If you've been to any of the other chain locations in the U.S., you know what to expect. I would have to agree with another Yelper, Ivette O., that disagreed with it being a "true Mexican grill." I've had my fair share of "true Mexican" food and this isn't really comparable in the authentic department. Nevertheless, it is damn good!

I particularly enjoyed the steak at this location, it appeared to be med-rare+, which is my favorite cooking. I mixed the carnitas and steak with light white rice, hot salsa, and some sour cream into a burrito...completely satisfying. 
Not to mention the fact that they have all of the different Tabasco flavors! 
Disclaimer: I AM A TABASCO FREAK. So, I mean, I had the original and green bottles constantly flowing onto my burrito. Major plus! 

Only downside of this location was the attitude of the staff on this given Tuesday night...they almost seemed annoyed that they had customers walking in the door. This aside, it didn't change the fantastic burrito I devoured!
What can I say it's DEl taco but it's better than any other fast food the green chili with chicken and avocado bowl is the bomb its fresh and healthy.

I've been back a bunch of times and they always seem to be out of something. They're typically out of chips by 6:30pm -- at some point you'd think they'd learn make more. And even if they do have stuff, you have to wait like 5 minutes for steak to be ready or something like that. I love Chipotle, so I'm flexible with getting something else. This is just consistently slow and out of basic stuff.

Was going to just drive through but noticed the outdoor seating and decided to take a few minutes for lunch and to enjoy the sunny day.

Was greeted by damn near a fleet of Del Taco employees. The guy [manager?] that took my order was also manning the drive through. Usually a rub, but enjoyed being upsold on a taco [Macho Taco [?],double meat and cheese!] and then he worked it on a cookie for dessert. Before I'd even finished filling up my soda the gal behind the counter had my order up.

The place was clean and bright but best of all was the enthusiastic service. So nice to have the patio seating too. Good job!

Can't give a fast-food chain a 5-star, just can't...
But would like to.  We had breakfast here, twice in two days.  Fried bologna, egg, velveeta on biscuits...DAMMMMM that's good!  Friendly people, clean restaurant, good coffee.  I can't speak for lunch/dinner stuff, but this is IT for fast cheap tasty breakfast.

For anyone who hasn't been to Chipotle, this isn't what I would consider Mexican food, but it is very good. It is "healthier" than other fast food places and generally a decent price. They offer burrito bowls, salads, & tacos (soft or crunchy). I enjoy the burrito bowls from here. My favorite things are the sofritas (tofu) and the chicken which are both full of flavor. If you want extra veggies you can ask them to add the fajitas veggies to anything. I love their hot salsa here. It isn't very spicy but it is full of flavor and a perfect pairing with their food. The chips are good, but beware, they can taste very salty. Otherwise, this location is a great location. Workers were friendly, helpful, and patient. Small dining area, but then again, every Chipotle I've been to generally has a small dining area. There are outside seats as well. Location had WiFi. It was nice and cool inside which is a perfect way to escape the summer heat.

I was shopping in the area and have not eaten at a Burger King in ages so decided to stop in.  It is located amongst many fast  food restaurants and stores with plenty of parking.

They have a very reasonable value menu but a rather pricey combo menu.  The value menu starts at $1.39 for a Jr. Whopper, cheeseburger, fries, onion rings, nuggets and the double cheeseburger were a bit more.  I had the double cheeseburger, onion rings and a drink for only $5.32.  Quite satisfied with the taste and bill.

The bigger burger combos are over $10.00 for the meal.  There's a kids menu, dessert, chicken and salad choices as well.

I was served quickly and the food was ready fast.  The drive-thru seems busy.  The restaurant is spacious and clean and there's a play area for young kids.

Went to the buffet which used to be ok. I asked for original recipe chicken and since they were busy I grabbed a plate till they died down and got chicken livers instead. Went back up and still no chicken so I got another plate with salad. Finally after 45 minutes and seeing an employee cleaning instead of putting food out I asked for 2 thighs and a leg. Not rude but enough to let them know that I wasn't happy. They gave my chicken but still didn't put new chicken out and finally another customer came in and they put it out 10 minutes after they ask.  So an hour of no chicken just while I was there and no telling how long before I arrived.

Another amazing Chipotle Mexican Grill.  This is a slightly odd location as it seems to sit alone on the far end of a large shopping center, but it's really close to the mall and other major stores, so I'm sure they do well.  Typical quick service. It's on the smaller side, but they also have some outdoor seating.  Like most inexpensive restaurants, you'll see lots of teens in the evenings on the weekend.  My favorite part isn't very specific to this location at all, but it's the first Chipotle I've visited since they're reintroduced carnitas to the menu.  All seems right in the world now.  They also made me probably the largest burrito I've had at a Chipotle that wasn't double wrapped. If you haven't hopped on the Chipotle bandwagon yet, there's still room.  It's delicious.

The only reason it gets one star is because the lady at the speaker was super nice. I got the wrong order but didn't have time to drive back and get the corrected one. So I ate what was given to me and it is the worst burger I've ever had. The bun is cold the burger is dry and it is drenched in mustard and ketchup. What a huge disappointment.

.I really like the Tuesday, taco nights deal, what some people call "Taco Tuesday" (I think that phrase started with Taco John's). You can get three beef Del Tacos for $2.99 - but you have to wait until after 3:30. I went there about 30 minutes early, and got charged full price. The clerk made no mention of the discount later on.
.The tacos are packed with lots of cheese, a little lettuce, few bits of tomato, and a nicely spiced ground meat. I prefer to eat inside the restaurant, because I can visit the salsa bar, ladle my choices into a couple tiny cups, and add it to my tacos as I eat. And I go back for  extra if I want.
.I did the drive through, for Taco Wednesday, and ordered nine tacos. This is essentiaIly the same deal as Tuesday, except we get ground turkey meat in our tacos. My wife asks for taco sauce, so we are handed nine little plastic envelopes of "El Scorcho" (medium) taco sauce - one per taco.
.I tried some of the El Scorcho, sauce and found it did not improve the flavor for me. Compared to the beef tacos, the turkey was not as satisfying. But either way, the tacos are just okay, not excellent.

Worst service ever. The kitchen staff are complete idiots. That's what you get for minimum wage, I guess. The place was not very busy. I placed the simplest order possible: a Whopper Jr and small fries. It took nearly 25 minutes to get my order - if this is "fast food" I'd hate to see what slow food is like - then they got it entirely wrong. I specified I wanted ONLY lettuce and light mustard on the burger, and the cashier rang it up correctly. When I finally got my order, it had mayo, onions, pickles & tomatoes -- all things I can't eat. I sent it back and they made it  the same way again! How dumb can you be?? I finally had to give up and throw it in the trash, having wasted money and a lot of time. I will never go to Burger King again.

I go here 1-2 times a month because it's close to
My house and about 50% of that time, something goes wrong.  There's not a lot of consistency in portion size, typically hard to find a clean table and I've actually had to ask someone to put on new gloves after they scratched their face. 

Today I tried to order from the app, but it quoted me an hour later for pick up. Drove the 10 minutes there and there were only 3 people ahead of me. Weird.

I had to ask them to start over and get me a different meat after I pointed out a long curly, metallic thing in my carnitas (maybe a grill brush wire?). Then the darn thing fell apart when I was eating it :(

Please excuse me if I gush and blush in this review, but Chipotle always leaves me in a good mood afterwards.

I ate at my very first Chipotle a little over a year ago, and have been to several locations since.  While fulfilling a sudden lunch craving for one of their steak burritos today, I noticed I couldn't check into to Chipotle on Yelp.  "That must be a mistake." I mumbled to myself; however, I could not locate this fabulous location in all of Yelp Land.  After all the times I've been to this location, I can't believe I have forgotten to check in every time before today.  No more will this Chipotle go un-Yelped, because today is your day Chipotle.

I was excited when this Chipotle opened up on the corner of Ina and Oracle.  I mean not only do I work right down the street from this location, can walk there in a matter of minutes, but I can fulfill my Chipotle craving whenever my girlfriend isn't in the mood for their burritos or tacos.  I don't often crave specific foods, but these Chipotle cravings seem to come up more often than most.  This particular Chipotle isn't really visible from Oracle, as it and Pei Wei are in a separate building behind the shopping center containing Whole Foods and Wild Flower.  If you don't find it at first, check the parking lot behind this shopping center and look for a different building close to Ina.

The concept behind Chipotle is echoed in their motto, "Food With Integrity".  They have only a few things on the menu to choose from, but they make sure each one of those ingredients is fresh and delicious.  You can customize every order using any of the ingredients they offer.  Everything behind Chipotle is simple, but equally brilliant.  Even the decor is inexpensive and uncomplicated, but fits perfectly in with the Chipotle idea.

Chipotle's food is excellent, and this location is no exception.  The meats are juicy, the veggies are fresh, and the tortillas are delicious.  Their crispy taco bowls are the greatest combination of tangy, spicy, meaty, and crispy in a single dish ever.  Their burritos are mouth watering, assuming you can actually fit one of those giants in your mouth.  My burritos are always bursting from the extra ingredients they pack in there upon my request.  Their guacamole haunts my dreams... not in a bad way, but in that good way the cute student teacher from the eight grade shows up in my dreams from time to time.  

Aside from the food, the service is always fast, friendly, and efficient.  Even though this place has a huge line around lunch time, the staff always works well to get everyone through the line and onto devouring their food.  The staff here is simply fabulous.  I had to wait about a minute once while they cooked some more steak for my burrito, and they gave it to me for free to apologize for the wait.  I hardly even noticed I was waiting, and wasn't the least bit upset.  That's just great customer service!

Something I've noticed about every Chipotle I've been to is that they are very clean.  I hate eating at a dirty restaurant, and at Chipotle I never have to.  Every one of these locations has been spic and span.  If some careless customer does make a mess, the staff is quick to correct the problem, and move on like nothing happened.

We came here for a quick dinner because i wanted to try out the sofrita i've been hearing about.  As a non-meat eater it's nice to have a tofu as a protein option rather than just your plain veggies.  I remember coming here a while back and the amount of veggies i got on my bowl was easily counted with one hand.  It was just a disgrace, hence why i never came back until now.  The sofrita was quite tasty and very filling along with the rest of the contents of my bowl which included cilantro rice, black beans, and cheese.  Only reason why i opted for 3 stars was this place is too gluttonous. You come here feeling over satiated and needing a long walk afterwards.  I think next time i go i will definitely have to share my meal.  The cashier was also nice enough to give me a free voucher for another sofrita meal. I am also not a fan of their sauces.  Baja fresh has got them beat on this one.  Their sauces are not that flavorful.

I've been here twice and have been disappointed both times. The last time I went here, before I could even speak at the drive-through window, the lady told me that the only thing they had available was wedges. I decided to let this go since I did arrive just before they were going to close.

Tonight I came an hour before closing. Again, before I could even speak at the drive-through window, I was told the only available was grilled chicken. Fair enough. I order the chicken, come home, and find the paper box that is supposed to contain my biscuit is in the same container as my chicken. 

The DIRTY paper box, that might have been touched by at least 10 people, and was probably sitting on a counter, was inside the same container as my chicken.

Also, nobody was wearing gloves.

I'm writing this review because they've obviously gotten a little lax over there, and hopefully this will light a fire under the management. I'm sure they're all nice kids over there but you can't be this sloppy with other people's food.

I love Chipolte, and what you get, but this one is stingy.  I've been there multiple times and I'm left wondering when rice and beans became so expensive, because the servings are tiny.  Additionally, I've gotten the steak twice at this location and it's been chewy - gross.  This Chipolte is worth skipping.

The absolute worst KFC we've ever gone to.
The bf and I like to dine in KFCs, because it's just easier than taking everything home.
We got the $10 6-piece chicken share grilled and it was HARD and dry. I couldn't pierce the top layer of any of the pieces. 

That was actually 30minutes ago- we returned it and they've been making us a new batch- but this is the 3rd review I've written while waiting in the dining area.

The 'team member' took forever taking our order because she wasn't listening. Continually asked us which bucket, and we kept answering with "$10 chicken share, grilled." To which she'd respond with,"original, extra crispy, or grilled?" -_-  This went on continually, and they packed our food in to-go bags when we answered 'for here' when they asked. Realizing their mistake, they put the entire to-go bag on top of a tray lol what?! 

Still had to ask for plates and utensils. 
We will GLADLY drive out of our way to the KFC on 50th Street or the KFC by Busch Gardens.

I walked into the restaurant with my family and a man working there in a red shirt looked at us and didn't greet my wife and me.  I bought $100.00 worth of gift cards and received 5 free meal coupons for buying it from the online del taco site.  I showed him the coupons and he says he doesn't know if he can take them. I then ask him what do you mean? He then talks in Spanish to a woman working in the back and they gave me and my wife dirty looks and said I could only use two of them. I had three to use and was suppose to buy my child a meal with one, but I was only allowed to use 2 of them? I read the extra one that I had handed back and nowhere on it did it say limit 2 per visit in fact there was no limits on them. 

Why was I treated as if I printed them out my self? They take your money and then don't give you what they say they will.  

Another thing i want to bring up is this place was dead and when I got their it was very dirty.  It looked like the woman in the back had the flu. 

I'm extremely dissatisfied and will never return to this deltaco.

The only downside was that there were multiple pieces of avocado in my burrito and the steak didn't seem to be cooked properly. Seating area was fairly messy but then again, what restaurant isn't on a weekend night?
Stay away from this deal taco on a Friday At dinner hours. Sat in the drive through for 20+ mins while no one was even in the lobby. VERY SLOW SERVICE

As a vegetarian I love sofritas in Chipotle. But this location has many problems!!! The employees act like its a torture to serve others. They roll their eyes, give each other looks, and pretend they don't hear you. 
I feel like this Chipotle is RATIONING food. I don't understand why they can't give enough food the first time. Overall just mediocre service! 

As always, live deliciously!

Was craving chicken but so disappointed. It wad dry and biscuit were burnt
 Gave a. Piece of a nugget with no meat. waste of 11 dollars.
This is my 3rd time in this kfc. Each time the chicken was dried out. Also, the help is loud carry on conversations that are inappropriate. This owner need to watch how this crew is costing him $

I love it here! And now that they have sofritas on the menu it is even better. I tried the sofritas in California before they started serving it here and the second my local chipotle had it I was hooked, I don't eat a lot of meats and so this is an awesome option for me! And it can be healthy if you want it to!

Some of the worst service I've ever experienced, even for fast food. The girls in the drive-through are EXTREMELY rude, and they are often running out of things. I love getting KFC when I have a craving for chicken, but sometimes the horrific service makes me just want to go somewhere else.

Horrible experience on 5 different occasions. One may ask why did I go back 5 times if I had a bad experience? To answer that question, I understood they were a newer location so I wanted to give them a chance to work things out. 

Well after a few weeks it still looks like they are on their first day. From my experience the steak has been consistently over cooked and horrible customer service. After waiting an obscene amount of time on every visit they still managed to mess up each order. The last time I was there with my friend, we finally got to the last stage of the order and the worker knocked into my friends bowl knocking almost half of the food out onto the counter. Instead of quickly making her a new one, the worker left there and went to make someone else's order. I assume a manager came and finished preparing it to go. They offered no compensation other than a free drink. 

We obviously left. I was hoping this was a good location since it's close to where I live. I will not be wasting my time at this location again. I will be driving to a further location in the future

Ordered a carnitas burrito, pork was cold and soggy, rice was not fully cooked.  Probably just a bad batch, will try a Qdoba in the area for comparison.

*5/2 update - Stopped in again for a chicken burrito, better this time around, bumping them to 3 stars.  Qdoba is still better to me.
Worst customer service EVER!!!!! The employees there are so rude and to have your order ready they make you wait at least 15 minutes. If I can give this location a zero star I would!

Good location, definitely getting busier .
All I know is that I am hungry and I want some carnitas . Been here for 15 minutes , only like 10 people in front of me and watched the burrito maker mess up 3 in a row, this isn't baseball.
Still love this place and can't wait for my carnitas on a salad.
What a tremendous value for $7.65

Steak burrito was dryer than the Sahara desert. Something in my burrito was colder than Antarctica  (I'm assuming the sour cream or pick de gallo froze in the fridge/freezer?). Tortilla was under cooked, not sure why, there was no rush. Portions were small, not sure why they are rationing the  burrito fixings. Burrito assembler didn't look happy to be employed. Cashier struggled with my egift card.

I went here briefly during a weekend afternoon. I had the egg and cheese croissant with smoked sausage and a nice pumpkin latte. I've never really had anything else at a Dunkin' Donuts aside from free donuts at work. This was my first time having other food and drink there. The iced pumpkin latte was amazing! The croissant sandwich was good too. I only came here at the drive-through though so I can't really give you any insight on what the inside to this location was like. The service at the window was average.

Ordered white meat chicken. Got home and found dark meat even though they asked twice if I wanted white or dark. How hard is it to give A customer what they paid for? When I went in to get my correct order the restaurant was filthy and I am about to look up the report from the health department. It couldn't be good. Perhaps they should wipe the tables once in a while and mop up the spills. Grossly disgusting

Pretty good for a national chain. The food at this location is always nice and hot! I always get the Fish Taco meal, it's my favorite.  Mom alwaya gets one crispy taco, she says their good! They are open 24/7 which is nice because I sleep weird hours usually and I will be hungry at 2am. Be aware that milkshakes aren't available during the wee hours as they are cleaning the machine,  which is really nice to know! Staff here is very nice and friendly! The fries are great,  too! But the best item on their menu is definitely their CHEESEBURGER! Yes, you read that right, amazing cheeseburgers from a taco place.  They are in my Top 3 Cheeseburger Places! Overall, this is a great location, so stop by when you can!


Happy Yelping!!

My experience here has always been a good one. They always overpack my taco salads, which keep me full and I always have leftovers for my next meal. They are generous with their guacamole, this is my favorite. I always get their steak and I believe that it's really good as well. Their staff always moves fast to get the line going. Overall, I really enjoy the food here.

"I'm a fan..." as YELP states, because this is a pit stop from Ventura to Goleta where I attend monthly meetings at 7pm right after I get off work... thus, dinner is needed and this Carl's is right off my exit. Whoohoo! They are speedy, then again there is maybe one other person in their besides my friend and I on a Monday evening. I am a Famous Star Burger (no onions) fan, although I have also thoroughly enjoyed the six dollar burger with bacon. Thank you for being there for me, for if my only option was McDonald's I think I'd rather starve through the 3 hour meetings.

Late in the evening munchies, not much open on 34th but the fast food places..drove through and got their 'Angry Whopper' which is a new item.
It had a bite to it surprisingly.
So far, I've made to 'angry' trips to the bathroom this morning.
Well done Burger King! A product which lives up to its name!

Wow. The other reviewers were definitely right.  I am currently in the drive-thru at kfc it took almost 20 minutes to get to the speaker to order, and the set up is so you cannot get out of line once you pull into the drive-thru, so you're stuck. At the box I asked for an individual combo meal and a chocolate chip cake. it took going back and forth three times of her telling me they do not have that in a combo meal while I stared at the sign advertising it. Finally she said they do have it, but there'd be a 10 min wait on the side I want (no thanks.), and that the chocolate cake is frozen.  I switched my side and said whatever on the cake. She repeated back my simple order, and the chicken, AND the soda were both wrong.    I also completely typed this in the 10-minutes-so-far that I have been sitting here between the speaker and the window. Im not expecting it to get any better from here. Oh, except the side I wanted might be ready, holler!

I ordered a Whopper and a value french fries. . HOW DIFFICULT IS THAT? A WHOPPER AND FRIES! I got my order and there were NO FRIES Give me a break! Maybe the girl who served me should take the black rag off her head and pay more attention to her JOB. This will probably be the last time I buy from this BK.

Also - there were only 3 cars ahead of me in line. Car #1 took 3 minutes to order and 5 minutes to fill the order. I saw only 1 bag of food passed from the window to the driver. What could possibly take so long? I was in  line for 10 minutes.
Tried the hot-ish chicken, complete waste of time and money. $20 for 8 pieces and didnt even get any sides. Had I know it was that expensive I wouldn't have gotten it.  Wont ever eat there again.

I am yet to walk into this location in the past 6 years we've been living in the neighborhood and not have some kind of issue. From not receiving the right items and having to go back, to being told on several occasions that an establishment with chicken in its title has somehow run out of chicken, it's ridiculous. Save time and frustration and head up Cottman to another equally popular chicken joint.
Service is usually mediocre. There's a lot of sista girl attitude in the mornings. Today I asked for sausage and got bacon because the cashier couldn't figure out the keys. At least she was nice.
Twice I had to wait over 20 mins for my food. What is a complicated order? 1 whopper JR & Medium fries. Nothing crazy. If they ask you to pull around to wait..... DONT.

Worst experience out of any Del Taco so far. Most of them seem to be sliding. Ordered  a beef burrito that was way too soupy, the sauce seemed different than others also. Bathroom was a mess... gross. The tables were fairly clean but floor was not and some seats could use a cleaning. The one on the nw side of town is better.

This is one of worst restaurants for service.  It is on my way home, so convenient to pick up dinner for the family.  I will give them an A+ for consistency.  They are constantly out of chicken, they constantly have machinery that doesn't work, they constantly mess up orders, they constantly apathetic about their work.  

Last night we went through the drive-thru and ordered a family meal.  They told me it would be 20 minutes for the extra crispy chicken because they were out.  I went with the Original just to get the order quicker.  When I paid and asked for a receipt, the clerk said the receipt dispenser didn't work.  When I got my order, they didn't give me the complete meal so I had to go around and go inside the store.  Biscuits were depleted as well and they were baking more, which was going to be another 5 minutes baking time, but the chicken they told me they were out of...there was a full tray of it sitting in the warmer.  Not one person apologized for messing up the order or for me having to come back to get what they should have given me in the first place.  I was not happy as I was trying to get home with a hot meal and now I had to pull my child out of the car to go inside and get it straightened out.  

If this had been a one time thing, I can overlook a mistake, but this happens 95% of the time we go there.  So this is the last time we will be visiting this KFC.

Horrible! The chicken was overcooked, dried out, pieces actually had "hard places on them", the biscuits crumbled in your hands due to being so dried out and hard as well. We ordered my daughter something from the Taco Bell Menu, within 1 hour of eating she had what appears to be signs of "food poisoning" . We spent over $27 for food that was terrible! What a poor representation of KFC at this location.
Shame on the workers for even serving such horrible food.

Love love love this location! Plenty of parking on the side..yes, it is always busy in there, but what do you expect? It's awesome food !

The staff is always on point. The food is cooked to perfection, especially the chicken and steak. The white rice ( I haven't tried the brown one yet) , is always fluffy and I mix it with the black beans.

I just wish the customers would put their cellphones away when ordering. I find it rude to the staff who are trying to get everyone fed. A sign would help!
Best flame broiled whopper!  And I rarely eat burgers. The girl at the window was so kind too. Great service.

Cold tortillas, steak, barbacoa, & carnitas with no flavor, & dirty tables. This is what happens when they become so big and quality goes down. And like they say in marketing, great advertising beats a good product anytime.

My first time there. I must say it was very good. Not a lot of options but maybe that is a good thing. Simple. I got the burrito bowl with steak. It was a nice portion and very good. Will need to come back to this place.

Food is typical KFC, but the service here is worse than any other fast food joint around. They rarely have everything on their menu available. They let me place a full drive through order for 6 people to only then tell me they are completely out of Chicken except for Chicken Wings.  How does a KFC run out of Chicken? They have never gotten my order correct on the first try in person or with drive through. I will not go back here and if I need fast food chicken,  I'll go to the Arby's down the street.

I went there five times.   Three of the times they got my order wrong.  The other two, my chicken was obviously made HOURS ago. All the speaking was done in  Spanish, and the attitude was,,,,,,,I don't care,  The rolls were  hard, and COLD, they did not offer honey or butter.         I will go to Churches, or Popeye's........They get it, and Popeye's chicken is amazing,   I LOVED the flavors on KFC chicken recipe. ......but I will never go back three again.....

Stopped by to get a burrito bowl with my wife. The staff prepared our bowls exactly the way we wanted. Got the steak and chorizo bowl with lettuce, cheese, sour cream, hot salsa, fajita vegetables. Delicious!

This the WORSE KFC in Indiana I believe.  Most times I go they are horribly slow and out of grilled chicken.  Today they had grilled chicken and I neglected to check before pulling off.  It looks and tastes like it has been on the grill for days.  Absolutely dried out and burnt taste.  Why it was not pulled I don't know, but this is my LAST time visiting this location.  Then they neglected to give me a receipt so I could review them.  I called REPEATEDLY within fifteen minutes of getting home and  and no one answered the phone when I called.  If it wasn't so far, I would drive and take it back.  I still might.  HORRIBLE!!
I have not had a taco in over 20 years. Just found this one and took my family there. We all loved it! Everything was delicious!

This Chipotle stinks!!!  Second time in a row they forgot something in our meals and I doubled the contents and all of our portions are so tiny!   Paid for double chicken and double steak in two meals - nope missing there is a teaspoon and a half of meat.  Service stinks too.  They take forever and never have our meal ready on time.  Will never ever go here again!

Why Does KFC always sound better than it actually tastes? 

We stopped in for a quick bite on a Saturday and the place was empty. Service was not that great. I asked the cashier if the numbered meals came with a side and her response was a mumbled 'Uh, I think so.' Ummm ok. Thank you for your knowledgeable answer. 

We both ordered the $5 Fill Up. It comes with a selection of main options, a side, a biscuit and a chocolate chip cookie. We both opted for the chicken tenders. They were mostly breading with very little meat inside. The ranch dipping sauce was very bland but the honey mustard was pretty good. I had the mac and cheese which was ok but more cheese than mac. Hubs had the mashed potatoes and gravy. He said it was alright. Biscuits and cookies were just average. Also, the honey sauce that they serve with the biscuits is only 7% honey. Why can't they serve real honey? It keeps forever! 

The store looked clean but the floor mat in front of the drink station was so sticky that my shoes stuck to it. Ughhh, gross. Also the drinks tasted watered down. 

The next time I get a craving for KFC, I need to remind myself that it won't meet my expectations and to go somewhere else.

Chipotle is what I crave these days. 

Its all about the salads! I absolutely love the dressing. I am not a fan of chunks of  raw onion and it in all of their salsas. So for me I get a bed of lettuce with white rice, black beans, chicken & cheese. And then they give you that amazing dressing on the side!!! Its perfect.

If you are not a salad person you can pick from many different options tacos burrito or a burrito bowl. They have chicken steak pork or grilled veggies. They have brown or white rice. And choice of beans, black or pinto. They have 4 different salsas that range from mild to hot. They also have sour cream and guacamole. But the guacamole cost extra. 

They also have chips and salsa or guacamole. And they have the normal 8 fountain Coke machine. I am not a fan of the new 130+ choice ones.  

Hope you enjoy it as much as I am.

I know 5 stars for a Dell Taco might be weird but their veggie burritos are the same at most of their locations.
When you are a vegetarian on the road you look for things that wont make you sick while sticking to a meat free diet!
If  that is not enough the clean well stocked bathrooms is a God send to travelers.

I'm pretty sure the chicken pieces are getting smaller! I guess I won't be coming to KFC anymore for chicken. I can get an 8 pc. chicken at Kroger for 6.99 AND get bigger pieces! KFC is going downhill from what it was years ago!

I've heard the loud din of the Chipotle culture and finally rang the bell by walking in and ordering a carnitas burrito.

For what it is, it is good. I enjoyed my burrito well-enough. I think I'll go with a bowl next time though. The meal was savory, which is what I dig.

I haven't been to this place for awhile so my bf got hungry after work so we went here and order some food. We ordered criss crossed fries with cheese. They gave us 5 pieces of fries with cheese that is on the cardboard box. There is barely any cheese on the fries itself. In my opinion that is ridiculous. Wasted my money and time on this place. I just recommended you guys to check your food while you're there making sure you got what you deserve. Or don't go at all. There is so much better places for fast food and better service. I hate fast food places like this and I would never come back. 0 star.

I was really excited to try Chipotle after hearing so many good things about it, but I was highly disappointed. I went towards the beginning of the dinner rush and the place was already packed with a line back to the door. The employees rushed me through the line with no explanation of any of the options. The food was hard for me to eat. The steak was really chewy and over powered everything else I had. I ended up picking it out so I could taste other things. The guacamole was really good, and I got a good amount for the extra price. The chips were also good with a hint of lime. Overall I wasn't impressed and probably won't be coming back.

I frequent this joint several times a week.  I'm an addict.  I love the steak tacos and corn salsa.  I feel like Norm from Cheers sometimes, because some of the staff know me and know my order when I reach the counter.  The staff are super friendly and go out of their way to ensure customer satisfaction.

I decided to try out their new $5 meal.  

This is a slightly dated, worn looking restaurant.  But don't let that deter you.  The servers were friendly and as prompt as possible. Who ever did the design/work flow never worked there though.  The workers were constantly going all around to complete not only my order but ALL the orders.  

The chicken was good and fresh.  The portion of mashed potatoes was more than enough.  In fact, I was very full for $5.

I haven't been to a KFC in ages but if I go again I'll go here.

On September 15th, I ordered a bowl and a side of chips and guac with their online delivery. This was my second time ordering from this location since moving down here from Chicago a month ago.  Both times my chips have been horribly stale. To the point where the chip bends slightly instead of snapping when I bite down on it. The first time I thought it was just a bad bag, but I got the same stale chips with my meal I ordered on September 15th. I contacted them and spoke with William. He told me they would comp me a meal and hplan apologized, saying there was a new guy working the fryer and he's been having trouble. He told me to say that I spoke to William, and he wrote my name down and said that if anything they can find the paper with my name written down, saying that I have a free meal. Great. I don't have a car, so I walked the 1.5 miles to get my meal today. At the register, a different guy questioned me when I told them I had a free meal and spoke to William (who I'm guessing is another manager). He told me that without a receipt, they won't "just give me a free meal" he ended up calling someone (I'm guessing William), THEN told me that I was only to be comped a carnitas bowl (that's not even what I originally ordered, I don't eat pork...), not the bowl and chips and guac, which was the original order I had complained about and was told I would get a free one. After I tried explaining this to him, he finally and reluctantly giving me my meal. As someone who works in the food industry, this is NOT how you treat your customers. Horrible customer service, and awful tortilla chips (yep, the comp ones I got are ALSO stale). My university's dining hall has higher customer and food quality standards. Guess I'll be saving a couple bucks from now on and will not be returning to this location.

Very poor quality. Mashed  potatoes tasted like flour and was liquid. Checked breast not fully cooked w/very poor breading original. Recipe, green bean tasteless. One order no dipping sauce for Chicken strips and chicken nuggets added did not order.

As a vegetarian/trying to be vegan, I appreciate the customizable bowls. Honestly, bowls and salads confuse me. Bowls have rice and beans on the bottom but you can top with lettuce, salads have lettuce on the bottom but you can top with beans and rice. I guess it depends your layering preference? :) I LOVE the Sofritas. For those who don't know, it is a spicy tofu mix that is vegan and super tasty (a bit rich but yummy). I think meat eaters and people with a tofu hangup would agree it's tasty too. Give it a shot! I always ask for extra black beans, which they're happy to oblige without charging me more or giving me attitude. Sometimes I ask for a couple tortillas on the side too, again they don't charge me. They have hard tacos too, along with quesadillas, soft tacos, and burritos. All good choices but I like the bowls best.

We love chipotle but this location is super unprofessional. They do not have a full menu and their staff is beyond rude. Don't waste your time or money for this mediocre Mexican! The "steak" was nothing but gristle!
And why is it that every other chipotle location offers a military discount but this one does not!

Haven't been here in YEARS! I was driving home and in the mood for some quick chicken, so we stopped. I was surprised with all the changes KFC has made to their menu and food options. We got the chicken tenders boxes with coleslaw, mac and cheese, and potato wedges. 

For a $5 box it is a lot of food. I upgraded to the bigger box that included the extra side and popcorn chicken. it was like $7. I was pleasantly surprised by the quality and quantity of food that we received. I'm not a big fast food guy but every now and then you gotta cheat. 

I have ALWAYS loved their coleslaw. I was also impressed with how clean the Willingboro KFC was. The manager was working with someone on the phone on fixing one of the ovens or warmers and seemed very involved. The lady at the register was also very friendly. Very happy with my service, food, and experience. Good Job!

I just moved across the street and was hoping this would be my go to when I'm looking for a quick meal, but I'm not sure.  First of all, they don't offer the Sofritas that most Chipotles offer (Tofu instead of meat).  Second, they all were sooo rushed that they were just sloppy, and I'm not sure why since it really wasn't that busy.  One girl reached over my husband's bowl to put beans on the bowl in front of us and in the process her apron completely dipped in the bowl (which already had rice and beans); then she did it again.  The guy that wrapped my burrito didn't completely cover it with foil, leaving it exposed so that several ingredients fell into the bag on my way home.  Everyone seemed overwhelmed, and again, it wasn't that busy. Lastly, the steak was tough and fatty.   I'll try it again, hopefully it was an off night, but so far I'm not impressed.
Not the best service but I love Del taco.  Whenever I ask for extra cheese, it seems they give me none.   :(  still addicted to their food tho!
My donut-loving husband and I can eat here together because I can order my healthier option: egg white, turkey sausage, cheese on flat bread. Love it!

There is one guy that I see all the time. He is very courteous, hustles the kitchen along and goes out of his way to say thanks. Food is like it is supposed to be and the order is correct. So, yes, this is a five star Hardee's
Seriously $3.99 for one chicken breast! Never going back. Not ever ! By the way, wearing a hoodie over your uniform with the hood up looks pretty unprofessional.

Zero stars. What a joke. Simple 8 piece bucket dinner turned into a clusterf$@.  Everything was wrong and I must have had a mutated chicken since mine came with 4 wings.  Called the kfc cares line...let me save you some time. KFC does not care.  Manager of store never called back, area manager has NO authority to give refunds and Jamie Hodges - the supposed director of operations - has no tact and no customer service skills. Worst experience.  Go ANYWHERE else.

This KFC does not even deserve 1 star. I asked for grilled chicken thighs and was told they had none and was given two burnt dried out drumsticks. I also asked for mashed potatoes no gravy and no biscuit. Guess what. They put gravy on and put biscuit on chicken. I did not realize until I got home. My mistake. 
  I should have known by the empty parking lot at 5:00 PM.

UGH!  I decided to stop by & pick up pot pies for dinner.  It was 4 o'clock on a Monday night.  I pulled into the drive through.  There were no pot pies ready.  I understood that.  Too late for lunch & too early for dinner.  I was told that if I waited 10 minutes that I would have piping hot pot pies.  I hesitated, but thought it would take 10 minutes to go somewhere else.  I agreed to wait and drove to the designated area.

After 20 minutes, I went into the store to see where my order was.  There were no customers in the store - yet it took a few more minutes for anyone to acknowledge me.  Finally the person behind the chicken counter told me she would be right with me.  A young man came out of the office & goes straight to the lady behind the chicken counter.  The lady who took my order came out of the office a little while later & when I asked her about my pot pies....she told me they just finished.  She proceeded to tell me that something happened with the first batch and had to make more.

If that were truly the case - someone should have come out to tell me.  There were no other customers & at least 3 employees working.  I think they just forgot.  It would have been nice had they just owned up to it.  

This was the longest "fast food" order I have ever experienced & I will NOT be making the mistake of going there again! 

UGH!

I'm sure I should be ashamed of saying this but, "Chipotle is one of my favorite restaurants".  It's consistently good and I can get down with their approach to quality food. Also, they have two vegetarian options including Sofritas which is a mix of peppers and tofu and also a vegetable mix of grilled peppers and onions. The best part? They have margaritas! Now the margaritas are the only thing I've ever ordered from Chipotle that lack consistency but I suspect that is because they are a new menu item. The first time I ordered a margarita is was fresh, the second time tasted more like a mix. Regardless, you just can't beat ethically produced food that taste good...and margaritas.

Updating review as I have discovered the thing to order here are the carnitas burrito bowls. Always fast service and consistent. My wife and I both get lost much here 1-2 times a month. Only downside is the $2 charge for guacamole. I understand an extra charge, but $2 seems high for the amount they give.

Great customer service! Made us very comfortable for our first visit! Food was great too. Steak/guacamole bowl and 2 kids steak meals every one was pleased. Seating isn't great but you can get it to go or eat outside.
I love their salads! Their food is so fresh and delicious. The steak is very good, and I'm not much of a steak person. We usually get takeout, as it's usually crowded when we go.

One day Dad and my Grandmother 'MeMe' and two of my brothers were driving in Kentucky and stopped in at a Kentucky Fried Chicken for lunch. And to our surprise Colonel Sanders himself was there. It was there  grand opening. These days I like the double down.

I'm not sure what's going on with Chipotle, but for the past few years, every one I've been to seems to not be as fresh as it used to. I ordered a burrito bowl with the carnitas and lettuce thinking it'd be more like a salad, but instead I got a soup. There was so much of the pork juice in my bowl that everything ended up getting soggy as I ate it. Also, the guac is just not as fresh or flavorful as it once was and the chips are always stale. I won't ever eat at a Chipotle again unless they step up their game.

I've been to Chipotle once when it first opened on Westshore.  I don't remember being a huge fan, but I figured I'd give it another whirl when my co-workers suggested it for lunch.  

The parking lot was packed at lunch and we almost drove off before finally finding a spot.  The restaurant was so loud that I could barely hear what the employees behind the counter were saying.  I decided to go with the steak and brown rice burrito bowl and added guacamole.  

I ordered a drink with my steak bowl and accidentally made it into a meal with chips and salsa.  (I could not hear what the cashier was saying and just nodded yes.) The total bill was over $12!!!  I could have went to Miguels for a few more dollars and had a much better meal!

I was not a fan of the steak.  The steak was tough and overcooked and I didn't care for the meat seasoning.  The guacamole was terrible, which was a shame since I paid extra for it. The flavors only got worse as I continued to eat the bowl. Finally I had to throw away the bowl because the food was starting to make me gag.

There are better and cheaper Mexican restaurants in Tampa. I won't be back.

This is the dirtiest Del taco ever. I took my son to the bathroom to wash up before we eat. There was no soap. We told the fatty behind the counter that they were out and they promptly did nothing. It took 12 minutes to get our food. Way to long for there only being 4 other people there. Tacos and cheeseburger were good though. Yeah chicken soft tacos!! By the time we left "30 min" still no soap in the restroom. Makes you wonder about the clenliness of the employees!!!
Great management and customer service! I had to wait a few extra minutes for the steak to be cut for my bowl and they gave me complimentary guacamole.

For me the location of this KFC seems a bit odd.  You know, typically you find fast food in groups of  2-4  near each other.  This one is kind of by itself at the intersection of Big Bend and Shrewsbury.  Other than that its a normal KFC.  The chicken satisfies that craving.  Last time I went they were very generous with the portion size of the potato wedges which was nice because the meals are kind of expensive (for fast food).  I think we spent like $19 for two value meals and an extra chicken strip for the baby.  They were fast with the order and friendly enough (I mean it is fast food and the bar is pretty low).  I would go here again if the craving strikes but nothing is so good that I wouldn't be open to other chains.

What can I say, it's Del Taco. Foods always seem to be fresh and tasty. ALways friendly staff, clean dining area. Has about 4 tables outside to eat at. If you are traveling on Hwy 80 in the East part of Reno Sparks, it is very easy to get to, just off the freeway.

Wasn't expecting anything special, but learned that there are no chicken pot-pies available at this location.

If you've never had one, they are great!

Never had an issue with this location! It's hard to believe that any KFC would run out of chicken, especially on several occasions. Anyway, if I had some kind of an issue each time I visited this KFC, I doubt that I would keep returning for six years.
This use to be a great place but they never have what I want ie..pot pies the chicken is always dry as hell and omg the wait in drive thru ...i no longer come here I go on 21st street ...

The staff here is always friendly and has come to know me on a first name (if not menu item) basis. The big fat breakfast taco combo is a hearty meal with hash browns and a medium soda priced at just $3.98. The bathrooms are always very clean and one of the staff members seems to always be cleaning something every morning. They have earned a loyal customer.

This cornerstone of the Soho scene is always bustling with activity. Mixed in a strip of stores, the Chipotle is on the end of a long line of restaurants and other speciality and service stores.
