This particular store is high volume but the staff is able to handle the customer load very well and keep the ordering line moving and customers out the door. Always pleasant and fast with their tasks, the food line is faced paced and the staff get you on your way with your food selections. There is ample indoor and some outdoor seating at the front of the store adjacent to the parking lot and sidewalk. 

I feel that Chipotle is modern fast food with quality ingredients. I particularly like that the new "No GMO" food policy they've instituted which means that they serve certified non-GMO ingredients to their consumers. I particularly am a fan of their salad bowls which are super customizable and can include any toppings they have, including the sautéed vegetables. I typically get lettuce and a little brown rice and either the barbocoa, steak, or sofritos. Everything I've ever gotten is fresh tasting and visually appealing. I think for the quality and value the prices are worth it. Some people gripe about the $1.95 charge for guacamole considering other restaurants include that in their entrees but that's not my style. Don't get what you can't afford :)

November 24, 2012 Saturday - lunch 2:30 PM
2 adults

Atmosphere - 4 stars
Food - 3 stars
Service - 4 stars

Background - Quick bite after shopping for a bit.

Atmosphere - Almost to sterile in there.

Food
  Appetizer - none

  Main Course - I ordered a #3 combo, signs everywhere saying the numbers changed. So I do not know what it was before.  I normally order the macho combo burrito, but wanted something lighter.  The chicken burrito was good until I found a small bone in it.  It is not like the local Del Taco knew it was there.  They probably got a bag of chicken from their distributor.  So I did not bother the staff with the problem, chicken, it happens.  But the best thing about the meal is the crinkle fries.  I am so hooked on those fries.

  Dessert - Lunch typically I do not and I am not feeling it.

Service - A little slow today, for a late lunch they were busy.

Future - Probably here or other locations, but probably will got back with ordering the ground beef choices in the future.

So this is the second time I have ever been to Chipotle. It has been a few years and my first time at this location. 

I recently watched the story of Chipotle and the reason for the metal tables are because that was what they could afford when they started, with no intention of expanding the way they have. I assume they kept the look with a few modern touches. As far as it being loud and the line that may wrap around closely to the tables is not ideal, but let's face it, you're not really coming here for some fine dining experience. You come for the good, non-GMO, unprocessed foods, which is pretty awesome to have around. Just have to watch for the sodium intake, because even though it is better for you than mostly all fast food chains, you still have to watch how much you're eating. You get a hefty portion for cheap. 

It was dinner time on a Saturday and the line was to the entrance, and we waited about 15 minutes to order. Within a few minutes we sat down to eat (no trouble with the service line), finished our food in less than 10 minutes and we were out the door to catch a flick. 

I tried the sofritas, tofu with a blend of spices. It is very tasty, and light. I'll probably start coming to Chipotle over Pancheros from now on.

I want some snack after the exercise. It is also the football Monday night. So I decided something quick with wings. I think Kentucky fried chicken may be a good choice. 

Recently they have the $10 bucket with a choice of fried chicken, popcorn chicken or wings. I have selected the wings. The drive through is easy since there was no one in front of me. I got my order in two minutes. Nothing better than that. 

The wings are fried correctly. Occasionally the have thick crust. The wings is a bit small compared to many wing place. I have 12 wings for $10 and with tax is about $0.90 per wing. It is average cost. In compared to I have Dry Rub wing for $0.80. I would said this is a three stars.

When: March 6
Why: Traditional Sunday Dinner

We decided we wanted to have a traditional Sunday dinner, so we choose fried chicken. It is amazing how a television commercial promoting 10 pieces for $10 pushes you over the edge. (Next Sunday, I'm cooking a pot roast myself.)

I remember when all KFC had was the original flavor. Now you get to choose between, original, crispy and grilled.  We mixed our bucket with original and crispy. For an extra $6, I got to add two sides and four biscuits. I love the Cole Slaw. In fact I have been know to buy large containers, place in a "cover dish" and take it to a pot luck picnic.
We selected Mash Potatoes as our other side, fried chicken and MP's just seem to go together. I'd prefer a nice white milk gravy, but their brown is seasoned well. 

What made this KFC stand out was the customer service. The young ladies behind the counter were cheerful and actually seemed to be enjoying their job. Brad loves thighs so I asked the young lady if she could  make sure we got two thighs in each flavor. She giggled at the way I asked her and said she'd do her best. I didn't care what the other six were as long as he had his thighs. She made it happen.

For those of you who are doing math and figuring 10 pieces is a lot for two people, don't worry. Four pieces were left over for lunch the next day.

New-ish Chipotle right on Drexel's campus. It was pretty clean, and the service was friendly and pretty fast.

I've been doing the Whole30 program, and Chipotle is one of the few chains where it is pretty easy to dine out and be Whole30 compliant.

My go-to Whole30 order is: lettuce bowl with Carnitas (only protein that is W30 compliant, double if need be), mild & medium salsas, and guacamole. It's actually delicious AND you don't end up feeling bloated and weighed down (like you might with a burrito).

I like this place. Indeed, the staff is friendly and they always satisfy my urge for a tasty burrito, especially the 1/2 lb bean and cheese one. Tacos are good too, much better than Taco Bell (and cheaper too), but I stay clear of their chili fries.
One lady who works there is so awesome every time I pull up, always makes my day.
The cheap, delicious Del Taco tacos you know and love, served quick and friendly.  I could eat 50,000 of these things.
5 stars based on Del Taco to Del Taco comparison. Fast and friendly service. The tortillas are better and fresher than most full service Mexican Restaurants around town.

If you want Mexicanish food on the cheap and in a hurry it's tough to beat your local Del Taco. Is it great food?  No. It is, however a solid value and pretty tasty. Breakfast served all day is a plus and the value menu iced coffee is surprisingly enjoyable. As a bonus, it's never sent me to the hospital so that's worth something, right?

Mildly impressed as an avid chipotle goer. The employees divvy out guac like it's coming out of their paychecks and we were able to pull pieces of onion out of our guac that were easily the size of a piece of steak. One person even tried to give me the last scoop of watery Piccio without changing it out. They were also out of bottled water (heard there is a shortage of bottled water -__- ). I'll revise my review upon my next visit. Let's get it together chipotle.

i am a regular at Chipotle, I eat there 2-3 days a week due to my busy schedule not being able to cook a healthy meal every night. Me and my roommate ordered our usual bowls at chipotle tonight and took 3 bites and had to throw them away because the meat was so gross. I got half chicken half steak, and she got chicken. The chicken was brown and the steak was so chewy. I found a lot of fatty pieces that I had to spit out also. I am extremely disappointed being that I eat here so often and rarely have problems, and also disappointed that i wasted money and had to end up throwing my food away.

I went here for a steak burrto bowl for dinner it was horrible. The meat was full of fat and the people waiting on me had no idea what they were doing...put way to much hot sauce did not ask me. No body in charge in this location. Never again.

Consistently delicious and fresh. Staff is friendly, but not passionate about excellent customer service. 

I'm a huge fan of the steak entrees. Sometimes steak isn't the leanest cut. Rest of options have tons of flavor.

I hate this frikin KFC with the passion. Every time I come here, they are always out of something, specially around 7:30. Always out of pot pies, sweet tea and extra crispy chicken. The teenies they have working there are rude and poorly trained. They need a complete overhaul of their employees and I would not miss it, if they closed the doors permanently.

Needing to find a quick lunch prior to a doctor's appointment, I opted to try Del Taco for the first time.  I had the 2 for $5 8 layer veggie burrito.  I was surprised when I got the order as they were huge!  I could only eat 1 and take the second home for dinner.  They tasted very good and with a touch of hot sauce it was a perfect lunch. The dining room is clean, nothing special about the decor.  The hot sauce is available at each table, which is nice.  Prices are reasonable and the cashier was ready to take my order and the order was ready very quickly.  I enjoyed my meal and I'll be back.  They just need a little extra parking.

I've gotten carryout from this KFC location maybe two dozen times -- I really enjoy the grilled chicken and in my book, KFC's mashed potatoes & gravy is amongst the best comfort foods ever.

This KFC is clean and the service has always been fast and courteous.

The only things to watch out for are (1) if you show up after maybe 7:00 in the evening, there never seems to be any white meat chicken available and (2) make sure to check your order BEFORE you drive off -- last night I ordered a grilled chicken meal (GRL was clearly printed on my receipt) but when I got home and opened the box I discovered that I'd been given extra crispy instead.

How do you make nachos and quesadillas inedible?  How does a place take melted cheese, tortillas and a few toppings and make 2 people beg to throw up so they can feel better? 

Not sure, but after picking up dinner from this Del Taco on 7/5, we were the ones asking and begging. 

Food tasted soured and old, neither of us managed more than 3 bites and threw the rest away.  Tea was bitter and had a metallic taste as well.  

Ive eaten some terrible food but this was by far the worst I've ever put in my mouth and spit back out.

Only getting one star, simply so I can review it and warn others to stay away.

The second star is being generous. There have been several times where they asked us to wait on food only to have been forgotten. When you do finally get your food it's not everything you ordered. Chicken is normally dried out, and the service is ridiculously poor.

I saw the bad reviews before going to this location, but I thought, eh it can't be that bad. I was wrong. This KFC location is horrible. I only got half of my order that I paid for. They literally replaced one of the pieces of chicken with a piece of wing. Food was soggy. Didn't give us to cookies, potato wedges, etc that we ordered. Employees were so rude. Get your food somewhere else folks.

We LOVE Del Taco, always better then Taco bell in the long run but night shift is lazy and RUDE! If you go pass 1030 (they close at midnight) you are NOT getting fresh food and they will NOT make new if they don't have any left over beef you're not getting anything beef! If its 1140... CLOSED! You can be in line too don't matter you pull to the speaker and it says to come back during open hours and now you're trapped in! Food at night sucks! Really disappointed tonight my chicken burrito didn't have avocado had guacamole... and nothing else but beans and rice!!  Churro hard no sugar dry tasteless !

Visited the Drive thru at 10:40am store hours says drive thru and lobby open at 10:30am. Called inside of the store at 10:44am spoke with a employee and she said they are open but they don't have no chicken ready. That would mean that you are closed. Your main dish is chicken so how would you even be open. Just poor customer service.

I wish my first visit to Dunkin' Donuts didn't have to be my last for a very long time. They don't have any locations nearby home! And going to the Philippines is out of the question; I keep hearing it's on every block over there. I kept comparing DD to Krispy Kreme since that's where most in my area resort to for sugar fixes. DD dozens are so much cheaper! $9 for an assorted dozen versus $11 and the sizes all vary. The original glazed is big and the traditional cake smaller as expected. My favorites were the powdered chocolate creme filled, chocolate long John, rainbow sprinkles with orange glaze, and the manager's special on 10/24/15: chocolate cake with maple frosting. The one thing I love about Dunkin' Donuts is they aren't as sweet as KK! I also like how they had a variety of cake doughnuts, such as regular, glazed blueberry, and glazed pumpkin. Too bad the frosted/drizzled pumpkin square and Reese's PB square are considered two doughnuts each. I only had one selection left for my dozen so I left without the pumpkin one. 

Service is fantastic! The lady that took my order was super informative and gave me her opinions on particular doughnuts. Ordering is different too. I had to pay before I chose what doughnuts to put in the box, instead of picking them out and then paying.

They sell breakfast items too! With meat! I saw sausage and biscuit sandwiches on the menu. They put muffins and bagels in the same area as doughnuts. Kinda got me confused when I tried to count how many different kinds they had that day. I forgot to choose the Boston creme pie flavor because I was so overwhelmed! By 5pm they had already run out of the Bavarian? custard filled one, to my aunt's dismay. 

Well, the strawberry iced one just tasted like strawberry cream from a Yan Yan snack. I tried a blueberry cake munchkin (donut hole) and strawberry jelly filled one, pretty good! I've seen lots of commercials about their iced coffees. Maybe one day I'll try one? The pink seating is so retro chic!

Second time here in Tampa disappointed with chipotle. if you say you're open till 10. I ordered on line sound 9pm for a 9:30 pick up. Got there 9:23. So be open till 10 and be prepared to serve the food that you promise on your menu that I ordered whether online or in person. Host was not helpful in making me feel ok with no guacamole. I wouldn't have ordered and made other plans if I had known. instead of being apologetic she was trying to control the conversation with an ultimatum type discussion, not impressed. manager where are you? you need to be there an hour before and until close. Last time at another location out or carnitas and lettuce and we were met with a similar attitude. The girl who put the bowls together was very nice.

Went to Del Taco to order a Fresca bowl... WELL LET ME TELL YA, the avocado was yellow and hard. Was that corn???? I don't know! Not to mention the beans! THE BEANS WERE CRUSTY. Fresca bowl more like crusty bowl haha..

Quite possibly the worst whopper I've had.
Was on the Westbank with only a bit of time for eats, so I went to the drive thru and got a lopsided, poorly constructed Whopper. 
Come on, people.... IT'S A WHOPPER!!! 
YOU CAN DO BETTER!!

I'm always impressed with Dunkin Donuts as they don't just serve donuts anymore. I always enjoy hot breakfast. The sausage and egg croissant with has browns and coffee was very filling. Getting through the drive through was quick and the staff was friendly. I would say that I wish there were more low calorie options. There was one lower calorie option but I would like to see more so I won't indulge in the other delicious goodness. I would definitely attend again!

I've gone here a probably 5 times and the first few times it was just okay. The service always seemed slow and rushed even if wasn't very crowded. Taco Bell handles comparatively more traffic gracefully. 

This time, it was gross. We went through the drive thru, as there was no line, but our service was even worse. We asked for two bacon egg and cheese on a plain bagel. Both came cold and with sausage instead of bacon. The bagel tasted hard and stale. We would have gone back but we were already on the highway heading out of town. 

We asked for five donuts and they came in small bag, and the donuts were just thrown in there. Look at this donut. Chocolate. Everywhere. And best of all, not a single napkin.

I want to start by saying that I do, really love Dunkin' Donuts. I try to include praise with my criticism regardless of what I may be discussing so please read till the end. For this location, 3 stars is kinda generous for how it's been (lately). I really wanted to rate it 2 stars but it was much better a few months ago and I'm holding out hope that it can improve again and if it does I will make sure to re-review it with a better rating. There was one girl working at this location who was BAMAZING. But she left (J lo we miss you baby come back) :( since then (about three months?) it's been really hit or miss (mostly miss) here. Ordering breakfast sammiches, you are likely going to be told that they are out of a lot of options, example: if you want a plain bagel, often they will be out and give you other options for bread, like croissants, English muffin etc. I ordered a Ham & egg the other morning and got a sausage croissant, which was fine but not really what I was wanting, or ordered. Depending on who makes the iced lattes, sometimes there is almost no ice, drink still relatively warm, and a few times have been no milk added, just black iced coffee with chocolate syrup added- Which is also yummy too so it's fine but I just feel like there is a huge lack of consistency when it comes to ordering/preparing/fulfilling the customers orders. 

There are also a lot of reviews stating that they are out of specific options when it comes to donuts- this is relatively true for me because about 50% of the time they never have lemon donuts- which is fine cause other ones are super tasty too. I never order specific flavors except I try for lemon when I can, I just do assorted 1/2 dozen or 1 dozen and tell them to surprise me, so I can't say or certain if this is an issue with other types/flavors as well.

The only other big issue I have is the other day we saw the assistant manager refilling a drink dispenser with her bare hands after touching her face and wiping her hands repeatedly on her jeans as she was training someone new. She should have been wearing gloves so that kinda grossed me out. (There are some employees here that are still excellent, the gentlemen with dark hair at the drive through was polite and agreed she should have been wearing gloves when we brought that to his attention so props to him!) 

Their ham egg & cheese croissant sammiches are super yummy, and my best friend really enjoys their bacon egg & cheese (at least I think so 'cause he eats them like 3 days a week) and I have never had an issue with the quality of their food/donuts. Always taste fresh and yummy no matter what. 

All of that being said, it has been frustrating how much this locations quality of staff has declined but I have high hopes that it can improve again.

The word "chicken" is LITERALLY in the name and they had. No. Chicken.  None.  How is this place even in business?  We have tried this place 5 or so times in 20 years and out of those times, 3 times no chicken, one time closed due to sewer back up and one time we did get chicken.  As stated by another reviewer, there isn't much in our area.  Too bad they suck so hard.  0/10, wont try again.

I LOVE Chipotle.... but this location needs to get their act together. It sucks because its the closest one to me, but dang this place needs better staff or management or something. After 4 visits like this, I HAD to write a review.
They are constantly out of big items like black beans, guacamole and steak. As I am writing this,  I am sitting at a table waiting for them to cook steak....yet again. They are always out of these items, why do they not prepare for this to happen?? They also ALWAYS fail at rolling my burrito. Every. Single. Time. They either break it or need to use another tortilla. Doesn't anyone know how to roll a burrito anymore??? So disappointed. And hangry, very hangry.

This was my first experience with Chipotle. I will start with the good:  The servers were very friendly. That's about it for the good. The food was ok.  My husband got the steak burrito and almost half of his meat had gristle in it.  YUCK!  The hot sauce was waaayyy too spicy.  It cost us almost $20 for lunch without chips or any guacamole. I had the barbacoa burrito.  I enjoyed the meat, but the burrito overall wasn't very flavorful.  I added some chipotle tobasco and it helped it. If my friends wanted to go back, I would probably go, but I will not be suggesting this as my choice.  There are too many other options in cool springs with better food.  For the money, I would rather go to Chuys.

On March 9, 2019,  at 5:20pm, I placed my order, a 16 piece original family meal.  I recognized that it was busy and knew there would  be some what of a wait.  At 5:45pm I placed another order for hot peppers, at which time the cashier (female)told me it wouldn't be much longer for my order.  At 6:05, I ordered a drink, at this time the cashier (male) stated that my order will be coming up soon.  At 6:25pm I hear a crew member say we are waiting on original chicken.  As soon as the chicken comes out, I see the crew member completing other people orders, but never minds.  So at 6:40pm I ask for a refund!! I told the manager that I have been waiting for 1 1/2 hours for my order, the manager said my order was given to someone else!!!  How??? I was right up front and never heard my order called!! Bad customer service!!!

Treated with such disrespect in the drive through. All I managed to get out was, "I'd like to order an 8 piece dark meat only..." 
I was interrupted with "I need to see if we even have that..." (what?  5 pm and you are out of chicken??) then dead silence for over 5 minutes. I then said "hello?"  She came back said the same thing then rudely said "go ahead with your order." I began again. She cut me off to ask me my 3 sides. I said that only comes with two. She mentioned a special going on (wasn't mentioned until this point). I ask for one coleslaw and two green beans. She said she can't let me have two of the same sides. By now I'm frustrated. I said , "I don't need the special I just want the two sides- green beans and coleslaw." (Note that I don't like the other sides).  I should mention I was also going to order a drink, chocolate cake and pot pie;  her response to me not wanting the special was "fine your total is ???, pull around. Then she was gone. I said, "excuse me, I wasn't finished?"  She said, "well what ELSE do you want?"  I said, "you know what, I'm not ordering from here. Never mind. " exhascerbated, I pulled around and dialed a manager. She sounded like the same girl, very young.  She wanted me to leave my car and come inside so they could take care of my order. I had NO desire to walk in that place. Offer to walk me out a coupon or apologize and tell me you'll talk to your employee...but let me inconvenience myself even more?  Texas KFCs are not this way.  This entire situation was CRAP.  Customer service is not the goal in this location.  The customer is definitely an inconvenience to them.

Came in on a Sunday 12/9/18 and there were three workers just standing there. There were no customers at the time and they obviously saw us walking up but no even a "hi" or greeting. They literally just stood there and stared at us from behind the counter. Whatever, these are kids who obviously cannot manage themselves. But get this, there was sign stating there was no steak or chicken available! No wonder why there was no one in the store. Ughhhh when something like this happens, the first thing you do is tell the customer. They neither greeted nor let us know about the chicken/steak.

Kinda hard to write fast food reviews. I mean, its fast food. Some are better than others and almost all are hit or miss.
This Del Taco is no exception. Sometimes the food is good and made with care. Other times it looks like they handed it to a hungry pit bull before they wrapped it up.
Staff has always been friendly with me. Food prices are on the same plain as other fast food in the area.

You don't expect GREAT service with fast food, but eye contact would be nice. We went here about a month ago through the drive thru and it was terrible. Food was cold, lady was rude. Exceptionally rude.
My husband did the survey and we got a whopper ticket.
So sure...try again.
9pm...half the restaurant blocked to clean. Three counter people, not one hello.
The unpleasant lady sat at the computer and just stared.
She barked at one of the younger girls but that was about it.
Struggled with the coupon code. Spent five minutes talking to the computer. Finally laughed at least.
Burgers were cold, onion rings terrible.
If it's empty,  how about not making food to sit and get cold.
This establishment truly needs to talk about customer service to their people. 
Smile, greet and ask people how they can help.
I love Burger King...this was thee WORST experience ever. I can't try again, this is two strikes your out.

So, how often are you amazed by service at a fast food restaurant?  I was at this KFC.  So here is the story, I ordered my bucket of chicken (gotta love it), but was asked if I minded waiting 7min for it.  I said no, was told one of the fryers were down, then the cashier handed me a large soda for free due to the wait.  After my 7 min. I went to the counter to pick up my food, I was met by one of the nicest food service employees ever.  She was very kind, police, and funny.  Walking out I passed another employee who was very cordial.  I got home, order was correct and the food was good.  A great and unexpected experience!
The DelTacos seemed to much better then Taco Bells reg tacos...  I really like the Macho Beef Burrito. its HUGE!

I used to love Chipotle; so much so that I bought some CMG shares a few years ago. But this is the worst location I have ever visited. First time there, I found a chunk of uncooked pork in my carnitas burrito. Next time, after deciding to give them a chance at redemption, the restaurant was out of a few key ingredients. How does that happen with such a limited, specific menu?! An obvious sign of mismanagement, which explains the uncooked meat received on my first visit - nobody is watching the store!! It looks like it's being run by unsupervised college students. I will not visit again. And if I experience anything like this at any other other Chipotle location, I'm selling my stock. What a disappointment, I used to really love this company.

Wasn't as good as I expected.   Had a burrito,  chips salsa guacamole and queso sauce.The queso seemed to be a cheeses sauce thickened with flour.   Guacamole did not disappoint and the steak burrito was good.  Had fajita veggies and no rice or beans on the burritos.

Stopped in last night and was pleasantly surprised. I originally went to Popeyes, but they were out of chicken and it was a 9 minute wait for more?

I hadn't been to this KFC in probably three years because it was always so screwed up.  They've upgraded the interior and the quality was damn good for a change. Sides of potatoes and cole slaw seemed larger than in the past and were pretty good. Chicken was perfect. 

I'll probably be coming back.

I love Chipotle and I eat at a restaurant at least once a month if not more. My experience at this Chipotle tonight was such a disappointment. I always get a steak burrito bowl and I know portions vary from time to time server to server but my bowl tonight was so skimpy that I feel completely cheated. I did not even receive a whole spoonful of rice and while I understand if I get a little less meat than usual that's ok but rice is such a low cost filler. I received very tiny portions of everything and it's annoying to have to ask for more for every item you want especially when there's a super long line. It's very inefficient. Most of the other customers I saw in line got very small meals too. Ugh especially with the price increase I do not need my portions decreased by more than half of what I usually get. I finished the entire bowl and was still hungry. Very disappointing and I won't be going back to this one. Skip this Chipotle and go to other Chipotles that have much better service and portions.

Went to Hardee's set in the lobby lady was snoring as we're eating our food she was a worker sleeping in the booth and my taco shells are stale do not want to go back for a while really don't even want to give a star but it made me.

Second and last time I have been to Chipotle..Burrito with about a tablespoon and a half of steak and chicken $14 dollars ouch! had to ask for more cheese as the guy like does a cheese dust and that is it! Place is NOT clean and the hired help...well...guess you get what you pay for..DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS PLACE!! Actually feeling a bit nauseous! Let's get real..I am embarrassed to pay $14 for burrito

y'all really skimped out on my rice.. EVERY CHIPOTLE GIVES WAY TOO MUCH RICE BUT YOU DIDNT GIVE ME MUCH. you also didn't give me a real amount of steak.. plus it was burnt. YOU ALSO did not give me enough cheese, corn, or lettuce. If i'm gonna pay near 12 dollars for a steak bowl and a drink THEN I BETTER GET A FULL AMOUNT OF FOOD. i used to work at a chipotle and this is simply a disgrace. 

note to other costumers: if you're in the area and you're carnivorous then don't go to chipotle, try five guys :(

Food tonight was horrible. The rice was undercooked to the point that it was crunchy, they didn't even have season rice just plane white/ brown rice, they were out of almost everything. No corn, cheese,carnitas, beef, regular rice etc. If you wanna go to a good chipotle, the one by the outlet mall is excellent.

Got the steak burrito with fajitas and corn in it. The corn, fajitas, and guacamole are now served cold here. By the time my burrito got to me and I sat down to eat it the steak was lukewarm. Literally nearly cold. Do not get cold ingredients or it will ruin your meal. Unless they served the meat below the proper temperature? Either way, this isn't being served correctly.

On 7/4/19 @ 0929 our food & experience were nasty. Food was not fresh. Buns were hard on our Whopper's. The crispy taco's looked like someone went to Jack N the Box to buy them and then sold them to is from BK. The customer service was horrible. Again, if you cant or dont want to consistently provide good customer service then DONT work in customer service related jobs. NO customer wants to ever feel like they are not welcomed, wanted or a bother to the staff.... This was such a completely different experience that we had our first time here that we cant & dont want to recommend this location. We'll be dinning elsewhere from now on.

I truly wish I could give this Chipotle location zero stars and I really love Chipotle. I've been to this location several times and each experience is worse than the last - I've decided I will not return after this last time here. 

The service is terrible - everyone looks angry and unpleasant like they don't want to be there, they slop the food around like a school cafeteria and they rarely refill the food containers until they are scraped empty. The tables are never wiped clean and there's usually trash all over the place. 

When I was here I noticed that the chicken in my bowl was raw - not just one piece a little pink but like all of it was obviously uncooked so I told the staff behind the counter and they gave me a new bowl with carnitas instead but continued to serve the same chicken to other customers... I was shocked. 

Management here really seems like they do not care about the restaurant which is so unusual for a Chipotle. The brand is all about high quality but this location is just low quality all around.

Where do I start?? What a horrible dining experience. The place literally has no decorum. Like a sterile jail. 

So I wanted to order a steak bowl. The server put one spoonful of meat, so I had to ask for double. It was around 4, but the containers were almost empty so everything was scraped off the bottom for my order. I remember it being good and fresh the last time I was there (five years ago) so I didn't mind. Except for the meat part. Why are they so skimpy with the portions?

No guacamole, no sour cream, but it still came to 15 dollars with a drink. I was going to eat some there because I wanted to taste it while it was warm. 

Yuck. Barely warm. It also seems they are using a lower cut of steak. No seasoning, no flavor. Do they taste the food they cook? The vegetables were chewy, not crunchy. No seasoning in the beans, like they were straight out the can. Thank heavens for Tabasco sauce, because it literally had no flavor save for the ton of cilantro in the tomato salsa.

Wow. What once was a decent place, is less than mediocre now. Either that, or they need someone that can cook with seasonings.  

One star. A solid one star. I didn't even take a photo. Thank heavens a bunch of authentic Mexican food places are starting to open up near there. With Mexican cooks, so you get the real deal. Steer clear of this place.
We went for chicken last night and they did not have any ready. This is not the first time.  Would not recommend.

there's a time their chicken taste so good so fresh, and most of the time taste like shit!! stale and old!! please the manager of this store can you make sure just how many months you guys change the oil in the fryer???come on people expect to eat good chicken here ...
Horrible Service waited half an hour in line to be interrupted by an online Order, then they ran out of steak and when they restocked I was ignored. I just left. It was ridiculous.

I'll admit I'm Mexican and love me some Chipotle.  I know it's not the most authentic, but God I love the steak they put in their burritos.  Plus you can load it with a lot of things and nearly all of those things are fresh and yummy.  It is decently priced and pretty clean.  Also, the people that work here are really friendly and are quick even when the place is packed.  Definitely my favorite Chipotle in Tucson.

I had an excellent meal here the other night. I ordered a salad with steak, black beans, fajita veggies, corn salsa, and pico salsa. My bowl came out hot and more importantly, fresh. All of the ingredients were cooked correctly and seasoned perfectly. Chipotle truly does fast food, fresh! I always enjoy coming here because I know it's a great healthy option for eating out. I really enjoyed my order and the service was excellent as always.

If I could give NEGATIVE STARS I would, my family and I show up at 9:31pm on Saturday 6/22/19 the lobby was closed, we go to the drive-thru and they proceeded to tell us they ran out of chicken and they only had strips and kfc bowls available, I asked how could they run out of chicken and the response was well we close in a half hour so we ran out. So we left but I tried calling the store to ask for the manager's name and the line was busy until after 10pm. I tried calling again this am and the line says all circuits are busy; usually we just deal with how lazy the workers here can be too many times our orders have been wrong or we'd have to wait because they ran out of biscuits but last night was just too much.

Purchased a dozen donuts, a big and small ice caramel lattes, sausage and egg croissant, a dozen of munchkins, and lastly 2 key lime squares which totaled to $ 28.69. No receipt was issued. When I checked my bank transactions that day since I'm from California and have been victimized a few times by fraudsters, Dunkin Donuts total charge was $ 39.25!!!  Why was there an extra $ 10.00??? I called them twice already and the black dude I spoke too was not very helpful and sounded defensive. Please people make sure you keep your receipts. Luckily I have a transaction number in my bank account that can be compared to their transaction. Will have to disputes this and hope for an apology.

I tried Dunkin Donuts many years ago while visiting DC. Either my taste has evolved or they just aren't as good as they used to be.Doughboys and Rounds have infinitely better donuts. The donuts here taste artificial and stale (are they made on site?), and the blended mocha I tried reminded me of a slurpee from 7/11. If you've ever tried a chocolate soda, imagine an icee/slurpee version of that - overly sweet and icey with not enough creaminess or any discernible coffee flavor. I also tried an english muffin breakfast sandwich with sausage. I wanted the pretzel bun sandwich which looked quite good from the picture, but they were out on their 2nd day of operation. My breakfast "sandwich" looked like someone dropped it and then haphazardly reassembled the pieces. The only thing worse than the presentation was the flavor which aside from a slight burnt english muffin essence tasted like pretty much nothing. I've had frozen grocery store sandwiches that tasted better. 

I'm not anti-chain per se, but the quality of chains that seem to come to our area don't excite me. Add this one to the list as another chain that might not make it through the next recession. Someone wake me when we have a Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf or a Krush Burger.

I'm typically not the type of person to write a negative review about places but I've given more than a couple chances to Del Taco. Today marks the 6th time they've completely forgotten parts of my order out of 6 tries. I really was hoping the first five times were flukes but I guess I'm just the bad luck Queen here lmao

Clean surroundings and friendly staff.  We've been going here for years, while traveling thru Reno.  it's just off I-80, just as you're heading Sparks/Reno.  Food is consistent Del Taco, which is good.  There is a gas station next door, so it's a perfect rest stop, on your travels...and easy on/off I-80.

Just had Del Taco cheeseburger for supper and it was pretty good. We also had some of the beef tacos and those were also good. They have expanded their menu so there are a lot of options. This location is never super busy but busy enough that the food is always fresh. The staff is polite and quick without making you feel rushed.
This chicken is far from finger licking good! Nothing good about KFC other than the Cole slaw! They have the best Cole slaw in the State! Lol

I love this Del Taco cuz the employees are always so much fun! The food is good, not great, but decent. I think you get a good quality for what you pay. Their fish tacos are the best thing on the menu! I really like their fish tacos here! Can't beat the prices for their plain little tacos either. Their dollar/value menu choices are good and solid and I like that they have different specials several times a week. I like Del Tacos french fries too, as well as the churros and their strawberry shakes are fantastic! They have real chunks of strawberries and they put plenty in. Probably my next favorite item.

I have always loved Del Taco's tacos far more than "the bell," so when I see one I always want to stop. Yesterday, I just wanted something small to hold me over for a dinner out, so I ordered just one taco. It was packed with fillings to the brim, and was tasty and fresh. My husband's meal, on the other hand, left more than a little to be desired.

My husband doesn't like Mexican food as much as I do, so he ordered a burger and fries. First mistake. Never order Americanized food from a Mexican restaurant. It was pretty awful. The burger was standard, nothing special, and he wasn't happy with the consistency or the presentation, the bun fell apart as he tried to eat it, just a mess.

And the fries, what can I possibly say about the fries? They were your typical frozen, crinkle cut, and weren't even crispy, in fact some were still almost raw in places. He threw some of them away, they were that bad.

While we waited in the drive-thru for our order, two different women waited on us, and they were, how can I say, clearly not happy with their jobs. They weren't friendly or welcoming at all, and repeated questions about sauce or not because they didn't communicate with each other. Overall a very disappointing experience, won't be back even if we're in the area.

You know what happens when you give a seagull some Alka-Seltzer? The same thing that happened to me the other day when I got a steak bowl from this restaurant. I don't know what the hell kind of bubonic plague they had in their food, but my stomach was bloated for at least three days after eating it. I don't get sick like this when I eat at Qdoba or even Taco Bell. I would blame how I felt on the spices they use, but generally, Chipotle's food is about as spicy as a bowl of rice crispies.

Look guys, I get it. You try to source your food responsibly and avoid GMO's. In spite of that, whenever I eat your food, I get sick. I don't know how you stay in business and I don't know how you continue to get long lines at your counters. My only explanation is that millennials are born with cast-iron stomachs coated with Kevlar.

Second Sunday in a row that chicken was not available. Went thru the drive the wait for chicken went from 10-35 minutes within 5 seconds. I've tried on too many times with this location. I put all blame on management. Rude and unprofessional. Never again.
OMG Gross! Stale chips, team leader replaced with stale chips. Then leaves them on the shelf. Steak was chewy.

4th time I stopped on my way home from work a little after 9pm and they did not have chicken breasts and refuse to cook more. They always only have dark meat or dried up strips. If they don't close for more than an hour I don't see why they can not cook more.

Your typical Chipotle fare...plenty of parking.  During lunch the line can get 20 deep, but moves pretty quickly.  They have some outdoor seating, but a bit dirtier tables and just overlooks the parking lot and Bruce B Downs, so nothing special. Food is always done right and the employees are pretty good with handling the masses with good attitudes.  Love the burrito bowls (made to order) and burritos.  Generally do chicken, but they also have steak, carnitas, sofritas, barbacoa and vegetarian.  They also have an app where you can order ahead for pickup (usually 15+ minutes at the fastest); along with saving favorite location and even various favorite orders for quick selection the next time.  Many of their entree selections are right around $7.  Chips & salsa are extra.

the drive thru woman was rude. how do you run out if chicken??? and then have an attitude when i ask a question and raise your voice saying 'MA'AM WE ARE OUT OF THE CHICKEN.' and after everything i ordered i kept getting 'is that all.' 'is that all?' and they didn't ask what sauces, what different sides i wanted, or anything. literally the worst KFC i've been to. when i paid we were handed our food and she shut the window. that was it. no thanks or nothing. looked so nice from outside but i won't be back.

First time i tried ordering from this store for delivery. I ordered at 11:30am to get my food at 1:00 pm. More than enough time to prepare right? Apparently it's not. 1:30 pm comes and i called grubhub and the driver will be another 30 minutes late. Where do they cook their chicken that it takes than more than 2 hours? tried calling the store itself, no answer. WORST OF THE worsts KFC branch i have ever dealt with. And i have lived and ate KFC from west coast to east coast. NOT RECOMMENDED. waste your money and time with some other place.

I absolutely love chipotle but, over the years the quality and portions have gone down. I always order steak tacos and they barely put any meat or toppings. I would dare to say your are probably getting...maybe 2 ounces of steak. Chipotle is very expensive considering how little you get. I ordered the guacamole, I'm not sure what was in it. It didn't taste or have the texture of simple Avocado. I see why a lot of people don't like chipotle. It's unfortunate.
This place is disgusting the manger roe has a attitude problem she got upset because she had to replace our order and they didnt have chicken and the steak was black and hard as street tar
I came to this location yesterday. The employees were extremely friendly, and I highly recommend the Beyond Meat Taco. You can't even tell the difference, but it's much better for you.

Got told it was a 20 minute wait for chicken to finally get it and be missing things I then had to wait for another 20 damn minutes for my Mac and cheese drive thru needs to get their shit in order bcuz I waited 40 minutes for food when it shouldn't have taken that long

I very rarely go out for fast food, but when I do, Del Taco is one of my favorites from my youth.  I do like their tacos.  Food is consistent and this is one of the food chains with a better percentage on getting your order fast and more importantly, accurate.

Luckily, on a week night, walk in, it wasn't too crowded.  I've seen the drive thru pretty full.  

Food is pretty inexpensive.  Very convenient in the Walmart Shopping center in South Reno, off of Damonte.

This Chipotle has gone downhill in the past year. I don't know if its staff turnover, regional management, or something else but this Chipotle has become dirty, inefficient, and lost any sense of customer orientation. 

I eat at Chipotle a lot. I'm actually a huge Chipotle fan, but this location is really bad., which saddens me because its right near my house Here are just a few examples of what I've experienced in the last few months. 

1. Employees are not customer service oriented 

I've seen this time and time again. There are actually some good employees, typically the females, but a lot of the male employees here have a "I don't give a $%$" attitude that reminds me of typical fast food workers. One of the Chipotle's differentiating factors was the employees but that's not the case anymore. 

Want a good example? How about last night I show up here at 8:30pm, its pretty much dead. There are two people getting burritos. The guy is leaning way over the glass, practically touching the food. The male employee serving them, a guy with really bad teeth, is clearly this guy's boy. They take like 5 minutes as the guy stacks the burritos huge, and they walk off without paying. Then, to add insult to injury, the guy walks away without doing my burrito. 

2. Not having items available at the line is a consistent problem.

Whether its fajitas, chicken, rice, or steak it's a recurring problem at this Chipotle. The most glaring example was when I showed up at 11:55am, there was no line, and they didn't even have chicken ready 5 minutes to noon. 

3. Food Quality and Freshness is a problem 

Most of the time the food quality is pretty standard but there are a few good examples of where this Chipotle misses the mark consistently. Don't bother ordering guacamole here before 12:30, because if you do it's likely from last night and covered brown discolored bits. If I wanted old guacamole, wouldn't I just go to Qdoba? 

Execution is off too. Its not hard to grill fajitas and steak but yet there seems to be consistent pattern of overcooked and gritty items, which might be related the cleanliness of the grill, which gets to my last point. 

4. This place is dirty

Remember a few years ago when you would walk in to a Chipotle and it was really clean? That's certainly not the case at this location as pointed out by numerous reviews. This place isn't just dirty when its really busy, its pretty much dirty all the time, and I wouldn't recommend using the bathroom here either. I can't imagine what the back room looks like.

I've been here twice, both times the rice and carnitas have been rock hard. Not too happy with my visits. They are new, maybe it'll take some time to get it right. I don't know. Been taking the extra ride to nesha mall chipotle, it's always good.

most lazy personal I've ever seen.  when I wanted to order a few times there, the lady looked at me or was serious.  my order was 2 chicken littles, I waited for 20 minutes, and still there was no mayonnaise and cucumbers.  the place to eat can be said to be a bread, a mess everywhere on the ground garbage, no one here to redeem.  in short, laziness and junkyard

Oh yeah!!! Today all Del Tacos started offering their new Beyond Tacos!!!  Just ate two of these, and they were delicious.  The new Beyond Meat Avocado Tacos are everything I was hoping for!!! Thank you Del Taco for being such an awesome restaurant to step up for tasty plant based tacos! You definitely have a new customer here!!!

If you order from the regular menu, the food is good, but if you want to try a promotional special, forget it! This was the third time I wanted to buy a special (Today it was chicken and waffles.) and they didn't have it. Just like the last few times with other specials, they claimed that they ran out. I have a feeling that because they are the only KFC for miles since the other KFCs closed in this area, they carry what they want.

Dunkin'... Guys... Come on...

I was so excited for there to be a Dunkin in my neighborhood. It's a great alternative to Starbucks. Very tasty, cheaper, the drive-through line at the vocal Starbucks was always ridiculous. And they have the meatless breakfast sausage!

But I'm so disappointed! This staff always seems like you're inconveniencing them by placing an order and the layout of the location is awful. Even if you don't go through the drive-through, you have to wait in the drive-through line to follow the one-way exit out of the space. 
That, and every time I've been, they've only filled my drinks up 2/3 of the way. I guess it's easy to be cheaper when you're skimping on the product... 

Back to Starbucks lines and the local coffee shops it is...

Ok so I'm a person that rarely complains at restaurants. I understand it's hard work and errors can be made which is fine and totally understandable but this kfc has a bunch of workers literally sitting on the phone one guy walking around eating buns and chicken legs jajaj and they send u to wait on your food there was literally no customers I came in cuz they gave me unsweetened tea they had no ice in the machine the drinks were flat. They messed up the order I stood at register for about 3 minutes before they realized I was there I think they need better management. Plus it very dirty.

WORST! Not worth one star. I placed my order in the drive thru, after waiting several seconds for a voice over the intercom. My order didn't get read back to me. I Pulled up to the window and still didn't get my order read back to me. The guy took my payment and didn't give me a receipt. 
I finally got my order, from a different person who took my order and payment, after a long wait and had to ask for my receipt. I looked in my bag and was missing a burrito. I informed them it was missing a burritoand went round and round because I said I ordered a Del "Taco" beef burrito, she asked that I "ordered a taco that you didn't get?"  I had to clarify 3 more times what I was missing. She went away, with my receipt in hand, and brought a burrito back and handed it to me. I asked again for my receipt and she said that she gave it to me. After informing her she walked away with it, she snuffed and printed me another receipt.
Will NEVER got to Del Taco again!

Was here the other day, the guacamole was brown(my fault for wearing sunglasses inside and not noticing), my  steak bowl was bland even with the pico. We took a break from this about 6 months ago because they didn't have their "stuff together"(online orders not being processed). The staff however was friendly from the get go, and I was easily refunded.

This burger King is so outdated. The people that work hear don't have much of a clue what they are doing. 

I've been to so many more that are by far better. 

I got 2 whopper Jr's and 2 orders of fries. And the soda. And the whoppers where cold and the fries had way to much salt on them. And soda was flat. 

Many burger kings this size usally have a play area for the kids. But this is the only one that dont have one. 

I can't see myself ever coming to this BK again.

Sucks!!! Pot pie was dry-- like it had been sitting for a LONG time
  Asked for barbeque chicken tenders-got dry- spicy chicken .  VERY disappointed

Had never been to a Del Taco - we live in Texas but stopped up to try the Beyond hard tacos and - OMG! Must try. My husbands a meat eater and I'm the pescatarian and he loved them too. We also tried the layered burrito and it was just a bean layer mess. Don't recommend.
Went it on a Friday before 5:00 pm. There was no chicken breasts  ready. Why??  Get it together! That actually happens a lot at this location.

So I had all but written this place off due to a bad experience but my buddy talked me into going back and I'm glad he did. The new Carne Asada steak wrapped in a burrito was absolutely delicious, I highly recommend it.

I enjoy the food but the fact that the dining rooms are closed for even take out is asinine. If it's a COVID thing then I don't think they've looked at the CDC facts showing that I have more of a chance of dying from a vending machine falling on me and killing me so I have to assume Del Taco is protecting me from their ice machines killing me. With Reno growing so much, a lot of people that want something quick to eat would like Del Taco so they can go back to work to help that growth. That also means service trucks and tractor trailers and many other vehicles don't fit in the drive through. Also, someone today may or may not have tore some stucco off the building because they were tired of the dining room being closed so they took their service truck that doesn't fit through it anyways.
Inexpensive, average wait for a drive thru order, employee was polite, on par with Taco Bell's prices, food selection, taste, and quality.

I absolutely love chipotle but, over the years the quality and portions have gone down. I always order steak tacos and they barely put any meat or toppings. I would dare to say your are probably getting...maybe 2 ounces of steak. Chipotle is very expensive considering how little you get. I ordered the guacamole, I'm not sure what was in it. It didn't taste or have the texture of simple Avocado. I see why a lot of people don't like chipotle. It's 

Went back because it's close to work 
Don't go here I ordered steak tacos, got maybe five pieces of steak per taco.....tiny pieces. So, I asked for extra meat. They charged $3.47!!!!!
I didn't get that much steak in the first place 
This is the worst location 
Such a rip off
They need to educate their staff
It isn't 
this way at every chipotle 
Must have horrible management

I ordered the steak soft tacos with white rice and veggies. The food taste disgusting. Normally, I don't talk bad about food. This place, I had to. It just doesn't taste right. I don't recommend this place.

No matter what time of day it is, this place never has want you want ready.. It's always "we ran out". How does a chicken place, "RUN OUT OF CHICKEN" ??? On top of that the restaurant never looks clean, always trash n trays laying all over. Don't get me started on the employees and there attitudes..  Oh, but they want $15 an hour....!

If there was another KFC around i might go there. Or another place that has really good chicken that's not spicy or dry.
This one the attitude of the employees are lousy. The paper on the door said pick up n delivery only no sit down. 
Ok, so you would think you can go inside n place your order n leave, right?
No. The employee tells me I have to go to the drive thru n place my order. 
Why can't KFC be like other restaurants, and have inside ordering so customers like me can be in and out? 
Now if you don't have a car, what are you supposed to do? Walk up to the drive thru and place your order?
I'm getting tired of getting attitudes from employees. I'm disabled n can't work. I don't need people giving me attitude because they don't like their job or they are having a bad day.

Sat for nearly 10 minutes in Drive Thru before ordering. Give my order at the box, then wait another 10. I get to the window and the girl says, "You had the 2 Del Taco Fiesta Packs correct?" I confirm that was my order. She then tells me that they weren't able to enter it in the computer so it couldn't be made. I clarify that I had just sat nearly 20 minutes in their drive thru for them to not make or attempt to make my order because it couldn't be entered in the computer. She confirmed. She didn't say anything about they're making it right now, it'll will just be a few minutes longer, sorry, etc. Just, your order's not.

Do NOT go here unless you can go inside. The drive thru is a joke!!!!

Grabbed some fried chicken from KFC today. They were not allowing customers in the restaurant so everyone had to order via the drive through. Even with a long line of cars it only took 10 minutes to place our order and pick it up. Pretty solid given how busy they were.

Employees were present and the hours posted indicated that the business had been open for over an hour when I tried to open the door, but it was locked. No problem, with the COVID-19 perhaps the drive through is the only way to purchase food. Problem is that my family and I had walked to the location and when we approached the window, the manager refused to take our orders and made the "throat slashing" motion indicating that he was not taking any orders from anyone one on foot. There were no other customers present but apparently this business does not need our money. Never have been very enthusiastic about the poor service at this location, but this is the last straw and we will not plan on ever frequenting this Burger King again. The employee with all the christian phrases on the back window of his vehicle needs to practice he he pretends to follow. Sorry the do not need my money! Just remembered, the last time about a year ago when I stoped at the drive through for this venue, I ordered a Whopper with cheese. The gentleman on the intercom then asked if I would like cheese with that burger. I then just drove off as the stupidity was overwhelming me. I should have learned my lesson then not to patronize this business. 
The McDonalds across the street had no problem takin my money BTW.

This KFC is amazingly run and the manager is very professional. I ordered the original chicken at 7pm yesterday and it was the best KFC meal I have ever had in my entire life. Hands down the best KFC establishment in Lawrence.

My daughter wanted chipotle so I figured it was time to give them another shot. So they have a carne asada option for a limited time. It's a big improvement over the steak I had last time. Much more flavor and not dry. I hope they decide to keep it. All around my experience was better. I do wish they would open up the menu more. There isn't a nacho option or quesadilla (besides kids) on the menu even though they have the ingredients. Also not a fan of ordering on the phone through an automated system but it was accurate. My daughter does like the vegetarian bowl. It's hard to find vegetarian options that she likes.

Shut the kfc on Gallentin pike , Madison Tennessee! It's got to go and every fucking employee there. Nobody wants to eat food that they don't give a fuck about. What i mean. Everyday I'm going by around 6:30-7 
I want my 6pc tender combo. The first thing I'm told every time is we're closed in the drive thru??? How can this be possible when it's still day out and this is everyday like they don't want to work but want to run that clock up for their paychecks. Or maybe kfc has a bad location either way. It's infestation of crack heads n no chicken ever . What's the point . I can give many reason why kfc losing money by staying open in this location. If you don't got food or open hours. Then shut that bitch down fire these people too they don't care but who would for 8hr. It's just irritating to deal with this .

I Stopped in briefly for a quick lunch run, was greeted by possibly the manager (his shirt looked different from the other crew workers). I ordered a chicken tender meal. The drive up cashier had to cash me out and gave me my receipt with no "thank you" he just passed me my receipt. The employee who gave me my food also just  passed me my bag of food a "thank you" without asking me would I like any sauces/condiments. It seemed like all of the employees were more engaged in their conversation and that would of been okay if there weren't any customers inside ...but ummm pardon me guys I was the customer there...theeee only customer there. 

The outside of the restaurant was clean, the inside was clean as well including the bathroom. My food was hot and fresh, chicken tenders were tasty, bbq sauce was delicious, water was a nice cool temp' and my biscuit was fluffy. I visited today around lunch time.

Drive thru order. 2 breakfast sandwiches. Told no regular eggs only veggie eggs.  Ordered bacon cheese and veggie egg on English muffin and turkey sausage veggie egg and cheese on English muffin. Received bacon veggie egg no cheese on a bagel and turkey sausage regular egg ( they were supposedly out) and cheese on a croissant. Really, how hard is it to put together a breakfast sandwich. Pathetic

I just left this location the parking lot was packed , and the drive thru line was backed up. So my thoughts were yes busy , I may have a little wait but product would definitely be fresh. Right..... NOPE!!!!!  I ordered a 8 P.C. chicken and 3 biscuits. Why when I went home up the street from here my chicken looked like this.... Old and greasy... Smh I wasn't upset that they did have the white meat crispy that I wanted but I excepted the original and this was what I received.

Chicken was over spiced - salty and bitter.  Manager was cool and gave me a new meal w steak. 
This was first time ever had poor food at chipotle.

Update: saturday 09/29/2018 I went in at approximately 9:40pm and the carnitas bowl I received was ice cold.  They do realize that you could get people sick with foodborne illnesses by not heating the food right?  DO NOT VISIT!!  I demand my money back!

05/18/2018 - Ordered a #1 combo (2 tacos) for my daughter, #7 combo and two epic burritos.  As we drove to the window, my kid reminded me I didn't specify soft taco. So I told them when I got to the window to make sure they were regular soft tacos. The girl at the window said no problem and went to tell the cooks. She came back and told me the manger said since the tacos were already made, I had to take the hard tacos and the would not give me the soft tacos for my kid. I left and took none of it. What a joke, except this isn't a joke...it is the worst kind of customer service. We ate elsewhere that evening and will continue to do so as long as this is the way they treat you.

I don't know what else to say but figure yourself out Del Taco. They were only taking orders for 1 car at a time and filling that order before they would take another order. Just super inefficient. I believe it was in an attempt to keep their window time down, but we waited in the drive thru with no way to get out for 30min. By the time we got to the ordering window we just decided to put in an order. Which took another 8- 9 min based on the clock at the window. Took at picture at 7 min 30 sec. 

So 40 min to get 2 bean and cheese burritos and 6 tacos....

I can't believe they made me into the monster that reviews fast food this critically.

Taco Tuesday! I shout to my children... Wait? What?!? Only one YAY! We get it so often (cheap, easy, and filling) that my kids are pretty bored with it. On Tuesdays, (Taco Tuesday) you can get 3/$1.29 soft or hard tacos- I recommend buying your own sour cream.
 
This is a newer location and so far they're doing pretty well. I am glad to see they brought one over to this side of town. We would have to drive down Eagle during dinner time (ewww, I know) or the other one off Franklin, which is much farther from me. 

Personally, I really enjoy their epic burritos. They're large and filling-- not like a taco truck, though, there is no comparison there! For the record, I have only been through the drive-thru at this location.

There was not many people in line when my Mom and I went through the drive thru. They are currently doing construction on the drive thru, but it was still workable which was fine! The lady at the drive thru speaker was so friendly and helpful and we even exchanged a laugh together - she was very pleasant! :) The employees packaged our food with care and everything was neatly in the bag. We ordered two chicken breast $5 Fill Ups with potato wedges, a small cole slaw, a Smokey Mountain BBQ Grilled Chicken Breast, green beans, 2 regular Pepsi's, and 1 Diet Pepsi. The chicken itself was pretty good, mine looked more like a rib than grilled chicken breast. The green beans had a bizarre flavor - kind of reminded me of soup or chicken stock flavor on the green beans, and extra salty (which I did not like). The Diet Pepsi was pretty good.

Now this is what I'm talking about on how to do fast food chicken.  Boston Market should learn from KFC on how to take care of their customer's stomachs.  My most recent order was a three piece box and if you look at the photo there is the equivalent of 4-5 pieces in there.  Awesome!  You could feed two on that

The original recipe is oh so good....it takes me back to my childhood in the 70's when the family would get the bucket...Usually at most restaurants I will peel the skin off before eating... but at KFC the skin is sooooo incredibly delicious that I eat every last piece of skin.  

Sides: You absolutely must choose the mashed potatoes with gravy.  If they sold their gravy by the gallon I would buy and put on EVERYTHING.  So perfect...and then they give you a biscuit to get every last drop out of the container.  See my photo for the perfect compliment by Col. Sanders...My other go-to side is cole slaw....another good job on keeping it tasty and simple.

KFC, keep doing what you are doing because we love it all!

Not sure what happened to this location but it's gone downhill and is terrible now. Went in at dinner time on Saturday to get food to go. I got a steak burrito bowl, steak burrito, chips, and kids chicken quesadilla. I watched them make the quesadilla.. they threw some chicken and cheese on a tortilla, and wrapped it up. Didn't heat it up at all. When I got home I found they forgot to put the quesadilla in the bag, my steak burrito bowl and burrito were ice cold, and the bag of chips had a handful of chips in it. I wasn't able to drive back to get a refund since I now had to make a separate dinner to replace the missing quesadilla and cold burrito bowl. I did call and spoke to someone who offered a free replacement meal next time I come in, but honestly I don't even know if I want to return to this location.

Felt sick within 15 minutes of eating here. I got the sofrita bowl. Not sure what's going on with chipotle lately but every location I've been to in the past year have been awful. I think I'm officially done with eating chipotle for good.

Same good old  KFC chicken taste but service is very disappointing. If you are visiting this KFC after 7:30pm, expect to get the "sorry we are out of chicken, it will be 25-30mins" followed by "we just got hit with a couple of big groups". I guess they just want to shut the fryers down early and get out early - sad. Disappointing because this place seems to get a lot of people but usually they just walk out when they get the out of chicken excuse.

Came by this morning to get sausage egg muffin and 2 drinks Hot latte Merrymint Mocha and hot Coffee...I had three cars in front of me and three cars behind i waited in line about 2min...my drink and food came fast and were made well... Alana & Jordan provided great welcoming service A++
Ordered two  steak and Barbacoa bowls online and I just wish they would've called me before they didn't bother to put the steak in my bowl,before I paid 20$?? Seriously not cool.
fryers are never working! And how you guys always out of chicken?...And every time I get the famous bowl combo I always get a cookie even though I ask for a biscuit. I don't understand....

Typical Chipotle experience. 

This location tends to be "out" of common items, which can sometimes put a dent in your trip. I really like their corn-type salsa and they seem to be out of this more-often-than-not which is kind of disheartening. If you know it is popular, perhaps management should make sure it is in stock. I've had similar experience where they were out of sofritas (a challenge if you've gone with a vegetarian) and they were once out of the carnitas. 

Carnitas here typically have some blobs of fat so I've just decided to avoid it. Bleh. 

Last trip was rather normal. Their new thing is the queso and chips. Queso is okay when you first get it (definitely not my favorite though, and for the price I would actually just skip it) but does NOT save well. So don't plan on bringing it home--just eat it all immediately if you get it. 

Overall, just an average experience to be had here.

First, they changed our order from what we told them in the drive-thru. They gave us a Big Box instead of the tenders combo we asked for.
Second, the chicken they gave us did not taste good. It had no seasoning and was so bland I didn't want to eat it. (Our dog, however, enjoyed it.)
Third, the biscuits were way undercooked and tasted like a dough ball.
After this experience, I would never go back to KFC.

Maybe you should have closed all day instead of 5pm. All the employees were unhappy and the woman with the tattooed arm was extremely rude. And why no cash?  Food ok but out of steak by 1:30?  We should have gone to Jersey Mikes a few doors down. They would have appreciated my business. Oh well. This place is probably gone so I don't have to say I'm not coming back.

Big fan of chipotle here! I've been to this location probably 10 or 15 times now and I have to say, it just gets worse each time. Been to chipotles all over the country so I know they tend to vary in quality depending on where you are. I promise I'm not being a drama queen, it is truly the most disgusting I've ever seen a restaurant ever! I've cut this location slack because I know businesses are having a hard time hiring rn, but it's really out of control. 

To be more specific, whether it is packed or totally empty, EVERY SINGLE table, chair, and the entire floor is covered in food no matter what. For this reason, people generally get their food and leave. A  family came in one evening looking for a place to sit and politely let the staff know there were no clean chairs or tables, to which they grabbed a damp rag and *literally set the rag on a chair then picked it up and walked a way , didn't even pretend to wipe it down at all. Not to mention trash cans overflowing onto the floor and drink machine, napkins, and flatware are always out. 
     
Beyond the actual state of the seating area, the food itself is *really not up to par for chipotle. The food assembly is so sloppy, cross contamination every time, I get a pretty simple burrito here, but somehow I end with every ingredient in it, half a#$ burrito folding, I ask for a bowl to put it in because there is no chance of picking it up. I feel bad going on and on like this, but the guacamole has been fully brown, rice undercooked (gave me stomach ache), fajitas undercooked, found hard "mystery bits"of something in sofritas, guac, and beans. They actually don't even clean out the metal containers before putting the new food in, there are crusted on layers of rice, guac, and other foods underneath the new food (I've never seen this at a chipotle before). How they have a good health score is really alarming. The staff is just plain apathetic and rude. I don't expect someone making burritos to be buddy the elf but, they really don't seem to care at all. 
 
Ok, end of rant. My intention is not to slam chipotle, I really do love their food and there are SO few healthy option here in Franklin, I would love to eat there more often. I'm hoping the right person will see this and make a improvement!

Went to this BK today 2/23/2021 and used the drive thru. Simple order whopper and cheese sticks.  You would think with the dining room closed and only the drive thru to deal with they be able to get it right. This was well after their lunch rush so they weren't busy just me and one other car in line. Got my food pulled around to a parking spot to eat. opened the bag no sauce for the cheese sticks and not a napkin in site.  There were a few cars in the drive thru now so i walked to the door and it was locked knocked and was ignored.  So walked around to the drive thru to ask for napkins and sauce.  Girl waved me down to the next door. It was unlocked so I went in to ask for what I needed as I walked in a employee started yelling at me as she walked toward me with a tray with 2 containers of sauce still no napkins. She continued to yell at me and telling me I couldn't be in there. Once I realised what she was saying I told her it was to bad and if they would do their the first time I wouldn't have to come in. Yes I had a mask on so it wasn't that.  I'm all for raising the minimum wage, but come on you have to earn it!

Stopped by for a quick bit and try their impossible burger. There were only a few cars in the lot and 1 car in line I front of me. The person taking orders was very difficult to understand through the box. After ordering it took almost 15 mins to get my food. The fries didn't even fill the container but the were also tasteless with no salt. The burger was okay but sort of off putting due to the fry and wait situation. Willing to give the place another try down the road. 3/5

So I ordered two burritos from here the other day for my wife and I. We do NOT eat meat so we always order sofritas in our burritos and there was barbacoa pieces mixed in with my wife's sofritas which is disgusting and inexcusable to do that, I under stand that cross contamination can occur but we've gone to another chipotle numerous amount of times and that has NEVER happened to us in the years of going to chipotle. So I'll be sticking to the one usually go to.

When you order chicken online at 3:30pm for a 5:00pm pick up and show up at 4:59pm to be told they are sold out of tenders and will not have any ready for 20 minutes and asked if I wanted to cancell my order? No, fix my chicken please, so Im told to pull around and they will bring it out to me so I did. 30 minutes of sitting in my car they finally bring out my food only to get home and find it missing part of the order? How hard can it be? Its in black and white, clearly spelled out online just what I ordered and what I was charged for. They got everything wrong from beginning to end and while I was in drive through it was just meand during my 30 minute wait only 2 customers pulled in so they were not busy at all. Highly disappointed!!!

On this visit to his Burger King. The service was fast 
My order was provided as requested. 
I asked the a for whopper with cheese with extra pickles and light on the mayo
What I got : somewhat warm jr whopper with cheese , with massive mayo and 3 pickles total. obviously not what I ordered
I also ordered new fries: when I approached the window to pay. The manger said these fries just came out about 2 minutes ago, please let me know if they are okay. 
To my surprise the fries were new and hot and the large container of fries were filled completely with fries. I was happy with the fries only.  
  I don't know why I continue to come to this Burger King.

yay!  for the impossible burger!!!
BK Lounge goes Vegan Friendly!!!
thank you thank you thank you!!!!!
cows dont need to be ground up for a whopper anymore!!!!
keep up the good work!!

I can't imagine why anyone with functioning brain cells would run the air conditioning when the temperature outside is 67 degrees.  That made the temperature in the restaurant about 63 degrees.  This insanely cold interior temperature ruined our food in a very short amount of time.  When remarking "Sure is cold in here!" the manager rolls hi eyes and walks away.  There are other Burger Kings.  Those will get our business, not this one.  (Especially given that they don't have Whopper Wednesdays!)

Let me start by saying that I've never had high expectations for the service received by any Del Taco (or fast food for that matter). 

Their food is always consistently decent, inexpensive, and since they're open 24/7, it's good for late night munchies... 

Never in my life would I have expected to hear a 5 minute (NO EXAGGERATION) lecture about letting Jesus back into our lives from the manager Tangie. Tangie questioned each of our involvement in Christianity and then lectured us about our deceased loved ones wanting to go and made it clear that she did not accept us because of our beliefs. 

She was insane, to say the least!  After our lecture, she went back inside and was loudly gloating to all of the employees about how she set us straight about Jesus. She then refused to give us her name, our food, or our money back. 

This was 10 minutes of our life that we will never get back, but a great story to tell none-the-less... Her employees were beyond embarrassed and kept apologizing for her behavior. 

I can't say that I won't ever return, because it's cheap and easy fast food open 24/7... but if I ever see Tangie again, I will break out my phone to video tape the interaction...

My kids were really craving chicken and suggested KFC. What I hoped was a quick in and out turned out to be a 35 minute wait. The place was crazy inside, the drive through and was backing up around the building, and only after ordering and paying did I hear the words, "we are out of chicken and it will be 30+ minutes before we have any." It would have been nice to hear that before I paid and as I contemplated getting a refund and going somewhere else, I couldn't even get them to acknowledge me. The workers spent more time complaining and yelling at each other and at one point, the young gentleman who took my order tried to get the ladies attention to speak with me and she looked right at me and then back to him and said "he can wait just like everybody else." So I waited there for over 30 minutes, took the meal and left.  Very disappointing experience.

Stay away from this location at all costs! When I showed up and waited for quite some time, four people in front of me, I was informed that they were out of steak, queso and chicken. Just so happens those were the three things that I wanted. They didn't even say it would be ready in some timeframe, they just flat out said they don't have it. Obviously this is a poorly run establishment and this is the pitfalls of chain restaurants.

Chipotle mentioned they were receiving orders until 10pm. I proceeded to order tonight at 9:05. Picked up around 9:30 and when I got home the orders were incorrect. We ordered steak for both tacos and a bowl, but received chicken. Ordered guacamole on everything and got it on nothing...when we paid extra!
