None of the chosen ingredients were in our burrito, nor in our bowl (see attached picture for what was supposed to be in the bowl, see what's actually in, or not in, the bowl) We spent $50. 

It seemed as if they either packed up early or ran out of the ingredients to fill our order. This place is also always dirty when I go in there. Full trash cans, garbage all over the ground. It's pathetic! Employees are rude, walking around with AirPods in. Management should be embarrassed.
Would not let us place an order tonight. Said driver thru was backed up and was told not to take orders. Drive thru had one car. Went to Popeyes chicken instead since did not want our order.

Don't order delivery from this location. DoorDash called to say the order would be delayed because the restaurant didn't have any rice (??). When it finally arrived, both burritos were barely even wrapped and rice was falling out everywhere. Almost no toppings inside. Ordered sofritas and one had almost none, and I think the other had none at all. Got a refund from DoorDash but this place really sucks.

I don't typically like to leave bad reviews but goddamn is this place in serious need of new management. First off, there was no black beans, no corn, no tomatoes, the steak looked super under cooked not that I choose that anyways. Barbacoa looked so dried out it seemed they had it sitting there since the midday shift. But worst of all the whole display was a MESS! These people were not even busy, but yet showed no interest to clean up after their own mess. It's as if the line worker/s  were just so over being there. I love chipotle, and would love nothing more then to see this establishment flourish not fall.

This fast food restaurant is anything but fast.  I dined in this week and ordered a whopper and whopper jr and fries and drinks.  I waited 25 minutes for my order which gave me plenty of time to observe the staff.  First this place was FILTHY with trash and some food on the floor all around the food prep area, not to mention the nasty tables---all in the time of COVID-19.  Believe me this place has not wiped down any surfaces  with disinfectant.  The girls waiting on me we're extremely rude and unprofessional and talking very loudly in front of the few customers that were there.  The only boy kept hollering he wanted a "f___ing break!  One girl kept hollering " I hate Roger".  I finally asked for the manager and "Barbara" came to me and said she was the District Manager.  I told her my complaints and could tell she didn't really care either.  She told me this restaurant is always clean when she's been there and I told her then she needs to come more often because each of the few times I've been here it always looks this way.  This place is PATHETIC!  I love the menu but will never go here again.  Someone higher up than the District Manager needs to take a hard look at this place.  IT'S A DISGRACE.

This place came in clutch. After a happy hour at the place next door this was our saving grace. They are located right in the middle of soho and they are open until 11pm! We forgot to eat before going out so we were starving after a few drinks. The place was packed with other night owls who were looking for a quick bite.

This was one of the fastest Chipotle lines I have ever been through. For it being almost close to closing time the staff was still super friendly and took everyone's order who came in before 11. Anyone inside the restaurant before the close was allowed to stay and enjoy their meal without the staff ushering them out rudely.

I got my usual burrito with steak and extra steak, along with cheese and sour cream. I added a soda too. Maybe it was because it was a good night or I was just that hungry but that was one of the best burritos I have had from Chipotle or any other restaurant in a while. If I am ever at happy hour again, I would leave early just to grab another burrito for the way home.

Extremely poor! Very disappointed and was not worth almost $50. I have a large family. At the ordering kiosk they couldn't understand what I was asking so as we pull up the the window the whole order was wrong. So I corrected them.... the whole order I read back to them. Paid almost $50. Was given the wrong drink then when we pulled over to check our order, my triple cheeseburger  came 50% the way I asked. I didn't want a bun nor lettuce wrap just in a little container. Well it had no lettuce or tomatoes or better yet cheese. Just onion, pickle and the sauce I requested. We also had to drive back around because we were missing a piece of our order. One of our fries were undercooked or hardly cooked and the other two had burnt ones. I know the people are working hard etc. but honestly I will not come back to this one. What an awful experience. I wouldn't even give it one star.

I usually stop in at any Del Taco all over but this was the worse service and very dirty location that I've ever seen! While we had ordered our food, another guest wanted to speak with a manager regarding an employee that was not changing out gloves everytime he went to a different station or even stocked. The guy I believe was named Danny was asked to change his gloves but the guy was very sweaty and looked disgusting. So my husband watched and waited as our food was prepared to make sure that he was not touching our order. There was no shift manager on and the kids that were working keep Jack assing around putting boxes on their heads. None of them were clean shaved and just look like they are hanging out than working. The food was ok but not the greatest. Definitely won't be stopping at this location at all in the future.

Sorry wanted chicken ordered online big mistake been standing here for 15 minutes can't tell you what the food sitch is because I haven't gotten it yet but I can tell you I lost a few IQ points standing here waiting

Ordered online for pickup at a later time. One of the orders was for a steak bowl with steak, mild tomato salsa, cheese and lettuce. After I got home, I noticed the sticker on the lid of the bowl listed exactly what I had ordered online. When I opened the lid I found nothing of what I had ordered. Instead of steak, I had chicken. Instead of mild tomato salsa, I had spicy corn salsa. I also had black beans. Fortunately they did get the cheese and lettuce correct. At that point I was home and couldn't take back the order. I Just wish they had paid more attention to what they were doing. Even though it wasn't a big expense, it's still money wasted just because someone didn't care enough to to do a good job.

Hooray for this location. I had no idea it was there. I did not even know that area existed until I went there. Yes, I know where have I been.

I have not had Chipotle since I worked by Westshore Mall. I did not want to go back there for bad memories of the old job lol.

Alas, I can come to this location. Tons of bars in the area, nightlight. So that's what SOHO is. Never understood that term til I found it. You know I am not from around here.

Once again, we know this place does not disappoint. Always has an outside area for Mocha the almight pup! lol. 

Always pretty inexpensive. I get the tacos or the burrito bowl, and I can not get away from the Carnitas. I have tried the other meats but Carnitas is my staple there. Also the Corn salsa on the side. Yum yum and yum.  

Bonus: This is listed in Weight Watchers, and points are actually not too bad!!

So after hearing about the impossible burger all weekend from a close friend that does not eat beef. I had to know. 

So I ordered the burger only, referred to as a sandwich, with cheese. 

To start it tastes fine but it is not juicy. There were no grill marks and the cheese was added as she added the tomato and lettuce. So no melting. 

Now flavor, tasted like beef, I would call it on the dry side. Def if you wanted no beef this would do it. But it is not in n out by comparison. 

FYI, i don t go to Burger King or Wendy's for food. So my compare might be limited. 

If I had to go meat free, I would buy it   But not otherwise.  

Now the restaurant was clean, but the bathroom didn't look like it was cleaned since it was put in. One urinal perm out of service with plastic cover and paper towels all over and no wiping.  It was 8 am. So not today, this all looked like yesterday's   debrie   

So i tried it.  Really needed to know what the acclaim was all about.

This is the worst KFC on the planet earth. I got one for you for this location I wait 10 minutes for fresh biscuits in a bring me out fresh biscuits and old ass chicken what a waste of my time is it in here shaking my head I should've known better
Then to add insult to injury I had to leave my house drive back up to KFC now I have to wait two days for my refund what a big fucking inconvenience I hope this Fucking Pl., Burnsdowne ain't nothing good ever comes out of the Willingboro location KFC a bunch of fucktard's work there

This is us that location that never has chicken I guess you're a fucktard staff haven't realized that they're in the chicken business

Cold coffee. Seemed like it was burned. Horrible. Worst coffee I've ever had. Did they leave it overnight? It was early in the morning when I ordered. Sandwich was ok. Bagel with egg white and sausage, cheese. Pretty bland. Staff was very short and impatient. Nobody was waiting in drive through line but they seemed extremely impatient.  Hard to understand. Never again. There are a lot of DD's. This isn't the one to frequent.  Attitude!  Garbage coffee.
Danyelle was awesome food came out quickly .. She was very friendly best del taco in the valley!! Thanks to Danyelle and her team for your hardwork

After seeing one of my coworker's with the  KFC $5 Fill Up (or as Daym Drops calls it "the $5 Holla") yesterday, I decided to see what the business was:

3 piece chicken (w barbeque sauce): 3.5/5 Now usually I hate circus side show carny food, yeah I called chicken tenders clown food. Lol   But that day, I didn't feel like tackling a piece of chicken with a bone and that was actually a good call on my part.  The tenders were actually the best part of the food part of the meal. Breading was oh so lovely hot, crispy in all the right places and flavorful. The chicken itself was on point; tender to the bite with effortless action on the chew. The barbq sauce was like sweet baby rae's lil cousin ..better than I expected.

Mashed Potatoes and Gravy: 1/5 yeah ok uh Well the good is that it was hot but now the bad: the mashed potatoes had a taste like straight box instant taste. 

Biscusit:0/5 KFC has the worst biscuit in the chicken fast food game. This shouldn't even be called a biscuit but a bread roll lump d lump. I had to mix it with the mashed potatoes. Popeye's come save me!!!

Cookie: 2/5 Nothing to write home about. Tasted like those 3 for $.99 chocolate chip cookies @ Walmart

Strawberry Soda: 5/5: The best was last.....  It was a straight 5 all day!!!

Overall: 3/5 I would get it again but I might see how much extra $ the potatoes wedges would be instead of the mashed potatoes

If you're only doing online orders, how can you be so inaccurate? Disappointing to place a big order get home and it's not even correct - even though the label itself had "steak cheese lettuce mild salsa "- we got steak and cheese. $40 worth of food, you expect better service.

First time in a long time in a KFC. Mostly because their standards have dropped. For the most part, they have this time.  Had the 5.00 fillup. The chicken was old and tough. Though the prices were good for the price. My wife had chicken pot pie and gave it a thumbs up.  Also had the Nashville Chicken Little sandwich, only a 1.29. Small and spicy but decent flavor.

This Del Taco is THE WORST!  Ordered two fiesta packs.  I  ordered one with 6 soft tacos and 6 hard tacos and 1 with 6 burritos and 6 hard tacos.  Dude who took my order took his sweet time, and punched it in at the drive through register.  My receipt was "accidentally" cut off at the register to not show the store number and address.  At least 10 minutes later, they are packing my fiesta boxes.  I get 4 soft tacos, 2 hard taco and 5 burritos in one.  5 more burritos and 5 hard tacos.  The guy from UPS behind me finally walked out because it took too long.  I tried to correct twice before I left with my to go order.  $30 I spent there last night.  Then the very slow moving, (I assume) manager tells me I must have a combination of tacos and burritos.  Now I have 6 kids.  This isn't my first rodeo with the Fiesta box.  I'm so frustrated I say, never mind.  My family is waiting in the car.  I know full well my family won't eat 12 burritos.  I get about 25 feet out the door and one of the boxes loses the bottom.  Tacos and burritos on the ground, that were not even wrapped well.  My experience was so bad that I picked them up off of the ground and left.  Never again.  They suck!

The only time I had Del Taco was at church.  Seriously, this church I went to a few times had a table piled high with the breakfast tacos and I never went to the actual restaurant because I thought Del Taco was just ok.  

I'm not a huge fast food person but one day a few weeks ago my neighbors said they were going to Del Taco to get a bunch of chicken tacos (apparently they're a thing).  I had no idea they were so popular.  We got a variety and added some spicy chicken tacos in the order too.  

Wow, okay, I had no idea what I was missing out on.  First of all, I like the spicy crunchy chicken taco way better than the original and might I add how soft and fresh the tortillas are.  I also like the variety of hot sauces the give you if you ask for a handful of mixed packets.  They are more flavorful and spicier than Taco Bell's hot sauce packets.  So that happened.  

Then, one night on my way home I was really craving another taco.  I went through the drive-thru, this felt so foreign to me because I never go through drive-thru fast restaurants.  After looking at the menu, I saw something called the fresh avocado burrito and it caught my eye, yes please!  Plus a spicy chicken taco.  Wow wow wow.  Since then, I can't believe what a better burrito this is than Chipotle and Qdoba, what?!  It's big, it's filling, it's tasty, plus it has fresh slices of avocado, all for under $6!  Ok I have also tried their beyond meat burrito as well and I thought it was wonderful.  Hands down Del Taco over the Bell any day!

Employees serving out portions of meat looked like they were under a magnifying glass from other employees. I paid 8-9$ for the tiniest scoop of chicken/steak I've ever received at a chipotle establishment. There's a fine line between trying to conserve ingredients and ensure return customers and after my experience today I won't be returning.

Love KFC. This place on Rangeline is just a joke. Went there today at 7:30. 3 cars in parking lot and one in drive thru. Took 10 min for them to get to the lady in front of us. She pulled up and it took 5 min for them to get to us. I ordered the $30 deal and his response "we're our". I said, "out of what". His response. Chicken. How do you run out of chicken at 7:30 on a Thursday night? I've always had problems with this one and, although I love KFC, I won't waste my time and energy any more. Went to Popeyes after and was thru the drive thru in 5 min. Just crazy how bad they are and have been for a long time.

I never really thought I would ever be leaving a yelp review for KFC but this place is so horrible that I feel like I need to warn others. The last time we went there the food was so disgusting that we ended up throwing everything away. It looked like they had fried the chicken much much much earlier in the day and then just try to put it in the fryer when we got there and gave it to us. It was falling apart and limp.
Ill never go here again the worst del taco I've ever been too!!! I gave this place a second chance and food was still disgusting!!!

The absolute worst KFC ever!  Walked in and guy behind counter just stood there.  I told him my order and he entered it in the computer.  The only words out of his mouth were "$24.73"  So I entered by credit card and paid.  He walked away and came back in less than a minute, dropped a bag on the counter and walked away.  No "here is your order," "thank you" .. nothing.  I thought it odd that the order was filled so quickly until I got home and opened it.  Every piece of chicken was obviously old; very dark brown, totally dried out and hard like a rock, like they were laying under a lamp for hours.  We managed to eat parts of 3 pieces and threw the other 5 pieces in the garbage.  This is not the first bad experience at this location so I should have known better ... but it will the last.  A total ripoff.  Next time I want fried chicken I will go somewhere else or drive across town.

Workers have attitude and every time I go to order food they always mess it up. I've ordered delux chili cheese fries, get home and find out that there's just chili on it. They always screw up something!!!! They are lucky this is the closest del taco to me. Otherwise, they wouldn't be getting my service period.

This place sucks. I ordered a combo and you would think they would include fries. But no instead I get attitude from the employer insisting she packed the fries. These new white bags have got to go. They can't see what they are packing. I just wanted my two chicken soft taco combo meal. I work customer service all you have to do is apologize for the mistake and ask how can you fix it. Not give me attitude and think I am lying!!! 3rd this has happened, I've let it slide last two times I gotta speak up maybe you will receive better training in communication skills. I sure hope so for your sake. :)

This is a new Burger King in White House Tennessee. The managers need to get their team members up to par. I ordered a double Whopper. I guess they were out of full size patties. So they stacked 6 jr patties on the burger. See attached pic.  Extra food....not a bad thing. Place is slow. Cashier doesn't understand the register, rarely give napkins. Get it together Burger King.

I was shocked at my meal that I just opened up from GrubHub to find a completely different meal than what I had ordered, and not only that but it was cold and put together like a four-year-old put it together.... Some cold meat on top of white rice, which was supposed to be a steak bowl!
I ordered a chicken burrito which used to be nice and big and full of all kinds of stuff, well this one was the worst one I have ever got from this restaurant ...cold, no guacamole, no rice, no nothing!!
I'm actually going to try and stop payment because the food was so terrible!

Standing here, no one in line going on 15 minutes now. I haven't been acknowledged yet. Not a single employee has attempted to make eye contact with me. Customer service is NOT a top priority. 

I haven't been to KFC in years, it'll likely be many years before I try again. Complete waste of time. 

I ended up going to Roma's Pizza right down the road and got some tasty fried chicken. Greeted right away and had my food in less time than I waited at KFC. Sad.

This is the worst Burger King I have ever been to. Orders always wrong. Ordered a whopper with cheese and got a jr whopper. Ordered 2 diet Coke's got one. Ordered an impossible burger with cheese - got no cheese. All this after being in line for 25 minutes and staff playing on phones. Other visit ordered two breakfast sandwiches and got one. There needs to be some adult supervision in these stores. Will not be returning

If I could give 0 stars I would. Normally we don't eat fast food but it was quick and fast after a long busy day. I got an Impossible Burger, I just wanted to try it because of all the hype. I will NEVER eat here again. The staff was not friendly at all but the restaurant was fifthly. And I got food poisoning from the burger. My advice is to read about the Impossible Burger before you try it!

The food has the best seasonings, you can create  the best dishes I love the brown rice, with steak black beans,cheese,touch of corn, with a side of Tortilla chips. It's great place for work lunch and something for everyone.

I love Chipotle. It is a quick, reasonable and fresh lunch time option. This is the location I go to the most as it is closest to work. Typically I order online and it is ready for me when I pick it up. This is the first time I actually waited in line, ordered, and ate in. The line moved quickly and the dining room was clean.

I swear they are more generous with the portions on dine in dinners because they don't have to put a lid on it. They really piled on the food! It was more than I could eat. My friend and I both got the burrito bowls. She went with the steak, I got the carnitas. I usually go with carnitas or barbacoa and both are great. 

One of the toughest things about going here is that the parking lot is always busy/full because it is in a busy plaza. Today we got lucky though!

I don't get what other people see in this place. I've given it multiple chances. I ordered three soft tacos. 1 steak, 1 carnitas, and 1 barbacoa. Steak was bland and cold. Pork was dry. Haven't eaten the Barbacoa yet. The hot salsa is good. The queso I guess isn't meant for me or is just different than what I'm used to. The worst part is, it is a mess to eat. I'll attach a pic of what I mean. Waaay too much sour cream. And spread it across all three tacos instead of applying it individually to each one.  Ohh, and $12 for a soda and three tacos. I can pay prices like that at most restaurants. Restaurant was clean, staff was nice, and music was better than the same old same old.

Please avoid this Chipotle at all costs. My food was wrong, service was terrible. They gave me a completely different order than I asked for and got upset that I wanted a refund because I asked for double chicken and they gave me steak, no toppings that I asked for, or my extra sides. Just avoid the headache.
Gotta love me some Colonel Chicken! The Buffet should fill us up so we have s lite Dinner! The lady here just gave me extra legs!

Because I could not leave ZERO stars.

Let me start by saying I went thru the drive thru during the down pour of rain...asked for a LARGE BREAST and a coleslaw she said 7.99 I am sorry what???? no give me a FIVE DOLLAR fill up box with a Pepsi... she asked me to drive up for price.

I get to the window and she said we don't have Pepsi... oh and we don't have the fill up box anymore that will be $8 and change.... 

Ok so if I changed my breast and coleslaw at $7.99 for a FIVE DOLLAR box to get more bang for my bucks why would I pay MORE for stuff I really didn't want. Cookies, biscuit, drink. ( you get my point)

I said forget it just give me a breast... now people it was $4.35 for this one piece of chicken... I handed her the money because my only choice was to go home and figure something out. 

Now.... PLEASE see the smallest piece of chicken they could find to give me that I just now saw when getting ready to add my side dish to it... while referring to my first paragraph where I said I wanted a large chicken breast because this store in particular is notorious for giving out small pieces of chicken but because I was drenched from sitting at the drive-through with my window open in the downpour of rain I took it I wanted to be done I had a long day it's almost 7 o'clock but this time way past the time for me to be eating dinner.

So please don't go to this restaurant they are shameful and hopefully management will see the one of many reviews I will give because I am outraged that by the time I take those bones off I may have a morsel to eat my dinner with

When i rate fast food it is based on how it stacks up to other chains in the brand.  This one is bad.  10 pieces in the 12 piece bucket and the following picture is one of them.  And no, no one took a bite of the chicken before we got it, or after for that matter.  Just an indication that the quality control is lacking.


As far as chains go, well it would be like rating a MCDonalds.  If you haven't had KFC before, you are not really missing out on good fried chicken.  But, it is a very famous fast food chain and i recommend trying it at least once in your life.  Just don't go to this one.
But only 4 a minite THC your a chicken mcnugget golden brown spicy Cole slaw bucket cup of luv..

Ordered 2 chicken sandwiches. The first bite was weird. I noticed a couple bones. Second bite I spit out and realized they put bone in chicken breasts that you would get from a bucket in between the bun. Very easily could have choked. Worst I've ever had an order from any chain like this.

Tried this place not once but twice now. Both times terrible. Food over salted in some regards but lacks flavor in others. Feels as though they try to be in direct competition with Taco Bell whom whole is not my favorite, beats this place out even with the other options they offer.

Of all of the fast food burgers, the Famous Star has to be my favorite, and literally! I request two sides of the western bbq sauce to dip and of course one must have the criss-cut  (fries). What's a burger without fries? Um...not satisfying! Lol. I'd highly recommend this joint to anyone looking for a super delicious tasting burger with fries of course! Duh!!

Got a 3 piece original recipe meal through the drive up this evening. The chicken was extremely dry and chewy which made me wonder if it had been cooked days ago and just warmed up. I won't be going back to this location again.

I had not been to Chipotle in years but my fiancé goes at last once a week for lunch and thinks Chipotle is the best restaurant invention in his lifetime.

I was out and about, starving and on a very strict diet called "Whole 30" I did a quick search on the Whole 30 website see if there was any talk about Chipotle.  To my surprise there was!  Most everything on the menu is cooked in soybean oil - not allowed on the diet but I COULD have romaine lettuce, carnitas, guacamole, and pico. Double the meat and maybe even the guacamole too.  I was ecstatic because the carnitas are my favorite anyway!  

I'm no longer on Whole 30 but will be going back to Chipotle for a healthy carnitas based salad bowl.

Over the past year and half, I have not had one of my orders done correctly. I usually go back after a few months hoping they will get my order correct...nope every single time. This past time they forgot to put steak on my bowl. 
I usually order take out or delivery. It's extremely frustrating when your paying for delivery and you have to go to chipotle anyway to get the right meal. At this point, my family will not be going back to this location just not worth it anymore. Also, don't try to call the store no one answers.

I went through the drive-through at 4:30. The young lady told me that their system was down and she could not take any orders. I asked her how long she thought it might be, and she stated that she wasn't sure how long these things took.
I called them at 7 o'clock to see if their systems were back up. The young lady on the phone told me their systems were up, BUT they just had five people come through the drive-through, ordering 16 piece meals, and they didn't have a cook there tonight so they might be out of chicken. I inquired about the chicken that goes on the chicken sandwich, and she said "oh no we don't have any of that chicken left."

Take forever. Food is terrible.  The stores are always horribly understaffed and I don't understand why people line up to buy the food here because it's tasteless and boring.

It's also too Americanized. When I order a Carnitas taco, I expect a Carnitas taco, with the meat, the onions, and the cilantro and sometimes cheese. One time my manager asked me what I wanted from chipotle and I told them I wanted some Carnitas tacos and they brought me tacos with only just plain meat and nothing else... that's not a Carnitas taco. I shouldn't have to specify that I want the things that normally come on it.

I've eaten chipotle in two different states and it's tasteless and awful and I don't understand why anyone eats here at all, much less being willing to wait in the long lines for something you could easily make at your own personal house. I mean, if you're not going to season it, or use cilantro or any spices, then why do you need to go to a restaurant? If you want boring plain food that taste like nothing, you can easily make that at home, and for less $$. I have bought fajita kits from the frozen food section that put out better meals.

They shouldn't call this chain "chipotle" because that implies it actually has flavor, and most of its customers don't even know what a chipotle pepper is, much less how it should taste or how to spell or pronounce it. This restaurant should be called "restaurant for adults who eat off the kids menu."

Like many people, I only post reviews when a restaurant is really good or really bad.  This is of the latter variety.  I picked up a bucket of original recipe chicken this afternoon at about 4:30.  When I started to eat a drumstick, I was immediately struck by the fact that it was not seasoned and was literally saturated with grease.  Another sample was the same, and my wife threw out the entire bucket after taking one bite. I've I bought chicken from this location on several previous occasions, and it was okay as KFC goes.  This time, it was inexcusably awful.

Hate to start the new years off with a shitty review but I'm am really pissed off! So here it goes, hungry 40mins into the new year thought why not deal taco here we go. Stood at the counter 5 mins before we were recognize as the 3 employees decided they would rather talk among each other then help the paying customers at the counter!  I order for me and my lady easy order epic burrito and a couple of tacos. I pay and had to ask for my recipe and drink. Their is 3 cars in the drive thru and they decided to help all of them before making my order. After 13 mins and still no food I say something. They provided me with 1/2 my order to keep us busy while they make the other half. I ask them for ranch for the jalapeño poppers we ordered and they proceeded to tell me that's 65 cents. Normally I wouldn't care about paying but we are going on 15 mins now and still not a complete order. I politely reminded them I'm 15 mins deep and still haven't my order completed that ranch should be a courtesy at this point. Silence was my response! Now the rest of my order is up.... First off how do you screw up a burrito so bad even a child can throw together a better product. My steak rock hard due to to much time on the grill the tortilla burnt had to scrape it to be able to choke it down!!! I've been coming here for years nows and I think this is my last and final draw. Next time I'm going across the street to McDonald's!  Any you want 15$ a hour. Hahaha. NOPE!!!!

Service here is the worse ever ordered chicken and strips and got home and realized they forgot the strips ....called them to let them know and how are they gonna make it rite and they said they will drop em fresh ....wow ......this place messes up every time on top of this I was told to stop crying by a man with a man bun and then they forgot my green beans after the second trip back ...unbelievable never ever going back
Nasty chicken gave a monster migraine. I pulled over to the nearest store to buy some Tylenol. I took the entire bottle in the parking lot and this is my final yelp review.

possibly the worst chipotle location ever. i always order from this one and the bowls are super skimpy and all their steak is either old/overcooked/fatty pieces, rice is undercooked and crunchy lmao. y'all need to learn how to cook

very disappointed  
i didn't get a receipt so i can't verify my order, that's the 1st issue. 
2nd issue i ordered extra crispy chicken tenders with french fries ,  didn't get that. i got original chicken n mashed potatoes with gravy.
my husband was very crossed with me n upset. 
 
3rd i asked for a ice tea n a diet pepsi. 
i got 2 diet pepsi n no cookie with my big box
4th
they rushed me out of the drive thru before i could check my order 
i'm not happy. 

gonna tell my friends n post on yelp n other review sites how badly i was treated

I went there for one single item. I requested a simple bean and cheese burrito with no sauce. Paid almost five dollars. When I opened the bag the burrito wasn't even wrapped all the way, not only that but the burrito was completely mangled, so having gone through the drive-thru was pointless...  I had to wait to eat it. Then when I got somewhere where I could, it had sauce in it. So, somehow they messed up my very simple, one-item order. Thus, I was not impressed. It tasted alright but it wasn't what I wanted. They also had wrapped it in tin foil rather then the typical green burrito / Carl's junior wrap for some reason. I docked a star for getting my order wrong, and another star for giving it to me mangled and unmanageable in a car. It literally fell apart and broke all over me. I was happy I decided not to try to eat it while I drove. I also let them have the third star because the experiences before this one were "okay" too, and I feel it would be unfair to rate them horribly after just one bad one. If they keep this up though I will have to minus another star.

Pretty stoked right now. Haven't had BK in years, and rarely eat fast food. My expectations are always really low, and just hope everything is at least somewhat warm. But ordered a Whopper and fries and both came out hot and tasted great. Really impressed. The staff also was real nice. Just wanted to give them a shoutout for doing a good job.

I've been going to this Del Taco for years and, while I wouldn't expect fine dining from this establishment, I could at least count on the food being edible.  I went there this morning after work at 4am and ordered a crispy jumbo shrimp burrito.  What I got will haunt me for years.  I never throw away food, but after the first bite of what I can only imagine was stale shrimp that had been sitting in a heat table for many, many hours, i had no choice.  Almost broke my damn tooth on that vile piece of shrimp jerky.  I will never go to this Del Taco again and will advise anyone I talk to against it

I ordered the easiest meal ever....the buy two whoppers for $5.  Although my order seemed simple...it took forever!  The drive-thru lanes were packed.  I ate my meal when I got home.  Once I touched the sandwich I immediately noticed it was cold.  This location is known for messing up orders, long wait times and lousy service during the lunch and dinner hours.  I did not appreciate waiting 10 minutes for a cold whopper and I won't be back for a long time.

I order a Whopper with cheese/ bacon and No onions. Th ere was onions and No bacon.I called and the girl told me to come back and they will remake. I got back, and a Heavy set girl, said she was the manager, said in order for them to remake, I had to bring the old one back. She actually wanted me to go all the way back home to get the old one. She became Very rude, and as I was leaving, one of the cooks, a Mexican guy, came out the door and gave me the finger as I was leaving. I will Never return to this burger king. People be earned, The Staff Sucks and need Customer Service Training. The Manager who hired them needs to be fired.

This is weird.  I don't think this KFC is the best but I don't think it is the worst KFC either.

I don't drop by right before closing so maybe the issue the others see and have noted only manifest in the later hours or right before closing.  The service isn't the best for sure but so far what I've experienced is adequate.

I don't get anything but the original two piece dark chicken and it's pretty good.  The chicken isn't over cooked, it could be in the fryer just a tad longer but otherwise it's a good piece of fried chicken.  What I find at other KFCs is that the chicken itself is fried to the point where the chicken turns a different shade of color which isn't the case here.  

I've only been through the drive thru here, never inside, so not sure how it is inside.  What I can say from the outside is that the drive thru window is recessed and it may be a reach to get you food or pay.  Don't try to get any closer with your car or you'll risk damaging your rims as there is an uncharacteristic cement curb in front of the drive thru window.

So while there are challenges, I still dig the two piece dark chicken here and I'll keep coming back for just that.

The chicken at this location is never cooked all the way. The skin is always coming off and all rubbery its disgusting. Nothing ever seems fresh either its always looking sad like its been sitting around. If you have the time and means go to the Burlington location its much better.

I should have eaten at Popeye's next door. I wanted a bacon cheeseburger with mayo lettuce and tomato and onions rings. Their marquee said you can add cheese and bacon to any sandwich. So I ordered a cheeseburger with bacon, and proceeded to tell the employee which condiments I wanted on my burger. Well that really confused her. Remember when you could "have it your way" at Burger King? Not anymore. She got so confused by my condiments request that she suggested I order a Whopper Jr. At this point the scrolling marquee isn't showing the Whopper Jr. but I trust her to know what's on it. When we got our food, my side was fries, not onion rings, and my Whopper Jr. didn't have bacon. Whopper Jr.'s don't come with bacon. The only reason she suggested it was because it comes with mayo, lettuce, tomato. Sigh!

Ordered a steak burrito, got a rice and pinto bean burrito with a little bit of cold steak in it. Chips with the queso were stale. Half the tables were closed due to Corona, the other half were obscenely filthy. Floors had discarded bits of trash and food scattered about. Didn't even look in the bathroom. 2 stars for a decently tasting queso, this locations only redeeming feature.

Service good and food better than Taco Bell and other similar competitors.  My grilled chicken avocado burrito was plumb full of meat, veggies, rice, and beans.  Not a wow in the flavor department, but very satisfying.  And huge!!  My wife's two taco meal deal was also good.
I wish that they had a better mild salsa, and that they grilled the stuffed burrito.  It would be sooo much better!  But would definitely go back if hungry for a good burrito.

Del Taco probably deserves more than 3 Stars for this review, so don't let that scare you away. The food really is good.

The good
The staffer who took my order was super friendly. Happy with the burrito so nothing to complain about there.

The meh
Due to covid there are no toppings available to add to my burrito. I don't recall being offered any.

No one else in the the dining area and while it wasn't dirty, it seems to me that with a few staff around and no customers, the tables could be spotless.

My husband went to Avon KFC, and again they left out part of our order!  The manager was outside talking to his friend at peak dinner hours instead of inside over seeing the business.  He erased our order before it was filled.  My husband ordered the new BBQ chicken strips, and they were dried up.  They put the bisquit in the tray with bbq sauce.  Tried calling to complain twice and no one answered the phone after it rang for at least 3 min.

Giving a 5 star review because this place seems underrated.

Stopped here on our way home to Philly from Boston for some end-of-vacation Whoppers. We were disappointed that the inside was closed and we had to go through the drive thru. Not sure if it's a staff thing (they had a hiring sign out), a pandemic thing, or what.

Drive thru went well. There was a pause when we got to the window and we waited a couple minutes for our Whoppers.

It was worth ittttt. These Whoppers were made with love and I feel qualified to say that because I recently had a Whopper at a Connecticut BK that I thought was good and this one topped it. So much lettuce, tomato, pickles... It was oozing mayo and ketchup. It was the epitome of what I expect a Whopper to be. If that's why I had to wait an extra minute, so be it.

So I dunno what y'all's problems have been with this establishment but my experience was a delight.

I rarely visit this location, but every time I do, I'm reminded of the reasons why. First, it is very dirty. The tables, beverage area, and counters are not clean. Second, the service is very slow and the location seems to be poorly managed. The wait times are very long and if you place a pick-up order, expect to wait a long time. Finally, the quality of the food is not great. I ordered a bowl and my husband ordered a burrito. The rice was stuck together in big clumps, the steak was fatty and a strange color, lettuce was brown and wilted, and guacamole was brown as well. I will not return to this location.

So, the first time I ordered food from this del taco was when it first opened I ordered a bean burrito and it came with a dirty fingernail in it, disgusting!

  Recently gave this place another try...customer service sucks, they NEVER get your order right, they make some pretty crappy tacos and their salad, which isn't cheap, is rotten and dirty.  Long story short, not impressed...Never returning to this location, ever.  Deserves no stars in my opinion.

My wife and I ordered a chicken burrito and a steak burrito, respectively.

We ordered rice and several other items for the burrito.

My burrito was FAIRLY infused with steak.

My wife's burrito was almost COMPLETELY rice throughout.

Needless to say ,

we won't be ordering there again .


Disappointing.

Burritos were $7.50 and $8.50 , respectively.

I've been a huge fan of Dunkin after living on the east coast for several years, and unfortunately this chain is a huge disappointment. RARELY can they get an order correct: I ordered two veggie flatbreads and ended up with two sausage sandwiches, half caf coffee is usually screwed up and the service is mediocre, usually slow with unfriendly staff. I've given this place so many chances and I don't know why. Time to find a new coffee shop.

This is the slowest service I've ever experienced. I ordered a chicken little fill up & it took 20 minutes for me to get my meal. There were three cars lined up waiting for their meals while the staff joked and laughed inside. I will never come back here & would not recommend this location to anyone.

This is the WORST Del Taco I've been to. The restroom and dining room is dirty. I can only imagine the kitchen! They seem to have forgotten that I ordered food, because countless others behind me was getting their orders. This isn't my first time coming here. I work across the highway for a trucking company. This location is the closest for getting a burrito. The other times I've been here it's close to the same as it is tonight.  If you want a way better Del Taco experience, go to the one on Northtown Lane...except Sunday's. The manager isn't there, and the kids seem to think it's party time when "daddy" isn't there.

For the 3rd time, we tried to purchase chicken and was told "We don't have any original recipe, it will be at least 15-20 minutes".  We agreed to change to grilled chicken but after a 10 minute wait, were told that the grilled chicken wasn't cooked enough and they couldn't serve it.   There was NO management person in charge - just minimum wage workers wandering around.  I say DO NOT WASTE your time and find another place.    If this only happened once I would understand, but after multiple poor experiences - and never any management, I've decided it is the KFC business model and I say "No thank you"!

The chicken is by far much better than other KFCs is the area. I would drive out of my way to go here because the food quality is much better. The staff is friendly/polite. Their cookies are always warm

Carried out a 20 piece dinner and the chicken was old and the biscuits were hard as a rock..called the kfc on rangeline road carmel and they put me on hold for 18 minutes and I hung up and called them back, the phone was off the hook..that's just sick

I came here the other day around 6pm to get an Impossible Whopper. I don't frequent fast food establishments, but this is one to which I won't soon be returning. There were a few disheveled-looking people just hanging out at some tables doing nothing. I don't know if they had already eaten and were chilling, or were simply waiting forever for their food like I was. The food took around 20 minutes to come out. Granted, there were several people in line after us and a bunch of people at the tables, so I don't know if they were just slammed at that particular time. There was also trash on a few open tables. I couldn't believe that people were so lazy and not even throwing their trash away. We did look around, though, and noticed there was only one garbage bin in the whole dining area, one right across from the front counter. Now, I'm not saying this trashy dining area is Burger King's fault, but I will say that while sitting at your table you can't see any trash bin. I wondered if Burger King, like Boston Market, had moved to model of employees picking up the trash off the tables. It hasn't, however, so please throw your trash away.
 
My boyfriend and I both ordered the Impossible Whopper combo. I was pleased with the sandwich itself for the most part. If someone told me it was meat, I'd believe it. The sandwich was huge and wasn't smashed flat - it actually looked quite appealing. The only gripe I had with it was the overabundance of mayonnaise. I don't like mayo, but can appreciate its usefulness. This sandwich, however, was swimming in mayo, so I had to scrape a bunch off in order to make it edible. Sadly, the french fries were not hot upon delivery, so they weren't enjoyable. 
I'll go back to a Burger King for another Impossible Whopper, but I would stay clear of this location in particular.

2nd time in a row ordering a kids steak meal with chocolate milk and getting nothing but rice and corn!! What can I do besides NOT order from here and definitely check the reviews to see all the 1 star reviews. Tried to give benefit of the doubt but good grief! 1st time NO milk, second time white milk and rice, nahhh, Taco Bell it is

To be completely honest, I'm not entirely sure why this location has so many awful reviews because my food (typically salad or rice bowl with chicken or sofritas) is always perfectly fine. Everything is noticeably fresh -- especially the lettuce, salsas, and guac.

The only negative aspect I've sometimes noticed is that the employees just looked drained and unhappy to be there, but who doesn't have that appearance while working in food service?? I just smile, say "please" and "thank you" to every employee that helps with my food, and I've never had any issues with attitude or anything.

Visit for yourself and see what you think ‍

Stopped here at 6:30 at the drive thru. The man was as rude as you can get. Besides the fact he was so rude, they had no extra crispy and I asked about the new spicy so he yelled and said they don't make spicy. It clearly says on the windows and menu they have the new Kentucky Spicy, Crispy, Smoky Chicken. I asked about it and he refused to answer. He said if want regular they had that. I said 12 piece chicken only. He asked what two sides. (what was he smoking?) Finally got the chicken. Figured my receipt was in the bag--NOPE!! No receipt. It will be years before I go back......

I've never had a problem with chipotle until now they put black beans instead of steak they put beans the lid looked like it had sauce and plastic glue dots on it ? and the lemonade was water and when I called they didn't pick up the phone this Chipotle SUCKS

Food is good, service is a bit slow, and their policy on Burger King app coupons is redundant. Used my app to get the $5 whopper jr meal for 2. Their app has really great deals, absolutely recommend you use it. So I used the app in the drive thru, they asked for the code at the order window. Pulled up to pay and get my food when try asked for the coupon. I told them it's on my phone, she insisted she needs to see and they ask everyone. Luckily I hadn't closed the app so it was still on my screen. Showed her the coupon and again she repeats they ask everyone for the coupon. I'd already shown her, so the added comment with attitude was unnecessary. What if I'd closed the app or it had timed out? Asking for the code and to see it seems redundant. Aside from that, the food is good.

I never thought id find myself reviewing a kfc even though; over the years i was IN LOVE with their fiery buffalo boneless wing that they discontinued. Luckily the nashville tenders are a close 2nd, as well as close to my heart. KFC is my favorite fast food joint for chicken, hands down.

Absolutely a disgrace. Ordered from drive through and the people that work there are disgusting and totally incompetent and lazy. The food was inedible threw it all out after one bite. Will never go back. They didn't give me napkins, forks or even a straw.   Chicken was cold and Mac and cheese was terrible. I guess this is why this people work there cause it's the only job they can hardly do.

"Try your best to win them all And one day time will tell.
When you're the one that's standing there, You'll reach the final bell"

First off, a little background on me. I'm a 40 year old professional account rep that enjoys a good dip in the tub once or twice per year, but I really prefer the shower.  I find getting in and out of the tub to be cumbersome, plus you're just kinda sitting in your own filth water...moving on.

If you know me, you know that I love the Popeye's chicken sandwich.  I'm assuming I reviewed it before (https://www.yelp.com/biz/popeyes-louisiana-kitchen-st-louis-4?hrid=NNZynatlOVfjP249P-9gBQ&utm_campaign=www_review_share_popup&utm_medium=copy_link&utm_source=(direct)).  It's legit, and I love it.  I also have a habit of telling most people I cum into contact with (dudes, chicks, co-workers, drug dealers, the clergy, first responders) to try that sandwich.

I recently read a review of KFC's attempt to knock Popeye's off its pedestal as the champ, so I felt I should give it a shot.  This particular KFC has let me down a few times.  It takes too long, plus the chicken quality isn't as good as local options (Porters, Gus's, Etc). That said, KFC is what it is.  Fast food fried chicken.  Much like call girls in Reno, you get what you pay for.

Yesterday was a big sports day with the AFC/NFC champ games blues a 7PM Blues start.  Needless to say, I got my average level of drunk, and didn't eat enough or switch off waters so I'm pretty rough today.  I'd call it a moderate to strong hangover.  I tried to pre-remedy this at midnight by taking a 50mg edible before bed, but that did not help.  Driving to KFC was hard because I'm spaced out.  Zero focus today.

I got up to the drive thru and ordered the sandwich meal, classic style with no pickle.  At this point, the nice young lady asked if I wanted anything else and I froze.  I locked up for about 30 seconds.  I kept telling myself to get something else, just in case the sandwich is trash, or the meal is not enough sugar and carbs to fill the bottomless pit that is my soul. I finally just said "Ya, I'll take some popcorn chicken".  She then asked what dipping sauce and I mumbled something that wasn't English.  She just said OK and assumed ranch, which was correct.  Total was $12.87.

I'll complete the food portion of this review as a direct comparison to Popeye's:

Fries - KFC fries are below average.  Not much crunch to them and they were too thick of a fry for my taste.  I'll be nice and give them a C-.  Popeyes is clearly better

Sandwich - The KFC chicken sandwich isn't bad.  SOLID B on this one.  In no way is it as good as Popeye's chicken sandwich.  It's good, but if you look me in the eye and tell me you prefer the KFC sandwich, you are either lying to yourself or you are just a moron.  They failed to remove the pickle, but that's a simple mistake (or they didn't hear me say "no pickle" or I just flat out forgot to say it because I'm dippy AF today).

Popcorn Chicken Nugs - Really above average.  I don't think Popeyes has nugs, so good on you, KFC.  That's a slam dunk win for you.  They were also somewhat necessary to order because I chucked most of the fries and was still craving more empty calories to add to my ever-growing FUPA.

In summation, I ended the meal with a weird taste in my mouth that reminds me of when you lick a 5 volt battery.  It's strange.  KFC is fine. Go there or don't.  Either way I will continue to love and support all of your food choices

I mobile ordered at this location when it wasn't too busy in hopes that maybe this time they won't mess up my order. However when I was half way through eating my bowl, I noticed that the chicken taste wasn't the usual tasty chicken I remember. That's when I noticed that the staff put steak in my bowl instead of chicken... I hadn't eaten red meat in over two and a half years so this really took a toll on my stomach. If they were out of chicken the appropriate response would be to just not add chicken into the bowl, or even call the customer to inform them but no they just decided to put steak as a replacement.

We wanted some juicy fried chicken so we, my brother and I went through the drive-thru to get some KFC Extra Crispy 12 piece chicken only. With tax it was $24.19. We were aghast at the prices of chicken. That wasn't for white meat only, no special request. It was just getting past our time to eat and a quick fix-so we thought. Tony was home making mashed potatoes and gravy. Got home, the chicken was so hard-the meat, and dry, you could have used the meat for firewood. I called them and told them nicely. They said to bring it back and they would make it right. I said I would. It was too expensive and we were too hungry not to. So to the drive thru we went and they said to come in. Now my brother is in getting new chicken.  The new bucket of chicken is hot and juicy!! If this was what I got the first time I would have given a 4 only because the price is ridiculous. The employees were very polite both visits.

I probably make it to KFC about once a year; my dad likes it and I was headed to his house with dinner. The decor is nice( very clean) and the service was attentive and helpful. They now offer a grilled option and I had to wait a few minutes.  I didn't mind when they offered me a beverage while I waited. 
Value meals include biscuit, side and beverage for $5. Chicken was moist and tasty; mashed potatoes were still very hot when I got home. Good Cole slaw, not too much sauce. Only fail was that the gravy was not on side as requested.

My boyfriend went to this KFC last night and not only did they mess up his order but he got food poisoning! He was up all night and had to call in this morning. I hope that someone from KFC reads this review and checks the chicken and/or other food items for whatever might make a person sick.

There is nothing better than Mexican fast food when you are in a hurry. We buy here and take it home since we live close.  I am giving them 3 stars for service and location. But when I compare this Del Taco with the one up in Northwest Reno, it is not the same. I find that the food is skimpy. Less taco meat, less meat in the burritos and less cheese. I have been going here for years since I live in South Reno but I have tried others ones in town when I am away from home. I have always noticed the cut backs on quality and quantity. This is not a good way to make profit as some customers won't come back. If we can, we try to avoid this spot and eat at another one. Please improve your food as the rest of my local family eats here too.

Trash. Only the Sierra Mist and the chicken was cool.
The biscuits are hard on the outside and soft on the inside.
The mashed potatoes were a nightmare.

AVOID THIS LOCATION BY ALL MEANS POSSIBLE!!!!!! I've lived in this area before KFC was built, and I only ate at this location a few times, each time was met with disappointment. No matter what you order chances are they ran out, or you will have to wait 10-15 minutes for it to cook,(reality is more like 30-50 minutes), even if your  the only customer? I visited this location twice this year, and they were either out of chicken, biscuits, or didn't get your order right or forgot an item, then you have to go through the drive thru again. My advice to the KFC Co, or the franchise owner is invest in properly training your crew and management, because customers don't want to hear excuses. Either chance the way this location operates or do the people in this area a public service and shut it down permanently!!!!
Its so bad.  Smell and funk from the meat.  I don't understand how such little care can be given to food.  This is four steps below Taco Bell, on its best day.

Went to try to see for myself why the bad rating. 
IT'S BAAAAD!
So many employees, but only 1 serving at the front counter, while there are 5 ppl at the drive thru counter. Inside, there were about 6 ppl waiting for their orders. There were 3ppl in line waiting to order food. There were empty trays of food and there was only 1 tray of meat - shredded pork. The steak tray had 3 pieces and dried out. The server had to mix the pork to hydrate the top part. There were so much spills in the counter and around each tray. I had 4 items to order and when I mentioned that, the server suddenly started getting irritated saying "I can only do 2 at a time!" I wasn't rushing him! I was merely letting him know so he doesn't move on to the next person behind me after completing 1 bowl. At the cashier, it took 3 employees to fix the entry and finally complete the transaction. 
The way ppl talk at this location is unfriendly, unwelcoming and annoyed. There's no Thank You, have a nice day! or even a simple Thank you! Not a word after giving you your receipt. 
The brown rice had so much hard bits and pieces. There's about 4 tbsp of rice, few strips of lettuce, tons of beans and bottom of the bowls were soaking wet from the beans juices! Just so unappetizing! I don't know if it's just this location or they lost touch of the company's mission and vision, or employee training is no longer a policy. Just going downhill - shame! I used to LOVE Chipotle! My first and last at this location!
My food that was delivered to me from KfC was awful my chicken sandwiches was hard and small I was very disappointed with their food tonight never again will I order from KfC again

We never received our bucket of Chicken we paid for. We have tried to call them for over ten minutes and got a loud squealing tone. Is the number even a legit number. Tried looking up the GM or DM with no success. Tried calling another KFC and was told they were not involved with that location.

Went today on my break to get one whopper jr. My bun was cold and had mold on it. I tried calling the owner. This is completely unacceptable. Went into the store to return my food when I walked I was not greeted both employees at the register where on their phones. So beware before you eat.

I leave 1 star ONLY because I can't leave a  0 at the very best I would say our food was Luke warm. I have cake sitting on my countertop that was more warm then BOTH the whopper & fries. The tomato on the burger was the skin and nothing else. (Think of it like an onion ring except it was a tomato ring). Ordered a whopper without mayo and got a burger without any type of condiments. (No Mayo, ketchup, mustard, ketchup). No need to waste my money at that location ever again.

We will never eat at a Del Taco again thanks to this location. The drive through staff has gotten our order wrong three times in a row. Not only do they forget to include items, but the food we do get is mediocre at best. The avocado is always far more ripe than it should be, refried beans are scorched, and we're lucky if the "platos" have all three items (and it comes on a single plate for Pete's sake! How can you forget to fill all three spots in the dish?!) The staff are all a bunch of kids giggling in the kitchen. Clearly little to no supervision happening here.

worst experience ever workers are very rude. i placed my order & told them my friend in the car with me wants to place a separate order & they told me they can not do that & that we would have to go around through the drive thru to place my friends order after waiting in a very long line already i was livid. me myself i ordered a $20.00 fill up meal which is suppose to have 8 pieces of chicken & i only received 7 only 1 breast & 1 thigh the other 5 were wings & the biscuits i received weren't cooked all the way, unbelievable! also at the drive through window the girl stood there both times with her back to me having a conversation with her other workers. i also went there the night before on 12-22-20 at 9:20 at night & as i pulled up to the drive thru before i couldn't even speak she said were out of chicken? i rarely go there because evertime i do it's nothing but a hassle. as me being a business owner of multiple stores in my past if my employees treating customers this way they would have been fired! i'm hoping by writing to you that someone would care about there business & would rectify this situation immediately unless you just don't care & want to go out of business. i have my receipt & my friends as well & will also be reposting this on yelp to warn other people who are already having financial difficulties not to go to your store & what they can expect. also your workers had a sign up stating exact change only? why there is no longer a shortage on change. it just seems everyone at this store is just lazy & lacking responsibility to their duties.
got the wings. came to me basically still alive, just battered. mashed potatoes were fine (hard to mess that up), but considering this is a fast food chain that campaigns off fried chicken...

I come here to buy breakfast for my shop once every couple of weeks. The food is good for the price and it's quick on my way to work. I'd give the food 3 stars by itself. 

The issue with this place is the attitudes from the employees. On most occasions I am confronted with a look as if either I am an inconvenience to their morning, or they hate their own existence. I couldn't tell which up until today. Today's experience really frustrated me because it was no longer a question. It was made very clear that the customer is an inconvenience to this business. I always place a nearly identical order, and yes it is somewhat large. 10 Epic Burritos. Today I placed my order and what looked like the shift lead at 6:10 AM on 10/18/2018 told me that anything more than 10 required coming inside to place the order. I told him it was 10 and no more. So his story changed to 10 required coming inside. Usually I am told to park by the front door and it may be a while which I completely understand. The thing that irritated me was when I asked why the requirement dropped and I watched him through the window as he shut off his headset, looked directly at me, then completely ignored me. I was stuck behind 2 other cars for about 5 more minutes and during that time he would occasionally stare at me then walk away. At this point I was pretty irritated. I was just going to leave but decided that he was going to make my employees their well deserved breakfast. When I went inside, he immediately said something in Spanish to the lady taking my order. She proceeded to give me the same "you're an inconvenience to me" look and took my order. I don't believe I was at any point rude to these individuals. I was polite and just trying to be a nice boss and buy my 9 employees breakfast. 

These employees may not enjoy their job, because it probably isn't a dream job. I get that not every job is enjoyable, buy at the end of the day the point stands that Del Taco didn't apply for you to be their employee. YOU applied to be Del Taco's employee and then accepted their offer of employment. You applied to be a customer service representative. Choose to be happy and smile. There will always be good and bad days, but from my current impression, you choose to make every day a bad day and that attitude rubs off on your customers... what a shame.

KFC is the epitome of a average chicken restaurant.
Here is why I am not the biggest fan of KFC
-I've never been a fan of the mascot, Colonel Sanders
- the chicken is usually moist and watered down in a bad way
Some positives just so you know I am not biased
-workers are always friendly
-They have a good menu (offers a good variation of food items)
However I wouldn't say that KFC is better than Popeyes. It's always compared to Popeyes but Pop's will always be the winner in my eyes.
Go to KFC if you'd like and give it a try. I can't guarantee that you'll find it odd as I do but if you do, you know where I am.

The worst customer service. After ordering 3 chicken sandwich meals the girl said she needs to check she came back on intercom and said there will be a 3 minute wait we said that was fine. When we got to the window she only repeated back 2 sandwiches when I told her I ordered 3 she told the other associate I ordered 3. The other girl came to the window and argued with me for a few minutes saying she told me when I know she DID NOT. I have three mouths to feed not two. The 1 star is only because I have to put it there.
Very slow service. They even ran out of fried chicken. I had to wait 20 minutes to get my order.

We recently seen the commercial advertising brisket on the bowl. So we wanted to give it a try and what a disappointment. First off, as usual looks nothing like the commercial. As other reviews said the portion of meat was chintzy!! When you look at this picture don't be fooled most of the dark stuff is beans.
The brisket was burnt and dry and I would not recommend this place to anyone. Also had the steak months back and that was chewy and fatty.
Good reminder to me why I don't do fast food.
I love their Macoroni and Cheese, Everytime I go to KFC I get the Large M.A.C, I do not really like their chicken that much but it deserves 3 stars but the M.A.C gets 5 stars!

Is less than 1 star possible? This place never has chicken. It's literally the only thing they make, and I have to wait for chicken.  21 minutes and counting for a bucket of chicken. I will not be back, I'll drive to another location to avoid the bullshit!

Chipotle is one of my favorite "fast food" places that I don't go to often anymore. I came here to get my fix, but the worker was pretty rude/facial expression was unhappy. 

It's like a "build your own" burrito/salad/bowl type of thing with Americanized Mexican food. Still pretty great, if you like salads and bowls. But if you want something more authentic (burrito, specifically), I suggest to go to a food truck/stand or El Guero Canelo. 

I go here for their salad bowls: I get the salad, ask for some brown rice, mixed veggies, steak, mild salsa, corn, sour cream, and sometimes cheese. If you order something like this... It will get loaded to the top and you'll be too full to finish sometimes if you are like me. (See my picture!) I think the price is okay. It can be a lot if you eat it all the time...But if it's once in awhile, I can spare ~$8 for a quick bite.

Tip: if you don't know this already...ask for a tortilla on the side, free of charge! You can either wrap your salad up or burrito bowl up. Or just eat it plainly.

Ordered via Postmates the kfc only filled half my order couldn't even fill a meal order and still charged full amount. The driver was told that they were closing at 8 and this was at 7:58 so they refused to make any more chicken, fries, or mashed potatoes and gravy!!! Their hours are until 10pm so it comes down to being lazy and not wanting to do their job. If they can't fill an online order they need to let the person whom ordered know not just half fill and order with a biscuit that is hard as a brick, a mini coleslaw not a large that isn't fresh and popcorn chicken that you can't even bite into!! And still charged $25 plus dollars for food that you wouldn't want to feed an animal, and food that is completely missing!! 
Very disappointed in the lack of taking the time to do a job. 
Will never ever go to this kfc again and I have been going here forever.

My husband and I have had a rough few experiences in the Reno area as far as food goes. We were hesitant to try this Del Taco but let me tell you it was amazing! They got our order correct, we're really friendly and most importantly we actually got fresh food! It was all delicious and reasonably priced. Definitely recommend going here instead of McDonalds or Wendy's nearby. Good job Del Taco, we will be back soon!

DO NOT GO HERE!!! I rarely write a yelp review but, this place fucked up so much. That I had to warn others. 

They wrapped my buddy's burrito so poorly that it was essentially a blob when he opened it 1 min after getting it. 

They confused my order qoth someone else's and I didnt think to check it. I got a chicken bowl and I ended up with a steak bowl. They employees seem like they are legitimately stupid and dont know what the heck is going on. 

Steer clear, and go to any other chipotle unless you you want to pay for something other than you ordered and shoddy service.

I went there and the sign stated buy 1 whopper and get one for $1. I ordered the two whoppers and a large onion ring. I was charged the two for $6 Whoppers. I went inside because I thought it was be faster since I was the only one in there. After I placed my order, about 6 customers came in and placed orders as well. One person had a big order with special instructions. The cashier was quick to take the orders and the money with everyone standing around waiting. What pissed me off was, everyone else were getting their orders except me. I as for my money back and the manager took her time and didn't say a word. Not even an 'I'm Sorry'. I've gone to that BK for over 40yrs. NEVER AGAIN!!! I will just drive the extra distance to other BKs. I would give a rating of '0' but that is not an option!

I think Del Taco is a solid three-star place.  A-OK is what Yelp says, right?

I thought Del Taco was a Texas-based chain, but their web site says the original was in California.  Regardless, if you want fries with your burrito, you've come to the right place.

It's decent fast food.  I wouldn't drive out of my way, but if I'm hungry and it's right there, sure.  Original crispy taco -- maybe nine or ten -- with del scorcho sauce packets...  No fries.

This is a new chipotle. Thought i'd try it. $20 for 2 tacos an a burrito. It was all gross.  Watching them make in work area i should of said no right get then. 
The tacos were stale. The lettuce wilted. The steak that was put in tacos an burrito was dry an tasted old.   I will never go back. Even if the food reached the ok point it was overpriced by a long shot.

This restaurant is absolutely the worst chipotle I've ever experienced. I placed a door dash for a veggie bowl. As i'm eating my food I bite into a piece of steak!! I don't eat red meat and I have an allergy to it! This is completely ridiculous. I tried calling the restaurant to explain this issue and they refused of pick up the phone at all! Do not eat here, clearly they aren't sanitary & careful with their orders! Health department & food handling needs to be involved.

So haven't had burger King in a while and decided to stop at the one on Mae Ann Blvd in Reno, NV at 7:33,pm. The lights were on in the building and the drive through. I pulled  up and the lady rudely said "we're closed" and I said " then you guys should shut off your lights" her response was (appalling to say the least) " EXCUSE ME B**CH" YUP, Burger Kings finest employee of the year! I still was craving a whopper and was going to just use faithful Sonic but decided to try one more time and went burger king on Clear Acre in Reno. Not only were they open but amazingly friendly! And they were busy!. I will make sure to tell everyone my experience at the first one until  I get an apology from that employee ( probably never happen but I hope karma bites her hard!)

Although their food was great the past 4 times I've gone there I have found chicken inside my sofritas (tofu) bowl. Im allergic to chicken and get very sick and sometimes don't catch it before I eat it and get very ill. I want to enjoy their food and say it's a great place but having to check my bite and inspect it before I can eat it isn't very enjoyable. And each time I go I ask the employees to check sofritas area to confirm there isn't any chicken in there and each time that I've found chicken in my bowl they told me the sofritas were vegan and no chicken fell in. Overall I think they need to fix their system for keeping vegetarian/vegan foods meat free.. Employees are very nice though.

How does this location stay open?  Probably the only reason is they closed the one in Washington Twp.!!  
I'm never going back--the food was fair, though it gave both my wife and me agita.  It was the other aspects of the operation that they fall well short in.  The greeting, speed of service, overall demeanor of the employees to the point of surliness almost--not to mention that they (again) forgot the honey mustard sauces.  It's like they do whatever they want to do, and they're doing us a favor by serving us!!  Are you kidding me?!?
I think part of the problem is, for whatever reason, you still can't go into the lobby to place a to go order, and wait for it.  Consequently, the drive-thru is CONSTANTLY backed up, even at off hours.  There's no break in the action.  If people could go in to order, at least that would take maybe 25 - 35% of the business, or more, off the hands of the drive-thru crew.

Save yourself the hassle and drive to Williamstown or Deptford if you're craving a Whopper!!

I placed an order on the website around 7pm. When I went to pick it up via the drive thru, the employee told me that they were waiting for the chicken to finish cooking, gave me an ETA of 5-7 mins, and asked that I pull forward and that they'd bring it out once finished cooking. There was a steady stream of vehicles after me who where receiving their orders. I waited 40 mins before my patience finally expired, parked my car, and tried to go inside. The door was locked, so I knocked on the door until the employee noticed me. I told him how long I'd been waiting, and he asked "Did no one bring your food out?" Turns out my order had been placed on the Pick Up shelf and forgotten about. I received no apology or even any acknowledgement that they'd wasted my time.
This is what you call being lazy as shit. I had so many huge steak slices in my food. You can tell by my fork. I wanna say this is just lazy people working.

We can here for dinner before going grocery shopping (as everyone knows you spend more at the store on a hungry empty stomach). I had a coupon from the mail, and my husband and I decided upon something on the coupons. 

It was for 2 wet burritos, which neither of us had had here before. We got the pork ones. They were served with green sauce and rice and beans and chips. It far exceeded my expectations. 

We will definitely be back for these again. 

Also our 2 kids devoured the soft beef tacos. 

I also like the Del beef burritos for something quick and simple. Super good with the hot sauce. And some famous del taco fries. I say famous, because they are sooo good. They serve steak fries that are tasty and never too salty.  

Also a convenient location right off the freeway in the wal mart shopping center. 

The drive thru is also usually pretty quick. All in all good review.

Had an order of 6 and drinks and chips.
The team executed flawlessly. Mostly everything was correct and it was on time.

Everyone was very kind and helpful.

I ordered extra steak and did not receive extra steak. I ordered extra beans and extra rice but did not receive extra beans or rice. The rest was amazing and flawless

Pathetic..went there tonight and ordered the $20 fast meal..Extra crispy...No white meat left only dark..After getting to the window I was ordered to pull forward and wait for the food...Final;ly got the food , went home and the extra crispy chicken was a doughy mess...kinda like slime.. on the outside..disgusting..I don't even want to give these employees one star..never going there again!!

This KFC is the worst of the worst. I have gone twice.  The first time they had closed 2 hours early because they had ran out of chicken! How does that happen if you are KFC?! I just went back and again, they were out of everything except the ingredients to make a  famous bowl. 
If I could I would give zero stars, but sadly the app does not allow for that. 
Don't waste your time with this KFC, you'll have to turn around and find somewhere else to eat.

Don't know if the yelp app is correct with their time they close, it says they are suppose to close in 20 mins but when we pulled up they said they were closed for the night. Not to mention even when you do order they never have any chicken or it will take 20 mins. I love the food when they actually have it but guess that won't ever happen.

I can't honestly give this place even one star I've never actually eaten there. I have visited this KFC three times and have left every single time. The restaurant is dirty, the customer service atrocious, and every single time, they are "out" of chicken and need to wait for it to be made. Which wouldn't be that big of a deal if the environment were inviting and clean. My opinion don't even bother.

I like their whopper cheese burgers and their new addition to their menu, The awesome Chicken Fries. They serve them with variety of sauces Zesty, Honey Mustard, BBQ, Ranch and more. Love the burger, love the fries. Great fast food. Friendly and Respectful staff. I drop by here to grab some quick lunch.

Pretty clean place and a short drive from Micron.  Now KFC got this grilled chicken thing, it makes me feel better when I eat their chicken.  And since this is a KFC and A&W partner, I get to drink the root beer right out of the tap.  They also have a drive thru which is pretty cool.  Now I think back, age 21 was like a barrier for me, I went from craving fried chicken every week to not wanting it that much, just feel like my body can't process that much fat and grease anymore, maybe that is a good thing.
The best KFC I have ever been to. Clean, excellent service and great chicken, they had just made a batch. Toilets are clean too. Very friendly.

I dont really like to review about chain restaurants all that much but I thought people should know how horrible this place is.
They are very slow, have a condescending staff and never have the food you want to order like I dont know chicken!
I only gave it two stars because there was one staff member, thats right just one out of the six I counted, who cared about the fact they were not prepared for the dinner time rush.  She was very apologetic and gave us free drinks and extra chicken when it was finally ready (45 minutes after we ordered it).  Horrible place will never go back!!

We had talked about KFC for a couple of days, and knowing it's not the healthiest alternative, we shushed the noise in our heads and drove to the Mae Anne location.  My husband went in and ordered the 8 piece meal with cole slaw, mac and cheese.
