PLEASE FIX YOUR TABLES KFC!!!

Prices have gone up dramatically and the portions have gone down at the same time.  My 2 taco and quesadilla special used to be 3-something and for an extra 59 cents you got an extra taco and a medium drink.  Now the base combo is $5.50 plus tax.  Probably a side-effect of Obamacare and the increased cost of taxes on business - but whatever it is - it's gone up 40% in less than a year.

BK promoted a hot dog revival
So I went to BK, but on my arrival
Dogs, on the menu, had been  terminated
I got there too late, I shouldn't have waited.
I could have chosen another surprise
Bacon / pepperoni or chicken fries.
To make my nutrient choice more valid
I chose a whopper along with a salad.
The whopper, flame - broiled, was highly rated,  
Though on a white bun it was  carb - onated.
The salad was small, and its date sticker --
It seems it was changed - though  I didn't bicker.
The carrots were dated, as for the dressing 
There only were two, and the fat was depressing.
The price of a whopper, eight bucks for the meal,
It's cheap at half-price, though not quite a steal.  
The restaurant? Old hat's the design
But was  kept clean,  and the service was fine. 
Still, I wish they'd held on to the wiener 
And that their choices were somewhat leaner.

I was so excited about finally having a chipotle in my town. The whole point of eating there is because their queso is amazing. They were completely out of steak AND QUESO!!! However, they didn't tell anyone that until you had already had your food started and you got to the end for the queso. Super irritated. That should be something that's told to the customer before you start creating your food considering it's clearly a best seller since the huge sign over the workers is advertising queso. Also, I've frequented a lot of chipotle locations and I know how large the burritos and bowls usually are. This location gives you half of what the other locations give you. I don't know if it's because they were running out of items or what, but it's way overpriced if I'm getting half of what I normally get. Extremely disappointed and won't be back to this location. Ever.

I love Carl's Jr. There food is great but the customer service at this particular joint is horrible. The wait is twice as long as any other cj's or fast food restaurant. The staff is always rude no matter what. I am always as nice as can be (sincere pleases and thank yous)because that would suck to work there and I feel for them but they continue to be rude every time. I just went in there and they messed up my order and when I told them they acted angry and made my sandwich really fast and shitty because they were mad. Absolutely ridiculous. The only reason there is one star is because I enjoy their food. Everything else? Shit.

Hep one star is about it.  Lame restaurant unfortunately.   Service is not friendly or hospitable.   Shakyra was the manager and took order.  No friendly greeting, connection or even grunting. Just no communication.     Too bad because KFC chicken can be so good.   No wonder chick fil a is taking over.

I would give this a -10 stars but I had to give at least one for sake of review this is absolutely the rudest worst Del taco I've been to Reno Las Vegas and California soon as I go and I'm waiting there everybody is moving back-and-forth the manager tells me I have to wait and walks away then she proceeds to come back to the register slight her car and walk away for another couple minutes then I sick and my children please have some water while we're waiting and she made me wait even longer than a gentleman came up to the register and helped us he was very nice nobody gave me a receipt so I waited there forever at least 10 minutes for my food to be delivered they kept on calling different numbers but I didn't know what my receipt number was because I never received a receipt so they called an order out about two or three times and I asked the lady politely I said is this my order and explain to her when I ordered she didn't know I looked in the bag had to figure it out myself and I said I'm sorry I don't have a receipt can you please give me a receipt because I'm getting reimbursed for this order and she had a problem getting my receipt I will never go to this Dell taco again the food was subpar and now I remember why I haven't been here in six months  I don't know how in the hell this woman became a shift manager she's got the personality of a wet noodle I'll get more reaction out of a stone wall no apologies no hi may I help you know customer service skills whatsoever

Literally the WORST fast food establishment I have ever been to. I've given them chance after chance to redeem themselves. Tonight was a real winner. I'm ordering drive thru since I have a whiny baby in the back seat. When I pull up to the window to pay, the manager just has his hand out for payment. No greeting or anything, just takes my card and swipes it. He hands me back my card and walks away from the window muttering "every time I try to do something, 15 more f*cking people pull up". Nice, right?  So I figure they're really busy and try to give him the benefit of the doubt and ignore his extremely rude attitude. He hands us our tray of beverages and then our bags of food. I had to ask for the juice box that comes with the kids meal. No parting remark but I made a point to tell him thanks and have a good night. I may have had a slightly sarcastic tone but I dealt with his awful mood so he deserved it. Then I pull into a parking spot to check to see if our orders were correct. I had a gut feeling something would be wrong. Well sure as shit they forgot chicken fries for a meal and put everything on a whopper that was supposed to be plain. That was it.... I pulled up to the door, placed everything on the counter and asked for a refund. I just couldn't take anything more. Please avoid this place at all cost so they knock it down and put up another establishment worthy of our patronage.

I kid you not, the guy gave us a hole in the drink after incorrectly trynna get our food. To make matters worse, Jason was a manager and served us poorly. I got the drink all over my seat and the food was on the verge of ok. I love my chicken but I can't trust this place. Stephanie was able to help us and make sure we're okay afterwards though.

Probably the worst fast food experience I've had. A few weeks ago my family and I hit Carl's Junior after busy day of moving. We used to love Carls Junior but had been living in an area where there wasn't one. We waited in the drive thru for over 20 minutes. We ordered 4 western bacon cheeseburger meals. When we got home...not one had cheese. I phone the restaurant and the young lady who answered said she would put out names on a meal replacement list. So, 8/11/17 my husband and I decided to cash in on our replacement to feed our teenage boys. A young man named Jesse helped my husband and I. Went went inside because the drive through was packed. The young man struggled to find our names on "the list" and then struggled to comp the food in the system. The general manager was present the entire time. He stood back in the kitchen/ grill area and not once offered his support. Heck he could have saved everyone some pain and suffering if he had just come out and helped. All the while this young man Jesse muscled through the awkward situation, answered phone calls, dealt with other customers and tried to be as graceful as possible. I have this place a one-star because the management is awful. The guy is lazy and has no business being in charge. Jesse however deserves a raise and a promotion. We won't be back to this location.

Del Tacos wait time to begin with was far too unacceptable. For a small order for 4 people including 3 of those orders being the same item, the wait was over 20 minutes. The food once received was cold dry and all around a disgrace to fast food worldwide.  The best part about to meal had to be the drinks as they were just regular old fountain drinks and not much could be done to ruin them. To sum it up: go to Taco Bell

JOKE. An absolute joke. 

I pulled into the drive through at 12:15 (aka prime lunch hours) with no one else in line and was greeted with "hang on a second". I've had slow service here before, so I broke out my stop watch and decided see how long "a second" was. 

I was finally greeted around the two minute mark. I ordered a ham egg and cheese (with an extra egg) and a single scoop of Heath bar ice cream. 

I was informed they were out of ham, so I requested bacon instead. 

Pulled around and was told they also did not have Heath, so I requested Reese's instead. 

Now I'm waiting...and waiting. I stopped my timer at 9:39 because my order was finally complete. 

As I pulled off I checked my bag and realized I received a sausage muffin with no extra egg. Around I turn and walk inside, proceed to burn another 5 minutes while my order is corrected , and get no heartfelt apology for all of these troubles. 

Joke. An absolute joke.

We went here again for the 4th time in the last few weeks, before 9pm...a mistake as usual. After 20 minutes of waiting in the drive thru line (and cars were behind me so I wasnt able to back out) I go to order KFC and am told theyre "out of chicken". I say AGAIN "Its not even 9 and youre open until midnight, why is this every time I come here?" I was informed quite rudely that they are not open until 12am only until 10pm (still over an hour away at this point) so therefor my only choice is tacos. So I ordered, then waited in line for ANOTHER 20 MINUTES. I finally reach the pickup window, where they tried to hand me an order that wasnt even close to being mine with a "Thanks have a good night." And he disappears for another 5 minutes!! He finally comes back, thinks im the next car, and tries to hand me another bag of food. I ask for my drinks I had ordered; he asks what they were. I said "I live locally and am NEVER coming here again". 40 minutes wasted for nothing. DO NOT GO HERE EVEN IF YOURE STARVING, SAVE YOURSELF.

I've heard of people having bad experiences here but I never have (knock on wood) I live nearby and normally get Popeye's if I feel like fast food fried chicken but sometimes get the craving for KFC because of the Mashed Potatoes n Gravy. Unless they have a deal going on I don't bother because it's getting expensive for meals there to the point where it's just cheaper to eat at a sit down. But chicken is hot, haven't messed any orders yet...

This place really deserves zero stars.  The drive thru attendant took forever to ask for my order. Then he tells me "we're out of onion rings". So I ordered the fries and impossible burger. Drove around and saw not a single staff person insight.  Waited exactly two minutes For someone to at least tell me that someone will be with me. Nope!!! So i pulled off. As I'm driving around, I see bags of trash and boxes that made the restaurant appearance look like a dump. Glad the attendant didn't come to the window after all.

Multiple mistakes: wrong side, wrong chicken recipe.  I can't know for sure but I am highly confident I observed my order being handed to another vehicle who a few minutes later returned it.  I really hope they remade it.  My son has an egg allergy so the chicken recipe wasn't just about taste preference.  Expected me to drive another 30 minute roundtrip to exchange and refused to return/refund.  I should have just went to Ravanelli's.

I made a pit-stop to this Burger King location for lunch, today. My visit was dine-in. 

I have been keeping track of certain things, every time that I come here. Sometimes, it's great. Other times, it's terrible. It truly all depends on who is working. When the General Manager is present, everything seems to go flawlessly. 

Today, I noticed that every single one of the available tables/booths were not cleaned, nor sanitized, following Covid-19 precautions. Crumbs, Salt particles, Ketchup packets everywhere, used Napkins left around, etc. I don't know if it was just a bad time when we walked in, or what the situation was. The drive-thru line was empty, and there was nobody else in the dining section but us. 

The younger Male Cashier we had, seemed to not give a care in the world, and had a bad attitude. He also lied straight to my face when he said that my food was just then cooked-to-order. It was very obvious that my other items had been sitting out for a long period of time. 

On a more positive note, my Double-Whopper Sandwich was delicious! Every once in a while, I love to enjoy an occasional Whopper of some kind from Burger King.

Believe all the other reviews.  This place is so bad that it actually made me want to leave a review for a fast food restaurant.  There were just a few cars in the drive through at lunch time and it took close to 20 mins for a whopper and chicken nuggets.  Not sure how that's even possible.

Stopped here for lunch while attending a conference at Covenant Seminary. Had a steak burrito bowl and it tasted as good as usual. They went a little light on the rice and meat, but otherwise, a decent experience. The place was empty, which was nice, since Chipotles are typically packed. It likely helped that it was a Saturday.

Go here way more often than I should! That said, rating this against other nearby fast food joints they're pretty good. Think that comes from a few areas:

Accuracy of the order - Rarely get home to see incorrect items

Quality - Again, for fast food, having fresh ingredients, having the meal by warm by the time I get home. Stuff not spilling out of containers. 

Friendliness/Service - Always friendly in the drive through. When my dogs ride along they frequently get a free piece of chicken as a treat!

Variety - How can you beat a joint KFC and Taco Bell menu?

Speed - This is the one area where they fall down. At prime times, the drive through line can take a long time.

Get your orders right, like read your tickets, and stop being so rude to customers and blaming them for your mistakes. Oh, and why is your milkshake machine always on the fritz? Either lazy employees or cheap owners who refuse to buy a new machine. No wonder so many BK's are going out of business. Oh, and stop trying to cheat when you feel lazy and don't want to go to the back for more buns, a whopper simply doesn't fit on a Jr bun. Lazy, lazy... Yet you want the minimum wage to be raised? Take some pride in your work. If you can't, you shouldn't have a job. Simple as that.

Walked in yesterday and the lady mgr let me stand at the counter for 5 minutes and try to find a coupon on my app. Didn't offer to help me or just go ahead and give me the whopper meal for 5 bucks anyways. Just let me hanging there. Finally a young girl named Amber helped me out. Thank you Amber I got to eat lunch!

This is the last time I'm wasting any money at this place I just don't understand how this one kfc can be so bad when the others are so much better Last night I stopped by and ordered a 5 dollar fill up I asked for original got crispy asked for butter and honey got NONE The chicken was old and cold and tasted like crap I hate writing bad things but this is like 5th or 6th time that I have gotten crap from this place and there is no excuse for it there was one car ahead of me and it was not at a busy time I have heard one excuse after another they were training a new crew so on and so on If you want decent KFC go to the one on Oberlin Rd they at least have chicken you can eat

I ordered the mac and cheese bowl, asked for the chicken  Not to be real crispy  and one of the workers assured me that it wouldn't be. I use to love their macaroni and cheese but it was flavorless, not very good and the chicken looked Nothing like the pictures, hella small little hard bites!! I asked if I could  get more that was softer but the toothless lady at the register said that they just came out of the fryer and they all look like that..smh. This was nasty as F**k!! I will never again:(

I stopped by this location on a Sunday early evening to try the impossible burger and the young lady at the register had an attitude. I spoke to her with a smile and asked her if she was okay and she said no. I'm thankful that its not easy to take on other people's negative energy because she was exuding it. Yikes. 

I placed my order for the impossible burger without cheese as I wanted to taste the burger without the added cheese goodness, with a small fry and small beverage. I took my cup over to the soda machine and they were all out of small lids. I notified the manager who shouted back to an employee to refill the lids and after three attempts the manager ended up giving me a lid for behind the counter.

I am happy to report that I enjoyed the burger. It reminded me of a whopper (real beef burger) so I was happy.

The fries were fresh but the service wasn't. It really is offensive that the Employees were messing around and one says to the other(as they are going on break):'we enjoy your crappy burger king. Hahhahahahhahahah' . Like I just spent $8 on an overpriced whopper meal- I don't want to hear 'crappy' from u.

This chipotle is consistently terrible. I went in at 8:15pm on a Tuesday to a long line that was barely moving. I stood in line for 15 minutes and watched the people working start orders then leaving to go in the back. They all opened refrigerators and went in the back with the gloves on they wore to grab food without changing them when they got back. The line was messy with food all over the surfaces. They were out of black beans and steak, both of which I generally order, and said they wouldn't be making more even though they had over an hour before closing and a line of people. The lettuce for the salad was almost empty and what was left did not look fresh. The staff was slow, and seemed uninterested in anyone they were serving, and there wasn't a manager of any sort in sight. Needless to say I didn't stick around to eat, and after many disappointments I doubt I will again. 

Do yourself a favor and go across the street to Qdoba where the staff is always friendly and fast and the food's always fresh.

Website says open at 6 am. Sat in the drive through for 3 minutes waiting for someone to take my order. Drove up to the window and knocked on it. A rude ass lady yelled that they weren't open yet. I'd give a half star if I could.

I just bought a 2 pc combo and a chicken sandwich, the only reason i give 1 stars is because the dark fried chicken is good, but fried the chicken sandwich is super dry and old, the same with the fries, looks like the fried in advance and they let it seat under the heat for a long time, i bought it on July 7 around 8:30 pm
The steak was cold cleaning or slightly wiping the table of with a dirty rag? Not the best chipotle i been to

I've now been here several times in the past few months. I knocked off a star because the food isn't always fresh looking. Today I had the steak since it looked fresh. It was indeed very good. Service was fast and friendly. 

Last few times have been fine as well. No major complaints.

i ate at this chipotle today and it tastes okay per usual, but these people are so STINGY. the manager was STARING at how much rice she put in my bowl because god forbid she but one grain of rice too much. then they put like 6 tiny pieces of chicken and i asked for a lot of cheese and they gave me barely any. i'm paying $10 for this bowl and they can put however much shit i want in it thank you very much. i'm very disappointed. and my friend that was dining with me had 2 out of the 6 pieces of steak in her bowl taste like rubber.

Since I'm home from Christmas I've been coming here every morning for a coffee! The service is quick and everyone is very nice. 

On my last day here I decided to try the beyond meat sausage sandwich and it did not disappoint. It tastes just like a real one of their breakfast sandwiches- so cheesy and delicious! I highly recommend for my fellow vegetarians and those who enjoy saving animals or eating healthier! 

I took off one star because one of the times I was here I received the wrong drink but luckily I liked it lol.

Based on taste alone, this is one of the better KFCs that I have been to in the area.  Why 1 star you ask? Because your order is rarely correct and/or you have to wait an extra 30 minutes to get it. I am actually waiting yet again for chicken at this very moment, and this is giving me all of the time I need to write a Yelp review. It doesn't matter what time you come; there is no chance of NOT waiting.  Don't come too late though, because they stop cooking chicken entirely about an hour before close, so you can only choose from what remains at that point. I only ever order extra crispy, and I have been given original on multiple occasions.  I only ever order dark meat, and I magically end up with at least 1 breast in my bucket. Unrelated to the service which leaves a lot to be desired, I think KFC's prices are too expensive for what you're getting.  I can get a whole chicken at the Publix down the street for $7 and change, but an equivalent amount of chicken here is 2.5x as much! Since my picture is on this post, today will definitely be my last visit. I don't want anything "extra" in my food, and I need to go on a diet anyway....

Stopped here during late dinner time (6:45/7ish) on Friday night, no line and super quick service. Ordered the chicken tender meal, an iced tea, a lemonade, and an extra side of potatoes. Only received one set of utensils even though the two drinks and extra side should've indicated two people splitting a meal, and the meal we received was all bone in items - wings & thighs, no tenders in sight. Our food was nice and hot, but it wasn't correct which unfortunately we didn't realize until we were home; they placed the two orders of mashed potatoes on top of the chicken all in the same box so we thought it was good until we shuffled things out & saw the chicken was all wrong.

I went in Friday night at 9:40. I realize that it's twenty minutes until close but it was obvious that the staff was put off with my arrival. They had started cleaning up and had to put food back in there bins to serve. Additionally, they were out of cheese dip and guacamole. I ordered a chicken bowl and a steak bowl and the chicken was luke warm and the steak was cold.  If your employees don't want to serve all foods at proper temperature, please change your hours to 9:30pm to serve the public as expected.

The rudest customer service I've encountered at a Dunkin' Donuts in my life. I asked about the Go2 $3 combo. Marta I. took our order and was not helpful and had an attitude when I asked if they were allowed to substitute the sausage for bacon. Any professional working in customer service would've just said "no sorry" or that they don't do that. Instead, she rudely said "No we can't do that bc it comes with sausage. That wouldn't be a Go2." Then she asked "what do you want?" I ended up not ordering anything because of her unprofessional attitude. My friend ordered a Big N' Toasty and she charged her extra for bacon. ??? Do yourself a favor and go to a different Dunkin.

EASILY the WORST Chipotle I've ever been in and that's saying something because I WAS INFECTED WITH E.COLI AT ANOTHER LOCATION. Where they make your food is absolutely FILTHY. All of their optioned ingredients are just all over the place. They are careless with cross contamination. Further, there was beef in the sofritas, corn in the sour cream etc. They dropped a ton of chicken in a vegetarian burrito. Then on MY burrito where I had chicken, was so overcooked it was like eating burnt wood. The portion sizes were tiny, the soda machine hardly ever works well. Customer service is mediocre. The man next to me asked them to make his burrito elsewhere because he has a bean allergy. He then said to me "this place is filthy, I'm not trying to take a trip to the ER tonight." Hopefully the man is okay but my goodness. Just do yourself a favor find a different chipotle.

The Terminal 2 Concourse E Burger King

    Facing a low of sitting through an uncomfortable flight, I was willing to pay a high price for a mouth watering Whopper with Cheese. Located in Lambert Saint Louis International Airport in Terminal 2 Concourse B next to a Dunkin Donuts and Baskin Robbins, this Burger King is a hungersaver. Facing a long uncomfortable flight the inflated prices were worth it to me. I believe it was over $11 for a Whopper with cheese meal. 

  Where the prices separate it from the majority of Burger Kings, management challenges keep in aligned with several franchises. In my opinion Burger King serves one of the best fast food burgers with the Whopper at the same time that many locations are management-challenged. Here you have a Burger King in the main airport serving the Metropolitan Saint Louis area and there is the same staffing as a highway strip location. The few employees were doing the best they could with the few hands that they had. Speaking of few, this applied to the tables which requires a trek to the gate seats to enjoy the food. At any rate my food arrived at a time that was too close for comfort to boarding the plane where I'd end up eating the Whopper with cheese. 

   Although this Burger King like several others has its challenges, it is a hunger saver before flying in the skies where restaurants don't exist. Owing to the fact that it filled me up with a delicious Whopper with Cheese and fries, I give it 3 stars.

This location needs work!  When we arrived at lunch time. 1:20.  No chicken no beef no brown rice.   no forks.   We waited for the chicken and brown rice (about 5 mins) but were told  steak would take forever so didnt wait for that.  Thus, my son got a burrito he didnt want.    Anyways, the "general manager" sensed my frustration and was gracious enough to offer me a BOGO card.  So..... if i come back and spend more money (after my $40 family lunch) they will give me one free.  no thanks. I will be driving to  the westshore location.   One last thing.  the gentleman cutting the chicken gave us all a dirty look when we asked for steak.  It was cooked but he was cutting chicken and would not stop to offer us steak.  

This location will not survive with this type of service.  And , there is enough negativity surrounding Chipolte that at least their workers should be  trained on customer care!

Tried to get some food the other night and before ordering was told someone had ordered 50 tacos and it was going to be 10 to 15 minutes before they could take my order.  Think I'll stick with the Del Taco in Meridian for my cheap Mexican food fixes.

I've been to this Chipotle countless times however it's only been getting worse and worse over the years. This last experience was especially appalling because of the behavior of the staff and I have officially decided to never come back here again. 

Upon walking in, there were signs written in sharpie claiming "NO RICE". This was not the case, as they had plenty of rice that the worker seemed to be mushing into a ball with her hands before placing on a bowl of lettuce for a customer. The line was move HORRENDOUSLY long and moving slowly because the employees were flirting with each other and messing around in the back. All these things, I looked past because I was hungry. BUT THEN...

I'm a vegetarian so I do not eat meat. My friend does not eat pork for religious purposes. In all other Chipotles, this has never been a problem since you pick your own ingredients. NO SIR NOT HERE, the employee who was attempting to serve us, was mixing the pinto beans (made with pork bone) with the black beans. She then flung shredded pork all over my friends' burrito, and within the sofritas and other ingredient containers. When my friend kindly asked her to make the burrito again, since she could not have pork, the employee literally snickered in our faces and asked rudely "oh do you want me to change my gloves too?".  This is the food industry, she should know better.  

Being, insulted and hungry, we decided to go to the Chipotle in Wayne which was the best choice we made all night.

Litterally always out of stuff.
Tonight we ordered a Salad and Bowl on the App.  They were out of the Salad Dressing and Salsa.  Luckily we were planning on getting chicken as they were out of steak as well.

Last time, they were out of cheese and lettuce.  They ended up just giving people queso for free since they were out of cheese.  Its hit or miss if they have steak, id call ahead

Service hear was fine,cleanliness was great chicken overpriced but good,mash potatoes and gravy now in undersized plastic containers but the real pisser was that the honey for your biscuit was not honey only flavored with honey! It was called honey sauce! High fructose corn syrup, corn syrup,sugar, honey, molasses, water,citric acid, flavoring, magic acid.

Not great tasting chicken, with the skin just peeling off while in the bucket before I could even grab my first piece. The sides were ok. Biscuits are always good. But something about their traditional recipes were off.
I come to this location quite often i'm a little late for this one but when I came in I tried to do a possible wHopper I did not like it at all sorry BK bring back the ribs and better tacos

Impossible Whopper.  Finally we can go grab a fast burger with our carnivore friends.  Tasted great and this particular Burger King was clean, had quick and friendly service, and was close to the house and on the way to airport. Perfect.

The one star on this review is related to their new "box" meals. If they have these to compete with the Taco Bell craving boxes, they did a poor job. The food tasted good but the size of the tacos were like mini tacos! They are more like appetizer boxes! At least the Taco Bell craving boxes have regular size tacos. Total ripoff at Del Taco. Don't waste your money as you will still be hungry....

I've been to this location several times over the years.  I believe I remember when it first opened about 10 years ago.  Every time I've been there, service has been good.  It's usually not too busy.  Prices are usual for Dunkin.  Food is usual for Dunkin.  They have the beyond sausage sandwich and espresso, which is what brings me in the door.
Chicken tasted old, mased potatoes had a crust on the lid... as if it was pre made and stuck under a heat lamp. I get it.. what do you expect for 5 bucks.... maybe edible food.

Ya know, sometimes you gotta give in once in a while to that fried chicken craving. 

Just don't do it here. 

Dirty and old, broken down seating area. Staff who look mad that they have to work there.

Ugggh. So sorry I wasted money here.

This Burger King was unprofessional and untimely. I went there tonight and the drive thru took very long. I said hello about 3 times to the drive thru speaker and there was no response and finally after 3 minutes one of the girls started laughing on the drive thru speaker and said "order whenever you're ready" while still laughing loud on the speaker. I ordered 2 cookies and a whopper w a coupon when I pulled up she told me that she only had one cookie and that I had to find something else for a dollar, I said ok I'll have that one cookie and I'll buy a drink , she said ok then I pulled off and she did not put any cookie in the bag or hand me a receipt. And she gave me diet lemonade when I ordered a regular.

Pretty good if you like cold food, ignorant people throwing ketchup, receipt and change at you in one hand in the drive thru and getting your order wrong. They know your not going to go back afterwords to fix it, since you're already home by then. I order a dbl whopper, paid extra for it and got a single. I should have known better than to even give them a shot. Do yourself a favor and go to Five Guys down the road. It'll end up being cheaper and less headache.

Didnt get a picture due to wolfing this down as soon as it was opened. Stopped in due to hanging by the hospital and was a bit worried with the low stars and rating. Normally not something you see with a Chipotle.  The place seemed great. Staff was observing and following COVID requirements in place, were very energetic, and seemed upbeat to serve. They were out of steak when I came in but it was fine as I just got chicken. Maybe I'm too easy to please? Was still very tasty and set up well as they always do it!  Hand sanitizer stations are at entrance and near register for convenience and work (thankful for that). Only loss of a star due to restroom (told the staff and they said they'd get on it) being pretty jacked up and the card machine was being funky. Still, no reason to avoid this place. Still a good place to grab food and run. Loved the mini Tabasco bottles.  Brought me back to MRE days.

First let me say that I am a Chipotle fanatic.  True story - I used to work next to the ground-zero E. coli-ridden Chipotle in Seattle, and would still walk by the restaurant weekly to see when it would be open again.  No virulent disease could have killed my loyalty to Chipotle.

Unfortunately this particular location disappointed me last night.  I ordered my go-to gluttony bowl with rice, steak, corn, sour cream, and cheese.  Everybody knows they're kind of stingy with the meat at this franchise; that's not too big of a problem for me.  What bothered me was the server ladled a disproportionate amount of sour cream on the bowl, and then over-topped with cheese.  These are not ingredients you can take back.  I gave it a try anyway but it was like I was eating straight up milk.  The ratios were all wrong.  So much dairy overpowering the rice and steak.  I've never been let down by Chipotle until yesterday.

I'll stick to my east-side Chipotle location.

Absolutely disgusting. I went through drive thru and order a 2 piece white.. when I got home I opened it the chicken was so dried out and straight rubber I couldn't eat it.. wasted 7.00. Never again ..

Ordered a steak bowl with guacamole. Delivered timely but order didn't have steak OR guacamole. Called restaurant 4 times, think someone picked up once and then let the line sit and then hung up. Drove to restaurant and asked what happened and see 4 people working there sitting and laughing. Not one picked up the phone, all I was offered was a new bowl. Not even a sorry or gift card or anything. I expect to be contacted. I have been very loyal chipotle customer and even was an intern for chipotle in tampa during college. This location has consistently messed up delivery orders and cares nothing about the customer. I also expect a refund as it defeated the purpose of delivery I had to drive there to get it fixed. Unacceptable.

Got my order delivered with no condiments at all. No honey mustard for the chicken. No ketchup for the fence fries. No honey or butter for the biscuits. Super disappointing that you cannot read what should have been included in the order.

Have you ever had someone say the words, "have a nice day", but their tone, facial expression, and body language really says, "go eff yourself"? Well, that was the last time I tried to tolerate Del Taco.   
I know what you're thinking, I should know better. It's gross food. Granted it was the holidays, and I just wanted a breakfast burrito to eat on the fly while running errands. The 10 minute wait in the drive thru should have been a red flag, but I was stubborn.
The Ranchero Burrito was an abomination.  It has some oily mystery meat clumped up into one end, and some green slime that may or may not have been a gauc clone glopped into the other.  The tortilla was stale, dry and cracked, like it had been left out uncovered, and promptly spewed the contents out onto my coat while I was driving.  Grrrr!
Sometimes you just want a quick guilty pleasure fast food item on the go.  Sometimes you just want to spread Christmas cheer to a grumpy cashier. Sometimes, you strike out on all of it, have to throw the nasty burrito out and maybe saved yourself a whole day of the bubble guts.  Either way, Del Taco, you win.  I'm OUT.

If I could give them no stars I would, it's a shame you have to give at least one star to start a review. My family and I are vegan and it is a challenge finding vegan fast food eats around town. One of our all time favorites WAS Chipotle. The reason I say was is because yesterday after ordering our normal vegan burritos we got home, starting eating and noticed 2 big pieces of steak in one of the burritos. Now for us all being vegan it's a lifestyle, a religion we follow and it's more then just finding something in our food that shouldn't be there it was an animal that had suffered that we absolutely don't believe in eating or harming in anyway for that matter. Not only did that make my family and I instantly sick to were we couldn't eat nothing for the rest of the night but it went against our believes and truly made us and our household just feel somber. When we first started going to chipotles as vegans we did our due diligence asking about cross contamination, how the menu ideas are stored, prepared, and served, and was reassured they make it a priority not to cross contaminate, as well as it being an option on PETA website for vegans and vegetarians, well apparently that wasn't the case for my family and I last night and we are beyond deeply disappointed and feel disgusted to have eaten there so many times. I'm currently in the process of writing PETA as well to have this addressed. Now for others I can see how this may seem like not a big deal but when you have a life style that you religiously follow and are passionate about its insulting for someone else to interfere with your beliefs. Now I understand accidents happen but weather it's an accident or not someone needs to be held responsible for it. I of course immediately called the chipotle location on broadway located by park mall where we had ordered and reported what happened trying to hold my tears back and they offered to make me another burrito, uh absolutely not are you kidding me my family and I are never eating at a chipotles again. I spoke to the manager to get a refund for the food I purchased since it wasn't hardly eaten nor would it be and he said since it was place online or on the mobile app he couldn't help and I could google a number for chipotles customers service and call them directly, wow I felt like another slap in the face I said,"no you guys are the ones that did this you need to google and give me the number to call in order to have this taken care of if you don't have it", like wtf. Mind you I was mad but kept it professional the whole time I was talking to them, the manager Luis placed me on hold then came back and said he would call the main number or whatever and have someone call me back, he took my name and number but of course here we are the next day and I still haven't heard anything. I find it beyond disheartening that not only did I find meat in my burrito but the customer service and level of responsibility was so low it's extremely dissatisfying and disappointing to say the least. If this was handled properly with sympathy and empathy then I probably would not have even written this review or contact PETA. What a shame. The worst part is it was such a small order like $15 the store could have easily fixed it. For us it's definitely not about the money but the principal, if my 6 year old son gets sick because he's not use to eating animal products then that's not something that can be compensated so let's just hope none of us ate any or any of us get sick from this experience. I just can't stop shaking my head. Again what a shame. I will be calling them back today to have this addressed for the second time which let's be honest it should have been handled the first. 

So it's 10-16 and still no refund I emailed them and they said they would have another check sent kind of ridiculous it's taking so long to resolve this matter

The incompetence knows no bounds.

I keep swearing never to go back, but then a few years go by and I let myself get drawn in by the memory of what it used to be. Time to let it go. I literally cannot recall the last time I placed an order with any Dunkin in the Spring Hill area and actually received what I ordered. Today was the last straw. My husband asked for a turkey, bacon, cheddar flatbread-- the same thing we've always gotten-- and what we received was barely identifiable. We had to look at the tag to find out that it was a spinach-egg, turkey-sausage, and bacon on some kind of wheat pita bread!!! And this is after he corrected the order several times! I'm seriously curious as to how these people are able to dress themselves in the morning, let alone get behind the wheel of a vehicle and drive to work. Explains why traffic in Spring Hill is such a nightmare... We've got assholes like THIS in front of us!

This was the worst Chipotle I have ever visited. First there was a misunderstanding over a kids meal, I decided no to get it. Though I'm sure the misunderstanding was on my part. However what happens next is completely on the staff at chipotle. First I order a steak and chicken bowl. She says it was a wait on chicken, never mentioning there was a wait on the steak too. As there were five of us and we all wanted chicken and/or steak we had to step to the side. Then once the chicken comes up, she proceeded the fix my requested bowl. She asked again what I wanted, again said steak and chicken. When the bowl came down the line, I asked was there steak in the bowl. The swine staff member said you didn't ask for steak. I said yes I did. Then they say it's a wait on steak and we are again asked to step to the side. So while waiting on steak, the chicken, rice and beans are getting cold in the bowl on the line. Then finally I get my steak and chicken bowl. We all walk out to sit down and the the dining area is filthy. We have to ask for a towel to clean a table off. They send someone out who proceeded to wipe the food on the table off onto the floor where our feet have to be under the table. I start digging through my food for all of the steak to still be raw. It was jus medium, it was raw like it had just been cut from the cow. I never miss an opportunity to stop at a Chipotle when I'm out of town, because there not one in my home state. But the service, food quality and cleanliness of this Chipotle were awful.
When the impossible whopper first came out , it was great. Now they come out cold and barely anything on it when you ask for all the toppings. Lost my business.

1 star is far too many for this location. This is by far the worst Hardee's location there is. There has been times I've gotten there in the morning and they have a homemade sign on the door saying "lobby closed, drive thru only." I work nearby so I've frequently visited this location thinking "it can't be as bad as the last time" and it always is! Need to start from scratch with staff. New manager, new employees, new everything!

This location is always a joke! Every time I go to this location they are always out of something. One time they even were out of chicken, how do you advertise to be a chicken fast food place and not have any chicken. The staff is rude and slow. Tonight I get in the drive through around 8 this evening, I order a pot pie and original thighs- they are out of everything. All exterior lights were off, including the drive thru menu. HATE this place! Don't even waste your time!

Say it isn't so Chipotle....NO GUACAMOLE OR SOUR CREAM today!! Oh my..that is what totally makes their food so darn yummy.  They did inform me before we ordered that they were out of guacamole and sour cream but we had our taste buds ready for Chipotle.  My hubby and I both ordered the carnitas bowl with brown rice.  I love their food because it is so fresh! I did miss the guacamole and sour cream though..that is why I only gave them four stars.  They were all masked up and ready to go.  They do a heck of a to-go business.  Will be back and pray have all the fixings available.

ZERO STAR! 
Ordered 3 crisscut fries and they were lazy to make em and only gave us 1... Smh they take forever too

Ok so update, I went back because I do like Burger King a lot and their deals on the app is very affordable and price conscious especially if you want a quick bite and have it fill u up. Ordered the fries, chicken nugs, a drink and a whopper. Everything came out great but the wait was 20 minutes for drive thru, super backed up. But other than that, better experience than last time and 4 stars once u guys fix the chicken sandwich that is overfried:)

I am generally a Chipotle fan, and I had no real qualms about this trip. I left satisfied. 

But I'm not sure that I got their best on this trip. 

Two reasons I say this. The carnitas they served seemed like they had been sitting out a bit. It was a little dried out. Plus, the guacamole had that slight discoloring that tells you it wasn't as fresh as could be. 

Nothing was bad, it just wasn't 100% fresh this time. 

Maybe 5:30 on a Tuesday is a bad time to go.

Terribly disappointed. The fish slider was served naked (nothing), even after I specifically inquired and was told it came with pickle and sauce. I had to search in the original burger for the sole teeny tiny sliver of 'pickle' with no onions nor onion sauce. The 'chicken rings,' though novel were 'blah' and served without any dipping sauce. All the above WAS served with, a bit of an attitude.

I have never been so disappointed. I moved to this area from California about 4 years ago.... I frequent chipotle at least weekly for last 5-6 years of my life and I was so excited to get on in town..... I have gave this place about 20 chances and they just don't seem to get it.... breaks my heart really... like for real.... I always order double meat.... and I'm lucky if I get half an order compared to other chipotles I have been too.... not to mention this last time I had NO STEAK in my Double Steak order... I repeat NO Steak! What the living hell? My husbands order has 6 pieces I know because I counted them! My queso containers not even half full! I'm done. This location has ruined it for me.... DONE DONE DONE!

Tonight we went to the drive thru and ordered the $30 Family meal. Terrible mistake, the cole slaw tasted like dirty mop water, the chicken was horrible, the mashed potatoes did not have any taste and the gravy was watery. KFC has definitely changed their recipe for the worst! Never going to a KFC again.

Wish i could post a zero star, went last night around 8 and walked in to a girl and guy employee talking shit to each other and the girl ignored me at first like i was bothering her while the guy employee just sat there singing. Then was told "what you want, but first we out of sour cream, guac, cheese, chips, queso, lettuce, steak and chicken" how are y'all out of all this shit at 8 pm?? Worst service always here, ignorant employees.

Winner! Worst fast food restaurant in Reno.

This place is a hot mess ... and yet I keep coming back bc the kids love those damn stupid chicken tacos you can't get anywhere else. The drive thru is ALWAYS, without fail, backed up with 5 cars and a minimum of 25 mins wait. Turn off your engines and recline your seats, folks, cause its gonna be awhile! Service inside is just as bad, except I have to look at all the overflowing trash cans the staff don't bother to empty, or feel my shoes sticking to the soda-covered lobby floor. I guess I'd rather play games on my phone in the drive thru! For years now, the staff here, no matter what day or what shift, are incompetent, lazy, distracted, and unapologetic. They are jerks, and they screw your sh*t up -  Every. Single. Time. Is it management giving them carte blanc to be careless rude a*holes? Is your cashier or bag packing job really THAT complicated? District management - take note. It's time you to retrain the entire staff - this place is not a functional business. I say this although my comment will fall on deaf ears - upper/corporate management clearly doesn't care either - I know because I've written customer service to complain thru their website TWICE and received ZERO response each time. It's an attitude of f*ck-it and f*ck-customers that apparently permeates the whole company culture from the top down. 

Way to go, Del Taco. Way to go.

If I could give this place a 0, I would. I ordered the keto bowl with steak instead of chicken for pickup. The food was ice cold and I got extremely sick within the hour. I could not stop vomiting. Avoid this place at all costs. It's not clean and they obviously do not follow safety food protocols.

Do not go to this KFC for the sake of your health! I ordered a sandwich and it was still pink inside! The 5 piece chicken wing I ordered was not fresh, it had a stench smell even though it was fried to oblivion. 

Some employees there do not wear mask despite of COVID 19 and the kitchen behind the counter was very messy and unorganized. The old guy was very impatient and rude towards his staff. The team argues and blames one another instead communicating. I was uncomfortable watching them fight while waiting there for my food. 

Needless to say I threw everything I ordered away and lost $15 and wasted large amount of time that day.

DONT GO HERE IF YOU'RE PLANT-BASED!!! They messed up our order twice giving us meat and cheese each time. Went to another Del Taco on McCarren and ordered the same thing to do a comparison and the difference is obvious. 
Not only did they mess up the order, the employees were in there laughing at us and took longer than it should. Something just felt off the whole time.
Anthony was very accommodating! Thanks for going above and beyond! If I could give you 10 stars I would! Thanks for encouraging me to try the impossible burger! It was as you said, "Impossible!" Lol

I really honestly don't know why I keep going back, I ordered a Whopper no ketchup add mustard.... Should be easy right don't put the red stuff on do put the yellow stuff on....
Well I get home and it is covered in red stuff and no yellow stuff.  By the time I got home they were closed so no late supper for me.

I ordered on-line and went through the drive thru. Our order was perfect! They gave us a huge portion of food and the food was warm and flavorful. The steak was fresh and tender. Super happy with this visit. Will be back!

Hubby is always asking for fast food burger joints, and I always persuade otherwise.

However, today, I thought, why not BK??

It's on the way to the hubby's work, so I called and said, "once in a lifetime offer"..... of course he said, "YES"!

Ha!.... what he expected was the WHOPPER.. but.. bad enough, I went with the Whopper JR.'s...

Uhhh... they were tiny? When did they shrink??? I finished mine in two bites!

Fries were salty.. but still will hold me over until dinner....

PLEASE READ BEFORE GOING:
This was extremely disappointing I always order the steak burrito with extra steak, beans, rice, guacamole, and lettuce. The burritos are were always huge! So anyway I am doing this review because the gave me the tiniest burrito ever! I could of went to Nicos or Viva burrito and got 2 big burritos for the the price you pay at Chipotle! I'm extremely disappointed at this Chipotle location! Not ever going there again...

Wanted to try the new impossible Whopper. Service was fine, but the food was horrible. Whopper, fries, and cheesy tots all stone cold. Put it all in the toaster oven at home to heat. Burger patty was only grilled on one side....

Was thirsty so I took the lid off the tea I ordered and took a big gulp, noticed there was no ice at all in the cup, but a fly was floating dead in it. Great, ordered meatless burger and they still served up a protein anyway. 

Didn't have the highest expectations, but damn, they set the bar low.

This place is pretty good! I always do the drive thru, and it's not that long of a wait. I usually get a sandwich there, and its good. My vegetarian sister gets the "impossible" whopper there, and she likes it. My only complain is that our server, Basil, put half the amount of onion rings I ordered there. Overall, very tasty sauces and food!

I ordered a turkey sausage and veggie egg white wake up wrap with cheese and they did not give me turkey sausage but had no probably charging me for it and also charged me 32 cents for tap water. Horrible service.

Skimp on everything. Had to ask three times for more rice. No vegetables on line. She tried to scrape the sides of the pan. I told her I did not want the stuff stuck to the pan. Then she said " I guess I could walk over to the drive through and get you some". Ok. Please make the long journey 6 ft away to get them. . Came back with a about three onions and two peppers. Asked if I could please have a little more. GIANT eye roll and off to the drive through food line. Asked for steak. No server tongs in the steak. "I will have to go find tongs". Ok. Comes back. Half a scoop of steak. I get it. I gave up on good customer service in Hendersonville a long time ago but this place desperately needs a manager. Guess it's back to DosBros.O. I forgot to mention the dude literally talking on his blue tooth ear pods while cutting steak. I mean I get it. Important calls and all but it seems a little odd he was having a full on conversation with someone just behind the food line.

This afternoon went there drive through to order 4 fiery famous star hamburgers. When got home to find out, there were 4 cold famous star hamburgers. Be aware to check what are in the bag they give you before you drive off. You could get cold and wrong order of hamburgers when you drive off. Not happy!

The food is good and my daughter likes the beyond burgers but they're simply not good with doordash. i've had two orders canceled and one that the dasher just didn't pick up which i can't blame on them. The family is starting to think the place might be cursed!!! It's a shame that the place is such a drag to order from and i wish i could rate them better but i simply just cannot

fucking horrible service literally every time i walk into this restaurant they make me LIVID with anger , like how fucking stingy do you guys have to be with your food if we are paying close to $10 for a bowl and you are giving me 5 pieces of steak HOW INCREDIBLY INSANE DO I HAVE TO BE TO KEEP COMING BACK. every time i come the manager is there and he is eyeing every worker as they serve us cause god forbid the poor lady working gives me 6 pieces of steak instead of 5 just absolutely ridiculous i hate this location.

Some business get to make a turn around and redeem themselves!  That's called better management! 
This KFC has done that during the years Places like this go through a lot of changes and then you have Covid where you have to close your dining room. Then you add on employee shortage because everyone in the state doesn't wanna go back to work just yet! So what are you do is switch to Foley drive-through service only. I have to say the lines are long but the service is always with a smile and you get a thank you for spending money here.  
The food is fresh tasting at least when it comes to that fried chicken, which is of course why we come here right! Good job KFC he had some good people working hopefully you get the right people you need to re-open the dining room and the service can continue.  For now if your craving is KFC the drive up is open.

I don't eat KFC very often mostly because it's so expensive. But needless to say there chicken is 2nd best. Nothing is wrong with my order and nothing is wrong with the staff or store. It just is a little expensive for fast food chicken. I will say they update there menu very often and that's always a plus.

I work in the mall so I eat everyday I work in  the food court lEt me just say that I've  only eaten 2 times at this chipotle went in and ordered a burrito on Friday and this thing was wrapped nicely but all the was on one of the edges so 75% of the burrito was rice and lettuce lol the steak was under cooked severely I had to wait till they made more stark because they were  out when I  got there! I have visited here 2 times now pretty safe to say I ww not be back!!! QDOBA's quality and service surpasses chipotle by allot!!!

I don't know why I keep getting hoodwinked by this place. I want to like it. The commercials make it look so darn good. 
How dare they compare their chicken sandwich to anything other than a prepackaged grocery store deli chicken sandwich. This sandwich is just awful. There's way more bun than chicken. The sandwich is cold. The chicken looks looks like it was cooked hours ago!  It's not crisp at all. The only crispy part was the area that was dried out. 
Don't even get me started on the petrified French fries. They are not even edible. 
I must say, the Diet Pepsi was good and cold. 

My husband's meal was just as bad. The chicken was in no way fresh. It wasn't even warm. I guess when they hand you the bag and you can hold it on your lap, it's a sign you just got crappy food!!!

inconsistent. i come one day and they made my impossible whopper on a seperate broiler. now they claim they dont do that and never did. why have vegan options and refuse to accomadate people paying for food.

Order a steak bowl and a barbacoa kids quesadilla meal The steak bowl was fine but the kids quesadilla was stuck to the aluminum foil they put it in I tried to get it off for my son but it was so burnt on there it wouldn't come off and when I found a piece that was stuck it ripped
I eat a dill taco all the time. This one is one you might want to skip though. Disgusting.

Never, ever, again.  been eating at carls for over 40 years and never had such bad treatment by a young nit whit manager.  
got a super star meal and it came cold...stone cold and the frys too.  asked her to make it again and she was obviously pissed at me!  I watched them make it again and saw them take some cooked meat out of a metal container and put it on the burger and i said, hey why are you putting cold meat on my burger instead of cooking new patties.  she looked at me with a real mean look and directed her people to cook two.  i watched as the patties came off the cooker and she gave me the meal...frys were still under the warming light (cold) and microwave them.
started to eat the burger and the meat was not even cooked thru half way...still raw.  took it back and she threw that one away and i said just give me my money back.  she said "good, you need to get out of here".  i asked her name so i could file a complaint with Carls Jr and she would not give it to me so i took her picture.  she started yelling at me immediately saying it was illegal to take her picture and picked up the phone and called 911 to report me while still yelling at me to leave in front of several customers and empolyees.  i told her that i would wait for the police to tell my side of the storey and asked her to ask the police if i should go or stay.  she yelled at me to leave and never come back.  i left and went called Carls Jr corp customer care and reported her and requested a call back from her manager....she was the manager so i aske for her direct manager.  this hispanic lady called and i could not understand much of what she was saying but i started to telll my side of the story and she started yelling at me then so i hung up and called Carls customer care again and asked for the Reno Area VP/manager to call me back.  that was 5 days ago.  i called them again on saturday and requested the manager call me monday and here it is 4 pm and not a call.  i am 67 yrs old and a disabled Vet and have never been treated so rudely or disrespectful.
i called the reno PD later that same day and asked to speak to the officer who took the complaint.  he called me back and i asked him if there was a law about taking someones picture and he said no, and that he told her that when she was giving her report.  He said dont worry about it and that there was no complaint since taking someones picture is not a crime!

and thats my story...my family will never eat there again and i will tell all of my friends and relatives to do the same.  just look at the reviews of these locations in Reno...horrible people and organization.

Please be careful when ordering from this location. My brother and his coworker came to this location on their lunch break. Not only where they told that they couldn't come inside to order their food but they had to do mobile ordering. Which they did. That wasn't the issue, the issue was that my brother is a vegetarian and he ordered a burrito with sofrito's but instead he was given beef.

I ordered a keto lifestyle bowl (salad in this case) with carnitas instead of chicken. I ordered on the app and picked it up at the window. The service was great. Unfortunately, when I got home the lettuce was wet and slimy. I put it back in the bag and went back to the store. The lady at the register was very nice and offered to make me another, but after inspecting the lettuce in the line, I asked for a refund. The manager was very apologetic and promptly gave me a refund without any issues. He was smiling the whole time. As for their customer service, I couldn't have been more pleased. I'm just sad I couldn't get my lunch there today.

For the record, those who like salad. See below.

Identifying Bad Lettuce
The sacrifice is in quality, as the lettuce will have less flavor and less of a crisp texture. Generally, though, once lettuce starts to turn like this, it's spoiling and should be discarded. If it's giving off a gross odor or developing a wet or slimy coating, it's definitely time to toss it.

Do not eat here! I got food poisoning! I know it was the chicken because that's all I ate all day. In a matter of four hours I was projectile vomiting everywhere. I've never felt so bad in my life.  I haven't eaten kfc in a year and thought let me get chicken tenders for lunch. Absolutely the worst idea I ever had. Finally after I threw up for HOURS I feel better this morning. 0 stars I would not recommend!!

This was the first time I have been at this location. Once we entered the place was packed. It was Nurses and Teacher Appreciation day. Even with it being packed the line was moving very quickly. When we got to the counter the staff greeted us with a smile and hello. My kids ordered the create your own taco kids' meals with soft tacos, white cilantro lime rice, black beans, and cheese. It came with chips and a kids' drink too. Great deal for $5! Two happy smiles on their faces. I ordered the $8 steak bowl with cilantro lime brown rice, salsa and cheese. The hubby got the $7.50 chicken bowl with white cilantro lime, salsa, sour cream, corn, and cheese. The staff was very helpful and friendly the entire time. The restaurant was clean and seemed well maintained. I would come back to this location if I was in the area.

First time trying to Burger King in Reno instead of a whopper I got poppers so the four dollar difference made me quite angry by the time I got home and opened the bag and saw that I didn't get what I wanted maybe employees are chatting too much amongst themselves to listen to customers 
not happy wouldn't go there again..

I typically enjoy del taco and find the staff helpful and friendly. However, tonight (1/23/17 11:45ish pm) I purchased black bean burrito no cheese just black beans green sauce and white rice. I found a big chunk of meat in my burrito. Pretty malicious if you ask me, going out of your way to add a piece of meat to an order that does not typically have meat in it. They got everything else right, except that chunk of meat. It amazes me how hateful people can be. I will be contacting corporate about it, and I have taken pictures for insurance. One star, because it does not allow me to give zero stars.
KFC is a really good restaranut. The chicken is really good as well as the biscuits. I love KFC

I had to give one star but prefer to give none. We drove up, no one in line. Ordered our bucket of crispy chicken. Was told it would be 20 minutes for chicken. Gotta be a joke. 2:40 on Sunday afternoon. No chicken. Worst part is this is the only Kentucky in this side of the river and I'm not waiting. I drove 10 minutes to get this. So instead, we are at Popeyes. They will  have chicken ready in 3 minutes.

This place puts McDonald's to shame. The remodel is nice. They make efforts to keep the place clean. BK knows it's niche whereas McD is still searching. The help was friendly. 

BK offers my favorite senior meal of two whopper juniors and two small fries. Today I realized there is a senior drink too so I had lunch for just over $5. There are other meal combos but I find this fits me perfectly.  I don't live here so it is nice to know the app coupons work here too.

Terrible experience! First they forget our pot pie I call they tell me to come back which is cool so I did. When I arrived the line was huge. I call back I keep getting a busy tone. 25 minutes later. We finally get to the speaker and the women taking orders is training someone and correcting everything every customer says. And then I receive my nasty ass pot pie w popcorn chicken in it. Wtf is this. Popcorn chicken and the pot pie is all sludgey. You guys need to do better.

I love chipotle but every time I order through the app either I have someone else's order in a bag with my tag on it, or most recently I ordered a steak burrito with queso and extra steak. Both are upcharges. I was given a burrito with no meat and no queso and none of the other things I ordered. I'd give it a month before the current overworked and underpaid crew quits.

Saturday evening 7pm. They keep the line moving, portions are consistent, in and out. My new favorite is the sofritas, tofu and spices! You won't even miss the meat. Dining room steel tables are usually always wiped down, even those huh no one ever fines in. No complaints for a good dependable meal.

Giving them one star is generous, if Yelp allowed zero I'd be giving them that.  Went in at 8 o'clock at night on a Wednesday night.  There was 4 employees there, only one person in the dining room and two people waiting in the drive through.  I placed my order, a jalepeno burger combo, with chili cheese fries, and a soda, to which the employee replied "I'm sorry, but we don't have curly fries."  That by itself I could easily forgive, because I have a cold and I know I might not be that easy to understand, but that was just the beginning.  I gave them the rest of my order, a teriyaki burger combo, chili cheese fries, and a soda, and a famous star, to go (I was picking up food on my way home for my family).  They told me it would be just a few minutes.  The dine in customer behind me though they told they were backed up and it would be a while, this should have been my first major warning sign.  While I was waiting I looked over to the window timer on the drive through and noticed that it was stopped at 9:59, the car had been waiting for over 10 minutes, at this point I moved to where I could see the order timer for my order.  After waiting 15 minutes they called me up, handed me a bag with my sandwiches and told me "we're sorry about the wait, but here are your sandwiches so you can get started while you wait."  I'm going to ask a rhetorical question, but when I ordered something to go, why did they think I wanted to start eating it there?  I asked if they could leave it under the heat lamps to keep them warm and they responded that they didn't have room (by this point they had taken out two of the three orders in front of mine and only had two after mine, how can they be out of room under the heat lamps).  Five minutes later, they finally call my number to let me know my chili cheese fries are done, by this point, I will admit my own fault, I left without checking anything, because after 20 minutes (according to their own order timer) I just wanted to go home.  When I got home though I discovered three things, first, they had given me a jalepeno turkey sandwich rather than the jalepeno burger (which while good, is not what I ordered), they had left out one of my two chili cheese fries, and the one they did put in had undercooked fries (it takes two minutes thirty seconds to cook their fries properly, so how they didn't let them cook all the way when they had 20 minutes to do so is a mystery to me), had chili that was cold and had only the lightest sprinkling of cheese.
And this isn't the first time I've had a problem at this location, twice before this I've gone in and had less than

You'd think I'd learn after so many bad experiences. I ordered delivery for my family and didn't receive the popcorn chicken and fries for my 2 year old. Called to try and get them to bring it out to us because I did pay for it the lady that answered the phone asked "are you sure you didn't get it?" Like yes lady I think I would be able to see it if it was here! Then had the nerve to say "well can you come pick it up?" SERIOUSLY??? I didn't pay delivery fees and tip your driver to have to drive to the store because you screwed up my order ‍

I went here for the Impossible whopper. Because I have acid reflux and I can't eat meat or onions, so I ordered the meal with  no onions and the staff thought it would be funny to slather my impossible burger with mayonnaise because that is a TikTok trend.  It took me about six napkins and the removal of all the vegetables in the burger to get the mayonnaise off-- and I ate it because I had no choice but to at that moment. The mayonnaise thing is not funny, that was the only money I had to eat for that day and that was my only meal of the day.  For them to play games with people's food, just because it's a Internet trend is not appropriate, it's inhumane and cruel. I think corporate should address this with their staff,  it can be harmful to someone's health and finances. More so it's a liability.  peoples stomachs are not a toy. Have some respect and compassion.

I have been eating sliders from White Castle for decades! White Castles have been a part of my life growing up. I love their burgers. When we didn't have a White Castle, we bought the frozen burgers. 

Today, I did something out of my norm. I ordered a breakfast slider. I ordered the sausage egg and cheese slider. I actually ordered two. OMG! These are very good! The breakfast sliders are better than any other fast food breakfast sandwich.

Trash. Came here once and had an ok experience. Came for the second time and instantly knew it would not be good. Got my order of popcorn chicken combo and was told it no longer came with a biscuit as advertised. Got home to cold food. Fries were cold and chicken was a cold lump of crispy skin, basically old! Only a few pieces had actual meat. You warmed up old food and gave it to me. I won't be back!

I have lived in Saint Louis for almost 7 years, and the Midwest my whole life. Last night was the first experience I have ever had with White Castle. 

It was very late, I was clearly not in the right frame of mind, and my wife has been asking me to go with her for literally years. The opportunity presented itself, okay?! Can you tell I'm feeling self conscious? 

Bottom line: delicious, unhealthy, and I will be back. 

We hit up the drive thru. The folks were friendly who took and served our order. We got a number two with a Coke and shared it. We each tried one slider and shared the fries. Typically, this would just be a meal for one, but we were looking for a snack so we sharedzies. 

Overall, I had a great experience and if I'm ever leaving the Grove and my wife gets another craving we will definitely be back!

This establishment is a disgrace! The chicken tasted old and was tough and they forgot to give us our cookies. We were given three refills because the drinks were awful. I requested a different drink, but the girl at the window served me the same one. Not to mention the restaurant employee's terrible singing, which only added to the misery. Don't waste your hard-earned money by coming here. It's best to just eat at home.

Wanted to get a burger and had coupons for a Whopper Jr. and fries deal. Drive in at 1:30 was not busy, but more people are still staying at home. Order was given by a masked and gloved worker with the best hottest food very quickly.  This place is convenient to where I live so I'll continue coming here.

horrible! stopped here with my grandpa because i was really wanting an impossible burger. that was good, as normal but wasn't all the way done. i ordered a chocolate milkshake and it was basically chocolate milk. i got a refund for that. my grandpas food was good. however, we were in like for 20 mins due to a complicated order ahead of us and short staffing.

Listen, I'm no KFC super fan, but boy is it my enemy now. 

Absolutely disappointing. First, they take away the freshly baked chocolate chip cookies for some dry, "cannot compare," prepackaged cookies, and now the chicken legs are the size of tadpoles. I literally could take a whole chicken leg, put it into my mouth, and devour it in one bite. Ahem, no I did not order wings. 

Further, the macaroni and cheese--yeah, that was not nice to my stomach. It also does not taste as it once tasted. 

To end...

Where is the Colonel? This is not the recipe that he worked so tirelessly to sell to a gazillion people. 

Please do better here.

Overall: Nothing exciting

Ordered my 2 small whopper meals coupon as per usual (8971).

Restaurant: Newly redesigned. Never been to the old one so I don't know if management changed from prior. 

Food: I'll tease out why I deducted some stars for this particular establishment (I'm a BK fan and not all BKs are made equal). 

Whopper: 5/5, veggies were fresh and crisp. Good number of tomatoes, pickles, onions, lettuce. No brown shriveled business here! The meat had excellent flame broiled taste, not overly greasy. Bread was fresh, not stale.

Fries: 3/5, they weren't piping hot, and some pieces had an odd tang to them. However, they were not overly salted, which was a plus. What bugged me most was how the fry container was half filled. 

Drink: 3/5. You may ask...how the hell did they lose points from their drink? What...was it not "fresh"? Well, actually no. BUT, the drink was about 1.5 inches from being full. Come on man, this boy is using coupons over here, don't be skimping on my drank.

Service: prompt and respectful, made my stuff right (I usually ask for one whopper regular no cheese, the other whopper no mayo).

Slow, obnoxious and ripoff. We walked into this KFC on Christmas eve at about 6:10 PM  and saw three women and a 3 to 4 year old kid loudly laughing and socializing with the employees. 

They charges us for three sides (green beans, mac and cheese, and colse slaw) but they never gave them to use. We didn't even get a biscuit with our 3 PC meals. 

We had to sit down at extremely dirty tables for 20 minuets before getting out order. We couldn't even get lids and straws because those obnoxioius women had their disgusting kid sitting on them the entire time.

Please review the security camera footage. You need to fire EVERYONE working that night. I will be calling the NJ state Department of Health. Tolerating children sitting on drink lids and straws, bacteria infested tables, employees cursing and socializing with their friends? Wtf is wrong with you?

The franchise owner should be ashamed. Everyone should know that this place is the most disgusting fast food place I've ever been to. Those tables had old, smashed and crusty chicken bits all over them. 

The chicken sitting on the racks looked wet and old and the employees orked at a turtle pace. Where is the franchise owner? Why isn't that person hiring competent employees?

Admittedly I hadn't been to any Chiptole in a while, but the Carne Asada burrito I just picked up today that I ordered with "light rice" was FULL of rice and had maybe 4 pieces of steak total.  A real disappointment.  I don't know if Chipotle has changed their portion sizes or if I just got unlucky (judging by recent reviews that I wish I'd read first) I think maybe this location just doesn't care much.  I won't be back.

If I could give this location and Chipotle as a whole 0 Stars, I definitely would. Did an order through Uber esta and not only were items missing but, I had 3 HAIRS IN MY BURRITO. And I am pregnant. The steak in my burrito was raw. What the fuck kind of establishment is this? Upon speaking to The "manager" Lloyd, he said, "things happen, we dropped the ball but that's no reason for you to get upset." And told me to go on chipotle.com to get a refund. So I did and chipotle didn't even send me a confirmation email stating they are going to resolve my issue. Fuck chipotle. I've always been a Qdoba fan anyway. Sadly, this was my first experience at chipotle too. What happened to the COVID-19 CDC guidelines? Cleary, hair wasn't on the list.

This BK used to be good and a favorite order spot for dinner.  But, Tonight was awful, I ordered online and pretty simple, 1 BOGO + $1.00 deal which was a whopper and a Original chicken sandwich. the we also got 2 bacon cheeseburgers, 1 more original chicken at regular price, and one Double Quarter pound King lastly 3 large fries! this was our family order, pretty simple i feel well firstly upon arriving telling them i did a online order and my number, i get to window, and associate hands me two medium diet cokes proceeds to tell me that the chik=King i ordered was out, and i'd have to  call credit company to get the refund???? say what??? so anyhoo i call my spouse and ask give me a text with order in case problems, so associate takes bags bag and say ok we are fixing it, fries are in fryer you will get some hot fires, so cool! so then a few he gives me two bags i asked everything right and in there he assured me so!  i pull to light and go through bags, wouldn't you know it no quarter pound king and only one original chicken. i pull back around and he says after i alert him they forgot stuff, he says i put it in there- like i was lying?  I pulled to the window then a female manager comes to window and cross examines me and acts like i am lying, i tell he then she tells me you did not order it, so i showed her the test my hubby sent, still reluctant she goes back after looking at it, and gets me the missing items, now this is total BS, bad service, and above all since they now seemed pissed off did they spit in my sandwich or drag it on the floor, cause you never know now a days?? scary huh!  I threw it out and went somewhere else. no one believes in good service today, and BK Commercial way/Applegate  you lost a once family who ordered like several times a month!, but no more, DONE!!  Check you bags and do not let the Manager tell you your wrong! so sad honestly!

For the third time in as many weeks, we have gone to this location for take out meals. We like the grilled chicken at KFC, & wanted to order it for our 2 meals. 
The young lady taking orders tonight said " No, we don't have any grilled chicken now." We explained that this has happened all too often, that her manager had told us before how popular the grilled version is & they would always have it available. This young lady tonight shook her head & contradicted her manager's statement saying "No it's not popular, & if we make it ahead it dries out." 
No offer to make any fresh for customers at all. 
Sadly we will not be returning here, we'll give our business to another KFC in our area that ALWAYS has the grilled chicken selection available to choose from - not dried out sitting around but freshly cooked.
