I drove all the way back to get my sandwich's fixed!! I called ahead of time and spoke with blk male manager on duty, and he said they will be fixed and ready when I got back there.
Upon getting back he apologized and said that he took the order but didn't make it. He said Mario the manager in training made it. So the manager gave me my new sandwiches and said to check them before I left . To both our surprise, both sandwiches again were only meat, cheese, bun, and Mayo .... The manger got upset and told me to give him the burgers back. 

At this point I just wanted my money back and would never return. That wasn't an option!! After about 5 more minutes wait , he brings me a bag of 2 more sandwiches. 

Now I'm afraid to even touch it, let alone eat it after having it returned twice.

This place needs serious help!!!

We did a delivery order to try the new chicken sandwich along with an 8 piece regular bucket with large slaw and mashed potatoes. The 8 piece was severely overdone, almost burnt. Smaller pieces were dried out and uneatable. The large slaw, which was my #1 priority, was not included in the order. We are very dissatisfied and would like a refund on the bucket and the slaw. The chicken sandwich was the only thing we could eat - so we ended up splitting it.

Clean, fast, and now they have the Impossible Burger. 

I balked when I pulled up the page and saw it had an average of two stars. I honestly can't tell you the last time I've eaten someplace with such a low rating. However, there aren't that many reviews and only one is from this year...see me trying to justify why I ended up going here.

The real reason I wanted to check this place out is because it is the closest Burger King to me and they have the Impossible Whopper. It's a Whopper made with Impossible "meat", which means it is completely vegetarian. Otherwise, Burger King is not my first choice (or even in my top fifty. I don't think I can even name the last time I was at a Burger King).

Here's why I give it 3.5 stars (which I rounded up to 4). 

CLEANLINESS - This place was SO CLEAN. It was almost shocking how clean it was inside. The only thing that was a little sticky was the high chair, understandably, which I wipe down anyways.

GREAT EMPLOYEES - The people manning the cash register seemed friendly and efficient. I've never ordered a kid's meal before (my son is only one) so I didn't know my options. The guy behind the counter picked up on this and actually told me all the substitutions I could make, unprompted. That came out of left field. I need to check my biases because I did not expect him to be so helpful. 

IMPOSSIBLE WHOPPER - I should have done a tasting of the Impossible Whopper next to a real Whopper, but I just tried the Impossible one. It was good. I'm really impressed that Burger King rolled this out. I would support Burger King over other fast food chains for this alone. 

NATURAL LIGHT - This place is all windows. It is so lit inside. I really enjoyed the design of the building. 

Overall, my experience was a good one. Maybe it's because I went inside instead of using the drive through, maybe I caught them on a good day, but I'm just relieved that I didn't have a two star experience.

Drive through.  Get home with the bags of food.  They forget in my order, a whopper.  We called spoke very calm and polite.  They said to come get one. We go back, pick up the whopper.  It is cold. So what, this is the same one I ordered 10 min. ago?  Yes, they were polite and "replaced" .  But why not with an actual fresh one. Guess you dont need business during a time when business is scarce.

Make sure you double check your order when they hand you your bag in the drive-through. Especially if it's the manager guy taking the order, he gets your order wrong. I ordered sausage egg and cheese on a sesame bagel I get home and it's on a croissant. I order avocado toast with bacon, I get home it has no bacon. Just annoying.

Finally got to try me some White Castle out. Been eating her sister Krystals for years. The fries suck big time. The burgers have a little bit more flavor then Krystal burgers to me though. Giving em three stars because I tried the impossible burger and it was raw. The inside was mushy and red.

I must start off by saying that the Whopper is a guilty pleasure of mine. I like that flame broiled burger taste. So naturally, I had to try the Impossible Whopper to compare the two burgers. I have to tell you, it was very good. It was a takeout order with the intention of splitting the burger with my mother. I didn't tell her that it was the meatless version. I only told her the true story after we ate our half of the burger. I know this sounds strange, but we actually liked it better than the original. It tastes fresh and light even though the patty is noticeably thicker than the beef one. I can't really describe the flavor. All I know is that it was pretty good, and might be healthier. I say "might" because you're still adding the same toppings so you're not saving much in terms of calories or carbs. I have read that the sodium content may be higher than the original because of the various additives that hold it together. However, it has more fiber and way less cholesterol. That's a big plus. Just a little something to think about before trying it. Oh, and it's a dollar more.

As for the location, it has been hit or miss for me in terms of the drive thru service. My recent visit was a very good one. The service has been good most of the time. It's my neighborhood BK. What more can I say?

Lunch time.  The drive thru was packed double lanes.  Only about 10% full inside. Pearl was our cashier.  Very pleasant and had an amazing smile. Her greeting was warm and welcoming. Our food came out fast. Our frys were hot and fresh maybe a little too much salt for me but I don't put salt on my food burger was good just a whopper with cheese.  Pearl was all over the place. Came in the dinning room. Sweeping floors checking soda machine and wiping tables. From what I could see she done it on her own.  No one had too ask her.   If I was still in the restaurant industry. I would come and steal her from them.  She is a very hard worker.  Most young kids are a go getter.  They always need lots of directions.  Great job Pearl.

Ordered a Whopper and a Spicy Chicken sandwich. Whooper was to be NO MAYO, ad Mustard.  Got a Wooper with HEAVY MAYO, no mustard...???

The Spicy Chicken sandwich came out as a Whopper with pickles, onion and heavy mayo only...???


And these clowns want $15 and hour to do stupid all day long..

W....T....F....? How hard was this order. Its.literally in the register screen and the kitichen monitor??

My friend heard about a $3 bowl deal and so we headed over to KFC to try it. I haven't been to KFC since I was a kid with my parents, so I was intrigued. 

We got there and I ordered the popcorn nuggets combo. It took about 3 minutes to come out, but when it did, the chicken was hot. Overall, taste and flavor were okay, but I was expecting more. The meal came with a biscuit too, which was great in texture and good in flavor. The mashed potatoes and gravy looked unappetizing, but were okay. I didn't get my drink and didn't care to ask. 

The establishment was fine and cleaner than I thought it would be. The staff were fine and the music selection was old rock music that I enjoyed. 

Overall, it was kind of "eh." I prefer Popeye's.

Fast, reliable service. Pricing is consistent with every other Burger King I've been to. Hardworking employees behind the counter with an easy to use order kiosk. 

It's simple. If you want gourmet, go to a sit down place and spend $20 more. It's a freaking airport Burger King. It's not going to look like the picture but it will fill you up for less than $15.

Edit: I bought an Impossible Whopper. 4 stars because it did make me feel sick like another reviewer here. I eat meat from time to time but usually prefer not to, and this upset my stomach a little. That said, it's the least expensive veggie option that I could find on this side of the airport.

I ordered a Fill Up Family Meal through the Drive-Through. The service was great and Cassandra at the window was very friendly and had great customer service. However, when I got home to serve dinner, all of the chicken was very dry and didn't taste fresh. Also, the 2 small wings they gave us with the meal, had NO meat on them. They were very dark and overcooked and we couldn't even eat them.

This has to be the worst of all times WORST KFC that I have ever gone to. I ordered two spicy chicken sandwiches and a large popcorn chicken. Was told it was $13.35. Waited four minutes to get up to the window gave the lady $13.35 in exact cash. After waiting at the window for another minute and a half. I was asked to pull around front I asked for the receipt. She said they would bring it out to me with my order. I'll wait out front for 10 minutes. Guy comes out and tells me to pull to the side it'll be another 8 to 10 minutes before the food is ready. I pulled around to the side. Waited 15 minutes and was ready to go inside when the guy came out to bring me my food. I asked him for the receipt and he said there was no receipt. Take the food home and I have two regular chicken sandwiches and a small popcorn chicken. Never again please tell everybody that you know not to go to this location

Tried the new Classic Chicken Sandwich. It's nothing special but the chicken was hot and fully cooked. I think I should have ordered regular fried chicken instead and skipped the bread. 
Kitchen was organized and tidy.
Friendly service from Ms. Moet.

Well I was tempted to order a whopper or a possible burger but I said to myself for once I should try something different. So I ordered the cheese bites. What I was expecting very fancy French cheese. It was the basic cheap American cheese. It was fried. However it wasn't greasy. It was kind of spicy but not really. I like the happy presentation of the box: so colorful!
Ordering was not stressful to me because I could hear and be healed. And there were very nice they asked me to be patient for a minute or so. Then I was giving my items a very polite and thoughtful manner. The communication ordering and receiving was kind a three stars level hotels. I liked the employees at this location: either I got lucky or Burger King in this area has higher standards.

I went through the drive thru Friday morning a little after 7am on my way to work. Surprisingly there was no one in line. This was my first time at this location. I ordered a large iced coffee with one pump of vanilla and one cream, and a sausage egg and cheese wake up wrap. My coffee was made timely but as I drove off and took a sip of my coffee, there was definitely more than one pump of vanilla or they added sugar because it was way too sweet. This location is on a very busy road next to US 19 so I did not go back to get my ordered corrected. It would have taken too much time and I would have been late to work. My food was warm and fresh.

Can I rate LESS than 1 star? DO NOT EAT HERE! Send a message by making them go out of business.

#1 Their prices are insane for a fast food burger. Since when did a combo = more than $11?!?!

If I'd had more time to think while ordering, having been in a state of shock, we would have turned around and gone elsewhere after just seeing the prices. I should have gone back up and cancelled the order, requesting a refund.

#2 The burger was less than lukewarm. The cheese was still cold, and in kind of a lump under the patty. Worst burger I've had in years.

#3 It was a cold day, and you expect establishments to be warm and welcoming. This one was cold and dark. I'm not kidding. It must have been under 50 degrees inside this restaurant. And you could barely tell that the lights were on.

Conclusion: We will NEVER come here again. The prices are insane, the food is horrible, and the establishment is unpleasant. We could have gone to a nice fancy burger place, paid the same amount, and been happy with our experience.

#neveragain

It is terrible that Burger King was the only food option at BNA (Nashville International Airport) in C Terminal, at this time (Coronavirus) around 4pm on a week day. Burger King should close too. The workers were extremely busy talking among themselves. One worker finally told someone to help me. I ordered the #3 Impossible Burger with mustard and pickles only. I received mayo, mustard, onions, tomato. Not even sure it was the Impossible Burger. I did not eat until I got on my flight so it was too late to exchange the burger for the right one. I had to scrape my burger with napkins to get the mayo off because I do not eat dairy. If that had been the only mistake at that Burger King...no yelp review needed but it was one of several. I will not eat at that Burger King (BNA) again.

Thank you for your donations to the homeless! Your service and food is great and your hearts are big! This White Castle donates crave cases to Moms on a Mission EVERY week for years and they pass each and every slider out to homeless and misplaced people. God bless.

It was lunch time yesterday. We walked in. The restaurant had one occupant. There was one gal behind the counter just standing there.  I ordered a number 7. Whopper junior, fry, drink. I stood there waiting for my cup. Finally asked for it. I walked to fill my cup and saw garbage strewn about on floor and counters. I waited for my food. Still no one else came in. I went back to counter to grab my meal and asked the lady if she wanted me to sweep the floor. I pointed and said I needed a broom. She was not amused. I was not trying to be amusing but it was clear she did not care about the mess. I asked for a ketchup. She gave me 6. The fries were hot and tasty. The Whopper Jr. has decreased in size. It was no bigger than the McDonald's kids' cheeseburger. The Sprite was just right. Eventually the woman came out with a broom and swept by the trash can. She NEVER swept the part of the floor that had the actual trash on it. Sad really. Probably thought it was beneath her. I work at a market. I am a Senior staff member. I do cart roundups and clean the bathrooms. We won't be back to that BK.

i hate to be a karen but i have ordered from here a handful of times and have never had a good experience. tonight i was given chicken instead of steak, no corn in my bowl, and both of my bags of chips were missing.

If you're a chipotle fan, don't bother with this location. I didn't believe the rest of the reviews because, hey, people can be ridiculous with their expectation. But, believe them. The portions ARE insanely small and whoever preps the food isn't following the recipe books. 
The point of a chain restaurant is that everything tastes the same at every single location, each location has the same exact recipe that is to be followed every time, same with measurements. 
I got chips and guac with my order. The guac is literally just mashed up avocado, no onion, no cilantro, no seasonings, totally bland. I received a small handful of chips that were unseasoned, no salt, or lime, nothing. The sofritas burrito I got was really flavorless and bland. The sofritas are usually delicious at chipotle, not here. I asked for extra corn, there's less than what would be a normal portion. Ordered and paid for extra sofritas, no extra. Also, I ordered with fajita veggies, no onion, only peppers. Wondering if the manager of this location is trying to cut back on food costs to inflate numbers? 
This location really needs to get their act together. If I were the DM for this area I'd be doing some serious investigation. 

Save your money, opt for a different location if you're in the mood for chipotle
Against my better judgment I ordered drive through because I was short on time, hungry and no time to cook. Mistake. Chicken so greasy I couldn't eat it. Enough said.

This is the 3rd time and last I will go to this Burger King.  I dont know if they are short staffed or what, but the drive thru wait is ridiculous on off peak times (avg wait time for a whopper meal 10 to 20 minutes).  Definitely NOT fast food.

Horrible 
Horrible customer service and the whopper was cold. The restaurant is extremely dirty and no one seems to be in charge. I love Burger King but it seems like all of them in Pinellas county are disgusting 
I will never go here again. Nothing was also stocked . Some people they handed 7 or so ketchups me two
They need to hire and manager and corporate needs to have a clue what is going on. The staff moved at a glacial pace. I have no idea how this place is open.  Go to Daly's burger off Seminole on 70 th

Although I don't have any complaint with their carry-out chicken, the buffet is not worth it.  When I was there mid-July  the buffet had run out of slaw and potatoes.  It was nearly 15 minutes before they refilled them.

There were never any biscuits.  The original recipe chicken was never replenished in 30 minutes - just the same old tired, picked-over pieces.

Dirty floors and super long lines. It's only to be expected when you have a Chipotle super close to the university. Staff are nice and are willing to give samples for the sofritos which are a nice meat substitute for all the vegetarian/Lent abiding people out there. Floors are sticky with bits of food/drink all over the place. Panhandlers are usually waiting outside the restaurant so it makes it really awkward to eat outside.

This place needs a serious overhaul of management. Every time we pick up food from here, either they're out of chicken or they forget something. This time they forgot to put our mashed potatoes and gravy in the bag AND the chicken breading was wet and slimy!  I don't know what happens to it, but it was gross and inedible.  The time before this one, they forgot our mashed potatoes and cinnamon biscuits. I really love KFC and I hope they get  it together.

I just called the store @ 1:10pm on 7/22. I ate there around 11/11:30am and got  violently sick. I ate the steak salad, brown rice, corn and lettuce. Hot sauce and a side of sour cream. Something was off this was the only thing I ate all day. I am so angry. I keep throwing up. I called the store and the girl said sorry to hear that. I will NEVER go back! EVER!

The service was fast and friendly. We went on a Saturday afternoon around 4:30p, and we didn't wait more than 10 minutes. The young lady at the window was not wearing a mask, however it looked as if those around her were, Im not sure what that's about. The $30 Fill Up is a great option for a large family. We're a family of 6, and the 8 pieces of chicken, 12 tenders, 3 sides, and 4 biscuits was more than enough. Some of the larger pieces were slightly under cooked. Overall given it's Fast Food, we were pleased.

Got a completely wrong order (which happens, no big deal).  when I went up to get it fixed and they gave me a second wrong order.  I went up to the front a third time (still very calm) I said "excuse me but we needed an adult whopper with just cheese, ketchup and mustard."  The gentleman who was helping me grabbed a random whopper and said "just take it and go."  Needless to say it still was the wrong order.  We got a random assortment of food for 24 dollars.  So unless you are wanting a mystery bag and service that is much like Dicks Last resort, I would avoid this place like COVID.

The food at this KFC is always good & fresh, just be sure to check your order before leaving the store. My family and I only eat dark meat chicken, and a number of times I got home (which is about 20 minutes away) to find white meat chicken included in my order.

It's like every other location but not as fresh. They really like to pinch every penny here since I ended up getting the scrapped parts of the brown rice and brown guac. The black beans look like they've been sitting there for a while and they were out of sofritas since they didn't want to make another batch. Another negative is the tortilla was hard and they didn't fill up the burrito like the other locations I've been to. On the plus side, I didn't get sick like how some other people described their experience. Qdoba's a better option between the two burrito giants.

Tony and I love Dunkin Donuts and try to eat here at least once a month for breakfast. I always get the "EVERYTHING" Bagel with Cream Cheese but my drink varies on the weather...and Tony gets usually a large black coffee and 2 donuts, Apple anything and a chocolate glazed donut..but sometimes we vary 

This Thursday, November 8, 2012. we stopped and I got my usual but he added a Smoked Sausage with Egg and cheese English Muffin, and I added the Pumpkin Muffin..good food..
I just wanted to share the pictures I took !!
If you get a chance, stop in and try their new Smoked Sausage English Muffin or their seasonal Pumpkin Muffin..you won't be let down!!!! Awesome is all I can say!!!

The meat in my whopper jr. was literally ice cold.
Straight out of the frig and onto my bun.
Will never order from there again. Poor management or lazy personnel!

I asked for only a little bit of rice and apparently they took that as meaning I wanted a miniature burrito.  They were almost out of steak but the employee decided to give me the remaining bits (not a full serving) rather than wait 30 seconds for the next batch to come out. Chipotle is usually one of my favorite places to eat but I wasn't impressed by this location. The air condition was also leaking on me when I was filling up my drink.  Not happy with this experience.
Meh. Don't believe the hype. The Impossible burger is impossible to consider as meat though at Burger King it may not make much difference. Go to Wendy's instead.

Sometimes they get the food right and others terribly wrong. I don't know how they're always out of butter whenever I go but they are. I wanted to get the four piece chicken tender meal with coleslaw I got three pieces with mashed potatoes but yet paid for something different. We gave him a chance cuz they were new but now it's ridiculous.
I ordered popcorn chicken and they gave me a pie. I don't even like pie. They always mess up orders and always have an excuse why there's no receipt.
I ordered online and they gave me the wrong bowl. Very disappointing. I ordered a steak bowl with black beans and brown rice. They gave me a pork bowl with no rice and beans. Annoying!
Carl's Jr The Best In Town 5880 S Virginia Wow Wow Tuleaka gave SuperStar Service the Beyond Meat Burger was cooked to perfection Great Service Great Food

Ordered the impossible burger here a few times. You can tell a distinctive difference In appearance but other then that tastes the same as the whopper. I haven't eaten meat in nearly 3 years. Last night I ordered it again when I got home I inspected it (as I always do because I always fear they'll get it mixed up with beef one day) ....they did NOT give me the impossible burger. Won't be going to this location again.

Horrible service in the drive thru! Rude employees, took a long time to get the food and when I asked for my receipt (after I watched him throw a bunch away with my receipt included) he told me he couldn't print the receipt, that it wasn't working. I told him you can reprint the receipt and I wanted my copy. I wanted it to complain about the awful service I received, and go figure the store number and the whole top of the receipt is blank. They must get a lot of complaints to stoop to these levels. I won't go to this Burger King again, and it's right by my house. You lost a customer. The only good thing I can say is at least my order was almost right, you should've asked if I wanted cheese on my whopper, and you didn't.

I don't usually write fast food reviews but I have to here. This is one of my favorite BK's. It is not a big one. As a matter of fact it is really small. It is the employees that make it a pleasure to eat her once in a while. I try to keep Whoppers as an treat once in a long while. I will say this, when you want a Whopper, nothing else will do but a Whopper!!!!!

The absolute worst service I've ever received on 817/2021 @6:16 pm the drive-thru operator ticket says Martell and she  had the worst attitude then the whole order of just two meals was screwed up so I drove back and she passed that I politely asked for my missing items and as I I pulled away made some unnecessary bad remarks to fellow team members that my granddaughter could here I won't be back to this location KFC use to be the gold standard for not only Fried chicken but its service I guess those days are long gone

Worst customer attitude ever at the drive thru window. The blonde girl hates her job and confesses it sucks. The place is brand new, how can employees be so miserable? Ordered 2 meals and felt like we bothered the workers to do their job. Chicken was average but that attitude was horrible. The land was a happy hangout for the crackheads before KFC was built there... maybe your employee misses hanging out and be unemployed. Lost customers tonight for sure and after reading other reviews, your night shift employees are killing your business.

The service at the drive thru window (including the speaker system) were good. Even though we went for a quick lunch, there was no wait as we pulled up, placed our order, and pulled around to pay at the window.  There was minimal interaction in handling the food exchange and payment transaction, but I've yet to find a place that is 100% efficient on eliminating some sort of risk.  But this was as good as most places I've tried during the close down.

Although listed with an Indianapolis address, this is right along SR 67 near the southwest corner of I-465.  So, it's closer to Camby.

I had enjoyed KFC in my pre-Yelp days when I wasn't as aware of supporting small and independent businesses.  I was in the mood for some fried chicken and didn't feel like making it myself or going to the other place in my town that is known for their chicken.  So, I talked my wife into taking me to this closest location of KFC.

As I said earlier, the staff were friendly, the lot seemed pretty clean, and I liked that the speaker system worked well enough that we were able to understand our conversation with the staff inside.  We ordered a couple individual meals.  I got an original 2-pc with dark meat.  My wife ordered an extra crispy with light meat.  We both got the biscuits and mashed potatoes as our side.  There was minimal wait after we pulled around to pay.

It took about ten minutes to get home.  By then, my wife's extra crispy had become soggy, though the inside was a little dry.  My original seemed cooked properly with just a bit of crunch and with moist chicken inside.  The only problem is that the breading on the chicken was very bland (my wife's was quite spicy comparatively). We both liked our sides.  Were the mashed potatoes spectacular?  No, but for fast food, they were tasty, had a nice consistency, and the gravy was smooth and didn't overwhelm the potatoes.  

I would have liked to give this place a better rating because of the service and sides, but considering this place is supposed to specialize in chicken, I have to say we were both disappointed in the flavor (and for her, the consistency).  

I rarely rate fast food restaurants particularly when they are chains.  But this one would have gotten a better rating for the service, but a lower rating based upon the chicken.  I probably won't rush back due to that discrepancy between food and service.  But if you are in a hurry, it's a nice option to consider.  Just be careful pulling out of the parking lot since that is one busy stretch of highway.

Review #3772

I went through the drive thru today and the cup was so far from full it's stupid! 
I also got a sausage and cheese bagel without the egg, every other time I've gone to Dunkin they gave me two pieces of sausage. They only gave me one.

Meh...dirty....slow....bad service, bad food...soda machine not working,  ice not working...ordered an impossible whopper....it was made and sat in the warmer in front of me for 10 mins....nobody around to even hand it to me.   Another lady came in from the drive through before me as her order also not correct...she stood around asking only to get cheese as per her order....after 10 mins  she got frustrated told them forget it...and just wanted a refund.....took another 5mins just to get that!!!
I was still standing there the entire time, the employee gets back to me and hands me the burger with fries....mind you ....there were only 2 of us in store!

The saga continues:  the fryer oil was not hot enough and the fries absorbed excess oil and were hot but slimy soft and tasteless .     BK et al do everything possible to automate and stupid proof their processes so they can cheap out on  employee pay...and this store still managed to fail miserably with their basic tasks.   The franchisee needs to take a serious review of their staff and store condition.   It is a failing and will not be around long with the current level of disservice

Drive thru order.  We were told to wait out in front because our order would take longer.  We pulled around front and waited.  15 or more minutes later our food was brought to us.  We asked if all 4 whoppers were in the bag...we were told, rudely, "all of its' in there".  We got home and only 3 of the 4 whoppers were in the bag.  We attempted to call that night over five times and no one answered the phone.

We called back the next day and the person we spoke with was only willing to refund us the cost of the whopper, they were not willing to do anything else to help us for all of the trouble that they caused.  I asked to speak with his manager and he kept repeating that there was no one else there.  He then hung up on me without doing anything to help.

I will never visit this booger queen again, and I advise all to do the same.

AVOID
Visited the Medford NJ Burger King 173 NJ-70, Medford, NJ 08055 location on
Friday April 16, 2021 at 10:30 AM. After a long wait at the drive-thru I ordered a croissant breakfast sandwich. Drive thru person screamed at me thru mic---"we're on lunch now!!!!!" (10:30 AM?) Then I ordered a Junior Whopper. She then screamed at me--"we're out of  hamburgers-you can only get fried foods" What is going on here????

Not again....I make sure twice with the person taking the order no cheese because someone in my house is lactose intolerant. Twice I ask and they say no cheese. I get the whopper home and it has cheese....thank you for listening.

Oh so disappointed. Inconsistent. Today's bowl looks like lettuce, rice and beans. Where is the Sofrito? Oh, I see a speck. Tastes like rice and beans. Was coming here frequently as I live nearby. Was great when they first opened. Now,  it's a crap shoot. Today is so bad that I don't think I will be returning. And the rice had hard pieces in it. I'm going back to California Tortilla down the road at the other end of town. Never been disappointed with quality of food or service there!

Traaaaasshhh!!!!!! Yikes. So my fiancé got the $5 popcorn chicken fill up meal which is supposed to come with a drink, popcorn chicken, a side (he ordered mashed potatoes), a biscuit, and a cookie. He ONLY GOT a drink (the wrong drink btw), a side (they messed up and gave him fries instead of mashed potatoes), and the popcorn chicken BUT THERE WAS NO CHICKEN because it was all just CRUNCHY FRIED BREAD CRUMBS. 
Swell- didn't even get one thing right.

When I was in this Kentucky fried chicken there were 11 people working there but first I was outside in the line and I was the fourth car back and after five minutes I didn't even make it to the speaker. So I decided to go inside and get the Uber eats meal. After waiting another five minutes they handed me the food and an empty cup I had to go make the Pepsi. This is not fast food it is fast food but it's not very fast

I requested 5 original wings & 2 biscuits. The time around 4:30pm.
I got home and discovered I was given 8 Crispy  drummettes & 2 Stale biscuits!
The worst Kentucky Fried chicken I have ever had. I tossed the total order!

Mom still craves the occasional Whopper, so I sadly still find myself having to frequent this joint if I want a quick fix.

Service has gotten "a bit" better, meaning just 2 stars now.

Forget the drive-thru, just go inside.

My last order was received hot, correct, and fresh.

Thus I will update them with 1 more star for now.

This location still needs an educated adult at the helm, and quick...

I normally love chipotle- seriously it's awesome..but this location is really sub par in the quality aspect- the steak I got in my burrito was fatty and chewy. I've never been to a chipotle with such poor quality. Maybe they were having a bad day? Got a bad shipment? Who knows- I did email their customer service and they apologized and offered to send two free vouchers for the hassle.. That was nice of them and I may try it again.

I think this is the second time I've ever given a one star review. 

We visited this located with success in the past, but my most recent visit will be my last. We walked in with nobody in the lobby. It was filthy, with food and crumbs all over most of the tables. That should have been my first clue. The boy behind the counter stuck his finger up to tell us to wait because he was helping drive through. I used to work at Hardee's and I'm familiar with the way they spread labor, so I didn't say anything. The manager came out of her office and instantly looked annoyed.

The order was as we asked for it, except they forgot my sauce and one of our cookies for the $5 meals. They gave it to us when we asked. Food was luke warm, except the fries. Those were hot and fresh. 

All of this would be fine, with the exception of the cleanliness of the store, AND the addition of the shift manager talking about going to jail for assaulting someone. Announcing. She was announcing it. To the entire store. And using foul language. I realize it's fast food, so you have to consider that, but that's a stereotype that doesn't need reinforced. 

There is a better location on South Harding. The store manager there is pretty cool and takes pride in her work. I'd recommend that over this location.

This place just can't seem to get an order right for me in the drive thru... 3 times in 2 weeks they gave me a single Whopper after I ordered, and paid for, a double. Tonight, I open the burger up to check before driving away. And then when I get home... They gave me Coke instead of Diet Coke. This is why I usually drive the extra distance to Wendy's.

The last few months I have had nothing but issues at this KFC. 
Missing items twice out of the drive thru and last night they were out of the following:
ANY original chicken
Mashed Potatoes
Green Beans

Seriously. They need to get things together. 
They have lost me as a loyal customer!!!!!
Closed permanently. Go to 19 or Brooksville because everyone craves a whopper now and then or onion rings which McDonald's doesn't have. You have other BK's to get your fix at.
Chicken taste old and my Brest was as small as the chicken wing aweful experience with the food here won't back

Cashiers have been welcoming. Always greeted with a hello and smile. They've been helpful when ordering, suggesting less expensive options that offer the same amount or more food. However the place inside just feels- dirty? Everything feels so outdated. And there's hardly anybody in here, ever, which makes me wonder if they clean the tables and floors if not many people come. It's sad because I used to love Burger King. But why is it $10 for 2 whoppers? Make those whopper juniors then please..... To go. Stay on the lookout for 2 for $5 or take your pick deals. Otherwise the sandwiches are not worth the price

I go to this Dunkin' every day for my morning coffee, sometimes twice a day.  It's close to my house and my son loves a chocolate frosted doughnut in the morning. The issue lately is the coffee and sandwiches have been inconsistent. Some times the coffee is super bitter, missing the Splenda ordered, or the sausage on the sausage sandwich is way overcooked.  These things are relatively minor and I need my coffee, so not going to stop me from coming, but today I stopped in after work and the place smelled really bad. I kind of looked around, bewildered, and soon realized that brown poop water was flowing out  from under one of the bathroom doors.  Nobody was attending to it.  At least put a cone down until you can get to it or something so  somebody doesn't stand in it while they wait for their items.  The puddle had flowed out to where people pick up their food.  Real nasty Dunkin'.

I went to Dunkin' at this location this morning. When I got my drink it was incorrect. The teenager at the window was very gracious and had it remade. It was remade incorrectly a second time, so I asked again for it to be remade. At this point, the manager was at the window and told me the drink was made correctly. It was not. He asked me to pull forward to wait for it. At this point, I was handed my breakfast sandwich, which was also incorrect. I handed it back to the teen at the window, and they quickly got it fixed. Once I pulled forward I discovered the sandwich had been made with"beyond sausage" which was not what I ordered. My order at this point had been made incorrectly 4 times, and I asked the manager who came to my car to make it correctly. He refused and began yelling at me that I didn't know what turkey sausage was and he would not fix it. He demanded I come into the store so he could show me what turkey sausage looked like. He continued yelling at me (I was yelling back at this point) about turkey sausage, while I continued to question (loudly) why he would not rectify the mistake but instead yell at and argue with a customer. I then asked for a refund and his district managers name. He refused to provide me with a name or contact information. He did give me a refund but was completely unreasonable, rude, and apparently unaware that his job is not to yell at customers. Needless to say, I will not be returning to this location. I don't think it's the managers job to make customers cry and refuse to even acknowledge when mistakes are made, but if it is this guy is on point.

WORST Burger King ever, and Burger King Corporate couldn't care less. // How can you be OUT OF IMPOSSIBLE BURGERS ON TWO CONSECUTIVE SATURDAYS BEFORE 9PM? This place was OUT OF FRIES, 8:30 PM tonight, Dec. 2nd, never heard of such a thing at a BURGER AND FRIES joint. I said I wasn't going to Burger King again after they were out of their big new advertised burger twice, but stopped for fries and - 'sorry, we're all out of fries'. Is this Candid Camera, it's too nuts! Customer service is non existent as you usually wait ten minutes before anyone comes to the  mic to take your order here. The manager must have something big on someone up the line to still be working here.

Don't even think about going here. All the cooks are straight outta jail with jail mentality. one guy had a beard so long as he was removing the chicken out of the rack his beard was rubbing against all the chicken. Another guy kept touching his private area and his pants were below his butt while making food. The manager is no better as they alluded to the fact they do not service "certain" people. Not sure what that means. Dirty, nasty, ignorant place and the food is bottom of the barrel dirty. Eat at your own risk. If the leader is this bad I can imagine the ridiculousness of those working underneath them.

I was just thinking how chaotic this location is, compared to my regular one on Columbus Bl... then I read these reviews and most seemed to say similar. Must be the twilight zone area that it's in; 
There's no system to things like at the other location... there they'll give you a numbered receipt so you know which order is yours. Today of course a woman in line ordered the exact same thing as me, of all the things on the menu- a sausage breakfast bowl. I thought I was in line before her, but the clerk barely called my order and the woman immediately grabbed it. Then a couple minutes later they called the other order but it had other things... then the woman was like oh wait. I'm like yeah grabby...

want to thank you for the 2nd worst dining experience i ever had in my life: the first was when i had moldy cheese in a taco about 50 years ago. this occurred at store #14464 we made our order and after paying i went to use the restroom low and behold they are closed due to covid. you should only have the drive-up window open if diners can't enjoy their food. you ever try to enjoy a meal when you need to void in the tenth degree. i did ask for a cup to pee in. i did ask to cancel my order and get a refund but they said it was ready and i ask for it to go. while leaving your dive, there is a big chuck hole in the parking lot. it made for a loud thunk, and now i have to get my car inspected for safety reasons. when i got home and was able to void, took a bite of the cold fries and burger. so thank you for a real enjoyable day, therefore we scratched burger king from our list to go places. and by the way "home of the whopper is the oval office"

Yes! They are open. First time they have actually been taking orders in weeks. They usually close crazy hours like 2:00, 4:00 or 6:45. The cone wasn't up so I dashed in line. I was the 3rd In line so I only waited 20 minutes. I got home to an ice cold burger and fries. I just put it in the microwave. At least I got a Whopper. I've been trying to eat here for a while but as stated they close early (especially on weekends) Thank you Burger King for doing the bare minimum, which is being open when your state that you are open.  Maybe you guys can work on giving customers warm food next. Thank you for at least being open and serving food even though your lights are a on with employees inside. Great first step though hopefully soon the food will be warm. Way to go guys!

Came to this KFC last night at 7:49. Waited in a long line for 30 minutes only to be told at the drive thru speaker that they were out of chicken. I watched them turn away a minimum of 40-50 cars from across the street at one of their competitors. A storm had knocked out power all over Nashville and every drive thru in the city was backed up and the restaurants were making money...with exception of this restaurant. They were turning away business. If you ever get a chance to visit this location, just read previous posts.

Not one of the franchised National fried chicken chains have had a decent piece of fried chicken in south tampa since I got here 8 years ago. Popeyes has poor ownership and the employees don't care about quality. Publix has been my go to for the past several years but their quality has dropped as well. I dropped by KFC on Kennedy this afternoon with the hopes of getting some quality fried original recipe chicken. They did not disappoint. Great job to all of the employees at this KFC. Thank you for making my lunch a great one.

A nice up to date restaurant. COVID-19 certainly changed the notion of eating ouurant  wasn'r for social distancing.   The drive-through line was too long and yje walkin option appeared quicker.  We went in the directed door and ordered takeout and left the directed second door out. 

The service was positive but slow.  The neighborhood is a multi-ethnic one that reminds me of what a melting pot Nashville has become. 

It seems that there are fewer White Castles in Nashville.  We had business in the area and needed a quick eat.  The food was hot and good. My wife and I split a slider/fry meal between us (plus  a second drink). My historic preferences have been chicken rings or fried clams.  I didn't see the clams on the menu when I scanned it. My wife preferred the sliders and they were good. 

Next time I will try the veggie slider or the impossible slider as it is called. It is worth the trip and the was very good.

Shittiest bk ever. The idiot working the drive thru didn't know how to put a veggie whopper into the system! She eventually left, manager came on and was a total frazzled asshole. "Hold on I'm trying to work 3 systems here" he yelled twice over the speaker. But he JUST asked what else was there to add to our order. On top of that when I went to order a mini Cinnabon, he decided to tell me how many he has left.. Unprofessional much? He was brass, rude and just unprofessional all over. Don't think I'll ever be here again. Still in the parking lot as I write this review .. Judge me.

Amazingly fast service with a smile. 

I initially saw the line and wasn't happy, but my son was really hungry so I figured we'd suck it up - thankfully it moved rathequickly. 

I was really impressed with the (mostly)  young people running the place. 

Sausage, egg, and cheese bagel on an everything bagel and milk.  No mistakes and yummy!

the worst bone in chicken wings ever, they tasted like processed meat on the bone, I took one bite and then returned to the restaurant to try and get a refund and they said they could not refund or give me other food because i left the restaurant on a togo order and had taken one bite out of the food. I used to order these wings all the time and they have changed, never going back and now I am not going to any PepsiCo fast food

I got the Whopper, and discovered the meat was raw soft and pink after 2 bites. I've never experienced this ever. So disgusted. Won't eat at a Burger King again. I really wanted something fast and now paying the cost. I called to tell the manager and she was apologetic, but also told me the broiler was down. So if the broiler was down - how did you send this burger out in the first place, knowing the broiler was down? Disappointed in this quality of product and experience.

So on December 9 at 10:55 AM we stopped in at Medford Burger King. The lunch menu was up over the counter so we ordered three whopper meals. The manager barked back 'we ain't servin no lunch till eleven'. That type of attitude and service might be okay in Camden, but 100 feet away is Ciao Italia Pizza. We went there and got their 2 slice and drink lunch special. Medford Burger King just needs to close down for good. Nobody goes there and the ones that do regret it.

Super bad service every time I come to this location... EVERYTIME!!! Another thing this place never ever have everything u want never.. How do they always run out of GRILLED chicken... How do u run out???? Foods cool I mean it's Taco Bell and KFC.. But the workers act like the customers forced then to fill out an application and start working there.....

Upon entering a female promptly greeted me and mentioned she's be with me as soon as possible as her drive through seemed busy. The dining room was just me and two other men(possible employees in plain clothes off work).
Shortly after last took my order. I order the Unbelievable Burger, onion rings and drink which was given a fresh cup with lid and straw in sweets inside. I liked that and felt it was Covid Careful!
Food was above expectations and the Holiday coke selection was fun for dec 28.
To my point, as I was eating I watched a gentleman that worked their named woody almost whistle while he worked! I watched him chat with the two guys and make small talk as he singlehandedly clean, sanitized, and mopped the whole dining room in his own.
Frankly I was so impressed by his enthusiasm that I got up from my table and ordered the Hershey Pie to enjoy while he filled the place with good vibes. 
He even went out if his way to something I asked and did it with gratitude and enthusiasm.
I felt this guy Woodys management skills, customer service and attention to detail was that of a 3 star restaurant as I dine out frequently.
The guy even made eye contact and said a great see you later to me!
I have been eating at Burger King for 30 years. I am 45. I do not eat fast food but once a year as it is it part of my diet. Diet not relevant to experience or reason why I am trying a review.
Please take good care of your employee Woody. I literally was at McDonald's 10 minutes before coming to to the aforementioned BK and got my money back before I even dared to eat their food.
So with that I will be sure to dine here once a month instead or my normal once a year as this guy made quite an impression on me. The unbelievable whopper was above or as well!
In this day in age most fast places suck and the staff is well, you get what you pay for I suppose. You would be foolish to not make this man a higher paid manager if he is not already!

I'm a big believer in second chances, and since all the DDs in the greater New Orleans area have closed, I gave this one another try. So glad I did! My macchiato was strong and sweet, beyond sausage sandwich delicious and not dry, and hashbrowns crispy and hot. Haven't eaten our donuts yet, but there was a good selection at 6am on Mardi Gras day. Got a few heart-shaped jelly and cream-filled. Will definitely return!
These people have served meat to me 4 times now when I order the beyond burger and I'm starting to think they mess with vegetarian/vegan people's food on purpose.
Avoid this location service stinks! If you do come don't go through drive-through they don't have a clue. I'd recommend King's fried chicken just down the street.

So, I placed an order through doordash tonight, eight piece crispy chicken with coleslaw and mashed potatoes. Some time after placing the order, we get a call saying that they are out of crispy, and so we said okay that's fine, classic works too. Then we are told that they don't have 8 pieces of chicken??? They only had six?? At a Kentucky fried chicken they didn't have even eight pieces of chicken? They had to substitute two chicken tenders. But wait, there's more! After the employee had hung up, we were contacted again and told that they also don't have coleslaw, so we had to change that to another side. Tell me KFC, where has all your food gone? Should be called Kentucky Fried Sorry We Dont Have That (KFSWDHT)

I got your impossible whopper. When I got to window i said I'm sorry I forgot to ask for no Mayo. She said that in cocky tone what do you want me to do with this. I said another no Mayo she didn't even say thank you come again. I got a sm surge. I think she was pissed at me for not saying no Mayo. I got coke didn't realize it until I left the parking lot. I work in customer service. She didn't had any customer service skills what so ever.

I have a love-hate relationship with this place. I love their mashed potatoes and coleslaw, but their service is absolutely terrible!  The wait was over 30 minutes tonight for a small order. They forgot the biscuits too and we had to go back to get them. Almost every time we go, they're out of something. They have one job:  cook and sell chicken!  I don't understand how they are always out of some types of chicken. Poor management and poor customer service!!

My husband and I thought we try it again and of course they messed up our order! We ordered the two for $10.00! Where you get a choice of burgers, chicken sandwiches, etc.. a small fries and small drink! I asked for the chicken sandwich with no mayonnaise as I'm allergic to mayonnaise, but got mayonnaise! My husband wanted a whopper with no onions or lettuce, his perfect! We also ordered a icee! We got no small fries! But did get our small drinks! Not sure why I keep trying this place! 
Went back today & the ONLY worker made my meal perfectly! But she had to close the store, no one to work!

They have a new manager who is very nice (and handsome) but the staff can be aloof. They don't seem happy to be there. It's fast food so I don't think anyone should have higher expectations or give it a bad review just because a minimum wage worker didn't respond how you would have liked. 

I go there for the Whopper so I can't comment on anything else
Bad service at the drive through. Had to go in and get what they forgot. Sandwich on stale roll that fell apart after touching it.  Also not the right chicken. Bad bad bad.

Spent 30 minutes in the drive thru trying to get my kids lunch. Then my receipt was a reprint and didn't have the survey code on it. This is all after they gave my daughter a regular whopper instead of an impossible whopper. Service is just bad here right now.

Rhstysheghtt (You're reading that correctly!). Goshdarnit, other Yelpers are right that there's not much consistency.

I've done the drive through and also ordered inside. I said "hi" walking in, everyone was somewhat busy on Sat. afternoon, but when I went to greet the cashier at the counter, no response, just this dead zombie look, so she seemed like she didn't want to be there at all...SERVICE 2/5 isn't the best and you may not know what mood some are in. 

On multiple times, have gotten CROISSANT SANDWICH 2.5/5 (egg, cheese, sausage or bacon) and sandwiches are hotter served at 7am, which is how I prefer mine. When I pick one up in the afternoon on the weekend, the croissant was barely warm, almost as if taken from freezer and lightly warmed...

TATOR TOTS 0/5 only had 5 pieces, looked pretty empty inside as if a black hole sucked up the remaining ones...?! I wouldn't bother getting them!

Their COFFEE 3/5 is okay for what you pay. I really love their iced latte though, better tasting when it's lighter on the sugar. Their iced caramel latte is alright. I find their drink sizes generous, so I can hit my system with lots of it, but not as good quality compared to local coffee shops!

I only come here because they just started sending me coupons and it is close by, so I like stopping by super early before work. 

I did get overcharged once and only caught it because I had a copy of receipt, so keep an eye out!

If zero stars were available I would rate it 0!  Ordered online yesterday told to Pu my order in 11 minutes at the store in Beech Grove Indiana.  We arrived to pick up our food for dinner at 9pm, they close at 10pm,  and was told they had been out of chicken since 4-5pm.  The manager asked why I was mad, and tried telling me how much sales they did this week.. as a customer I don't care how busy you have been or do I want BS told to me.  You are KFC a chicken restaurant and you are open and taking online orders and taking our credit card money. If you are out of chicken close your doors and shut down the store!  Then was told I would be called at 930am by a manager to refund my money, and which didn't call, so I called to be told they can't give me the GM number or area director. This store should close down. Before you go there think twice! Rude employees no food rude managers. They just don't care, and if that is the case I don't want to know how sanitary this restaurant is or the employees or management. Just don't go to this location, read the reviews, many people say the same thing.

Wow!  Thought I would get some chicken for dinner...guess not!  Crazy for me to think a chicken place might have chicken available.  I was told it would be 20 minutes.  Unbelievable!  It was 6:20 pm. KFC is advertising their "Fill Up" specials.  Apparently you can only get what they want to give you.  I was told I could get 5 wings and a couple legs.  No apology.  The management apparently had no clue on how to "manage".  I will drive the extra couple miles to the Popeye's from now on.

So, I have had some bad Chipotle in my life and I have also had some of the best. If I die tonight 9/15/2021 I want this place paying for my funeral. I would have rather put a toothpick between my big toe and toenail ... then kicked a cement brick like Ronaldo. The steak was rubber. The chips reminded me of biting a grocery store brand bottle of water. There was no flavor in the salsa. This is the worst chipotle of all time. Rest In Peace to my gastrointestinal tract. Nasty nasty chipotle

Salt, salt and more salt. For whatever reason, this location oversalts their meat to the point of it being inedible. This is especially true for the carnitas. You can actually feel your blood pressure rising as you're eating this garbage. It was like this about a year ago. I reluctantly returned tonight and it was even saltier than before. I would have returned it except it was a take out order and I'm too far to go back. Will never return to this location again,

On Saturday 7/25/20 about 9pm IOrdered a Double whopper meal, added cheese and bacon thru the drive thru, I got home unwrapped my burger and immediately knew it was not a Double whopper, I have orderd several times in the past.   More bun then burger, the lettuce was 2 chunk 
pieces that you get in the middle of the lettuce.  This was horrible, had 1 tiny piece of bacon, they Just slopped on mayo and pickles, seem like something someone returned, horrible service, didnt see anyone that could be identified as a manager. The drive thru service issomething a lot of people are not fond of  because of crapike this.  Whoever was working should be held accountable

Today I stopped to get a Bacon Cheeseburger once home I found it not warm and two pieces of a bacon( not a complete strip, tiny little pieces) I took pics to show if needed. The staff was not polite and too distracted .i visited two weeks ago and the same poor service, too busy talking to each other than acknowledging me and the Whopper Jr was like warm and no lettuce. I was impressed after the reopening but as of today and last 2 visits I am not. Will not recommend this store.

They don't listen. Seriously when a whopper automatically comes without cheese why do you add it when I say not too. Then you dont mark the different sodas, and you rifle them through the window as I am asking you for a drink holder. I love that you don't give out a receipt or answer your phone when you want to speak to management. NEVER AGAIN and I called the corporate office.

Stopped by this Dunkin' location on Monday. It was a waste of money with a side of attitude. 

There was a guy at the drive up window that was nice and pleasant. The woman who just handed me my bag and didn't even look at me was terrible. Looked like she hated her job and I was an inconvenience.

I ordered the sausage, egg and cheese croissant, hash browns and a coffee.  The eggs were a weird mushy consistency. I took 2 bites and trashed it. The big hash brown bag consisted of 5 hash browns. They tasted horrible and were soggy. The coffee? Taste was off too. Didn't taste like normal DD coffee.

Easy to say I never ever have a reason to visit this location again. I'll drive to McDonald's which is only a few seconds away.

I am shocked by the reviews for fast food places. 1.5 stars? Are you kidding me?! If a fast food joint gets your order right, it should be at least 3 stars! If the food is good and fills your belly because you needed to eat something right away, it deserves more. That being said, KFC has done something right with the Classic and Spicy Chicken Sandwiches. Depending on which KFC you go to, you will enjoy a sandwich that easily rivals (and even beats in some cases) Popeyes. I am saying this with all honesty... I did not trust KFC because of the inferior sandwich I received at KFC, 716 Adams Ave. I thought KFC was putting one over on us with the crunchy coated sandwich in the ads and the limp, barely crisped piece of sh*t the 716 Adams KFC served me. It was not until I tried a better version of the sandwich from 411 Oregon Avenue and then an even better version at this KFC location that I became a believer. The chicken breast is legitimately huge and juicy  like Popeye's chicken sandwich on a good day. I was pleasantly surprised by the nice crunchy coating, lightly toasted buttered bun, sauce, and pickles.

I don't give a d*mn about customer service at a fast food place, especially a drive-through. All I care about is the food. The chicken sandwich here is stupendous. Get it! Plus, watch my YouTube review here for even more details: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=evrBgFJ2fy0&t=681s

I come to this Burger King because it's closest to my house, that's the only reason I come here and the impossible whopper.  

This Burger King is probably the higher rated out of all the other Burger Kings in the area.   This Burger King has a total of 2 yelp stars out of 5 possible.

Now for my personal experience in dealing with this Burger King I would give them a five.

It's not because of spectacular food,even though when hungry the food is good.

Its that great service!

The workers at the drive through window have been really been good to me.

I guess it depends on what crew is working, but when I have went through the drive through I've had a crew that really blessed me and understood what I was trying to do and accomplish.

Even though I may have been confused about how to use a coupon on my phone or order via the app.  The crew here did not make me feel like I was a dummy.

They treated me like a real person and even if I was a buty hole they have always been professional with me.

In addition to that the food was pretty good, I am not going to complain about the food, because I ate it and was satisfied.

I come here just for the Impossible Burger and I'll get the fries or onion rings with it.

Burger King is the only place I can get an impossible Burger for $1.00, anywhere else, when you go to a restaurant they probably more like anywhere from $13 to $18.

Burger King is always clean on the outside and believe it or not, I've never been on the inside of this Burger King and I have only gone through the  drive-thru.

They have two drive-thru windows when you pull up one on the left and one on the right.

However, you all come to the same two windows when you pay and pick up your order.

I am going to keep it  and I can't say nothing but good things about this Burger King.

Worst customer service ever, even from apparent management. Definitely keep walking. Much better food in the terminal anyway!
Ordered the impossible whopper and two regular whoppers. None of the burgers were labeled, so I asked which was the impossible. The first kid I talked to said, "you can tell." I asked if they were suppose to be labeled, since the Burger King I go to regularly always does. He turned around and walked away. The next person I talked to said, "this isn't the impossible. You look at the patty to tell." Then he used his fingers to open the burger and show me. Then he told me to do the same to the others and I would find my burger.

DONT GO HERE VEGANS AND VEGETARIANS 

They put bacon on both my beyond burgers (I cannot eat real meat) and when I went back through the drive through two kids were laughing and said *sorry were out of beyond burgers* and wouldn't remake them and then when I asked for my money back some lady from the back came up and yelled at me telling me to show her my burgers and when I did she THREW THEM AT MY CAR AND SPIT ON ME THROUGH THE WINDOW I should have called the cops honestly.

Picture Hell. Now picture Hell's waiting room. It's a place you can't get wait to exit so you can get on with the rest of your day. This is how I feel when I make the rare mistake of coming to this Burger King.

It's usually down a person or two on staff, but it's not a big deal, I go during off hours when there's not a lot of traffic. This doesn't stop them from standing around as much as possible. I think they play a game of tag, where the person tagged is "it" and has to actually do the work. They're mean about it, of course, I don't say anything about it, so maybe if I did they may have a bit of an attitude. Once I had to wait for 25 minutes for a plain whopper with cheese, fries and 10 nuggets, all things which should've taken less than 2 minutes to assemble, everything is in your heat trays, put it together.

The last three times I've gone, they only have diet drinks available in their fancy Coke machine. You have a fancy Coke machine, let me try fun things!!

After several attempts to give this place a chance since they at least get my order right, I just can't deal with it anymore. The one by 86th and Michigan is a little further out of my way, but far speedier and just as accurate.

I don't even want to give 1 star I'm so upset with Burger King! I ordered a whopper with cheese NO tomatoes and light mayo... I received extra tomato and extra extra mayo where I couldn't even hold my burger to eat it, in that same order I ordered a DOUBLE bacon cheeseburger and I received a Tiny baby hamburger, NOT a DOUBLE bacon cheese.. Next morning we ordered BK for breakfast was quick and easy after a night of bowling..  2 sausage egg sandwhiches we received NO SAUSAGE!!! Are you kidding me!!! GET IT TOGETHER!!! The new remodeled building looks great... Remodel your service now!!!!

Been going here for 15 years. Until recently, no complaints. Last 2 visits were disappointing. Hot chicken was great, service was bad. Last time, waked in,  it took forever, my order was placed before family that came in 5 minutes after me, but their order was put together while I watched my items in the partially filled bags sitting there growing cold. They also forgot my pickles. You have to have pickles with hot chicken. This time, drive through,  it was just neglect. Got home and no fries. Too far to drive back for fries. I don't know what happened.  This is my neighborhood KFC. Change of management  or hiring practices? Theses servers were not worth minimum wage, let alone $10 or $15 an hour. Almost same distance to KFC in Lavergne for me. I may have to change.

This Chipotle has the best customer service I've experienced with this chain. The employees were great every time I went in (about 3-4 times now), genuinely cheerful, enthusiastic, and accommodating. When I ordered a bowl with meat that was still being cooked, they gave me chips and guac on the house because of the wait. Another time, my husband and I got drinks for free. One time, my husband's double meat portion was free because, well, I don't remember really why. Every time I asked a question (why don't you have carnitas right now?) or had a comment (you remembered me from last time!), an employee responded with an upbeat and non-fake cheerfulness. It just warms my heart to go to a chain fast food restaurant where the employees actually seem happy!

I stopped on my way home from work and ordered an Impossible Whopper with no onion. There were 5 cars ahead of me. I was in line for 33 minutes. When I finally got my order, no one apologized for the excessively long wait, and the sandwich had onion on it. I would have driven around to complain and demand the correct sandwich, but I didn't have another hour of my life to dedicate to poor service.

At KFC I like to get chicken fingers with buffalo flavored sauce, not the Texas Pete flavored hot sauce that they always try to give you. I never have a problem asking for buffalo sauce on the side at most KFC locations, and while this location used to give me that option, they recently stopped and wanted to charge me more money for something that I can get for free at another location.

When a man takes his food a certain way and you deny that service, you lose a customer. Unfortunately for KFC, this means losing a steady customer who ate there frequently because he worked right down the street. There are other places to shop.

Horrible. My wife went through the drive-through and bring home some chicken. I had white pus coming out of it that they said was fat. Now being that I cook a lot it probably was maybe under cooked for sure. It also had no skin on it and new fried. It was like naked chicken.I'm sure the kernel is rolling in his grave right now. When I took the chicken back inside. The restaurant was horrible and very very dirty I suggest no one comes to this location because you will most likely get food poisoning. The young chump wearing the wrangler Jean was a punk ass and very rude. I will most definitely call the health department in the morning

You're better off going to the grocery store and getting a box of fried chicken and buying the fixings separately. Value for the dollar; none. Ordered extra crispy, when I got home 15 minutes later it was extra soggy. Never never never again. As far as I'm concerned they owe 35 bucks. Don't waste your money here.

What an exciting day dear vegans! I didn't get a chance to take a picture of me devouring my burger but! It was amazing take my word for it! You can sub any burger with the beyond burger minus the cheese and the mayo. So I did the jalapeño burger, with their special sauce(ketchup and some sort of pickle). Just an advisory for vegans though they don't cook the burger on a separate grill. But if you are like me and needed something quick and can tolerate that, then it's a perfect situation. Also service was extremely fast and I enjoyed the enthusiasm about the beyond burger at their location.

Dear Burger King,

Let me start by saying there as over a two year period where I frequently passed Burger King and didn't glance back. 

But, something changed. 

The impossible whopper was added to the menu and I couldn't have been a happier.

At first, I wasn't sure if I should go and try the new menu item. I did and it was delicious. 

If you are skeptical, you should try the item. While it has been a while since I have had a whopper I can tell you this- the impossible whopper was so good, I had to double check it was the item I ordered. The plant based burger was tasty and with the regular fixings that the original whopper has, it was a trip down memory lane. The vegetables were crisp, the hamburger buns were perfect, and even my side of onion rings were crisp and delicious. 

So Burger King, you have made this vegetarian a very happy one.

I openly admit :  I cook often and thus can be a bit of a cranky food snob.

Yet I still find myself craving a BK Whopper a few times a year!

( Please forgive me for not joining the "All Fast Food is Evil" club yet. )

This is my nearest Burger King.  Sometimes the food is actually up to par.  You have a 50% chance.

I've quit going here several times.  Then a year or so passes and I try them again, out of convenience and perhaps HOPE?

NOPE!  Tried again tonight...  Just more disappointment...

The ownership and management of this BK location seem to be happily clueless for well over a decade now.  Other FFood joints in the area actually manage to run a professional and more consistent store.

While I still love a good BK Whopper I believe it's time for me to say goodbye to the Gateway BK store #87 forever......RIP

I've been trying to order a Whopper here for a while. They are opened strange hours? The cone was put in the drive through at 6:20. The other day it was there at 4pm. Lights still on and you can see employees inside. Tons of cars pulling up and then reversing when they see the cone. I can't imagine how much money they are losing. Meanwhile the Tacobell right next to it has cars out into the street. Just close down completely already.

The drive through is open during the Coronavirus and staff was wearing gloves. I also have Hand sanitizer in my car always... I can recommend the "Wake up Wraps." They are bacon or sausage with egg and cheese on a wrap. It's a good deal! Also the Matcha Latte is really good, I had the iced one. The coffee is also pretty good. Of course if you want something sweet they have their famous donuts. Today we stopped on the way to work (essential employee) for a quick breakfast. The staff here is also friendly and fast. I will definitely try the breakfast sandwich's on another trip!

I bought an impossible burger from here and I've been poisoned I've been throwing up with lettuce onion and impossible burger coming from my nose. I haven't eaten meat in 10 years I believe they either gave me meat or cooked with with meat. My stomach is in so much pain and im on vacation this is awful !!!!!!!!!! I can't believe they would do this. I tried to do the survey online also they don't have the restaurant number on the receipt so I can do the survey. I tried calling the number and no one answered please very disgusting food would not recommend 



Well here is the update They cook the impossible plant based burger on the same grill they cook the whooper on . And trust if you are vegan or Vegetarian you will be sick

Food is usually 2/10 when it gets to my house. The food is cold and they don't give you enough mashed potatoes. The chicken is small and barely has any good meat on it. Sometimes I don't even get what I ordered or somethings missing. Very disappointing.
Choose another place to eat this place is disgusting my chicken sandwich was cold and hard

Okay, let me start with the girl who took out order, who didn't have a clue what she was selling. We asked what was in the teriyaki burger, she said, pineapple... Really? What kind of sauce? I don't know... Okay, anyways, so we order, get out food and it looks like it's been sitting on the warmer for the last hour. Why did we wait if this what we waited for? The star is fur the waffle fries, they were good. Otherwise, my chicken burger was falling apart before I took a bite, the wife's burger with mushrooms looked soggy and warmed over. Too bad... This was only or second time, but probably our last time.

This place is unbelievably bad. Like I can't even believe it's still open after moving from the area a few years ago. It was bad then and seems to have somehow gotten worse.

The staff is rude and surly. I went here yesterday with my uncle against my better judgment. He was craving a whopper. Despite the fact that customers were piled up at the register waiting to get their food, I was barked at by the worker "next guest please!" She continued repeating this in a robot like fashion while I continued to wait for the people to move, getting louder and visibly more annoyed with me every time she had to say it. I suppose she may have expected I just shout my order from several feet away. Obviously by the time I got there, she wasn't even at the register anymore. Eventually she fumbled through taking my order, visibly frustrated and annoyed the whole time, barking at me for clarifications here and there. Overall, I couldn't believe how rude and poorly trained she seemed to be. I also watched her make 2 milkshakes and it looked like (and tasted like) she was just guessing as to how much ice cream and milk to use.

The food was horrible. I was feeling sick all night and immediately regretted eating it.

Save your time, frustration and money for a restaurant that actually cares. Also, from what I read with other reviews, corporate has no interest in customer feedback about this location. They probably wrote it off and so should you.

My mom was stuck at home in Cahokia without anyone around to go shopping.  I called KFC from California.  The manager helped me get an order ready for a taxi to pick up.

The staff went above and beyond the call of duty.  My mom is giggling, eating chicken, and thinks I am the best son, ever.  Thanks!!!!

I love Chipotle but it's sad to say that the employees who work here have extremely bad work ethics and are destroying the franchise's customer service ratings. It took the two employees to acknowledge me and other customer's existence from standing in front of them for about 15 minutes. They were still talking extremely loudly and chatting it up with each other and ignoring the line of customers waiting for them. Strike 1. 

Strike 2. When I ordered the "chicken bowl" the girl in front named Marquay literally scooped a bit of chicken/steak in to a cup and threw it on top of the stove and began eating it afterwards with her hands. Are you kidding me? Can you eat on your break instead of doing that in front of the long line of customers who are waiting for you to finish their order.....? 

Strike 3. The front counters are extremely dirty and have not been wiped off for a while. There were straw wrappings everywhere, Tabasco sauce drippings on the counter, napkins out of place, and salt all over the place. 

Strike 4. STRIKE 4. The lettuce! OMG. It was old! Looks super inedible. I was really upset looking at the old lettuce that looked like it haven't been changed out for a while. 

Strike 5. The meat was cold. Is it suppose to be cold? Who knows. 

Also, you won't get a hello, a smile, or even a small greeting from the workers. They just hate working there. You can tell.

* So the charming young lady here is Emma. Great smile, great service. She gets 5 stars. 
* And if you can overlook the terrible condiments offered at any KFC, they still have some really satisfying chicken. Original recipe, with A&W root beer, and fries. Can't get a much better food coma than this gave me.
I live for the vegan sofritas and eat here way more often than I should.

Let's get the record straight- Chipotle is my go-to and I get it very frequently (at LEAST once a week).

THIS chipotle location is the worst ever. The food does not taste like normal chipotle, like you know how you can tell some chipotles just taste better? Ya this one is the complete opposite of that. The cuts of food are so atrocious as well. You'll have an entire serving of steak for your bowl all be connected instead of the typical small cubes of meat. The lettuce also is like your eating the entire head of lettuce. 

Love chipotle and I'll always choose to eat there but seriously this location is disgusting. 

Avoid.

The service here is really spotty. Sometimes you have an amazing girl in the drive thru who tells you that you are "dripping with swagger" despite being extremely hungover, (thank you awesome DD employee) and other times every single part of your order was wrong because the lady was talking over you while you were making your order. 

The turkey sausage breakfast sandwich is killer, despite obviously being a microwave creation. 

It really doesn't matter to me though. There's not a DD near where I live. I'm obsessed with Dunkin Donuts. I will return because coffee tastes better in a styrofoam cup.
Shouldn't a fast food chicken restaurant have chicken that is already cooked and ready to go? Why do I keep coming back? Oh that's right, the wife wants the mashed potatoes.
This trip was better then most. Try there carnitas. Usually have steak, but prior trip wasn't pleasant. Steak seemed too marinated.

My daughter makes me take here all the time. She loves Chipotle. First it was the quesadillas (they aren't on the menu but you can order them and they are really good). Then she tried a Burrito and can't get enough of the Steak and Chicken Burrito.

It is a bit expensive for fast good but babygirl gets what babygirl wants so I am pretty much investing in Chipotle at this point. It does taste good though and I feel it is healthier than most takeout options.

The guacamole with chips is good too. And I love the Izze sodas. Carbonated fruit juice with no corn syrup!

I just don't care for Dunkin' Donuts. As a child I loved them, then they disappeared. Now they are back, but they are just not the same. I know people are crazy about the coffee, but I am one of those freakish people who doesn't really drink drip coffee. Their espresso drinks are nothing to get exited over. The frozen coolattas are decent. I've had a few breakfast sandwiches including the smoked sausage. Spicy, but I could have made a better one at home. The donuts are also nothing spectacular, which is so disappointing because I looooovvvvveee donuts. Most food items are subpar especially for the price. 

I will say the highlight for all you Dunkin' fans is that this location has daily deals. So worth checking out if you are a fan. Unfortunately, I am just not a fan.
