I called the restaurant- we were overcharged, given crap food, & crap customer service.  
I was told that the manager stepped out & after finding out it was actually the drive-thru person we dealt with, I really wanted no part in talking to him.  
The guy who answered the phone was nice & apologetic...said to contact Jeremy the following day, but I flew out of town for a trip & also just don't have the energy- getting on Yelp is easier & lets the people know! 

I'm not a picky person & don't have high expectations for fast food but what a mess, & a slightly pricey one too! 

I do want to try that sandwich again & add tomato to it, just won't be back to this location to do so.

As bad as it gets. Dirty, everything from the floor to the table tops were sticky. Food was cold and horrible. Fries were not edible, taste like the oil has not been changed since they opened . Pretty sure they could not pass a health inspection based on food temp. Only thing that makes it worth a single star was the gentleman behind the counter was very nice and polite.

The last few times they have been more on this miss. I guess it's because Matt wasn't there. A friend and I went inside and waited for no one to come to the register to take our order. Another customer came and there was a woman at the drive thru window and 3 or 4 other ladies in the kitchen area, at times they would just skirt past us. Finally one of the ladies came up and after a minutes and asked if we'd been helped. We tell her our orders and she just tells us how much, never ringing it in the cash register, so I'm guessing she wasn't the cashier. Before we pay she announces it'll be 20 minutes before the extra crispy chicken is ready. So we left.

A few weeks later, we tried again and it was better than before, but this time I asked for regular chicken and got extra crispy. 

I don't know why, but when Matt's not there, it's like a different place. Not sure if he's still there as a I haven't been in awhile.

Went to this Chipotle with high hopes since when we visit the US it's our go to place. Went around 30 minutes prior to closing time. They didn't have corn, there was a 15 minute wait on meat (i guess I can live with that) and they didn't have medium salsa. The carnitas looked like they were 5 days old (all brown and slimy). When we asked where the corn was the employee smiled and said "not there". Food was standard Chipotle food. Anyways overall poor customer service and if you plan on charging us full price for your food and not having the ingredients which are supposed to come in the bowl, we definitely won't be coming back. You might as well change your closing time to 30 minutes earlier than what's posted since you're already doing that anyways.

We decided to give this place another try, I know I wrote a bad review before now I'm going to be writing another one! We went here because it was their Tuesday special, it was about 9pm and I think they are open till about 10pm. We go threw the drive thru and the lights turn out? And no one answers the speaker. We drive ahead and there is still people inside, but no one even bothered to pick up the speaker. Even if they were out of chicken or whatever they should have just let us know, sorry we closed for the evening. We have made the decision that we won't be back again, possibly not to all the KFCs, but to that one for sure!
Steak looks and tastes like it comes out of a can.  Go to jerry's Pollofino next to kmart for a better and fresher burrito.

DO NOT EAT HERE. Ordered a Famous Star that was served on a bun so old and so stale that it literally thudded on the counter when I brought it inside to show them. The chain itself is usually pretty good, but this place will endanger your health.

The worst fried chicken dinner experience I have ever had! We haven't have kfc for ages so we decided to have it for our dinner. I purchased a deal that comes with original chickens, fries and gravy. My kids were so excited to dip the chickens and fries in the gravy because both of them are gravy lovers, they will eat almost all the gravy from everywhere as long as the gravy is salty, but the gravy from kfc tastes like starch with tiny bit of salt to taste, fries are definitely cooked for a long time and waited for someone to buy, hard and taste like something was cooked the day before! The chickens are nice and hot since we had to wait for more than 10 mins, but seriously, how come the fried chickens from kfc doesn't smell like the fried chicken? The unique fragrance from the seasoning? I asked my kids the same question after we picked up the order on our way back home. The chickens taste nothing like they are marinated with 11 secret ingredients and they are ALL so greasy!!!! The oil kept dripping down my kid's hand to their forearm.....we will never buy from KFC again

The chicken and sides were good when we finally got them. 

The cashier needs to be the cashier. She was trying to do everything which just confused everyone. The expeditor was doing fine until she tried doing his job, the "servers" were doing fine until she tried doing their job. Since she wasn't at the caah register customers had to wait. 

Our order sucked. We got 10 pieces of dark but they were out of grilled, AND they were out of thighs. She asked if they could substitute legs for the thighs. I said that isn't a fair trade as the amount of meat on a thigh is substantially greater than that of the leg so I would take a couple breasts instead - she wanted $1.29 extra each. So I was fed up and took the legs. THEN while waiting for our meal she told another customer that thighs would be ready in 3 minutes - I kinda jumped her about this and got some thighs! 

The dining room floor and tables were dirty as was the floor behind the counter. 

The food was good and fresh for 4 stars
minus a star for the filth, minus a star for the horrible service = 2 stars.

Over the years this location has had a history of horrible service, health dept issues and just looking dirty. They did manage to deal with health dept issues and haven't had any since. Bad service has been a constant, but unless I wanted to drive 5 miles or more my only choice for KFC. Tonight it was on the menu for quick easy dinner. The young lady that waited on me was very friendly and professional. They didn't have enuf chicken to fill my order but it was only going to be 5 min. She gave me a free Pepsi for my wait and I pulled up out front. In about five min she brought out my food with all the condiments necessary. The order was totally correct for once. Got home ate, full and ready for a nap. They need more employees like her.

I love Chipotle, BUT... I hope  it is just this one Chipotle store, but I was surprised at the half-empty burrito bowl.  I watched the rice being spooned in and was waiting for another spoon - but they moved on to the beans.  The portion was small enough that I could almost count the individual beans.  Then, a truly meager portion of carnitas.  At that point I commented on the small portions and got "the shrug."  I don't need a huge portion but rice and beans cost pennies.  The $8.35 spent on the bowl didn't seem like a good deal.  Especially since the bowl seemed half empty.

Went to drive through on 8/21/16 how hard could it be I ordered 2 whopper Jr. Meals with cheese and 1 whopper jr no cheese. Guy repeats my order and I say yep 2 with cheese and one plain. I get home and the plain whopper jr consist of 2 pieces of bread a an itty bitty piece of meat. I'm shocked and very disappointed. If I wanted this why would I spend 1.99 for this and not just get a burger and you wonder why they don't deserve $15 an hour. I'm done with fast food in NOLA

Awesome burritos and tacos, made to order right in front of your eyes.  

Customize your burrito with the type of beans, meat, and salsa to be added to your 13" flour tortilla on a bed of their perfectly seasoned cilantro-lime rice.  I usually cycle through the different burrito meat choices (chicken, steak, pork, shredded beef) because each is so good. 

The resulting burritos are incredibly massive, but reasonably priced.  Add a drink and you'll spend around $8.
Bad Burger King. Got whopper with cheese. Bread stale. Lettuce soggy. Wrapper discolored. Not hot enough. Several hours old? Jeez.

I've frequented this Del Taco a lot, and more often than not is the drive thru dangerously slow.  Last visit I was in that drive thru line for 25 minutes, with only 3 cars in front of me. Taco bell can bust out a 6 car line in 5 minutes man, cmon! And I'm not one to complain about one bad experience, this has been on multiple occasions. Seems that over the past year it's gotten worse.  One time I went there and they had run out of refried beans, so the employee told me I couldn't order anything with beans in it. Hey man, that takes alot of options away here. I can understand a down economy and having to cut costs, but when that affects your product and adequate staffing, you may have to rethink your budgeting plans. Just sayin.

Ordered through Uber eats. Left a message for the cook to leave no onions on burgers and drinks to be water. 
Uber ests arrived only 5 minutes later (not a big deal at all) 
Handed us the burgers And jetted off without a single work. 
Checked our order and had no drinks (even though it was supposed to come with 2), we had 2 straws in the bag 
Our burgers were full of onions too 

Great place If you want a quick slider and don't care what's on it. But we didn't have the best experience tonight

I'm not a big Burger King eater. But now that they have Impossible Whoppers I knew I had to check it out. So when my son and I needed a quick bite before baseball practice. 

He got a Bacon and Cheese Chicken Sandwich. I asked for plain chicken, bacon and pickles. We still got cheese. He's a Chick-fil-A guy so the cheese was weird. He said he didn't dislike it and that it was good in a different way. Ok. 

I got the Impossible Whopper with Cheese. The patty was dried on the edges. Kinda reminds of when something gets freezer burn. Not as good as the Impossible Burger at Red Robin or Dog Haus. Both seemed fresher or something. Not bad, but not as juicy and good as expected. 

This quick meal was about $9 each. That's a lot, IMO. We were satisfied but not looking forward to a special trip back. He still wants Chick-fil-A and I'll go with a better option unless I just don't have time. I do appreciate this option though. So good job Burger King!

I have never had a problem with Burger King until today. I ordered my normal Whopper, no pickle, no onion with a large fry. I drove about 2 blocks and parked on the street by a walking path. I opened the bag and had a small order of fries and when I bit into the burger, the meat was stone cold, not cool, COLD! And to top it off, pickles and onions on the dang thing. I picked off what I could because I didn't have time to go back, get a re-order and make it to work. This was the first error or bad meal I have had so I hope it is a fluke.

We went in the afternoon and by the time that we got there all the food was old from the lunch.  there was no chicken in the buffet line so I had to talk to the cashier  to put some chicken out, twice! 
Maybe this place would be better if you try it during lunch time but I'm not so sure about it.

This is my first time at this location. I wanted to try the impossible burger. I pulled up to the drive thru and the lady says "welcome to Burger King. We don't have any meat right now. We do have chicken left (that's meat) and we can microwave the impossible burger if you'd like. What in the world is going on. This is my first and last time here.

Love me some Whopper. Or as our son calls it a Sloppy..   we love it with Xtra xtra Mayo so it's pertty wet n dripping, we wrap the wrapper firmly to catch the drippings in Chicago they wrap them that way.  Our son came up with that name Mom said that he wanted Sloppy for lunch she had no idea what he was talking about. This burger King on lemon Dr. does a great job. Food is hot and the people who work here are very friendly . Clean seating and condiment area.  I will drive past other B Kings to eat here. The problem the fast food restaurants have is getting the order correct and hot. And keep in the seating area clean.

My grandpa would eat these when he lived in Michigan and then he moved to So. Cal and would get these in the frozen section at our local grocery store, so when I was getting ready to visit Missouri and saw that a White Castle was close to the St. Louis Airport, I knew I had to stop and try the burgers.

They were delicious!  I had the breakfast slider and the original slider and they are not to be compared with any other burger I've tried (In-N-Out, Carl's Jr./Hardee's, McDonald's).  They stand on their own.
Impossible whopper. Friendly and attentive staff. Clean. Professional. Get BBQ sauce instead of mayo if you want to keep your impossible whopper vegan.

Ordered 2 whopper jrs. The whole sandwich taste was mayo and onions. Each bite the mayo would ooze out from top and down sides. Tomato, lettuce was all in center. Looks as if more training is needed. BL. Antioch, Tennessee

Have not been to a chipotle in years & had some time to kill. Got a salad with steak, steak flavored  very good, spicy. Came with black beans, brown rice cheese. Apparently it was called a steak bowl. This is in a convenient spot, in front of Dicks & the mall. Seating is a little weird, it's like they want yu to conversant with others that yu don't know, seating is close together in other words.

Need to add more than 1 person on the register on whopper Wednesdays. Lines are too long. In the past, this bk handled crowds better. Totally disorganized now. 

Several weeks later...still long lines on whopper wed. 1 dude at register. Ummm...what's up with that?

Wow. Came back to give this place a try after 6 months. What a mistake. It's a whopper Wednesday and as usual, standing in line FOREVER. GOTTA get back to work soon. What a mess.
It made both me and my fiance sick last night.  I got the vegetarian sofritos bowl and he got the chicken bowl.

Burger king gets bad reviews, I cant't see why tho.  Went here today and my whopper was excellent. Now about the new tacos, there ok, but jack in the box tacos are better and only 2 for $1.20. Your going to have to match that price before I get them again.

Horrible horrible horrible. Wish I could give minus stars. I don't expect miracles when getting fast food but I do expect what I ordered. 

The guy that took my order wasn't even close to hospitable or even acknowledged my presence. Just came to the register (after I waited 15 minutes) and stared at me, no can I help you or nothing.  Ordered no pickles and extra onions for my pregnant wife on a Whopper Jr. Meal and a Number 4 for me. After I ordered, without even looking at me said, "That it?", I barely heard him so I said, "Excuse me?"  He bluntly repeated, "That it?"  seriously?!?  I said that would be all, paid for my meals, got my drinks and went home with the food. 

I get home and the wife's burger had no onions, or cheese but did have pickles. Not the cashiers fault because the recept shows he at least punched the order in correctly. Also fries were cold and under cooked. 


WORST BK EXPERIENCE EVER.

Please, please, please, please times 100, save yourself and do NOT go here. I think this is the first time I wished there were a negative star system in place. They would negative stars from me after my experience today. 

I think I'm now traumatized and really nervous about going to any fast food restaurants anymore. So for that, I say thank you to this establishment. 

First thing, I think the young lady at thee window was annoyed and didn't want to deal with me. I didn't order much, a few rodeo burgers, a couple bacon cheeseburgers and a whopper meal. But I thought she was annoyed that I had bothered her by coming to this restaurant. 

Next, I checked my burgers to make sure they were correct and they were. However, they looked thrown together. The rodeo burger had literally a dab of sauce on it which was very disappointing and were dry. The others were fine...a whopper is a whopper, but they didn't put my extra veggies omit as I requested. I was too sleepy to go back and fuss so I went on to make my way home. 

Last, but certainly not least.....the coup de grâce: were my fries. I took a couple of bites of my fries and what I tasted I'm embarrassed to even say it. They tasted like someone had used the bathroom....didn't wash their hands and wiped their filthy, hands on my fries. It was disgusting!!! They tasted literally like boop. I spit them out, it was so strange as I ate it....it was very weird. one may say, "well how does boop taste?" Well as a mother of 3 and one who works with children, I know what it smells like, and that taste of those fries was a close match!!! I don't have any other profit than what my mouth tasted, but...that's enough for me

We've heard horror stories about dirty restaurants and the horrible things  employers do. I wasn't a believer, I thought I'd never experience that......well today  I think I did. 

I'm disappointed. 

So now, I'm thinking is that what happen???did somebody do this unthinkable act???what else has anyone else did??! I feel like I've been betrayed and can't trust the fast food industry. 

Deep sigh. Won't be eating here definitely EVER again....

If I could give it no stars I absolutely would. First of all the person taking drive thru orders needs to be retrained or fired. It took over twenty minutes to get my food, and once I got it home I realized they didn't give me the cheese on my impossible whopper that they charged me for. Tried to call to fix the problem and they took the phone off the hook. NEVER AGAIN. I only went here because my usual BK is renovating. I will never go back here.

Not getting as much for the money. There's Usually no customers in line. Got lots of instant mashed potatoes. Tiny skimpy chicken pieces. Greasy extra hard potato wedges. Will boycott this place for a while.

Sorry. I have always wanted to love this place because I love KFC. But they never seem to get it all right and I've been coming here for years and this is not an isolated incident. 
Today: 
- Order was wrong. The 2 side items with my box were not what I ordered.
- No napkins w takeout order. No straw for my drink.
-  I was asked what drink with my order and then was charged an additional 30 cents for it at checkout. When ordering I asked if I could get lemonade with my chicken box and was told "yes" .  I was not told when I ordered there was an upcharge for lemonade. I will gladly pay but I find it shady they don't tell you. 

On the plus side, the people were nice and the chicken was good.

Hubby raved about the Impossible Whopper at a different BK, so we decided to try it in the Havertown BK. It was awful - as if it had been sitting around for hours. The store should have been embarrassed to serve it - dry, quite cold, flat (not how an impossible burger should be and not like the one hubby had previously at a BK), totally overcooked (it is difficult to overcook an impossible burger so there is no pink), a few pieces of soggy lettuce, a tiny bit of sauce (tomato and onion were fine). It was a waste of money and calories, and we did not feel up to complaining at the time. Will not be returning to Havertown BK!

On the upside, the cashier was a very nice, polite young man.

Honestly, this isn't the greatest chipotle I've been to. It's still chipotle so it's going to be fire, but it's just super inconsistent compared to the chipotles I've been to. Sometimes the ingredients just don't look or taste the freshest like they've been sitting out for a hot second. Which is honestly probably the case, but ya. Chipotle is still bomb. I always get a steak/guac bowl with a tortilla on the side. Ya u can do that. So do it. & get extra corn on the side. Cuz they're corn is fire.

Upon the urging of daughter, we went to Chipotle this evening.  While I love their burritos,  this was the first time that I had the displeasure of eating a steak burrito that I did not like.  Five pieces of steak were mostly fat. I understand that the fat gives the steak most flavor,  but I'm sure that my burrito would have tasted better if the pieces of steak had been leaner. I still like Chipotle,  but I'll probably consider having something other than a steak burrito.
So we ordered corn on the cob a 12 piece chicken bucket, some ice cream and a pot pie meal..the  corn we got was burnt and deflated. No flavor at all!

The worst chipotle ever. I paid 9.10 for a steak bowl, which is normal for a steak bowl but, my portion was tiny. they gave me not even enough rice to fill the bottom of the bowl, when i asked for more, the lady rolled her eyes at me and gave me about 6 grains of rice more. very rude. then she gave me steak, maybe 8 pieces of steak were on my bowl, but, i was too nervous to ask for more. they also ran out of sour cream. how does chipotle run out of sour cream? i'm not sure. A couple weeks ago i did and online order, i asked for extra rice (they did not give it to me) and i asked for diet coke (they didn't give that to me either). when i called they told me there was nothing they can do about it (waste of $12). it is also very dirty, i don't think they cleaned it for at least a week. I guess i'll go to qdoba next time.
Need to add more than 1 person on the register on whopper Wednesdays. Lines are too long. In the past, this bk handled crowds better. Totally disorganized now.

First of all, I think most fast-food restaurants are inconsistent in service, even if their food is consistent in quality.  Our first visit here was great though.

Michael took our order, and something he said that I can't remember told me that he was pretty new at the job.  He offered me a small cup with ice (no charge), presumably because I brought in a bottle of soda.  Then he tells me, after my discount, my total is $xx.

So I asked him why he gave me a discount, and he said: because I'm a nice guy.  ;-)

While we were eating, he jumped out from behind the counter and started cleaning tables.  When another customer came in, he rushed right back to the counter to help him.

I guess this is more a review of Michael than a review of Del Taco/McCarran, but keep up the great work Michael!
This is the worst place to get fast food. Chicken was gross and it took an hour to get our food. Go somewhere else

Well, I was going to IHOP (it's in the same shopping area, just off I-80) for breakfast, and then decided the budget needed taking care of, so I went to this Del Taco.

For one-quarter (or less) the price of the IHOP breakfast I didn't have, I had a great bacon-egg-cheese quesadilla, a substantial side pot of refried beans dripping with cheese and red (enchilada?) sauce, a cup of not-bad coffee, and some crisp, fresh potato sticks. Five stars for value for the money and a bright, upbeat place to eat.

The only trouble was trying to figure out how to eat the quesadilla. It's tucked into a big triangular paper wrap, so I supposed I should pick the thing up in the wrapper, but it was hot (a good thing) and the flour tortillas were soft (also a good thing), so I couldn't quite get a grip on it! When I did, it was tasty as can be. The potato sticks were crisp and better even than the potato cakes at Arby's, if you know about those.

And BTW, the decor in this Del Taco makes you think you're in the Milan airport: White, green, and red tiles laid vertically to resemble a mountain range; orange-painted ventilation housing (industrial chic); bright cube ceiling light fixtures; multi-colored tables; and more. This contempo ambiance adds to value for the money!

Counter service was friendly, polite, and quick. This is a great spot for an inexpensive, fill-er-up breakfast when you can do without the Swedish pancakes.

Now, let's keep in mind I'm comparing the Chipotles here in Philly to my  fair, fun and beloved state of California. 

Pros: 
-consistently great taste of the food. Steak or chicken, the meats are delicious. The veggies and dressings are fresh too. 
-the tables are clean and even though this place is always busy, you can always snag a table. 
-another thing, the packaging of the product is cute! Aesthetics are important too you know! A nice, decorated recycled brown bag for the food is cute :)

Came here for a quick bite. I found this location for it was close to Discount Tires where my car was being inspected. The place was nice. Modern looking and well kept together. There wasn't a lot of people which was nice for me. I was helped right away. The cashier was very nice and outgoing. I got my food in like 2 or 3 minutes. Which was really good. I ordered the Nashville Hot Chicken Colonel Combo. Hoping that my food would be spicy, but it wasn't. It had a good flavor but not to what I am used to when eating Nashville Hot style chicken. Plus, my burger buns were a bit burnt, the smokey flavor kind of overtook the taste. It wasn't too bad, but just wanted a spicy chicken sandwich. Hopefully next time, it will be better.

Always a favorite, White Castle always has the best chocolate shakes anywhere, and I hadn't had a Slider forever! So this was a treat to stop and enjoy. This location isn't in the best spot. It's near downtown and near the expressway. We were walking back to our hotel after doing the Honky  Tonk bars, so we ignore the untidy area and went inside. The restaurant was clean and the staff friendly. The menu on the board still had excellent prices and the same food items.  This is definitely the place to go for a good cheap meal, and the must-have milk shakes.

Hi! I came here for the steak fries. They were gone in sixty seconds! Well two minutes. Maybe I was starving or maybe they were just excellence in a box. It's both! 

The drive through had the food made by the time I got there. But I also took my time ordering lol. 

Only thing is they gave me regular coke which I hate when I asked for cherry coke which I can drink. So I didn't  enjoy the drink. Little details make a big difference. So one star off. Keep your stars up and pay attention to what's ordered. You guys are great and I enjoyed the experience. This is a great way to bring home some food quickly hence the fast food term. The steak here is excellent and has a great taste! My burrito was also so good! 

Thanks Del Taco. The drive through at fast food places will keep you safe from homeless people! Not that I don't like homeless people I was just raised to give all my change to people in need and sometimes I need it! 

They should have signs in front of these building no loitering or something.

This place doesn't even seem like fast food.  I'm a vegetarian and since they got the beyond meat tacos on their menu I go there often.  Also the lady who works the drive-thru at nights is always so incredibly kind and nice.  Next time I am there I will ask for her name to update this review.  She has an amazing customer service attitude.

I had the sofritas salad and my husband had the bowl.  I'm allergic to dairy so got everything but cheese and sour cream. The sofritas was tasty as well! It was so good with a little cilantro (have to ask for that) and lime. The girls were all really nice and I'd go back.

Sign in front of the building advertises it as a 24 hour location. It's listed on BK's website as one, too. Good luck finding anyone working there overnight, though. All the lights may be on, but there's not a soul inside. Head on over the 38Th Street for your late night Whopper fix!

This review is strictly to this location and not the franchise itself. I love Chipotle. Everything is so fresh and flavorful, however, this particular location fails. Maybe they recently opened and haven't had things fine-tuned yet BUT it's a franchise and operation is usually consistent among stores.

First, the building is quite small so there's limited seating. If you sit indoors, it's cramped and very noisy and echo-ey. Since I was by myself, I took my food to-go and just ate in my car!

Secondly, something was a little off as far as flavoring of the steak and the guacamole...most likely a lack of lime and/or salt. Everything was so bland. As I ate my burrito bowl, I kept pondering why it tasted so different and found myself chewing on a piece of plastic. I'll spare you the disgust and won't post that photo, but I was so disappointed that I had to try again at Chipotle in Harahan the next day. That experience was much better.

I'll wait a little while for them to improve and maybe try again, but I definitely won't go out of my way for it.

I'd give 0 stars if I could based on customer service alone. I walked in to this Chipotle (4/13/19) and ordered a chicken quesadilla and a chicken burrito bowl. I ended up leaving mortified based on the way I was spoken to by the girl taking my order. I ordered CHICKEN and the girl kept telling me they were holding on steak. I asked what the meant and she told me in a very condescending manner that it means that they're out of steak and that it'll be about 10 minutes before they have more steak. I think I was justifiably confused because I didn't order steak and didn't know how that pertained to my order. I was then told that I need to learn how to order a "bowl" because I ordered the wrong thing and that's why I was getting a burrito instead of the "burrito bowl" I asked for. I have never been spoken to by people representing an establishment and I was so embarrassed as there were customers behind me and employees behind the counter who had heard the exchange. I then went to pay, when my quesadilla had been completely forgotten about by the employees, and I had very obviously inconvenienced them by asking for it since I ordered it. I didn't even bother to ask for chips. To me, this is completely unacceptable and I will NEVER visit this location again.

Portion reviews are spot on.  Tonight meat guy took of four small pieces of steak to put back.  Thought I was nuts till I saw others complaining of the same.  Food cooking extremely in consistent. Over done and underdone. Biggest kicker is the horrible service. Always can count on that at this location. Truly unprofessional and I can only imagine what is going in the food. Go to other Mexican restaurants nearby or Lilly's in same parking lot.  May be a little more money but 5 times better tasting food!

Still like Chipolte.  Just not this one!

Enjoyed the service I got today! The GM waited on me and took my order and she was amazing!

I ordered a Famous Star with cheese and extra cheese, of course with fried zucchini!  How cool is that!  It was amazing and I really appreciate the attention to detail with the extra ranch I was given without having to ask for it. 

Thank you crew at Carl's Jr's!!

Ordered from Door Dash and will never order from Chipotle again. The rice is OLD! Carnitas and rice are both ice cold, stale chips, and unseasoned salsa. Complete waste of money. This location should close.

This is a must-stop location anytime we have to travel to the Nashville area. We typically buy a sackful of 10 or even a Crave Case of 30 to bring home. We only have the "other" slider restaurant in our hometown, so White Castle is a special treat for us!

We picked up a Crave Case of 30 to go, and we each had a double cheese plain for the road! My, oh my!! So much better than the "other, dry-buns" place! During this visit, Felipe was on the grill. He was like a well-oiled-machine in perfect rhythm!! Our order of 30 sliders on top of all the other orders coming in never even phased him! Way to go, Felipe - Master of the White Castle Grill!! Thank you for an awesome lunch and our special treat to bring home and enjoy too! Thanks to the entire crew! :-)

(Wow, some reviews are severe on this Chipotle) I was just happy to be able to eat Chipotle one last time before I flew back to my "home and native land", i.e. Canada. Ordered 1 steak burrito for my husband and 1 steak bowl for myself. Both with Guacamole. Loved every bite, and was sad when it was all gone. The staff was friendly. I like the fact there's a Chipotle at the airport. Good job, PHL!

With all the travel I do for work, i go to a LOT of DDs.  Sausage/egg/cheese on a plain bagel at those, but I go to the DD on Vets to get donuts for the family.  These are wonderful people and it's nice to be treated like a regular.  NOLA is more a donut town, so the glaze are usually hot and all the donuts are fresh.  DD is a winner.

Need to add more than 1 person on the register on whopper Wednesdays. Lines are too long. In the past, this bk handled crowds better. Totally disorganized now. 

Several weeks later...still long lines on whopper wed. 1 dude at register. Ummm...what's up with that?

OK I have been seeing the advertising for the new Impossible Whopper meatless burger for weeks now. But, try as I may, I could not find a single person I know that tried it. What to do? What to do? I was afraid it might disappear before I had a chance to try it.

I consider myself a little adventurous eater, for my age. I will try most things  at least once. Chitlins once; escargots several times; menudo once; durian - nope, couldn't get past smell! Ok so time to go got it!

My wife was having a sleepover with girlfriend so perfect time to try. Besides I do like Whoppers but too many WW points. Stopped by drive through for a meal with tea and onion rings, all favs of mine. Onion rings were hot and crispy and great. At home I opened the wrapper and enjoyed the Impossible Whopper. I was very surprised. It was very good and had that meat flavor. You never know unless you try!!

Burger King needs to pay better and train better. This place is a nightmare.  The soda machine is often broke or out of ice. For some reason it draws a rough crowd of juvenile delinquents and older social-services losers so the dining experience is unpleasant. I swear a young woman that works there once cursed out a guy, a customer, that she believed took an unflushable dump in the terlet that she was sent in to clean. Imagine hearing that conversation as you chew your double Whopper.

This was the worse KFC i have been to. I had a meeting run late and had to get to another site so stopped in to eat. I wasn't sure what i wanted to order as it has been a while since I've even to KFC. The lady at register seemed annoyed with questions I asked such as what was on  their $5 fill-up meal. Since late lunch i didn't want to order anything big. I ordered the chicken tender Big Box even though i was asking about the $5 fill up. I just went with it. Got my order and took bite of first chicken tender. Was dry and hard and no chicken meat. I searched through each tender and ALL were the same. Maybe a bite of each one had a dry bite. Sad to say but I will not be back to this one. Definitely was not worth almost $10.
Ive gone here 3 times in the last week and each time told they don't have grilled chicken for the day wtf. How do you not have grilled chicken for the whole day by 2pm terrinle

Thanks, CJ, for offering the  Beyond Burger. I eat almost everything but my husband doesn't eat meat. With the Beyond Burger we now have a good fast food option. I now prefer it to the beef version. I just wish that we didn't have to pay extra to get s non-beef burger.
Have yet to come to this del taco and receive hot food. Room temperature would be an upgrade. I have thrown away every single thing I've ordered here. Unacceptable.
I ordered chicken strips and onion rings to go.   I got home the strips were dry and almost inedible and the onion rings were soggy and not cooked enough.  Not something I will do again.

If I could give zero stars I would. Possibly some of the worst customer service I've ever received at any establishment I've been to. I've worked at many restaurants so I know how important customer service is. Almost all of the employees I've interacted with have been just straight up rude. I gave them one last chance the other day and they blew it. I ordered a sausage egg and cheese croissant and asked for no cheese. I finally get home and of course there is cheese on it. I tried to call the restaurant several times and no one answered. I drove back there and went inside. I did speak to a friendly employee and asked if I could have my money refunded to me. She walked back to speak to the manager Nicole. I over heard Nicole start complaining and saying how I did not ask for no cheese, she then starts complaining about how long she has been working and then she starts complaining about another customer who is in the drive threw! After a few minutes of me standing then she grabs the receipt from me and just hands me my money back. No apology for the inconvenience does not offer to remake my order, nothing she did not say a single word to me. I took my money and walked out. This is not the first time I've had a bad experience at this location one time an employee while I was at the counter walked up and said " what chu want?" I also contacted corporate about these issues. They were not very helpful Jenna with the support center emailed me back a day later with what seemed to be a copy and paste email that they probably send to everyone who complains. They stated in the email " hope you give dunkin another chance." Yeah that will not be happening this company is not getting another dime from me. They're plenty of places that serve way better coffee for a cheaper price. Also I've been to many other Dunkin locations, ones not in St.Petursburg and the staff never seems to be in a good mood. If you want coffee and a donut in the St. Pete area I would suggest Frays Donut house right across the street. Coffee is way better and the staff is very upbeat and happy. Hope Dunkin Donuts realizes that people who come there so early in the morning have not had there coffee yet, so no ones in a good mood nor feels like dealing with disrespectful rude employees that do not know what they're doing.

I just learned that Hardee's is offering a Beyond Meat thick burger so of course I had to go try it. Especially since my local Burger King closed down and I can't get the impossible whopper without going out of my way. But I digress, on to the beyond thick burger. It was, well, thick! But definitely on par with the impossible burger. Although I do prefer the flavor of the impossible burger. The Hardee's bun is so much tastier than the burger King one which is another plus. Fries are decent, and also better than burger King for sure. The price is a bit steep, I paid $11 and some change for the combo plus an extra order of fries for my kiddo. Still, it's good to know that there is a decent vegetarian burger within a short drive from my home so I'll definitely be back (and I want to try the beyond sausage biscuit, and hopefully they'll make a beyond biscuits and gravy next!)

The prior 2-star review might have been generous. KFC is my occasional guilty pleasure. This particular franchise might have cured me of that. Several months ago, I'd ordered some chicken and potato salad. The chicken was even greasier and blander than usual for some reason. The kicker was the potato salad: it contained RAW potatoes! I foolishly thought that was a one off. Last month I ordered some chicken and potato salad again. I know. I'm a slow learner. Guess what? The potato salad still uses RAW potatoes. It's a sign of workers who don't know what they're doing or just don't care (or both). How can anyone screw up potato salad? Obviously, this franchise has found a way. I suspect the staff doesn't do the chicken right either because the chicken tastes bland compared to what I remember KFC tasting like. Hey KFC! The franchisee here is doing a lousy job! Someone might want to review that...

Cons: lousy (even for KFC) fried chicken and RAW potatoes in potato salad
Pros: You've given me all I need to kick the habit.

My boyfriend and I had a bad experience last weekend with a to go and corporate sent us a voucher for two full meals asking us to try the location again. Worst experience I've ever had at chipotle and so disappointing. We had to wait 10 minutes for steak because the girl didn't cook the steak when asked and then it took so long to get them that the burritos were cold. Stale chips and very few of the tables wiped. Maybe they do better when they aren't busy but I'm not coming back to see. Doubtful that my boyfriend will want to take me to Chipotle at all since both experiences have been awful.

So today I came in to the Burger King expecting to get a nice cheap meal and yes....I got cheap meal. I ordered a whopper meal with cheese and half with you my whopper I realized I did not get any cheese on my burger. This definitely is one of the nicer Burger King is in town but their service is not very good. Just kind of like the McDonald's down the street where they never really quality control of the meals going out. But I really can't expect too much I guess from the Burger King or McDonald's. He definitely get the food out somewhat quickly. Maybe too quickly and didn't check to make sure that I got my actual cheese on my burger. That I got charge for. Although I do feel a little bit better...sarcastically.....That The girl that took our order said that she would tell them to be more careful next time. Thank you so much for taking my missing cheese and $.60 very seriously.

I went to this White Castle last night in search of some much needed nourishment. I ordered my usual: a number six with a sprite and a chicken and waffles slider. For me, the chicken and waffle slider is like a delectable dessert one receives after slamming a hearty white castles meal. I compare eating it to the feeling a marathon runner gets after they finish a race and are wrapped in one of those warming space blankets. Anyway, last night I was horrified when I bit into my chicken and waffle slider and found not a single bacon bit or country gravy. I've ordered this same thing at 10+ White Castle locations and it ALWAYS comes with bacon bits and country gravy. Without those two things, the slider is pretty lackluster. The rest of the food was good, but I was VERY disappointed in the quality of the chicken and waffle slider.

I do not get fasts food very often so when I do Im usually pretty hungry. I went on my lunch break from work and the girl who took my order was very friendly and told me my order would be right out. Before I could even put my change back in my purse my order was on the counter ready for me to grab and go. I was very happy with the portion size and the way my tacos tasted. I have been to this location twice now and both times I was not disappointed. The place looks clean and the counter help are nice and friendly and the best part is it is fast.
If you want a good place for some fast tacos then I suggest Del Taco.

White Castle, is White Castle. Don't expect anything crazy, or anything amazing, it's just White Castle. This restaurant was literally only made to satisfy munchies and cravings and that is what my family and I did. I got a 20 slider/4 small fry combo and it was filling and satisfying. The burgers were squishy, but it's what you expect from "steam-grilled" White Castle burger. Love this place with all my heart, but I don't know if many people share (or will share) the same sentiment.

I went here about 15 minutes before closing. Instead of telling me that they had run out of most things the guy started making my order. He put literally 5 pieces of chicken on my order, no beans, no vegetables and when I asked him what was going on one of the other women comes in and claims this is the usual portion size of chicken. When I complained and told her I'd been here enough times to know that was not the case the guy making my order agreed to add in sofritas. If I hadn't complained all I was going to get was rice and 5 pieces of chicken. I am disappointed that there was no apology, they charged me full price for a sub standard product. Another guy came in after me and made the right choice by going to qdoba. I'm going to do that in the future and you should too.

I love Chipotle!  The food Is always consistent and the portions just right.  I love their bowls and order their steak which is just amazing!
I always feel I ate healthy when I go there.  At other Mexican restaurants it is always a gamble waiting to see what you ordered. It is always great here.  It is truly the best fast food place around.

I'm writing this review based on my most recent experience at Chipotle. I don't typically get food from restaurants that have made hundreds of people barf but I just wanted a quick burrito. The sofritas in the burrito were not fresh and neither were the salsas and rice in the burrito. The burrito almost fell apart because it was poorly folded. Luckily, I did not get the guacamole on my burrito because it looked old and brown. Overall, worst "Mexican" in Tampa(excluding Taco Bell, which doesn't even try to be Mexican).

This Carl's jr is ran by kids.  I've yet to see anyone resembling an adult.  I have been here twice both times I got home and my order was incorrect.  First time I ordered the guacamole bacon burger and opened it at home and had a famous star.  Tonight we were missing fried zuccinis.  I get it tgat hapoens but when you have to turn your car off on the drive thru and you're the only car in line theres an issue.

Checked v
Been to a White Castle.
The slider is with onion, pickle, beef patty and cheese if you wish. The taste of slider was okay. The bun is soft and overall taste of slider is good. Glad I tried it rather than driving by and skipping it.

I recently used the Burger King app to order. It was a disaster. I specifically ordered a plain whopper with just cheese, ketchup, and mustard. I left the drive thru and went back to work feeling it would be accurate since I was specific in what I wanted. I went back to work and my sandwich had lettuce, tomatoes and mayonaaise all over it. I am highly allergic to mayo and lettuce so it would be dangerous for me to eat. I am not sure if management reads these reviews but I would like them to contact me to see what can be done.

This place has gone down hill in a bad way.  Stopped in today and was treated rudely by a particularly obnoxious little girl working there. She was annoyed and angry before i even placed an order.  She seemed to have no clue what she was doing behind the counter and had an attitude about the whole thing.  I asked for a rice bowl and she looked at me like she never heard those words before.  She was slopping the food around tossing my order down the counter in an angry manner.  Who wants to be treated like that going in to a restaurant?  

The food was poor quality.  The steak we ordered was ice cold and mealy.  The restaurant looked filthy.   What is management doing here?

Will not ever return to this location.

Avoid this place! Been there a couple of times and both times has been super disappointed. Orders through the drive thru always messed up. The fries are so old that you can bend them and they wont even break. The patty on my whopper probably sat out for a couple of days! For being a new restaurant, I would think that they would take extra care and time to ensure that all orders are correct, fresh and allowing the customers the want to come back. NOPE.....not this place! Thinking the ownership has this as a front for something else since they obviously dont care about their restaurant keeping returning customers.
I asked for a whopper wit cheese no pickles...they gave me no cheese and a ton of pickles

Welcome to the neighborhood...slow start, but room for improvement. Typical Burger King food quality, everything cooked good. Clean areas and fresh new drink bar (everything is new, only open a week). 

So first troublesome issue, we ordered at 11:40 AM and didn't receive our order until 12:07 PM, ouch. Luckily, we had time so that didn't hurt too bad. Then, I open my whopper and of course it had lettuce, onion, and tomato on it (even though ticket says NO).

I'll retry this location in a few weeks to see if they get their stuff together. Be ready, you are located in a very busy location and will need a full staff to stay "fast food". Good luck.

Service is friendly, but extremely slow. We ate in the dining room for the first time yesterday, and had my children not been whining so loudly for chicken fingers, I probably would have left and gone somewhere else.

There were only a couple people in the dining area, but it was clear that nobody had cleaned anything, all day. Chairs were all over the place, and every table was dirty. Even worse, the whole place smelled like a public restroom. 

The food was alright, but I kept wondering if it was sanitary to be eating in a place that smelled like a toilet.

What's to love about Chipotle in Center City?

 - space
 - signage
 - ingredients
 - staff

The space is beautiful. A row of tables bisects the restaurant vertically allowing for two paths: to and from the counter. There are also stools overlooking Walnut Street and a wood-paneled booth. It has high ceilings and gets plenty of light. For such a narrow space, it is efficiently arranged.

The signage is simple and clear. You may choose from tacos, burritos and several different types of meats. The first sign states the local, organic, sustainable nature of the meats available: a huge selling point. 

The staff are knowledgeable, accommodating, yet still fast. I told them that I was allergic to lime, and they immediately confirmed with the manager which dishes had lime and what I my options were. There is lime in the rice, guacamole, corn, and all variants of beans. 

I went with the carnitas (pulled-pork) tacos on soft shells with lettuce and spicy salsa. The pulled pork was juicy and tasty, and the spicy salsa was flavorful yet not too hot. The soft taco shells were also moist.

Overall, the space is beautiful and the food is tasty, quality, and cheap. Solid.

This KFC by far is the single worst fast food location in Boise.  The last two times I have been through their drive thru, I had to wait 15 minutes.  6 months ago we went through their drive through and we were told it would be 40 minutes as they were out of chicken at 8pm at night. Tonight we went through the drive thru thinking the last two times must have been a fluke.  We had to wait 5 minutes to order. Then we get to the window and pay. We are then told to pull up and they will bring our order out. After 10 minutes we realize that 7 cars ahead of us parked at an office building are also waiting.  I then park and go inside and demand my money back.  I asked the manager, why it is taking so long to get orders out.  No response other than they are backed up.  I said " Let me give you a customer service tip. If you know you are backed up with a 20 minute wait, let the customer know and let them make the decision if they want to wait before getting to the pay window.  We will never give KFC another chance. I would give them zero stars but it wouldn't allow me on Yelp

Sad. While this isn't the only Chipotle I've been to, the fact is that Freebirds is or any other nearby Mexican fast-food is better than here. I ordered a carnitas bowl with guac, no beans and no rice, and they gave me puny half-scoop that was smaller portioned than other places. On top of that, they ran out of grilled peppers and onions AND pico de Gallo while I was ordering. Really? I think they should've restocked at least one of those items instead of leaving them out. 

As for the venue, it's kind of decrypted with the lack of decor and run-down concrete as the flooring. I don't think it was intentional, but boy did it make the place look like the manager has no interior design ability. 

The carnitas were pretty overdone, and I felt sick in the hours after coming here. That's the last time I go there!
New crunchies ..had to try them for$1..chicken. beef. And blt ranch kinda like a taco crunchy sandwich made with a tortilla..shoul have taken a pic ..but i ate them. Yummy

I got a call from Del Taco corporate and she said I was right that the National Taco Day was all day not just after 3pm. She was very nice and is sending me a coupon to make up for not getting the Taco Day special. I will not go when Robin is working. I'm satisfied they will discuss this with Robin so she won't treat anyone else this way!

Went to this location in the Plymouth Meeting Mall. Got the steak tacos ,hot with a side of chips and Guacamole. Here is my 575 review.

           Hungry at the Mall
          Tired of the same old shit
           This place hit the spot

  Namaste!

While fast food is not usually my thing, my wife was hungry around 11 on Tuesday night on October 9th. I would like to thank the person or persons making our whoopers. They were made with care. Most often with fast food the toppings are just haphazardly thrown on the sandwich, but not at this burger on this night. Cutting my sandwich in half I had a wonderful distribution of toppings that made my whopper quite enjoyable. Thank you for taking the extra time to make it well. Props to the staff working tonight. Thanks.

Just tried to go there tonight and they are out of chicken... They told me I could not get a eight piece because they were going to close soon so they weren't making any more food. The manager or the general manager should be fired for treating customers that way and for not having product available during the business hours. If you go to any restaurant you should be taken care of like you were the first person in the door even if you're coming late night... KFC must be very well off to be able to turn guest away... I will never stop at this location again. Horrible horrible business.

ATMOSPHERE = 2 stars (I've experienced better)
Common areas need to be cleaned and several tables need to be bussed.

SERVICE = 2 stars (I've experienced better)
Our two burritos were poorly wrapped. I only ask Chipotle for two things:
*PLEASE wrap the burritos so they do NOT fall apart as soon as you tear off a bit of foil to eat it.
*PLEASE try to spread the fillings along the length of the burrito.  It's not a great dining experience to eat your burrito and have nothing but rice & beans, then the meat & salsa, and end w/ guac & cheese.

FOOD= 3 stars (A-OK)
Chipotle is Chipotle.  All the components were as expected, although the Chorizo was lukewarm. Our order was for 1 Carnitas Burrito and 1 Chorizo Burrito.

OVERALL = 2 stars (I've had much better Chipotle experiences)
NOTE: this store was NOT serving lettuce on anything that day.  I have no problem with this, but you'd think it would make the burritos EASIER to wrap. No such luck.

Out the door for two burritos: $16.16.

For chains, the comparisons are to other in the same chain or similar ones.

Negative stars. They were out of chicken, buns and unsweetened tea. They didn't inform the customers until they had waited for 20 minutes. Their receipt printer was not working and they kept asking for the receipts for refunds.  Terrible customer service and in effective employees.

So i don't know whats going on with this Chipotle because they don't have THAT many customers yet they were out of various items... including the fajita vegetables!! Mine was a sad looking Sofritas Salad bowl to go. I'm trying the Clearwater location next time.

The worst fried chicken dinner experience I have ever had! We haven't have kfc for ages so we decided to have it for our dI purchased a deal that comes with original chickens, fries and gravy. My kids were so excited to dip the chickens and fries in the gravy because both of them are gravy lovers, they will eat almost all the gravy from everywhere as long as the gravy is salty, but the gravy from kfc tastes like starch with tiny bit of salt to taste, fries are definitely cooked for a long time and waited for someone to buy, hard and taste like something was cooked the day before! The chickens are nice and hot since we had to wait for more than 10 mins, but seriously, how come the fried chickens from kfc don't have any fried chicken smell? The unique fragrance from the seasoning? I asked my kids the same question after we picked up the order on our way back home. The chickens taste nothing like they are marinated with 11 secret ingredients and they are ALL so greasy!!!! The oil kept dripping down my kid's hand to their forearm.....we will never buy from KFC again

Yet another business that will close in Smyrna due to lack of leadership. Got a burrito,  half chicken,  half steak... Chicken cold,  steak lukewarm. 

Lackluster burrito.  I would have been better at taco bell.

The management here was super nice and gave us really great service. We got a complimentary french fry and my kids got one of each type of toy in their kids meals. My kids love the star shaped chicken nuggets. The food was typical Carl's jr: fast food, not the worst, not the best - but tasty just like I expected when I went there.

I typically love KFC and they've never done me wrong...until tonight.  I ordered 12 extra crispy chicken tenders and received 12ish extra dry chewy dog chews instead.  The mac and cheese had been left under the heat lamp unstirred for God knows how long and had burnt spots on it.  The biscuits were older than the dirt I stand on and very hard.  I have no idea what happened to my KFC as this was not it.  Even the employee's were disinterested and annoyed. The manager who I spoke to on the phone verified that, "yes" he does oversee the food being served.  He must be blind tonight, because my chicken didn't even look like chicken!  More like mutated dog turds after eating the slop on the bathroom floor.  Yes, I'm pretty grumpy.  Had a craving for some KFC and am eating a donut instead.  The food was not fit to feed my dog and I will hand it over to them tomorrow when I collect my refund.  I don't think I've ever in my life asked for a refund on take out.  This is a first.

Dunkin Donuts is ubiquitous in Philadelphia--convenient, available. I'd say that's all it has going for me. Doughnuts are unspiried--I do like the French Crullers. The coffee is subpar. And the breakfast sandwiches are weak (I had the turkey sausage this weekend and it was fine, but nothing I couldn't have made at home).

I go here before breakfast meetings where I haven't planned to bring anything better. No idea how this chain stays in business with the huge amount of better coffeeshops around town.
The worst chipotle experience I've had no beans, steak over cooked, terrible customer service

What a s--- Show! Unpleasant slovenly counter person  would not even look at me. Could barely mutter. I tried to be friendly, she was just miserable.

So I ordered a sausage biscuit: they were out of sausage.

I ordered a bagel sandwich: they were out of bagels.

When I left she said " whatever".

What a brand killer. I will never stop at DD again.

Today my fiancé and I came to this location ready to eat their all you can eat buffet. We always go to the one in Lakeland but since this one was closer we decided to give it a try. Walking it Patrick was okay he greeted us and handed us our cups and off we went. As we approached the buffet area there was some food out but it seemed like it was there for a while. My fiancé went and asked for some more chicken and the lady named Jessica seemed to have an issue with putting out some more fresh chicken out. As I sat in the dinning area I could hear her have issues with everything that was going on. From the drive thru orders to the orders in the counter. A lady walked in explaining that her chicken was to small. Here come Jessica with a chicken in her hand letting the lady know that they where all the same size. The lady asked if she could have the one In Jessica's hand and Jessica had a problem with that. 

Food was okay. 2.5
Customer service 1 because of Patrick.
I had such great service and a very good carnitas bowl today. I am very impressed, love chipotle!!!!
They say a picture can say a 1000 words. The restaurant was under staffed and cooks gave up on my order when they put a tomato the size of a dime on famous star.
Got the angry whopper.... Much more like a passive aggressive whopper and bacon cheesy tots... No Bacon, not much cheese or for really. Sad. Also waited around 5-10 minutes just to order.

I used to be a big fan of Del Taco's fish tacos. But I recently had them from this Del Taco location and they were absolutely terrible. I'm not sure if I just thought they were a lot better back in the day, or if this particular location's were just really terrible, but I was honestly so disappointed. There was barely any fish inside the breading and the toppings that are usually the best part, didn't taste like anything. I did enjoy the fries, but they could have used a little more salt. 

Although, the service was very fast and the staff was super friendly. The food just was so awful.
Always takes forever to get your food and they usually out of chicken. I highly recommend you go somewhere else there's a Popeye's up the street.
This location has gone down hill . Got a to go order today and burrito was the size of a potato. Steak was grizzly and chips were stale .
I got the chicken rollers and fish taco. It made me sick with food poisoning. Very disappointed

It's been more than a decade since I've gone to the former Kentucky Fried Chicken. Ever since Popeye's came to Boise in the early 1980s, KFC has played second-fiddle.

The chicken used to be really good, but the quality has long suffered. 

I recently learned of a food craze in Japan, where people take Original Recipe chicken and place it in a rice cooker with jasmine rice, a little soy sauce and chicken stock.

So I broke down and went to KFC for some chicken. I ordered three breasts and was later told they only had one, but they could substitute three thighs for the other breasts. OK.

I was surprised that right before dinnertime they didn't have more chicken on hand. 

Service was friendly and they provided by chicken to go in a timely fashion. It wasn't as good as I remember it.

As for the craze dish, it wasn't spectacular either. I guess I expected more of the 13 herbs and spices to mix with the broth and infuse the rice with flavor. It was kind of bland. But that wasn't KFC's fault.

Well been here a few times I would say only got the order right twice! We kept given the benefit of the doubt and figured well the other one is across town so our order was totally wrong the chili fries were suppost to be deluxe which we paid for only had chili and barely any the rest was cold tacos had no filling and the tostada had beans and literally 3 pieces of tomato pretty sure this was it for us and I like Del taco but to bad not wasting our time for crap! Keep driving don't waste your money it's not the normal Del taco you usually get!

Word to the wise... Stay away. Aside from the fact that it took 20 minutes to get two Whopper meals and a salad, the grilled chicken was burnt pretty bad. It was dried out like leather and tasted terrible. I know.... Why did I get salad at a burger joint... Because the boys wanted Whoppers... Next time I'll wait and eat later.

I understand that this store is in a busy location, but almost every order I've gotten at any time of the day, from mid-morning to late at night, has been wrong. Tonight I ordered a large Impossible slider combo with no onions and some honey mustard packets; and we got a small fry and four sliders, all with onion, and no sauce or napkins. Also, every time I've been, it takes a minimum of 15 minutes to make it from the drive thru order station to the window. Again, I know this is a high-trafficked area, but I won't be going back.

Super soggy. We don't usually eat at KFC, but tonight we were craving it. When we got home and opened it up, it was heard trying to find 1 crispy piece of chicken! Ridiculous. Also they were out of potato wedges.

Horrible service. Manager is an expert at rolling her eyes. Asked for a Whopper, hold the bun, manager stared me down and said, "We don't do that." Huh? I asked her if she could wrap my pattie in lettuce and she said no. I thanked her and drove off. I called corporate. They said each location has their own policy and procedures. I'll accept that. I won't visit this location again. When is saving a bun from the trash can such a big deal. If you visit here, make sure you ask them to hold the eye rolls. Wait... They can't do that either.

My wife & I both ordered carnitas bowls.  Each of us were satisfied after half & brought the remainders home for tomorrow night.

I like the white rice, pinto beans, romaine, mild salsa, shredded cheese, & sour cream with my flour tortilla on the side.  Our dishes were tasty, fresh, & generously portioned.  The staff was friendly, efficient, & coordinative.

We're regulars but not a frequent basis.  I guess there's just so many good restaurants in Tampa Bay.

Being a Tennessee boy, I've always been on Team Krystal. But, I've wondered how the yankee version of slider burgers compared. So, after giving White Castle a try...I remain firmly on Team Krystal. WC burgers are similar in look but they have a funky "old oniony" taste and the meat leaves an interesting (not exactly good) after taste. 
So, after all that; I tried, I tasted, and decided Krystal is still king. 
*White Castle fries have the edge, though.
Ordered a steak burrito and half the meat was like trying to eat a bicycle tire.
The food tastes great! Chicken is spectacular. Has the great original taste and crispy flavor. The staff service is very welcoming, warm and friendly.
Friendly staff, consistent food quality /prep. For a White Castle no complaints. Be sure to order more then one slider as they are small.

They must have recently hired the former Tim Hortons employees because it has gone downhill the last 2 months. I used to really like this location but recently I've been given a cold (hot) latte, a latte with 4 pumps flavor when asked for 1, and a really crispy sausage wrap. Starbucks will be opening shortly up the road, so they better get it together or they will be losing all their business.

The worst experience and customer service I've ever had.  They have this four pc. chicken which is $7.29 and it comes something else. The manager asked me what kind of sauce i wanted. So chose a sauce but to my understanding it would be on the side since the chicken will get soggy if you put the sauce on it. Who would want a crispy chicken that is soggy??? I asked the manager if it's ok to put it on the side and he said no cause that's what the menu says. Seriously??? I just wanted it on the side. How big of a favor is that? I just left and took my money back. It's gonna be my last visit to any KfC which is going down the drain anyways. Look at my other review  and don't be surprised that it's kfc as well.

I know, I know. These guys have taken a beating in the news last couple of years - and mostly deservedly so. But each location stands and operates on it's own, and this particular Chipotle has *never* once let me down.

I really thank God for Chipotle, they fill a need that pops up once or twice a week: the need to grab relatively healthy food extremely quickly. Chipotle delivers, every time. For a time we couldn't order carnitas as a protein, because nationally they had an issue with the supplier - that's the *only* thing I can say that was a minor inconvenience for a bit.

Other than never getting sick here(I can't believe I have to mention that as a plus), this place is immaculate, the food is rotated often and always fresh, and the staff are awesome. The grumpy-to-happy ratio here is higher than your average fast food joint, that's for sure. I don't even think they mind that I take 22 napkins with me every time I'm in for take-out. 

I'll be back every 5-6 days for the rest of my life for a Carnitas bowl with brown rice, pinto beans, mild *and* medium salsa, and a dollop of sour cream. Ya know what? I'll be there in 5-6 minutes actually.

Worst chipotle I have ever eaten at. First I am not sure me what their staffing requirements were but there were only 3 people working there and only one making food. This is not to put anyone down so
If it was this persons first day than I understand but the speed of making food left a lot to be desired. There were two people in front of me I. Line and it took 15 minutes from walk in till I could place my order. By that time another staff member had come to the front and realized the delay and the now line of customers and at high speed literally threw my burrito together messing the first one up and restarting over again. Now that's just the service. Let me tell you this was also the worst tasting burrito I have ever had. The tortilla was not soft and tasted a little stale, the steak was extremely dry, the sour cream was solidifying and the cheese was completely clumped together. I think what makes it worse is. The conditions of the restaurant. I could see from the counter how dirty the grill and counters were in the back. I will never go to this chipotle again personally. They could have had an off day but honestly, I go to chipotle cause they are always a quick and healthy go to when you need something to eat, but next time I will be sure to skip over this particular one.

Food was hot so I'll give it 3 stars on that alone. If it were based off customer service it would get 1 star only because I can not leave 0. If you don't like people, do not work in customer service. Was handed the wrong drink and when the lady came back to the window my husband gave it back to her told her it wasn't right and immediate attitude. Slamming the drive thru window and all. When she handed him the bag all she said was here and once again slammed the window and proceeded to give him dirty looks. We had to circle back around and go inside to ask for straws, napkins and dipping sauces. I will not return. Next time I want chicken, I'll find a Popeyes.

The place is TERRIBLE. I ordered online for pick up.  I get there at the pick up time pull into drive thru. Lady tells me order is not ready to pull around and park in front. 21 minutes later my order finally comes. I ordered 12 original wings and 12 buffalo. First off, these are not wings at all, they are wing pieces. about 2 inches long and the worst part they are 1 dollar each.  When you order original wings off the menu shouldnt you get ORIGINAL wings, not wing pieces. BTW,  every wing piece is counted as a wing in your order. These wing taste nothing like KFC chicken and are heavily battered. They were /are horrible.  In the end I paid almost 25 bucks for something I could have got at Albertsons for 9.99.  If you want chicken, this is not your place. Terrible customer on service on top of the crappy food.

Can't go wrong with Chipotle its fast and delicious. Whenever I have a craving for it I come to this location. The staff is friendly and efficient. I typically get the chicken burrito bowl with the tortilla on the side. However, sometimes I want to try a different type of meat and will say the steak here is my least favorite which is why I took a star off. I enjoy it well done, but it is so well done it becomes dry and difficult to chew. The pork is another tasty option which I enjoy on tacos with an order of guac and chips on the side. I always order to go so I cannot review eating there but it looks clean to me.

I went thru the drive thru late last night.  A woman took my order.  I asked her if they carried root beer because I couldn't see it on the menu.  She replied, "Do you want anything else?"  I asked her again, "Do you have root beer?"  She replied, "Do you want anything else?"  I said, "Yes.  Can you tell me if you have root beer?"  Another woman screamed back at me, "She already said YES!  Pull forward!"  I want to note that no other customer was in line behind me and the restaurant was empty.  I was stunned.  I pulled up to the window and asked her if she was the person who just screamed at me.  She replied, "Well, she answered your question twice, she didn't need to answer it again."  I tried to explain to her that I asked the question twice, because I did not know she had answered me.  She slammed the window shut.  When she opened it to hand me my food, I asked her for her name.  She started to chuckle a little with a smirk on her face and replied, Sider.  I'm not sure of the spelling, but she was extremely rude.  I called customer service and they offered me a coupon for a free whopper.  No thank you.
The worst whopper ever... cold with hard uncooked bread.  Never coming back here again.  Clearly a poor franchise.

Went through drive thru for dinner for the family they were pretty quick with a good amount of cars in front of me, you heard the guy on the speaker perfectly clear!!! got chicken soft tacos, a bean and cheese burrito with green sauce, and my daughter got chili cheese fries, I was surprised to see the variety on the menu they had cheese burgers to tacos even French fries. I liked the bean and cheese especially with the green sauce! But the burrito was only half green sauce and have plain lol Super weird, but the food was really organized and well packed with napkins and taco sauce without even asking! MORE GREEN SAUCE AND WOULD HAVE BEEN GREAT!

Stay away.  Ordered a double whopper with cheese tomato & onion. Double checked at window to make order was right. Oh yes she said.  I got home with a single whopper with pickles  mayo & tomatoes.  No onion or cheese. PATHETIC.

I have to say never order delivery from them.  This is my 3rd time and every time is it wrong or missing items..  I asked for rice and the teenie amount of rice that I got was crunchy.. Is steamed rice supposed to be crunchy? Not only do I get items I didn't want in my burrito bowl. Such as beans along with their burnt steak. I was missing my chips and salsa. I call in and speak with a lady..never once did she apologize for the mistake on their part. She offers for me to come get my missing item. I had to ask,"what about my burrito bowl?" Oh she scoffed as she tells me I'll give you a refund.. Always dine in or get take out.

Chicken is good although Popeyes is better. Problem with KFC is they don't give you all the sauces, plastic utensils, napkins, etc UNLESS you ask for them specifically. I was told this is their company policy. So don't forget to ask for all of them before you leave. I left and they didn't want to give them to me whennI returned.

Excellent Vegan Beyond burger (order without cheese or mayo and it's vegan).    would have given 5 stars but the dude taking the order the other day doesn't seem to like his job.  Other than that it was excellent thank you!!    We actually went tonight too and the gal taking the orders was helpful and sweet.

I tried to call multiple times yesterday as well as today but somehow the phone goes unanswered. I placed an online order (which I was already hesitant about) and I should've listened to my intuition. I ordered a bowl with brown rice, steak and chicken, DOUBLE MEAT, fajita veggies, queso , guacamole, corn, cheese and lettuce. Mind you the bowl was $22 :) yet it had white rice, missing steak altogether lol, no queso, and no guacamole :) Should've been the base chicken price of, what $8 haha you can't even technically check to make sure it's correct because the lids are so hard to put back on. I even work in the restaurant business so I can attest that it really isn't that hard to get an order correct

So me an my gal come in during lunch time on a Saturday, nobody here besides a couple of workers...odd but okay. I should have seen that as a sign of GTFOH, but shame on us. So she orders a whopper and fries I just get a cheeseburger and onion rings. They hand us our cups, we go to get our drink, no ice? Never heard of a restaurant not having ice. So thinking ehh that's fine I'm sure the soda will be cold enough. Wrong! Warm as fuck and flatter than a 70's white girls ass. So then We get our food, I instantly notice how my burger slice was thinner than any airbrushed IG model. We both take a bite and instantly spit it out. "Ugh wtf" we both uttered, quietly cause we don't want to piss off the 6'8 jacked dude behind the counter, idk maybe he takes pride in this shithole, you never know and again we're the only ones here at lunch time. Then without hesitation for whatever reason we both felt the need to sniff our burgers. I swear the smell was gasoline. Had a flash back of  me pumping gas. Shit was cold as fuck, cheese was harder than I was the night before. So, remember warm flat ass soda and cold ass gas smelling nasty burgers.  Onion rings were soggy some didn't even have any onions in it? How the fuck do you fry air? So then we just look at each other and bust out laughing about how terrible every little thing was. 
The second we get in the parking lot after taking two bites, we had to piss out of our asses. We rushed home luckily we have two toilets and made it home safely and just in time. 
If you're on a revenge date, take them here, maybe it could kill them. I'm 100% certain if we ate any more of this food, we both wouldn't be here.

I came to California for my sisters wedding and had to give Del Taco a try. I wanted to try multiple things so I got a Del Taco (crispy), grilled chicken taco and fish taco. The fish taco is the sole reason for 4 stars. Way better than anything you could get at Taco Bell. It was crunchy and delicious! 

The grilled chicken taco was just okay. They asked me if I wanted hot sauce and I said yes. Unfortunately there wasn't any in my bag. That could have made the chicken taco better. 

The Del Taco had an incredible cheese to meet ratio. I love cheese, so that was appreciated. The meat was tasty I just needed some sauce to go with it.

Going there on a Sunday at 5 p.m. I would figure the dinner offerings would be super fresh. I was wrong! The chicken breast was dried out in my 8-piece I have six pieces of chicken and two itty-bitty wings. I do not know what has happened to the quality of the Colonel's chicken! I will not be spending my hard-earned money there anymore. Maybe Popeyes? Time will tell.
Stopped by for some impossible whoppers and the staff was very friendly and the sandwiches were great!

Literally the worst order of chicken I ever received tonight. Everything was dry- the chicken, rolls and corn. I went through the drive through and then they made me come inside. It was truly ridiculous. They must have known it was bad because they gave us extra chocolate chip cookies but all the food was so nasty. Plus the restuarant always seems so dirty. I think it's the last time we go there.
They or very fast bringing my food out sometime I order can be a little complicated but they get it done I really like the vegan sausage sandwich on a doughnut it's really good
Never had a good experience at this chipotle. Had a whole avocado in my guac, steak was overcooked, and my bowl was overpriced compared to other chipotles.

Absolutely worst KFC that I have ever been to. I went yesterday afternoon and wanted spicy chicken, which I was told they don't sell. Yet, I have had spicy wings just a month ago from KFC. The management  was rude and unprofessional and made it clear that "hot wings" and "spicy chicken" are two different foods and that's why I couldn't place an order for it. Consumers take your money somewhere else.
