One star for good service, one for good biscuits. Sadly dinner a huge disappointment, food was not warm, not fresh at all, chewy from sitting under heat lamps. Overpriced for portion size--makes sense why they're busy in the morning and slow at night, breakfast was tasty but never again after dark.
I give this Dell taco five stars because they always make the food right, even when they get it wrong. They are nice and work fast.  Good costumer service.
Great late night bite. Nashville doesn't have much open 24 hours with vegan options. They serve the impossible sliders and it's just perfect when your our late, Vegan and need a cheap eats

This place just needs to be closed... looks new, but run by miserable people who are neither courteous to the customer nor have much of a work ethic... no ice in the soda machine, no catsup in the dispenser, more than half of the soda options were out... did I say miserable people... everyone moping around with scowls on their faces with zero customer service in mind. Counters and area for cooking were dirty and had trash everywhere... store score for cleanliness was a 89... which means horrible. With all that said, the whopper meal tasted like it should. Which was actually shocking. BTW, we (two of us) were the only customers in the store.

With introducing the impossible whopper I became a customer for this location. Impossible whopper tastes good but still does not feel like a tea burger to be honest. Coming to their mozzarella sticks they are really outstanding. May be the best mozzarella sticks ever tried.
The staff are always nice and fast in the orders

Generally good food and decent service when I stop in here, but stopped tonight 25 minutes before closing, and the sevice was terrible. The bathrooms were closed, there were mop buckets in the walkways, the kid behind the counter slurred his words so much he sounded drunk,  and he had to check if they had any chicken left before he let us order. It's not like we walked in at 955. Hours say you close at 10... you should be ready to serve guests until that point.

Since chipotle started serving quesadillas online I had to order online where I usually order in person. So I ordered online my usual bowl and quesadilla. I get home and my ball has literally nothing in it it is the smallest bowl I've ever seen about five pieces of steak. And the quesadilla is like a children's quesadilla. This was the biggest rip off of all time I might never go again and I suggest that nobody goes here

I loooove me some del taco,  but this location is awful. I moved right around the corner from it and I was super happy to find it!  After going a few times I decided it wasn't worth it.  Literally everytime I ordered they got it wrong,  but that wasn't the worst part. The worst part are the workers! I am not kidding or exaggerating when I say they are the stupidist and rudest employees I've ever experienced.  My first trip in all the young workers were just hanging out and really ignoring the customers that were waiting in line, cursing and being obnoxious. The second time the girl at the counter (I think her name was Heather or Holly or something) walked up to the register and sighed loudly as she asked what I wanted with a bored, annoyed tone.  WHILE I was ordering, she interrupted me to tell me how she can't wait to get off because they're making her work longer than she was scheduled - I don't care,  just give me my food (mind you I had just gotten off my normal everyday schedule of 12hr day...prettty sure they don't make you work 12-16 hr days at del taco and if they do its fucking easy work so get over it).  I payed by card and she grabs the receipt, holds it out toward me and as she looks away rolling her eyes says "Here, you have to sign this stupid thing." ...Really? So after waiting literally 30min for the food, get home and realize part of the combo is missing and have to go back. Same girl goes "oh, we're out of ground beef,  so that's why we didn't give you your taco" .... don't you think you should tell me that instead of not giving me what I paid for? Then another worker eating her lunch goes "No, we have ground beef." They argue for a minute and the original girl literally turns around and grabs a taco that's been sitting on the shelf behind her this entire time and says (and I quote) "Oh, J K, here." Literally said j k, not just kidding, not I'm sorry you had to come all the way back because I'm a fucking moron. Just "Oh, JK, here." Ugh. I have never, ever,  EVER had an issue at any other Del Taco (I've mostly been to the Stockton and Roseville locations and they've always been great.). 

DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS LOCATION.

This business receives zero stars. Food is normally good, but this visit yielded in an angry manager (Robin), food was cold (even though we took it home - three minutes from the drive through), order was completely wrong, and the bread was completely stale on the burger.  
When discussing with the "manager" Robin, we were yelled at, told that food doesn't stay warm in your car when you take it home, it's 25 degrees outside when it's definitely warmer than that and the last time I checked people have heaters in their cars, fries were COMPLETELY COLD ON ARRIVAL, was told that "I'm in the middle of lunch rush and am not going to deal with you", and then was hung up on. 
Del Taco isn't the best quality food, however, service should be a priority. Especially considering that none of the employees were following COVID requirements. 
Being people who are trying to support restaurants, it might behoove the owner of this franchise to take another look at who they have running the place. 
Robin seems to be a great role model, completely understands customer service, and follows the health department's standards as to food prep and COVID requirements. 
Honestly, reporting this to the health department is my next step.

Del Taco is one of my favorite fast food restaurants and they've added a delicious item to their menu called the chicken guacamole crunchtada tostada. Guacamole tastes very fresh and flavorful and the tostada is like something you would get at a sit down Mexican restaurant. Customer service is very good at this location.

We don't have a White Castle near us in Texas and obviously I see why now. 
I requested no onions and once I got my food it had onions.The cashier looked at my burger and said the burgers come with onions on it and they try to scrape them off. I just don't get why they don't say that when you order it. I ate half a slider then through them in the trash. Taste just like the frozen burgers at the store. Fries were great. Bathrooms have key codes.
Avoid it. Go to steak and shake instead.

I have reviewed this Burger King before as horrible and have went back for another chance and it is still awful.  The employees do not listen and when you tell them the order is wrong or something tastes bad they respond in the most negative way as to let you know that they are irritated.  They do not know how to make a chocolate shakes to save their life.  Also, when I asked for cheese on my whopper, they did not put it on.  I went back so that they could fix it and they still did not put cheese on it.  AND.......their double cheeseburgers are the size of a White Castle slider.  Their service is awful and the food portions are so small, it is not worth the money.  I am surprised they are still in business.

A few weeks ago I decided to go through the drive through to get some yummy fried chicken and it didn't disappoint!  Got home and the order was perfect and the chicken was WONDERFUL!  I like the extra crispy-yum!! Oh and the woman who waited on me was very nice and friendly!

Service was terrible.  Employees went on break with the register keys so we couldn't pay at the counter.  The manager "Allen" was arguing loudly with the other employees. They were out of tenders, dark meat, etc.  A lady at the drive-through was parked to wait for a chicken pot pie.  She finslly got tired of waiting and had to come in to get it (it was ready and just sitting there).  People in the drive-through were waiting 10+ minutes for their food, then after employees talked to them they shut the window and commented about the customers being rude.  When we tried to talk to Allen about all the problems, his response was to argue with us then say  "sorry you feel that way, have a nice day"  A couple of employees were really trying to handle the rush and the problems well, but the "manager" obviously didn't care, and doesn't have the skillset to go along with his position.

Its chipotle

I think they just opened but there are still some things that needs improvement.  After asking for a bowl and having my protein portioned out, the next person in the line did not ask me what type of salsa I wanted and waited for me to tell her.  Now in every other chipotle I've ever been to the second person on the line would ask "mild, medium, or hot" followed by "corn, quac, or cheese", this is what i come to expect when I go to chipotle, and not being asked this confused and annoyed me ever so slightly.  Finally, I asked only for lettuce and despite my bowl being not filled at all, I had just asked for mild salsa and steak at this point, I got barely a handful of greens.  This plus I had an upset stomach a few hours after I ate there.  All in all as far as chipotle goes this one still need improvement.  PS, they have margaritas and beer on the menu, but their liquor licence is pending.

Where to start, I'm not very sure. Anything and everything was wrong. Parking is tight, crammed and limited (not very good for dining, rush times). 
Once inside, line really has no were to go. It's a squished area if busy. We came around 9:30 at night, and still a line up to the door. The line moved fairly slow for being so busy. 
Once up to the counter, server seemed stressed and frustrated (definitely not service with a smile) but she did seem to know what she was doing. However, portions she gave could barely pass as a small lunch portion. I barley got any meat and the rice was low as well. I got white rice with carnitas. Cost is about 6.50 or so, and with the portion size I received, was not worth it.
Also, my dad order chips and queso only.
Once we started moving down the line, I asked for mild salsa, they were out. They were also out of 3 other top ingredients for toppings. 
Once we reached the checkout line, the cashier did not seem experienced. Took a very long time to checkout. First problem, it was the cashier that told us that they were out of the chips (should have said that in the beginning). So my dad had to change his order at the checkout line. The cashier did not seem pleased by this and her tone held slight irritation.
Next, after we fixed his order, we were finally checking out, but she forgot my drink. So I mentioned that, she seemed confused. She then started taking things out of my bag. When she did, she used a little bit too much force when placing my requested dressing on the counter, squashing the lid and spilling the contents. She didn't seem happy at all about this. She also forgot my dads drink.
After the chaos at the cashier, we got most of our food and went to sit down. Right away, I noticed the filth that was dropped all over each table and all over the floor. There was trash of straw papers, bits of napkins and lids everywhere. I was a little grossed out. 
Once things settled at the front, the same girl at cashier came out and started to "clean" the tables. Regardless, it was left just as dirty, still crumbs all over the surface. 
One positive thing was that the food was decent enough, but that was probably only because I was starving. 
Over all, if this facility wants to stay open, they need to change the parking situation, get their staff more organized to be able to handle large lines professionally, better friendly service and much more cleaner.
I can say based off tonight and every time I've come here, not a pleasant experience. Do not have a desire to return.

Came here on Tuesday 06/15 to grab some of their Taco Tuesdays deal before heading to cool off at the Truckee River at Mayberry Park. Taco Tuesdays consist of 3 value tacos, (your choice of soft or hard) for $1.49

The lobby is only open for online order pickup (although they were nice enough to let me order inside when I stopped by).  There is no seating.  If you didn't order online, you'll have to go to the drive-thru.  Fast service, excellent grilled cheese.  The Beyond sausage and egg breakfast sandwich is AOK.  Oatmilk is $1 extra.

.|\---/|
| o_o |
.\_^_/..2021

This is the WORST Chipotle I have ever been to and we won't be back. I stopped in on a Monday night around 7 pm on 9/30. The first guy we had acted like he had to pay for this food out of his own pocket. My boyfriend literally got 3 chunks of chicken. He had to ask for more of which he got another two. Then I was my turn I got carnitas. Had it not been for an ok size piece getting caught in the tongs I would have been just as bad off. The whole entire bowl just tasted like water. Literally zero flavor. And to top it all off...no guacamole. But it seems that was not their fault.

Warning!!!  I not happy, mad! As. The chicken skin fat in it, no chicken!  And the carrot not cook good it hard chew!! In a pie!   I not trust people who work in KCF!! 
From 
2212 E Fowler Ave
Tampa, FL  33612
United States

Where do I begin? My husband and I used to frequent Chipotle, especially on night's that we wished to not cook or nights before we travel making it easy on us. TERRIBLE idea on this occasion. I went over to the Chipotle in Brandon shortly after my shift at the hospital for a quick and somewhat healthy meal option. We had plans to travel to San Diego the following day, so knew it would be an easy option as well. 

I walked into the facility around 6:30pm to a huge line, which is normally a good sign, being that many people are there ordering and the food is not just sitting under the lights for hours. When it was my time to order, I ordered the usual - steak bowl with white rice, mild salsa lettuce, cheese, and easy sour cream. This particular occasion was no different except that I normally get extra fajitas and that option was not available to me. 

I quickly raced home to finish my dinner and start packing before our early flight the next day. I didn't think anything of it that evening and it wasn't until I woke up at 2AM with the worst stomach pains of my entire life. So painful that I begged my husband to take me to the hospital, I was in such agony. 

Due to the timing of this and our travel plans, I took a TUMs and decided to try it to sleep it off. I woke up at 4AM, ready for our flight, with even worse pains in my abdomen. Like 8/10 pain. I somehow made it to my flight without dying, but nonetheless, still felt I was going to. 

I made it to Houston (our layover) with even more severe pains. I begged my husband to continue on and leave me at the airport, while I was peeled over in my seat. I cried the entire duration of the flight because of the pain and correlated it to Chipotle the night before. 

Needless the say, our entire trip was ruined because of the severe abdominal pain I was in and vouched to never, in my entire life eat Chipotle again.

Hubby went thru drive thru tonight. We had coupons for buy 1 get 1 on whoppers. 

My hubby specified 1 with NO CHEESE, NO PICKLES (bc I hate their pickles and I don't eat cheese!!  Hello, allergies!!!!!)

My hubby specifically asked the girl when she handed him the the bag that my whopper had no cheese or pickles. She looked at the receipt which stated my hobby's correct order and said yes. 

He comes home and guess what......

Cold yucky burgers WITH CHEESE & Pickles!!!'

If I wouldn't have opened and looked, I'd be in the ER!!

We threw our food out and heated up cans of soup. 

I give zero stars!!!!

This fast food taco stand has impressed me over the multiple times I've been here.

Service has always been friendly and at times, even fun. I made a meal out of Del Taco's vegetarian burritos last night. You get two 1/2 pound burritos for $5.00. That's a deal! With an order of fries and you are eating healthy!
Except for the fat, salt and carbohydrates. But, this is Del Taco, when you come here, you're looking for a tasty meal that doesn't cost much and is served quickly with a smile. That's exactly what I got and you should get the same too!

Food was good as normal. It's a chain restaurant, so it "should" be identical if you eat at this location or in Bishop, CA!
They have a varied menu from tacos to burgers. Yes, they even have burgers. But, why would you want to have a burger when you come to a taco place? Sometimes, you just have to have a burger!

The environment was fairly clean. The floors were swept and the tables didn't have any cluttering garbage on them. I did say fairly and the reason why is one table was cleaned off of garbage but wasn't wiped off and food residue was on it. 

Over all, I was pleased.

Bottom Line
---------------
For a fast food place that is inexpensive, it's good and yes, I will be coming back here.

They messed up our order completely.  My daughter went inside after checking order after going through the drive through. They *fixed* the order with a whopper instead of the disorder chicken sandwich. The whopper was cold and not what was ordered. It was supposed to be a regular whopper with extra pickles. What I  received was a  double whopper with cheese a ton of peppers and bacon, nothing else. Took one bite, it was gross. The coke was flat and had 4 ice cubes. The fries were cold when she got home, it's  a 5 minute drive to our house. She said screw it and went into Reno to a different BK and they got our order correct.  I realized this why we don't  go to the one near us. Funny, it took her less time the second time, that should also tell you how slow this one is. Also the employee who was working the line, walked away when my daughter got to the counter, turning his back on her, snottily  yelled "I'm  going on break!" And walked away. Yup, great customer, not.

Went here today and the girl working the window was very nice. My order came out within 4 or 5 minutes. We had chicken sandwiches, fries, and pot pie. The pot pie was really pretty good. The fries could have use another 2 to 3 minutes. But seems every fast food fries are that way. I bring the fries home and put them in the toaster oven and they come out perfect. The sandwiches are good and a nice piece of non processed meat. Much better the Chic fillet. But that's really not fair because every chicken sandwich in Tampa is better than crap fillet!!

I've gone to Burger King for years. I work nights so when I get off in the morning I order a whopper and fries. And the LAZY employees at this particular Burger King doesn't make fries and makes you eat hash browns with there order. Don't eat at this Burger King. Employees are liars and lazy. McDonald's here I come!!

You need a all new staff and until that happens just remain closed.   I am ashamed of your workers for themselves.  We ordered a pot pie for my son online and figured it usually takes time so we waited for the conf email.  We got the conf email our order was ready.   When we got there the workers were having a chat in the dining room with the doors locked.  My husband banging on the window until they finally came to the door we told them we had a pickup they said drive around.  We drove to the pickup window before I could sat anything a lady said "it will be 45 minutes for chicken".  We said we ordered ahead she said "oh we out of pot pies"  no your not! You are a lazy, worthless generation of entitled brats.  Shame.

Had a previous poor experience at this particular KFC a little over a year ago.  I called to get a catering order for a meeting.  Called way ahead of time (like a hour) and the food was so slow coming out, the meeting ended up cancelled.  Today I thought....we'll give them another shot.  The lady said, "it's going to be 18 minutes for grilled chicken."  18 minutes????  I asked her if she wanted me to grill it for her.  I see nothing has changed.  We work in the area and eat out 4.-5 days a week.  It'll be at least another year before I give you another chance.  Staff  and/or poor management at this location.

Excellent food quality and service today at the KOP BK!  The employee at the drive-thru window was fast and very friendly.  The Whopper and Whopper Jr meals we ordered were hot and fresh.  The fries were perfect.  The parking lot and landscape looked very well kept too. We rarely eat fast food and this was our first visit, we'll definitely return.

This is just a bad review due to staff and over all cleaning of the facility. My son and I went to use the bathroom however as we came in one of the staff came out and did not wash his hands!! We went to order our food and he was handling the fries and drive thru, I am not saying all BK's are like this love me a whopper just this time I couldn't

Del Taco is a California classic. We always stop when we can here. Service was fast and delicious. We love the Double Del Cheeseburger and the chicken soft tacos . The fish tacos are good and the shredded beef tacos del carbon are bomb.

I went in today,  was not acknowledged by any employees after standing there for awhile. No "sorry we will be with you in a minute" nothing. I than noticed there was no meat except a little chicken, which looked like it had been sitting for awhile, and carnitas. No meat being prepared on the grill.  I took my business down thee street to Poke Brothers where I was greeted right away. I will not return to this Chipotle. To not even be acknowledged  at the counter is completely unacceptable.

OK, so we all know fast food is what it is, but three different occasions, this location has cheated us!  Pay for a regular chicken sandwich, get a chicken jr. pay for a whopper, get a whopper jr.  are Burger King profits so far down that they're resorting to openly ripping off the customers? I preferred the old rip off, overpriced, unhealthy food. Just choose a different location!!

I  know a lot of foodies don't eat fast food.  However,  there are times where I fall for the marketing ploys and try the new food items they offer.

The grilled italiano chicken was not bad, sorry I am a true foodie. This chicken slider was okay as I have not yet tasted anyone make one other than these guys.  Nice flavor...you get pure chicken flavor from the grilled Italiano and with just a touch of n sauce nit bad at all when you are in a hurry. The textures were good nice and soft with a warm taste in my mouth.   To look at it is not that inspiring but it's fast food so n you will not get a major sex appeal from their food.

The fried chicken Italiano not as good as the good IMHO.   That grease with the Italiano thing just looses it on this chicken slider.  If you been out drinking this might be perfect,  I remember those nights.  Texture somewhat soggy, and pasty, flavor.the grease just don't fit n this Italiano chicken slider.  Makes it feel very processed. 

The slider pizza burger,  not the best taste.   I enjoy the concept of pepperoni on top with a mild piazza sauce, but it was not working together for me.  Perhaps a real gourmet slider yes, but the white castle burger is just to thin.

Late night bar night...to for it.  Otherwise,  not a menu of food that I will want to eat weekly...unless drunk!

Pretty disappointing visit here yesterday at lunchtime. We do not frequent KFC at all, but after getting your teeth whitened you are only supposed to eat light colored foods so we thought mashed potatoes and chicken breast meat. I actually felt sorry for the 3 people working, they just couldn't do it all. There was one lady cooking, a young man at the drive thru window and another guy kind of doing a little of everything. There was no one stationed at the front counter for walk ins, so we waited a reeeeeaaaallllly long time until the one guy could step up and take our order. They were also doing curbside pick ups, so someone would have to run out to the parking lot. I know they are short staffed, so we were patient. The food was just not what I remember it being. There would be no reason to ever eat here again, and I think that applies to all KFCs.
How can you be out of chicken bites at KFC? Really. I'm so disappointed in this establishment.

I saw the commercial for the hot wings, and was like hmm, I want them. So I stupidly went to this KFC, even tho I've avoided for years because everything about it is awful. Should have gone to Popeyes.

Took three minutes to place my order, as the idiot I was speaking to couldn't hear me, or couldn't do two things at once, and kept asking me to repeat myself and then there would be long periods of silence. After an additional 8-9 minutes, I finally make it to the window. The guy is avoiding looking at me, standing at the register typing something in. After a minute, he grabs my drink, leans out and yells my total. I give him my card, say thank you, and I have yet to see this man's eyes or here his voice. After another minute, my food is given to me, making it a total time of 14 minutes I've been in the drive thru. Good thing they don't have a 90 second guarantee like mcdonalds.

Get home, to see that my order of 5 hot wings, potato wedges, medium Pepsi and a chicken little sandwich has morphed into 4 chicken wings, 2 chicken little sandwiches, and a Pepsi. Having a hungry bf and not wanting to waste another half an hour to get my order fixed, this is what we are having for dinner tonight.

NEVER GO TO THIS KFC NO MATTER HOW ENTICING THEIR COMMERCIALS LOOK!!!! Don't be fooled.

A bit overpriced for me. I love how they send out coupons in the mail with deals for burgers without cheese. If you want cheese it costs more. I ordered a whopper a large Coke and a small fry and it came to $13.90. No more!!

My visits here was rather frustrating. As a mother of two small children, I take food service seriously especially during this crucial time. When my husband and I ordered our dinner from here one Sunday evening we noticed a worker behind the counter without a mask on. 
She was preparing food as well as conversing with another coworker. I did ask to speak to the manager and she reassured me (as politely as she could) that the worker wasn't preparing the food (although, both my husband and I saw differently). 
To top it all, our chicken was pink on the inside of the wings and our order was just a waste of money. 
My advice to anyone reading this, pay attention to the "behind the scenes" while you wait in the long drive thru line.
Another update. Can't be happier with this location. Used to be HORRIBLE. Now everytime I go I get good service and fresh fried chicken. Must be new management. They are doing a great job.

I ate here in mid-afternoon. This KFC needs to be refurbished. The food in the buffet has been sitting far too long and clearly looks it. Otherwise, the order for chicken breast, mashed potatoes & gravy, & coleslaw were what one would expect -- fast food of mediocre quality. The service was friendly but clueless. The Wendy's, McDonalds, and Burger King nearby are superior. And then there's Applebees for fairly tasty frozen/thawed food.

Let me start by saying I love love love KFC and have since I was a kid. Their coleslaw is so good that sometimes that's all I want for days. I could eat their coleslaw everyday and have definitely had my share of binges. KFC coleslaw is awesome! So by now you know I like coleslaw right cuz I could tell you again. Actually it's just KFC's coleslaw pretty much.

The Colonel's got awesome chicken too, my favorite being the extra crispy. I really dig that they've expanded their menu to keep up with the times. But I also really love them for keeping the basics just the same as they have been for decades.

Now, this location really has just gone downhill so much. I've had rude staff and so many mistakes, not to mention that I show up at lunch time in their drive thru and get parked for 20 minutes to get a small order of the $5 box. I mean really how hard is it to have a lunch for 1 out the window during lunch? They're very greedy and want to charge you for every little thing, like dips and such. They send you out with no napkins or utensils. So many errors and so many bad experiences. 

The only reason I go back...COLESLAW! Yeah I knew you'd guess it.   ;-)

When this place first opened, it was great food. We loved their jalapeno poppers, not being fans of their fries.  Today we ate there and my taco salad was almost all lettuce, with very little else. My husband's chicken burrito was skinny and not well filled. And my husband and I can no longer order the jalapeno poppers.  Not a good place to eat anymore.

I recently went to the Shadeland Ave Dunkin Donuts, and I wanted to compliment those working there on excellent food and coffee and pleasant customer service! A+  We ordered the turkey sausage breakfast sandwich and the bacon, egg, and cheese croissant, with hash browns, and coffees.  Everything was fresh, and cooked to perfection, and it was a fun and pleasant experience!  Not to forget a few donut holes, as well!  Keep up the great work.  Signed, a couple local seniors, East Indy. Peace, Hope, Comfort!

The Burger Queen that took my order was very kind and compassionate. She asked me about how much Mayo I want and I said give me that extra Mayo, ketchup and mustard. My boyfriend really enjoyed his big juicy whopper. Thank you Burger King. You are the mvp.

I enjoy Kentucky Fried Chicken every once in a while as a change but I won't go back to the on in North Whales again. Service was good but when I got my meal and it was to go, I got everything I ordered two breast and a wing, biscuit, wedges and coleslaw. The breast a wing looked like it was sitting in the warmer all day, they were dried out and hard. 
Lesson to be learned, check your food before you drive away.
I'm done with this place! Using regular hamburger patties on the Whopper now! My order is never right! This place is a disgrace.

I wanted to give zero star if I could.
This place sucks
Service is awful and unkind, unfriendly 
I ordered 8 pieces of family meal bucket
Smell of the chicken was nasty  , like they fried them in old thousand times used oils.
And taste was horrible. My stomach was upset  because of bad oils.
I went there several times since I live very close but I would never ever go back again
Other than not being provided cheese and they're being catch-up after specification not to forget your von the biggest concern was the fact they gave us real meat instead of the impossible burger

Super fast, accurate and friendly staff. I customized a bunch of things and they made it easy to order it all. The staff here are fantastic! By the time your done ordering your chicken is all ready and fresh.

10:30 in the morning cold whopper and chicken nuggets stale and old probably from the day before very sorry.
Will not return not recommended.

Customer service was good.

I agree with the last reviewer. I'm not sure what all the bad reviews are about (granted they are really old). So to compensate for those bad reviews and because it's deserved, I'm giving them a 5-star rating. We've been here a few times and the line moves really quick through the drive-thru. The food is consistently good. The guys of the drive-thru have always been very polite and quick. Any time you order something like a chicken tender bucket it's already ready to go so if you're in a hurry it's a great time saver. I'd recommend this location.

My family just left this restaurant and it was by far the worst service we have ever encountered. The manager and whole staff should be fired for poor attitudes and reckless behavior. When we pulled up to the speaker the employee kept repeating "anything else" while my wife was asking a question that did not require that answer. We witnessed the manager throwing our food into the bag upside down and possibly digging into the vat of chicken to find old chicken to put into our bag. Once the order was ready the employee barely gave my wife the bag out of the window and didn't make eye contact and was very rude. Don't eat at this restaurant unless you want your day ruined.

The only reason I would Yelp a Dunkin Donuts is if I think something went wrong. Today, something went wrong. 

So they have been advertising this new turkey sausage breakfast sandwich lately. Keep a few things in mind. The sandwich they have been advertising has a sausage patty separate from the egg white patty. The old way they served anything like this before was a combined patty where the sausage was crumbled into the egg white. On top if that, the old way never tasted any good to me. 

So I decide I want to try one of these new sandwiches. I order a turkey sausage with egg white and cheese on a bagel. 

They gave me the old style patty. Needless to say, not only was I disappointed, I felt slightly ripped off. I would have gone back in but I had to go to work. 

Just saying that they need to figure this out. The sandwich this morning was not good at all.

I was here to try their new items. KFC now have a lot different types of buckets deal. But I am here for their combo meal. I got their two pieces dark meat original fried chicken. The combo meal come with one side and drink. I still like their potatoes with gravy side item. 

I have try their new product- Nashville Hot Chicken Strips. The Nashville hot is good hot. Chicken strips are crispy. I would love to have this dish. The last dish is the popcorn chicken nuggets box. This $10 deal is good for movie night. The chicken get bigger pieces than old popcorn chicken. It is a improvement. 

During the pandemic, the drive through is one window with person handle the money and the food is one person. I think this is the area to improve. No mask is found on the person who at the drive through window

Saw the commercials for the new Tacos at Burger King and thought I'd give them a try. I've tried the Impossible Whopper and enjoyed it, so I thought may-be the taco would be good, too. It wasn't. I put it on the same level as Jack in the Box. If you've got the I've been drinking munchies, it may satisfy you. If you're sober and wanting lunch, I'd order a burger instead. 

I can not for the life of me, figure out why businesses just don't continue to focus on what they do best and what they are known for, instead of trying to expand their menu. Do something well, instead of serving mediocre everything. 

Another reason to lower the star rating is the customer service here is on the decline again. There's not interaction between the staff and customer. They take your order and that is it.......if you get a thank-you you're doing good.

It's a general fast food place. They have fresh ingredients.  
I had a burrito with 1/2 carnitas and 1/2 barbacoa. Black beans, lettuce, brown rice, Monterey jack cheese, red onion, grilled pea pod(?) and green pepper, jalapeno, on a flour tortilla. I used the bottled hot sauce for some heat.
ARE THE INGREDIENTS TASTY? 
YES
WILL I GO THERE FOR GREAT MEXICAN FOOD? 
NO.
Sorry. It's a good clean fast food restaurant........ that has kind of watered down pseudo mexican food. 
If you never had a great burrito will you be satisfied? 
Yes. 
Otherwise,  find a small family owned place who uses great-abuela recipes. 
By the way, their guacamole lists several ingredients on their website, that just weren't there. This guacamole is just whipped avocado. Save your money.

Second time here and both times I had wished I went to El Diablo instead. Stingy server both times when it comes to food. Got "double" steak and it was maybe 1 serving. Out of cheese and out of tomatoes. Cheap on the guacamole too. All in all, if you want to not get the bang for your buck, go here!

Great new addition which has me becoming a regular. The Beyond Meat burger is the best tasting BURGER period!! If your thinking of getting healthy but with no compromise, then the Beyond Burger is for you!!

If I could give zero stars, I would. Sadly, this is the closest BK to me but it's definitely the worst. My husband is disabled and I went to get him a whopper since when they're done right, can be very good. The whopper from this location was stale to the point of being crunchy. The meat was not fresh by any means. It was the worst BK food I've ever had. Steer clear of this location.

I dined inside, the place was VERY clean (including the restroom). I had the #2 Double Whopper meal, everything was delicious and the burger was well prepared (well dressed). One of the nicest Burger Kings I've ever been in.
I've been wanting to try the new carne asada steak. Tonight I got a bowl with it and the steak was so salty I couldn't eat it. So disappointed.

I ordered  3 piece meal with two sides and dark meat chicken. When I arrived home and was ready to eat my dinner, I saw where I had received two pieces of white meat and a wing. I called the restaurant and was told that if I did not bring it back this evening, then I would not be able to get my $11.53 refund. I drove back to the store about 10 miles from my home and the manager told me to call the corporate office for a refund. I refused to leave the drive through lane without my refund after returning all of my food. A guy came to the window and apologized and gave me a cash refund. That manager was very rude and should not be working with customers in any way or fashion. She threatened to call the police if I didn't move my car. I told her that I would after receiving my refund. The guy working that shift was really nice and gave me my refund without a hassle. But I was furious after dealing with that girl! I'm 71 years old and cannot see to drive at night. It was very dangerous for me to come out after dark and drive that distance only to be harassed. She told me that I received food for my money and she wasn't going to give me a refund - even though I didn't receive what I ordered. I am very disappointed with KFC!

I ordered a whopper with cheese meal on October 29, at 9:00 pm and got food poisoning. I tried calling the phone number but it's a fax number. Please be careful ordering there,  they don't have a good health inspections ratings.  When I run over to the shopping center, I'm going to make sure I tell them in person.

Convenient, fast, and very affordable. I mean what else can I say, it's Del Taco. It's cheap burritos and tacos. Grab 20 for 20 bucks and go eat until your stomach hurts. Then complain about it later. Return in 2 weeks and repeat.

The chicken wings were so scrawny.   It was hard to call them wings. Those five wings (pictured) and a cup of corn and soda was about $7.00.  This was so not worth it, but it was so close to Macy's at University and I was starving, but I will not be returning

Because of current events I want to give companies the benefit of the doubt.  Unfortunately, this location is just producing very poor quality food. I had a simple order for lunch the chicken was so old and dried out from sitting underneath a heat lamp that it was completely disgusting.  It was like eating chicken flavored beef jerky.

There's no excuse for such poor quality control.

Ordered 16 piece chicken and came home and gave us 11. How the fuck do you mess that shit up, they need to hire people  that know how to count. You pay a decent amount for a 16 piece family meal and you short people for food. Never again, make sure if you order at the drive through, make sure they give you the right amount.

Typical fast food attitude of don't care if order is correct. Two minute wait in drive up, paid and then we waited and waited for one Whopper and fries. Four different people came to the window to ask what we ordered. They tried to give us two of the wrong sandwiches. Thank goodness we continually check our orders before we leave the parking lot. We, not should anyone, have to open wrapped sandwiches in the car to confirm order.

We were close to not returning to this new location but apparently someone has heard our plea's. Things have improved recently and we are taking another chance it'll continue to improve. Why does fast food have to be like this??

Haven't been to a KFC in years, was hopeful for a little childhood nostalgia.  Although this location has been remodeled, the food and service are/ was the worst I've experienced ever!! Save your money and the lining of your stomach and go to Popeyes.  Food sat in a pool of grease, yes a pool. Sure fried chicken is greasy but this was just nasty. No flavor bland farm chicken. Staff did not know menu and was utterly rude when you asked questions.  This is because they didn't know the answers.  Stood at counter for 3-4 min before being acknowledged. Should have been the first sign.  Thumbs down Colonial Creepy. Yes creepy read the slogan on the outside of the building. " making it the hard way .. by hand".

What can I say about Mexican fast food? Well, I think the fact that I gave it four stars to begin with says a lot. I mean, 4 stars for a place where you order your burrito over a pane of glass? And it's a chain with locations in all major metropolitan areas? Is that blasphemy? If it is, I don't care. These cats do a fine job of making burritos and bowls and salads and tacos, and I want everyone to know it. 

The thing that drove me to finally head to yelp and review them was the other day I decided to order pinto beans instead of black beans for the first time, in I don't know, ever? I knew for a fact, from a vegan friend, that the pinto beans have bacon in them. But the burrito chef let me know as I was ordering, so I would not get something I didn't want! My friend had been up in arms saying that they didn't tell you about the bacon and Chipotle be damned. But, I guess they've changed they're wily ways and they're now on the straight and narrow. 

The backbone of the 4 star review is that, for the most part, every meal I've gotten from this establishment has been tasty, made from quality ingredients and well put together. I don't think I've been disappointed more than once, and that was from some steak that was more on the rare side. They just gave me the option of getting my money back or getting a new bowl. I chose chicken and I was a-ok. Might be good to ask how new the steak is, since they seem to take it off the grill while it's still rare and let it cook while it waits to become a part of your lunch.

Have to wait twenty minutes for chicken. Haha wtf this is a chicken place right? Lazy ass workers that don't give a funk. Im sure they are currently jizzing in my chicken as I write this nice segment. Next time I'm going to publix. This is why everyone loves publix. Publix should thank dirtbags like the workers here for their continued customers.

Decided to try this new Del Taco because Taco Bell across the street had a long drive thru line.  I now know why no one was in the drive thru of Del Taco.  I ordered nachos and went to the window.  When the cashier opened the window the smell coming from the restaurant was overwhelming and not in a good way.   It smelled like old grease and rancid tortillas.  The nachos were a mess and almost Inedible.   Do not recommend this place.

The drive-through is open. You can walk in to order stuff, however you cannot eat in the dining room.

We had coupons fortwo burgers to fries and two drinks for $9.50. Since we have a large family, we use three of those. Then we used a family pack coupon for $14.95 that included three whoppers and three whopper juniors.

The dining room was a little bit sloppy, however service was good and the food is as expected. The one thing I never knew, is it seems they've changed their fries. I really like this change. They're not quite steak fries but not quite the skinny fries. Nice change, many years ago when they stopped doing the shoestring fries, I start going to Carl's junior and McDonald's. Now with a new phrase, I will come back more often.

Overall a good experience and we will come back. Best that can be expected during the Covid days

I had two simple orders and it wasn't even busy. I got one spicy chicken sandwich box meal and a classic chicken sandwich meal. They still messed up and didn't give me fries! The spicy chicken sandwich was stale and dry with no kick at all. Go to Popeyes instead or get a mcchicken from McDonald's, it will be better than this! Chic fila has a much better sandwich!

Quick mobile order. Sausage egg and cheese were superb. Hash browns were good. Coffee cream to sugar ratio was on point....just how I like it.

Perfect way to nurse a hangover.
What can I say sometimes you gotta have a Whopper. Also who sells chicken that cheap. What an affordable choice also the fries are good

Chipotle has been in the Philly area for at least two years; what took me so long to try one?

I thought they were going to be a Qdoba clone, but I was wrong. Their not-quite-fast food is fresh, delicious (not mind-blowing, but far from average), affordable, and I might have heard something somewhere about it being organic. The burritos are scrumptious, and nothing beats a triple threat of soft tacos. Carnitas, barbacoa, and steak, anyone?

Find them in the Plymouth Meeting Mall. Parking can be a bear during busy hours, but it's worth the effort if you love Chipotle.

If I could give this chipotle half a star I would. We did the chipotle lane and our food was cold even though we got there within 10 min of our order being place. Once we got home we realized we barely had any toppings other then steak and rice, I've never seen a bowl so empty. I'm really disappointed since this is the closest chipotle to us, so we will most likely be driving to Sewell to the other chipotle. Not worth your money or time. This also isn't the first time we've had a poorly made bowl.
The impossible burger looked and horrible. The party looked brown and uncooked. Would not becoming here again.
Had a whopper here when it first came out. It was 25 cents. I was 12. I will be 65. I can't  believe I ate the whole thing. It was great!

As A former fast food employee and current retail cashier I am absolutely stunned on how disrespectful their services here at this location.  I went to the window and they charge me $18 just to say my card declined, and then told me to leave and started being rude and snapping and yelling at me as I wanted my money back after, they charged me for it... I spoke to the manager after she tried to help the cashier figure out the problem and she was being insanely rude and started snapping at me. she is obviously not equipped to be a manager at all. I highly do not recommend going to this Del Taco, their food is awful and their services even worse I can't believe I actually went here and now I have to deal with getting my money back, without feeling completely disrespected.

I need to preface that Chipotle should get 5 stars.  I love Chipotle.  If I could marry Chipotle or make out with Chipotle (sloppy HS making out, not adult making out), I would.  Unfortunately, the best I could give this location is 3.  Let's go.

1 whole star lost for the parking situation.  I drive a compact, and I felt like I needed to start playing bumper cars just to get into the spot.  Combine that with the fact that you are coming off of a very busy Westshore, you may end up backing up traffic, since someone in front of of you is trying to jigger their way into a spot, holding up the flow, and causing a ripple effect of annoyance.  At the other end, you have a bottle neck where you can only turn left, and only one car can fit, so you may be stuffed and then stuck for a while.

1 whole start lost for the salt.  Yes, this wonderful little mineral that has served roles from currency to condiment for centuries was notably absent.  I asked for salt packets, and was informed there were salt shakers near the straws.  False.  Now, I've heard of folks taking stacks of condiments OUT of a restaurant, doing a sneaky squirrel maneuver and shoving packets into a purse or pockets, but I have never heard of someone taking condiments TO a restaurant.  

The food, spot on.  My favorites are a double chicken bowl with brown rice and black beans, mild salsa, cheese, sour cream with lettuce.  Pair that with chips and the hot salsa and its a match made in heaven.  On my fatty days, I get a steak burrito, also paired with the chips and salsa, and a diet coke to keep me from getting fat.  Location is clean, seating is ample, and there were no shortages of napkins, straws, lids or lemons.

We got the 2 for $10 meal. I got the original chicken sandwhich with heavy mayo & my hubby got the whopper no onions no tomatoe. My sandwhich had next to no mayo on it & the bun was hard at the ends. I had to ask for mayo packets & my hubby said his sandwhich was ok but didn't have enough condiments either. But, I guess what can u expect from a fast food joint?? Just don't have to high of expectations if u eat here. Oh, and the cashier was nice but only half listening to us. Oh well

If you're looking for the greasiest chicken you've ever eaten, this is THE place. I've eaten here several times and EVERY time, the Original Recipe chicken looks and tastes like it has been soaking in grease for hours.  It's so saturated with grease that when you pick up the chicken, its heavy, and the skin slips right off the meat and bone. Absolutely Disgusting! I will NEVER eat there again. Huge waste of money.  Should be reported as a health risk.

This location is the worst dd I've ever experienced! The employees ignore you when you're at the counter. When they do finally get around to taking your order, they'll keep a conversation going with other employees (half listening to the order).
When you do finally receive your order it's wrong... I've given this place so many chances because it's near my house, but I've finally written them off. 

I am boycotting Dunkin all together now.

PS: see the picture of my sausage egg and cheese (minus the sausage!).

I was excited when I saw a commercial that they now offer quesadillas. We've gone to this location for years btw and have had good experiences and also bad. But today was ridiculous. We went inside to order our food. I asked for a steak quesadilla and they told me I had to order it online and couldn't order it in the store...uh what? I thought maybe I was misunderstanding and clarified that I couldn't order a quesadilla face to face, but could online? And two employees said yes that I could only order a child's size quesadilla in person, but had to order an adult size quesadilla online. I said ok uhm I guess I'll pick something else and the girl proceeded to ask the next person in line that had just walked up what they wanted. First, that's ridiculous that I have to order something online in order for them to make it but they're somehow incapable of taking my order in person? Makes zero sense. Second, incredibly rude to skip past me and take the next persons order that had just got there. We left and we will GLADLY go to Qdoba instead from now on.
Being from So. Cal del is a staple. This only shares the name of my beloved chicken soft taco Thursday nights.  I've given it a few chances.  Just seems worse each time. Never going back.

The drive-through was supposed to close at 11. I visited a full hour before closing, and after waiting five minutes at the drive-through for someone to welcome me, the employee finally walked outside with trash and saw me. I had to wait another three minutes after he saw me just to have him tell me over the loudspeaker that they were ALL out of chicken! How is this possible a full hour before closing at a place who prides themselves on chicken? How ridiculous. My friend and I waited for almost ten minutes for absolutely nothing and will never be back. 

I doubt a restaurant with "chicken" in it's name actually ever runs out of chicken. What I wouldn't doubt  is if the employees were just itching to close early and decided against putting more on the grill.

As a post script, after I was explaining my problem to other friends, a few responded that they have experienced the same problem before as well, and will also not be returning.

Soooo, it's a Burger King, not a swanky spot, but I have gone to the drive thru for an impossible burger (with cheese!) at least a handful of times, and they are always quick and efficiently polite.  

I always make some adjustments to my order and they have gotten it eight every time.  

And I know impossible burgers are not necessarily "healthy" but it's nice to get that chargrilled burger taste and texture without contributing to the meat processing industry. :)

I normally would not review a fast food spot but with all the negative reviews I wanted to chime in with my positive experiences.

Worst food I've ever tasted in my life. Chicken was nasty and dry. Gravy for mashed potatoes was disgusting. Corn was nasty. Everything was horrible. I do not recommend this place at all. Never eat here

WOW, KFC has gone down in quality over they years, but yesterday I realized, they are heading for the worse, I ordered a 4 pc dark chicken meal, at this location, and not only was the WORSE chicken I have ever ordered, the nasty attitude of the person who took my order, in which I seriously considered just driving right off, gave me a feeling the food could not be any better. I attempted eating it when I got home, as I was hungry, but it gave me the feeling this chicken was Re-fried, hard as a rock and with a weird OLD oil, or was it LARD? after taste in which neither I nor my son could sink a teeth on it! I considered just tossing it to my dogs, in a sort of attempted feeling of not having wasted my money, but seriously, I was afraid they would ALSO get sick as we did when we tried to eat it. Not only did I waste my time, money and almost my health, I will DEFINITIVELY, NEVER EVER visit this location, which, they should seriously think about demolishing this restaurant, PERIOD!! End note? Sorry KFC, you will NEVER, see my set foot at any of your restaurants Ever, again!!

Everybody calm down! Chipotle fills a much needed niche in the "Mexican"/fast food/healthy/casual restaurant category. 

This location is as efficient and fresh tasting as the next one. Prices are reasonable, portions good, and the food is fresh as can be.

Problem is, the flavors are bland and one dimensional. Even with copious amounts of various salsas on the shredded beef burrito and the carnitas and chicken bowls we had recently, I was underwhelmed by everything except the freshness and crispness of the product.

If flavor is what you want, go to Freebirds or Los Agaves or Lito's. They charge more, but they're worth it.

That said, I'll happily be back to Chipotle in six months to a year, just cuz.

I love Del Taco. With that being said I have never had such a rude humiliating experience as I did last night and I'm sharing it to hopefully help someone else not go through the same thing. It was 730pm ish when I grabbed my little dog Koko who just had surgery a little over a week ago and still has her cone on to take a ride in the car. I pulled into the drive thru and gave my order only to have the girl read it back to me laughing. Then I pulled up to window and as she opens the window she's laughing and joking with another worker. The whole experience was rude and I will never return to this location then I get my food home and it's wrong. So they laugh at my order, make jokes aboutmy dog and then can't get a simple order right. 

If you want a decent experience with the right order find another Del Taco location

They now sell Beyond Burger and I'm so grateful! Goleta & Santa Barbara have a handful of delicious veggie burgers but the fact that a chain offers a meatless patty makes me so happy!! The service was friendly and there's lots of parking. I'll be going back and would highly recommend. It's delicious and filling! I just got the burger no fries or sides and was satisfied.

I'm done with this Fraudulent place. KFC is so expensive and yet when you decide you want to go...you Always hear we are out of breasts. 800 pm out of breasts ..it's no matter what time you go. Last time I went out of breasts and drumsticks and biscuits...so you want me to spend $30 for two sides, 4 wings and 4 thighs...Are they nuts?? And to top it all off, I got a drummette as a piece of chicken. F bullshit! If you're gonna order take out there, Check Everything before you leave. One woman got home and found a cookie that they gave her because they were out of Mac n cheese. Completely ridiculous. it's also dirty , slow, rude and ignorant employees. If you really want fried chicken, Popeye's is close if you use your GPS. I'm going there from now on. KFC is a fraud . They never have breasts and we all know no meat on wings or thighs. And if you really want KFC, go to the Abington location. Even if they are out of something they make you wait ten minutes..none of this we give cookie because we're short four pieces of chicken. Close the Montgomery location!!!!

First of all, I go to chipotle all over the country whenever I travel because the quality of the food is excellent for the price in my opinion. This particular location is usually pretty good, but not all the time. Sometimes their steak is overcooked, sometimes their line is not full of necessary portions to fulfill orders when they are busy.  I just walked in to get my typical steak burrito and an employee was getting their meal prepared for them by other employees. The manager, Blake, saw this, and ask them to get to me as I was waiting. Blake then proceeded to comp me my burrito for my short wait that I had. That to me speaks of his character.  Chipotle would do well to find managers like this.

I just went through the drivethru and showed the girl the tiny piece of chicken, it was supposed to be a thigh I received last time. She explained to me that they have no control what the company sends them. I explained to her that I am doubling my order so if I am spending that kind of money I want to be taken care of. She did exactly that. All the chicken pieces were decent. She even remembered to include my spicy mustard sauce. Thanks KFC

Frankly, I try not to eat fast food, but sometime dire situations come forward.. Like it being 2 am, and me being hungry. 
Ergo, I forget about my hatred for fast food and I head over to Del taco!
It was fast getting our food, probably because it was leftover beans from that morning? Maybe? Probably. 
I got two 1/2 pound bean and cheese burritos. After I brought them home to eat it was clear that the food was old. The beans were really dry. I ended up just throwing it away and living with my hunger. Lesson learned, yet again, on fast food.

I wish i could say that they have great customer service but they don't.  Almost every single time I go,  the service is lacking. Not very friendly.  I go because I work near there and get hungry for fried chicken.  The food is usually good but occasionally they forget a small item (biscuit, cookie, etc).

This KFC is clean, convenient, and they do their job well. The service staff was friendly and I got my food almost instantly. I ordered (to try for the first time) their new chicken littles, and although extremely delicious, they are incredibly tiny. The commercials inflate them a little. More like chicken tinies, am I right? But, alas, this isn't a review of the chicken littles, it's a review of the KFC as a standing restaurant. This KFC passes my test of quality and service! The food was delicious, the tables were clean, and the people were friendly. What more could you ask for from a Kentucky fried chicken distributer located in central Indiana?

Update. Last few times I've been here it this place was bad. Once they didn't even have any chicken ready, had to wait ten minutes for their fried chicken. This time I ordered five crispy strips. They were right out of the fryer. Warm and tasty.

Dropped by on a whim cause they are offering free guac to celebrate National Avocado Day! Convenient location and the food is consistently fresh! The staff are super friendly and attentive. Ordered my usual half chicken and half steak burrito bowl with a side of chips on the side. Their guac is a hand-mashed masterpiece that really hit the spot. Chipotle never disappoints!

This location and only this Westmount location will ask you to wait 15 minutes if you want white meat (chicken breasts) in your bucket order.  And this was around lunch time.  This happened three times already.   They'll fulfill your order immediately if you're okay with whatever they give you.
KFC management should look into this.
Ordered a double whopper with bacon, got a single patty with one piece of bacon. Pretty depressing burger.

I had the misfortune of arriving at this KFC a couple of Saturday nights ago. I haven't been to a KFC in years and had never been to this one. What I know for sure is that I will not be returning to this one and probably never ever KFC. Nothing horrible happened, but I ordered two things: 5Hot wings and Some new offering,I think they were chicken bites. I pulled off and tried one of the chicken bites. GROSS!

First they were warm-ish, not hot. Second they were soggy and had loose skin. Third, someone obviously did not check the recipe, Because there was way too much seasoning on these small bites. So much so, I actually threw them out. There was no way I could feed these to my child (not that I should be feeding my child KFC anyway :-)

It was late and we were returning home, so I called myself looking for a "better quality"fast food and made a poor choice with KFC. I ended up having to run to McDonald's and get those god awful chicken nuggets anyway.  The experience was so awful I wanted to call the manager and complain, but I realized that the drive-through guy  did not even give me a receipt. Doesn't matter I won't be back...

The hot wings were okay. Warm-ish, not a fresh flavor. Either the oil needs to be changed or the chicken wasn't at its peak of freshness. I get it...it's fast food, which I rarely buy, but it's still my money. I'll shut up now.... ;0)

We went through the drive thru and ordered our food. When we got to the window, they charged us a different price than they said at the menu. We pointed this out and she quickly had it fixed and gave us a refund back in cash. She then told us to pull up and she would have our order right out to us. It took 30 minutes to get our order to us and she said it was because we were waiting on gravy. Then once we got our food, she asked if we needed any sauces. We said honey. She said she would be right back with it. She never came back out and when we looked into the restaurant she was wiping down a table and did not look like she was going to be coming at all. We waited another 2 minutes to see and she never came back out. Had we known this was going to happen or take as long as it did, we would have never finished ordering. Then once we got home to eat, the chicken was old. It was completely dried out. This is not the first time an order has been messed up at this location. I am not happy with the service at this specific location and will not be coming back. I would rather drive farther for better service than keep wasting my time and money on this restaurant location.

If I could give zero stars I would. I just waited 30-45 minutes in the drive-thru. The poor girl at the window sounded like she had no training. So she got my order wrong 3 times. I had to cancel my
Order and wait in line 10 minutes to leave. (WITHOUT FOOD). So I call the store and asked for the manager. I continue to explain what had went on and she says "it's not possible. I've been gone for 15 minutes." But I had checked the time when I got there and left because I was in a rush for work. When I stated that the manager proceeds to give me attitude and says "well I can take your order right now if you come back". Very very poorly managed, trained, and mannered. Del taco do something about this.

Ok so this particular place drives me insane, and of course its not the food. I always the a whopper but holy cow this places service is the absolute worst. It takes forever for them to do anything and they are all rude and dont care.

If I could give 0 stars I would. 
1st I had a coupon for a Family Bundle, which includes 3 Whoppers, 3 cheeseburgers n 3 small fries. The coupon says $12.99
They charged me .96 tax.
Then they charged me for the cheese on each Whopper sandwich. 3×.50= $1.50
When I got home 5 mins later, I find 3 cold Whopper sandwiches n cold fries, the cheeseburgers were room temperature. 
I would go back, but I'm tired n there's always a line at the drive thru since the inside still isn't open.
These workers want higher pay, well then learn how to cook hot foods n stop talking to your friends.

Chipotle burritos are always good and fat. The only problem is that my burritos seem to only consist of rice and vegetables/corn. I came here for dinner and got a carnitas burrito with brown rice, sour cream, mixed vegetables, corn, guacamole, salsa and cheese. The tray with the carnitas was down to the grease with little leftover crumbs of the meat left. The employee had the nerve to pick up the leftover greasy pieces and put in my burrito when there was a fresh batch right behind him! I even told him that I would like the fresh batch of carnitas but he went to the other side where they were making the bowls and got a little salsa cup full of the meat. The amount of meat was not even the size of my palm. I paid for extra meat thinking he would put more from the NEW batch but still he got another small cup and put it in my burrito. I was super disappointed. The only good thing was that he hooked up the guacamole.

In the end, I still got full but it tasted more like a veggie burrito. I barely tasted the carnitas.
Slow service, horrible customer service and crap food. This place needs to be torn down and a Taco Bell should be built
Far better than the clear view location. Perhaps it's because it has just opened and everyone is on their game. No complaints it is a chain so it's usually pretty consistent. Try the sofritos!

I live close nearby, and I do really enjoy Chipotle. Unfortunately, I've come to this location multiple times, and it is by leaps and bounds the worst Chipotle I've ever been to. I've actually never written a Yelp review before, but this location is so bad that I feel obligated to. This particular location has been out of essential ingredients nearly every single time I've been. They've been out of staples like pinto beans, chicken, veggies, and even sofritas multiple times. I recently made the mistake of ordering a quesadilla, and even when politely requested, (I went back up to the counter to ask for it to be sliced) they strangely refused to cut it, due to "policy changes". I thought slicing up a quesadilla was a pretty standard practice, but apparently they will now only serve fully intact, folded tortillas. After giving this location many, many chances, I will not ever be coming back.

This location is terrible 
Had a whopper that was warmed up and definitely not freshly cooked on the grill
It is consistently not good.

I'm a regular at this location and I must say this visit was one of the better ones. Ordered via drive thru and the young lady who took my order was pleasant. My food was made to order. Nice and fresh.  The chicken sandwich was surprisingly delicious.  I will definitely be ordering it again with the help of the coupons.  The combo without would have been 7 bucks and some change.  Took  a  star due to fries. They were a little stale but manageable.

Tonight went to this our local KFC. Was swarming with people. I think it is because of the new Staff. A charming young man named Joey waited on me. He had a Sunshine Smile and was very adept and professional. Awesome! When my order was ready a Delightful young man named Joseph was Super Personable and Fun and said he too enjoys the sauce I had chosen for my chicken. We Always get the 20 dollar fill up. This is the first time the Service was as Fantastic as the Food. Thank you KFC
Pretty good service and the food is good no complaint what so ever. And I got fresh chicken strips just the other day it was pretty awesome.

This Chipotle is OK. Our orders have been pretty consistent. The guacamole is my favorite part, definitely worth splurging on extra guac. They also started selling white queso about a year ago, which is pretty good. I actually like yellow queso better, but either way it's a nice option to share with the table. They're not shy with spice, especially on their Sofritos so if you're averse to spice then let them know. The restaurant is literally called Chiptole, so I'd hope folks would expect some heat from that smoke jalapeno flavor, I certainly do. Yum!

We come here quite often either dine in or drive through and each time the order is completely wrong. The sad part is that these orders aren't even complicated one bit.  Tonight I went through the drive through and ordered a usual combo meal whopper Jr with cheese  no tomatoes and kids meal nuggets. I found it quite hysterical that the employee in the drive thru window(the man that clearly portrays himself as a female) asks, " why do you always come here, burger King sucks ,it's so gross." " I'm just here for the money." What an awesome employe huh?  My order was Simple.  When I got home my whopper Jr had no cheese on it and full of tomatoes. There were tidbits of onion rings in my fries also. Management of this particular location obviously needs better employees.

POOR service and COLD food. Drive thru order at 9:35 p.m., got to window and paid, he asked us to pull ahead and they'll bring order to us.  20 minutes later still no food. Walked back to drive thru window, manager standing at register counting cash, both other workers in back covering up food containers and putting food away in advance of closing at 10. Mgr opened window & asked me "can I help you?".  Ya, where's my order?? She turned around and asked the 2 others, it was sitting there in the "ready" location.  Not happy, got chicken was luke-warm and couldn't get corrected as they had already closed.  Not the first time.  You want to get frustrated?....  go to KFC and try to get some good service and warm food. Never again, goodbye KFC.

The staff were super polite and kind.

The store was clean.

The food consistent.

I tried the new chicken sandwich. It was good. 

This place is cleaner and the staff better than the nearby Popeye's

The worse customer service, not one staff member had a hair net on. Ordered whopper with cheese & bacon looked like a 5 yr old made it. Bacon was burnt, lettuce was brown and the roll was dry and lil hard. Soda machine was being worked on, although they had a wet floor sign access water and soda all over the floor not cleaned up.

Waited 20 minutes in line (only 3 cars in front of me). Once I paid at the window the lady ask me "what did you order" then starts to make my drink and food. As I'm waiting at the window for another 7 minutes I see that they have 5 people "working" and only the drive-through is open. 

I ordered a sausage EGG and cheese on a croissant and caramel ice coffee with cream and sugar. I got a sausage and cheese on a croissant (the sandwich only got 3 things on it idk how you can mess that up) and a black coffee on ice.

This place is a joke. Personally you couldnt pay me to eat at any kfc however my gf had a craving for it hence we gave it a try. $10 for 3 legs and 2 tiny (3 bites and its gone) sides and a mini biscuit and drink. People say Boise has a low cost of living. In California you can actually get good food and a lot of it. All the fast food in Idaho is over priced garbage imo. Anyhow back to the story at hand. The lady ava was extremely rude and offered no greeting or a happy Easter. Ava learn how to put a cap on a drink would you? As she hands me the dr. Pepper it spills on my shirt due to inproper cap install. Chicken is dry and awful. Colonel sanders is long gone and so is KFC. No wonder they have to team up with A&W. Avoid this establishment if you have any sense of value in money. Popeyes is much better.
Ordered a del taco with extra lettuce. After sitting in the drive through for a good 15 minutes, I get home and this is what I got. Just cheese and a broken shell. Thanks guys! You have one job

So as many of you know, Burger King is not allowing people in their dining room yet. So we only can go by the drive-through experience.

When I pulled up, the line was going quite fast and the person on the intercom was very nice and teary asking for my order. I told her I had a coupon for a three dollar double whopper and she was happy to ask for the coupon code. But I went to the window to pick up my double whopper, the guy was really friendly. We chatted for a second about my debit card being from Fresno state. He recognized it, and told me he was from Fresno.

The burger was fresh, and taste quite nice.

The only issue I have right now with Burger King, is they do not allow people to sit in their dining room, and you were only allowed to use one coupon per drive-through order. Previously, a couple of my teenagers would grab some coupons and go to Burger King to save some money. Now we don't go near's often due to this rather strange restriction. I do believe that if they are going to limit seating, which mini fast food places are allowing seating now, that they should make accommodations for two or three people in a vehicle that have discounts or coupons. Other than that the food was fresh, the service was nice.

The food is well del taco and when you have a chicken taco craving than it will do. 

Service was horrible. We sat in the drive thru for over a half hour to get our 6 tacos and 2 drinks. The  staff shorted my change and when I pointed out that I didn't get the correct change I was told "I gave you what the computer said" needless to say my frustration was through the roof.  I asked to speak with a manager and was told they were on break.  Ugh!

Worst service today Sat at drive thru waiting for several minutes to arrive at window and yet wait even longer than at box... Order in correct no receipt in bag and no onions on my Whopper! I asked girl at window who is always there if they are having problems today and she says yep and we will be all day!
I usually love the steak bowl from here, but it was just way too salty and I couldn't finish it. I know they're understaffed and everything, but I wished it tasted a bit better.
Really, really good customer service. Not to mention the bomb food. Carl IS THE MAN! So understanding and makes the best chicken tacos any del taco I've been too. THIS IS THE BEST
Raul was so patient with our large order and was very pleasant and honestly made are day! Thank you Raul for your outstanding service!! 5 star!!

Not the best KFC I've been too. Service can be a mess taking orders they can get confused. The chicken can be over cooked with the bracing raw. The cole slaw can be inconsistent (sometimes dry or full of mayo). I did try the new zinger sandwich and it was good.

I've given this chipotle location multiple chances. Time and time again I've been let down. They've given me mediocre portions and some ingredients have been missing. Most of the time the food doesn't taste fresh. Last time I ordered the steak bowl and it was flavorless and too chewy. It literally taste like blood. This time I ordered a chicken bowl and the chicken was pretty tasty. However, I barely received any rice and my ordered was flooded with watery sour cream and queso. I also ordered chips and queso on the side. The queso was warm and tasty but the chips were completely stale. This is unacceptable! I've given this location multiple chances and I've been let down repeatedly. I'd rather go to the pancheros across the street or drive a few extra minutes to a different franchise. I definitely won't be spending my money at this location again. I wouldn't even accept a free entree from this location.

Always a little more expensive in the airport! The serving size is smaller too. The employees are nice not much interaction it always fast pace due to long lines.

I ordered salad bowl, no rice, half steak and chicken , cheese and medium sauce. It was keto friendly and delicious!

Was craving a juicy delicious burger and onion rings, you know with a cold soda to curl up and watch a movie at home. For starts the food was so cold  when I got it, my impossible burger had this disgusting smell as if they didn't cook it right, the onion rings were literally just breading and no onion inside.  I most likely will not ever stop at this location again.

Ordered a double steak, cauliflower rice, tomato salsa, red chili salsa, and cheese. Instead I got my steak, guacamole, cheese, my salsa and corn? I paid extra for the rice and didn't even get it. This isn't the first time this location messed up my order. I paid $16 to not even get close to my order.

You can only go through the drive thru as the dining room is closed. This causes a major back up and extended wait, even if you order ahead. The impossible whopper was great however and the lady in the drive thru was friendly.

The Elmwood location is far too often a hot mess, but this one seems to be consistently on point, at least as the food is concerned.  My steak tacos with corn tortillas were delicious, loaded with ingredients, and everything tasted like it should when Chipotle is doing it right.  I love Chipotle's steak and this location gets it right: cooked to a perfect medium rare.  One of the things I love about Chipotle is that you can ask for extra of anything except meat and guac for no extra charge!  A lot of mexican places charge you extra for every little thing (looking at you, Felipes!) and Chipotle doesn't nickle and dime.  They also don't hold the napkins hostage, either.  

This location even has convenient parking!  I confess; the drive to Metairie at lunch time definitely happens more than it should.

went to KFC drive through on 1/11/22 at 3:30pm. Asked for two (2). Three (3) piece white meat chicken dinner, did not want drinks, paid $20.95 left $1.05 tip.  When I arrived home and opened the meals I was given one drumstick and two thighs, the biscuits were dried up and unbeatable. We were not at all satisfied with the meals, I did not return them because of distance and traffic ( which I am sure KFC assumed would happen because of putting those meals together.
Sincerely, 
Carol A. Knotts 
budsis155@yahoo.com

I door dashed a steak quesadilla.. that was literally all I ordered and they forgot the steak, folded it so many times I couldn't even take it apart and shoved it into a box. By the time I got it (not the dasher's fault she was actually waiting at the restaurant for it) it was hard as a rock. So I paid almost $20 for a plain hard quesadilla and when I called (5 times) nobody answered every single time. Never ordering from here again.

I was going to write a review after seeing that my bowl was only half filled (I got it delivered), but decided against that. After taking a few bites, I noticed that the rice was rock hard and inedible as well as the steak. Moreover, I found a piece of hair in my bowl... ew.

Chipotle!!

You saved my life !
I almost DIED of starving  
YOU healthy organic Ingredients Brought me back ALIVE!
also Staffs were soo quick and friendly!

Ordered my Steak Burrito with everything on it!
